authors_text: Jiachen Liu,Yuan Xue,Jose Duarte,Krishnendra Shekhawat,Zihan Zhou,Xiaolei Huang
title: End-to-end Graph-constrained Vectorized Floorplan Generation with Panoptic Refinement
title_zh: 具有全景细化的端到端图约束矢量化平面图生成
abstract: The automatic generation of floorplans given user inputs has great potential in architectural design and has recently been explored in the computer vision community. However, the majority of existing methods synthesize floorplans in the format of rasterized images, which are difficult to edit or customize. In this paper, we aim to synthesize floorplans as sequences of 1-D vectors, which eases user interaction and design customization. To generate high fidelity vectorized floorplans, we propose a novel two-stage framework, including a draft stage and a multi-round refining stage. In the first stage, we encode the room connectivity graph input by users with a graph convolutional network (GCN), then apply an autoregressive transformer network to generate an initial floorplan sequence. To polish the initial design and generate more visually appealing floorplans, we further propose a novel panoptic refinement network(PRN) composed of a GCN and a transformer network. The PRN takes the initial generated sequence as input and refines the floorplan design while encouraging the correct room connectivity with our proposed geometric loss. We have conducted extensive experiments on a real-world floorplan dataset, and the results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under different settings and evaluation metrics.
summary: The automatic generation of floorplans given user inputs has great potential in architectural design and has recently been explored in the computer vision community. However, the majority of existing methods synthesize floorplans in the format of rasterized images, which are difficult to edit or customize. In this paper, we aim to synthesize floorplans as sequences of 1-D vectors, which eases user interaction and design customization. To generate high fidelity vectorized floorplans, we propose a novel two-stage framework, including a draft stage and a multi-round refining stage. In the first stage, we encode the room connectivity graph input by users with a graph convolutional network (GCN), then apply an autoregressive transformer network to generate an initial floorplan sequence. To polish the initial design and generate more visually appealing floorplans, we further propose a novel panoptic refinement network(PRN) composed of a GCN and a transformer network. The PRN takes the initial generated sequence as input and refines the floorplan design while encouraging the correct room connectivity with our proposed geometric loss. We have conducted extensive experiments on a real-world floorplan dataset, and the results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under different settings and evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 根据用户输入自动生成平面图在建筑设计中具有巨大潜力，并且最近在计算机视觉社区中得到了探索。然而，大多数现有方法以光栅化图像的格式合成平面图，这很难编辑或定制。在本文中，我们的目标是将平面图合成为一维向量序列，从而简化用户交互和设计定制。为了生成高保真矢量化平面图，我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段框架，包括草案阶段和多轮细化阶段。在第一阶段，我们使用图卷积网络（GCN）对用户输入的房间连接图进行编码，然后应用自回归变压器网络生成初始平面图序列。为了完善初始设计并生成更具视觉吸引力的平面图，我们进一步提出了一种由 GCN 和变压器网络组成的新型全景细化网络（PRN）。 PRN 将初始生成的序列作为输入，并完善平面图设计，同时鼓励与我们提出的几何损失正确的房间连接。我们对现实世界的平面图数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法在不同的设置和评估指标下实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的图约束向量化解析生成框架，通过全景优化网络提升建筑平面图的生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法生成的栅格化平面图难以编辑和定制，需探索更易交互的向量化表示形式以满足建筑设计需求。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：首阶段用图卷积网络（GCN）编码房间连接图，再通过自回归Transformer生成初始向量序列；次阶段引入全景优化网络（PRN）结合几何损失函数进行多轮精细化调整。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上实验表明，该方法在多种评估指标下均达到最先进水平，生成的向量平面图具有更高的视觉保真度和结构准确性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的图约束向量化解析生成框架有效解决了栅格化表示的局限性，为建筑平面图的交互式设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhongzhi Li,Yunmei Zhao,Jinyi Ma,Jianliang Ai,Yiqun Dong
title: Fault Detection and Classification of Aerospace Sensors using a VGG16-based Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 使用基于 VGG16 的深度神经网络对航空航天传感器进行故障检测和分类
abstract: Compared with traditional model-based fault detection and classification (FDC) methods, deep neural networks (DNN) prove to be effective for the aerospace sensors FDC problems. However, time being consumed in training the DNN is excessive, and explainability analysis for the FDC neural network is still underwhelming. A concept known as imagefication-based intelligent FDC has been studied in recent years. This concept advocates to stack the sensors measurement data into an image format, the sensors FDC issue is then transformed to abnormal regions detection problem on the stacked image, which may well borrow the recent advances in the machine vision vision realm. Although promising results have been claimed in the imagefication-based intelligent FDC researches, due to the low size of the stacked image, small convolutional kernels and shallow DNN layers were used, which hinders the FDC performance. In this paper, we first propose a data augmentation method which inflates the stacked image to a larger size (correspondent to the VGG16 net developed in the machine vision realm). The FDC neural network is then trained via fine-tuning the VGG16 directly. To truncate and compress the FDC net size (hence its running time), we perform model pruning on the fine-tuned net. Class activation mapping (CAM) method is also adopted for explainability analysis of the FDC net to verify its internal operations. Via data augmentation, fine-tuning from VGG16, and model pruning, the FDC net developed in this paper claims an FDC accuracy 98.90% across 4 aircraft at 5 flight conditions (running time 26 ms). The CAM results also verify the FDC net w.r.t. its internal operations.

The CAM results also verify the FDC net w.r.t. its internal operations.
abstract_zh: 与传统的基于模型的故障检测和分类（FDC）方法相比，深度神经网络（DNN）被证明对于航空航天传感器的FDC问题是有效的。然而，训练 DNN 所消耗的时间过多，并且 FDC 神经网络的可解释性分析仍然令人印象深刻。近年来，人们研究了基于图像化的智能FDC的概念。这一概念主张将传感器测量数据堆叠成图像格式，然后将传感器FDC问题转化为堆叠图像上的异常区域检测问题，这很可能借鉴了机器视觉领域的最新进展。尽管基于图像化的智能 FDC 研究取得了可喜的成果，但由于堆叠图像尺寸较小，使用了小卷积核和浅 DNN 层，这阻碍了 FDC 的性能。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种数据增强方法，将堆叠图像膨胀到更大的尺寸（对应于机器视觉领域开发的 VGG16 网络）。然后通过直接微调 VGG16 来训练 FDC 神经网络。为了截断和压缩 FDC 网络大小（从而缩短其运行时间），我们在微调网络上执行模型修剪。还采用类激活映射（CAM）方法对FDC网络进行可解释性分析，以验证其内部操作。通过数据增强、VGG16 的微调和模型修剪，本文开发的 FDC 网络声称，4 架飞机在 5 种飞行条件下（运行时间 26 毫秒）的 FDC 准确率达到 98.90%。 CAM 结果还验证了 FDC net w.r.t.其内部运作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于VGG16的深度神经网络，用于航空航天传感器的故障检测与分类，通过图像化方法提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统模型-based方法效率低，深度神经网络训练耗时且可解释性差；现有图像化方法因图像尺寸小、网络浅层导致性能不足。
AI.method: 通过数据增强扩大堆叠图像尺寸，直接微调VGG16网络，结合模型剪枝压缩网络规模，并采用类激活映射（CAM）进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: 在4架飞机5种飞行条件下实现98.90%的故障检测准确率（运行时间26ms），CAM验证了网络内部操作的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过VGG16微调与优化，在保持高精度的同时提升运行效率，并通过CAM增强模型可解释性，为航空航天传感器FDC提供新思路。

authors_text: Yuesheng Xu,Taishan Zeng
title: Sparse Deep Neural Network for Nonlinear Partial Differential Equations
title_zh: 非线性偏微分方程的稀疏深度神经网络
abstract: More competent learning models are demanded for data processing due to increasingly greater amounts of data available in applications. Data that we encounter often have certain embedded sparsity structures. That is, if they are represented in an appropriate basis, their energies can concentrate on a small number of basis functions. This paper is devoted to a numerical study of adaptive approximation of solutions of nonlinear partial differential equations whose solutions may have singularities, by deep neural networks (DNNs) with a sparse regularization with multiple parameters. Noting that DNNs have an intrinsic multi-scale structure which is favorable for adaptive representation of functions, by employing a penalty with multiple parameters, we develop DNNs with a multi-scale sparse regularization (SDNN) for effectively representing functions having certain singularities. We then apply the proposed SDNN to numerical solutions of the Burgers equation and the Schrödinger equation. Numerical examples confirm that solutions generated by the proposed SDNN are sparse and accurate.
summary: More competent learning models are demanded for data processing due to increasingly greater amounts of data available in applications. Data that we encounter often have certain embedded sparsity structures. That is, if they are represented in an appropriate basis, their energies can concentrate on a small number of basis functions. This paper is devoted to a numerical study of adaptive approximation of solutions of nonlinear partial differential equations whose solutions may have singularities, by deep neural networks (DNNs) with a sparse regularization with multiple parameters. Noting that DNNs have an intrinsic multi-scale structure which is favorable for adaptive representation of functions, by employing a penalty with multiple parameters, we develop DNNs with a multi-scale sparse regularization (SDNN) for effectively representing functions having certain singularities. We then apply the proposed SDNN to numerical solutions of the Burgers equation and the Schrödinger equation. Numerical examples confirm that solutions generated by the proposed SDNN are sparse and accurate.
abstract_zh: 由于应用程序中可用的数据量越来越大，因此需要更有效的学习模型来进行数据处理。我们遇到的数据通常具有某些嵌入的稀疏结构。也就是说，如果它们以适当的基表示，它们的能量可以集中在少量的基函数上。本文致力于通过具有多个参数的稀疏正则化的深度神经网络（DNN）对解可能具有奇点的非线性偏微分方程的解进行自适应逼近的数值研究。注意到 DNN 具有内在的多尺度结构，有利于函数的自适应表示，通过采用多个参数的惩罚，我们开发了具有多尺度稀疏正则化（SDNN）的 DNN，以有效地表示具有某些奇点的函数。然后，我们将所提出的 SDNN 应用于 Burgers 方程和 Schrödinger 方程的数值解。数值例子证实了所提出的 SDNN 生成的解决方案是稀疏且准确的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有多尺度稀疏正则化的深度神经网络（SDNN），用于求解具有奇点的非线性偏微分方程。
AI.motivation: 随着数据量增长，传统方法在处理具有稀疏结构的数据时效率不足，尤其针对存在奇点的非线性PDE数值解问题。
AI.method: 设计多参数稀疏正则化深度神经网络（SDNN），利用其内在多尺度结构适应函数表示，通过 penalty 机制增强对奇点的捕捉能力。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，SDNN在Burgers方程和Schrödinger方程求解中生成的解具有稀疏性且数值准确。
AI.conclusion: SDNN通过稀疏正则化有效捕捉非线性PDE解的奇点特征，在保持精度的同时实现高效函数表示。

authors_text: Rohan Pratap Singh,Iori Kumagai,Antonio Gabas,Mehdi Benallegue,Yusuke Yoshiyasu,Fumio Kanehiro
title: Instance-specific 6-DoF Object Pose Estimation from Minimal Annotations
title_zh: 根据最少注释进行特定于实例的 6-DoF 对象姿态估计
abstract: In many robotic applications, the environment setting in which the 6-DoF pose estimation of a known, rigid object and its subsequent grasping is to be performed, remains nearly unchanging and might even be known to the robot in advance. In this paper, we refer to this problem as instance-specific pose estimation: the robot is expected to estimate the pose with a high degree of accuracy in only a limited set of familiar scenarios. Minor changes in the scene, including variations in lighting conditions and background appearance, are acceptable but drastic alterations are not anticipated. To this end, we present a method to rapidly train and deploy a pipeline for estimating the continuous 6-DoF pose of an object from a single RGB image. The key idea is to leverage known camera poses and rigid body geometry to partially automate the generation of a large labeled dataset. The dataset, along with sufficient domain randomization, is then used to supervise the training of deep neural networks for predicting semantic keypoints. Experimentally, we demonstrate the convenience and effectiveness of our proposed method to accurately estimate object pose requiring only a very small amount of manual annotation for training.
summary: In many robotic applications, the environment setting in which the 6-DoF pose estimation of a known, rigid object and its subsequent grasping is to be performed, remains nearly unchanging and might even be known to the robot in advance. In this paper, we refer to this problem as instance-specific pose estimation: the robot is expected to estimate the pose with a high degree of accuracy in only a limited set of familiar scenarios. Minor changes in the scene, including variations in lighting conditions and background appearance, are acceptable but drastic alterations are not anticipated. To this end, we present a method to rapidly train and deploy a pipeline for estimating the continuous 6-DoF pose of an object from a single RGB image. The key idea is to leverage known camera poses and rigid body geometry to partially automate the generation of a large labeled dataset. The dataset, along with sufficient domain randomization, is then used to supervise the training of deep neural networks for predicting semantic keypoints. Experimentally, we demonstrate the convenience and effectiveness of our proposed method to accurately estimate object pose requiring only a very small amount of manual annotation for training.
abstract_zh: 在许多机器人应用中，要执行已知刚性物体的 6-DoF 位姿估计及其后续抓取的环境设置几乎保持不变，甚至可能是机器人提前知道的。在本文中，我们将此问题称为特定于实例的姿态估计：机器人预计仅在有限的熟悉场景中高精度地估计姿态。场景中的微小变化（包括照明条件和背景外观的变化）是可以接受的，但预计不会出现剧烈的变化。为此，我们提出了一种快速训练和部署管道的方法，用于从单个 RGB 图像中估计物体的连续 6-DoF 位姿。关键思想是利用已知的相机姿势和刚体几何形状来部分自动生成大型标记数据集。然后，使用该数据集以及足够的域随机化来监督深度神经网络的训练，以预测语义关键点。通过实验，我们证明了我们提出的方法的便利性和有效性，可以准确地估计物体姿态，只需要很少量的手动注释来进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从少量标注中快速训练和部署用于估计已知刚性物体6自由度姿态的方法。
AI.motivation: 在许多机器人应用中，环境设置几乎不变，机器人需要在有限的熟悉场景中准确估计物体姿态，因此需要一种高效的方法。
AI.method: 利用已知的相机姿态和刚体几何学部分自动化生成大规模标注数据集，并结合领域随机化训练深度神经网络预测语义关键点。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法仅需极少的手动标注即可准确估计物体姿态，展示了其便捷性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够高效地在少量标注下实现高精度的6自由度物体姿态估计，适用于场景变化较小的机器人应用。

authors_text: Hüsrev Cılasun,Salonik Resch,Zamshed I. Chowdhury,Masoud Zabihi,Yang Lv,Brandon Zink,Jian-Ping Wang,Sachin S. Sapatnekar,Ulya R. Karpuzcu
title: On Error Correction for Nonvolatile Processing-In-Memory
title_zh: 内存中非易失性处理的纠错
comment: ef:2024 ACM/IEEE 51st Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA)
comments: ef:2024 ACM/IEEE 51st Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA)
abstract: Processing in memory (PiM) represents a promising computing paradigm to enhance performance of numerous data-intensive applications. Variants performing computing directly in emerging nonvolatile memories can deliver very high energy efficiency. PiM architectures directly inherit the vulnerabilities of the underlying memory substrates, but they also are subject to errors due to the computation in place. Numerous well-established error correcting codes (ECC) for memory exist, and are also considered in the PiM context, however, they typically ignore errors that occur throughout computation. In this paper we revisit the error correction design space for nonvolatile PiM, considering both storage/memory and computation-induced errors, surveying several self-checking and homomorphic approaches. We propose several solutions and analyze their complex performance-area-coverage trade-off, using three representative nonvolatile PiM technologies. All of these solutions guarantee single error correction for both, bulk bitwise computations and ordinary memory/storage errors.
summary: Processing in memory (PiM) represents a promising computing paradigm to enhance performance of numerous data-intensive applications. Variants performing computing directly in emerging nonvolatile memories can deliver very high energy efficiency. PiM architectures directly inherit the vulnerabilities of the underlying memory substrates, but they also are subject to errors due to the computation in place. Numerous well-established error correcting codes (ECC) for memory exist, and are also considered in the PiM context, however, they typically ignore errors that occur throughout computation. In this paper we revisit the error correction design space for nonvolatile PiM, considering both storage/memory and computation-induced errors, surveying several self-checking and homomorphic approaches. We propose several solutions and analyze their complex performance-area-coverage trade-off, using three representative nonvolatile PiM technologies. All of these solutions guarantee single error correction for both, bulk bitwise computations and ordinary memory/storage errors.
abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PiM) 代表了一种有前景的计算范例，可增强众多数据密集型应用程序的性能。直接在新兴非易失性存储器中执行计算的变体可以提供非常高的能源效率。 PiM 架构直接继承了底层内存基板的漏洞，但它们也会因计算到位而出现错误。存在许多完善的内存纠错码 (ECC)，并且也在 PiM 环境中考虑，但是，它们通常会忽略整个计算过程中发生的错误。在本文中，我们重新审视非易失性 PiM 的纠错设计空间，考虑存储/内存和计算引起的错误，调查几种自检和同态方法。我们提出了几种解决方案，并使用三种具有代表性的非易失性 PiM 技术来分析其复杂的性能-区域-覆盖范围权衡。所有这些解决方案都保证对批量按位计算和普通内存/存储错误进行单错误纠正。

AI.tldr: 本文针对非易失性处理-in-内存（PiM）的纠错设计进行研究，考虑存储/内存错误和计算引起的错误，提出多种解决方案并分析其性能-面积-覆盖率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有纠错码（ECC）通常忽略PiM计算过程中产生的错误，导致系统可靠性不足，需设计兼顾存储与计算错误的纠错方案。
AI.method: 调研自检和同态方法，提出多种纠错方案，并基于三种非易失性PiM技术分析其性能-面积-覆盖率权衡。
AI.result: 提出的解决方案可同时纠正存储/内存错误和计算引起的单比特错误，并量化不同技术的纠错能力与开销。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非易失性PiM提供了兼顾存储与计算错误的纠错设计框架，为提升其可靠性提供了理论支持与实现路径。

tldr: 本文针对非易失性处理-in-内存（PiM）的纠错设计进行研究，考虑存储/内存错误和计算引起的错误，提出多种解决方案并分析其性能-面积-覆盖率权衡。
motivation: 现有纠错码（ECC）通常忽略PiM计算过程中产生的错误，导致系统可靠性不足，需设计兼顾存储与计算错误的纠错方案。
method: 调研自检和同态方法，提出多种纠错方案，并基于三种非易失性PiM技术分析其性能-面积-覆盖率权衡。
result: 提出的解决方案可同时纠正存储/内存错误和计算引起的单比特错误，并量化不同技术的纠错能力与开销。
conclusion: 本文为非易失性PiM提供了兼顾存储与计算错误的纠错设计框架，为提升其可靠性提供了理论支持与实现路径。
search_text: On Error Correction for Nonvolatile Processing-In-Memory 内存中非易失性处理的纠错 Processing in memory (PiM) represents a promising computing paradigm to enhance performance of numerous data-intensive applications. Variants performing computing directly in emerging nonvolatile memories can deliver very high energy efficiency. PiM architectures directly inherit the vulnerabilities of the underlying memory substrates, but they also are subject to errors due to the computation in place. Numerous well-established error correcting codes (ECC) for memory exist, and are also considered in the PiM context, however, they typically ignore errors that occur throughout computation. In this paper we revisit the error correction design space for nonvolatile PiM, considering both storage/memory and computation-induced errors, surveying several self-checking and homomorphic approaches. We propose several solutions and analyze their complex performance-area-coverage trade-off, using three representative nonvolatile PiM technologies. All of these solutions guarantee single error correction for both, bulk bitwise computations and ordinary memory/storage errors. 内存处理 (PiM) 代表了一种有前景的计算范例，可增强众多数据密集型应用程序的性能。直接在新兴非易失性存储器中执行计算的变体可以提供非常高的能源效率。 PiM 架构直接继承了底层内存基板的漏洞，但它们也会因计算到位而出现错误。存在许多完善的内存纠错码 (ECC)，并且也在 PiM 环境中考虑，但是，它们通常会忽略整个计算过程中发生的错误。在本文中，我们重新审视非易失性 PiM 的纠错设计空间，考虑存储/内存和计算引起的错误，调查几种自检和同态方法。我们提出了几种解决方案，并使用三种具有代表性的非易失性 PiM 技术来分析其复杂的性能-区域-覆盖范围权衡。所有这些解决方案都保证对批量按位计算和普通内存/存储错误进行单错误纠正。 本文针对非易失性处理-in-内存（PiM）的纠错设计进行研究，考虑存储/内存错误和计算引起的错误，提出多种解决方案并分析其性能-面积-覆盖率权衡。 Hüsrev Cılasun,Salonik Resch,Zamshed I. Chowdhury,Masoud Zabihi,Yang Lv,Brandon Zink,Jian-Ping Wang,Sachin S. Sapatnekar,Ulya R. Karpuzcu cs.ET

authors_text: Wangmeng Xiang,Chao Li,Biao Wang,Xihan Wei,Xian-Sheng Hua,Lei Zhang
title: Spatiotemporal Self-attention Modeling with Temporal Patch Shift for Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于动作识别的时空自注意力模型
abstract: Transformer-based methods have recently achieved great advancement on 2D image-based vision tasks. For 3D video-based tasks such as action recognition, however, directly applying spatiotemporal transformers on video data will bring heavy computation and memory burdens due to the largely increased number of patches and the quadratic complexity of self-attention computation. How to efficiently and effectively model the 3D self-attention of video data has been a great challenge for transformers. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Patch Shift (TPS) method for efficient 3D self-attention modeling in transformers for video-based action recognition. TPS shifts part of patches with a specific mosaic pattern in the temporal dimension, thus converting a vanilla spatial self-attention operation to a spatiotemporal one with little additional cost. As a result, we can compute 3D self-attention using nearly the same computation and memory cost as 2D self-attention. TPS is a plug-and-play module and can be inserted into existing 2D transformer models to enhance spatiotemporal feature learning. The proposed method achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-arts on Something-something V1 & V2, Diving-48, and Kinetics400 while being much more efficient on computation and memory cost. The source code of TPS can be found at https://github.com/MartinXM/TPS.
summary: Transformer-based methods have recently achieved great advancement on 2D image-based vision tasks. For 3D video-based tasks such as action recognition, however, directly applying spatiotemporal transformers on video data will bring heavy computation and memory burdens due to the largely increased number of patches and the quadratic complexity of self-attention computation. How to efficiently and effectively model the 3D self-attention of video data has been a great challenge for transformers. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Patch Shift (TPS) method for efficient 3D self-attention modeling in transformers for video-based action recognition. TPS shifts part of patches with a specific mosaic pattern in the temporal dimension, thus converting a vanilla spatial self-attention operation to a spatiotemporal one with little additional cost. As a result, we can compute 3D self-attention using nearly the same computation and memory cost as 2D self-attention. TPS is a plug-and-play module and can be inserted into existing 2D transformer models to enhance spatiotemporal feature learning. The proposed method achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-arts on Something-something V1 & V2, Diving-48, and Kinetics400 while being much more efficient on computation and memory cost. The source code of TPS can be found at https://github.com/MartinXM/TPS.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的方法最近在基于 2D 图像的视觉任务上取得了巨大进步。然而，对于动作识别等基于 3D 视频的任务，由于补丁数量大幅增加以及自注意力计算的二次复杂度，直接在视频数据上应用时空变换器将带来沉重的计算和内存负担。如何高效有效地对视频数据的 3D self-attention 进行建模一直是 Transformer 面临的巨大挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间补丁平移（TPS）方法，用于在基于视频的动作识别的变压器中进行高效的 3D 自注意力建模。 TPS 在时间维度上移动具有特定马赛克图案的部分补丁，从而将普通的空间自注意力操作转换为时空操作，几乎不需要额外的成本。因此，我们可以使用与 2D 自注意力几乎相同的计算和内存成本来计算 3D 自注意力。 TPS 是一个即插即用模块，可以插入现有的 2D Transformer 模型中以增强时空特征学习。所提出的方法在 Something-something V1 和 V2、Diving-48 和 Kinetics400 上实现了最先进的竞争性能，同时在计算和内存成本方面更加高效。 TPS的源代码可以在https://github.com/MartinXM/TPS找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Temporal Patch Shift (TPS)的方法，用于在视频动作识别任务中高效建模3D自注意力机制。
AI.motivation: 直接应用时空Transformer处理视频数据会导致计算和内存负担过重，因为空间和时间维度的补丁数量大幅增加且自注意力计算复杂度为二次方。
AI.method: TPS通过在时间维度上以特定马赛克模式移动部分补丁，将常规的空间自注意力操作转换为时空自注意力，仅需少量额外成本即可实现3D自注意力计算。
AI.result: 该方法在Something-something V1/V2、Diving-48和Kinetics400数据集上达到与现有最佳方法相当的性能，同时显著降低计算和内存成本。
AI.conclusion: TPS作为一种即插即用模块，能有效提升时空特征学习效率，为视频动作识别提供了高效且实用的解决方案。

authors_text: Junyan Lyu,Yiqi Zhang,Yijin Huang,Li Lin,Pujin Cheng,Xiaoying Tang
title: AADG: Automatic Augmentation for Domain Generalization on Retinal Image Segmentation
title_zh: AADG：视网膜图像分割领域泛化的自动增强
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI)
abstract: Convolutional neural networks have been widely applied to medical image segmentation and have achieved considerable performance. However, the performance may be significantly affected by the domain gap between training data (source domain) and testing data (target domain). To address this issue, we propose a data manipulation based domain generalization method, called Automated Augmentation for Domain Generalization (AADG). Our AADG framework can effectively sample data augmentation policies that generate novel domains and diversify the training set from an appropriate search space. Specifically, we introduce a novel proxy task maximizing the diversity among multiple augmented novel domains as measured by the Sinkhorn distance in a unit sphere space, making automated augmentation tractable. Adversarial training and deep reinforcement learning are employed to efficiently search the objectives. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on 11 publicly-accessible fundus image datasets (four for retinal vessel segmentation, four for optic disc and cup (OD/OC) segmentation and three for retinal lesion segmentation) are comprehensively performed. Two OCTA datasets for retinal vasculature segmentation are further involved to validate cross-modality generalization. Our proposed AADG exhibits state-of-the-art generalization performance and outperforms existing approaches by considerable margins on retinal vessel, OD/OC and lesion segmentation tasks. The learned policies are empirically validated to be model-agnostic and can transfer well to other models. The source code is available at https://github.com/CRazorback/AADG.
summary: Convolutional neural networks have been widely applied to medical image segmentation and have achieved considerable performance. However, the performance may be significantly affected by the domain gap between training data (source domain) and testing data (target domain). To address this issue, we propose a data manipulation based domain generalization method, called Automated Augmentation for Domain Generalization (AADG). Our AADG framework can effectively sample data augmentation policies that generate novel domains and diversify the training set from an appropriate search space. Specifically, we introduce a novel proxy task maximizing the diversity among multiple augmented novel domains as measured by the Sinkhorn distance in a unit sphere space, making automated augmentation tractable. Adversarial training and deep reinforcement learning are employed to efficiently search the objectives. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on 11 publicly-accessible fundus image datasets (four for retinal vessel segmentation, four for optic disc and cup (OD/OC) segmentation and three for retinal lesion segmentation) are comprehensively performed. Two OCTA datasets for retinal vasculature segmentation are further involved to validate cross-modality generalization. Our proposed AADG exhibits state-of-the-art generalization performance and outperforms existing approaches by considerable margins on retinal vessel, OD/OC and lesion segmentation tasks. The learned policies are empirically validated to be model-agnostic and can transfer well to other models. The source code is available at https://github.com/CRazorback/AADG.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络已广泛应用于医学图像分割并取得了可观的性能。然而，性能可能会受到训练数据（源域）和测试数据（目标域）之间的域差距的显着影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于数据操作的域泛化方法，称为域泛化自动增强（AADG）。我们的 AADG 框架可以有效地对数据增强策略进行采样，这些策略生成新的域并从适当的搜索空间使训练集多样化。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖的代理任务，可以最大化多个增强新颖领域之间的多样性（通过单位球体空间中的 Sinkhorn 距离来测量），从而使自动增强变得易于处理。采用对抗性训练和深度强化学习来有效地搜索目标。对11个公开的眼底图像数据集（四个用于视网膜血管分割，四个用于视盘和视杯（OD/OC）分割，三个用于视网膜病变分割）进行了全面的定量和定性实验。进一步涉及两个用于视网膜脉管系统分割的 OCTA 数据集来验证跨模态泛化。我们提出的 AADG 展示了最先进的泛化性能，并且在视网膜血管、OD/OC 和病变分割任务上明显优于现有方法。学习到的策略经过经验验证，与模型无关，并且可以很好地迁移到其他模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/CRazorback/AADG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AADG的自动增强方法，用于解决视网膜图像分割中的领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络在医学图像分割中表现优异，但训练数据与测试数据之间的领域差异会显著影响性能，亟需提升模型的领域泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过引入基于Sinkhorn距离的多样性最大化代理任务，结合对抗训练和深度强化学习，从搜索空间中采样数据增强策略生成多样化训练集。
AI.result: 在11个公开眼底图像数据集和2个OCTA数据集上验证，AADG在视网膜血管、视盘/杯及病变分割任务中均达到最先进水平，且策略具有模型无关性。
AI.conclusion: AADG通过自动化增强策略有效提升领域泛化性能，验证了其在跨模态和跨任务中的广泛适用性。

Our AADG framework can effectively sample data augmentation policies that generate novel domains and diversify the training set from an appropriate search space. Specifically, we introduce a novel proxy task maximizing the diversity among multiple augmented novel domains as measured by the Sinkhorn distance in a unit sphere space, making automated augmentation tractable. Adversarial training and deep reinforcement learning are employed to efficiently search the objectives. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on 11 publicly-accessible fundus image datasets (four for retinal vessel segmentation, four for optic disc and cup (OD/OC) segmentation and three for retinal lesion segmentation) are comprehensively performed. Two OCTA datasets for retinal vasculature segmentation are further involved to validate cross-modality generalization. Our proposed AADG exhibits state-of-the-art generalization performance and outperforms existing approaches by considerable margins on retinal vessel, OD/OC and lesion segmentation tasks. The learned policies are empirically validated to be model-agnostic and can transfer well to other models. The source code is available at https://github.com/CRazorback/AADG. 卷积神经网络已广泛应用于医学图像分割并取得了可观的性能。然而，性能可能会受到训练数据（源域）和测试数据（目标域）之间的域差距的显着影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于数据操作的域泛化方法，称为域泛化自动增强（AADG）。我们的 AADG 框架可以有效地对数据增强策略进行采样，这些策略生成新的域并从适当的搜索空间使训练集多样化。具体来说，我们引入了一种新颖的代理任务，可以最大化多个增强新颖领域之间的多样性（通过单位球体空间中的 Sinkhorn 距离来测量），从而使自动增强变得易于处理。采用对抗性训练和深度强化学习来有效地搜索目标。对11个公开的眼底图像数据集（四个用于视网膜血管分割，四个用于视盘和视杯（OD/OC）分割，三个用于视网膜病变分割）进行了全面的定量和定性实验。进一步涉及两个用于视网膜脉管系统分割的 OCTA 数据集来验证跨模态泛化。我们提出的 AADG 展示了最先进的泛化性能，并且在视网膜血管、OD/OC 和病变分割任务上明显优于现有方法。学习到的策略经过经验验证，与模型无关，并且可以很好地迁移到其他模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/CRazorback/AADG 获取。 本文提出一种名为AADG的自动增强方法，用于解决视网膜图像分割中的领域泛化问题。 Junyan Lyu,Yiqi Zhang,Yijin Huang,Li Lin,Pujin Cheng,Xiaoying Tang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jogendra Nath Kundu,Suvaansh Bhambri,Akshay Kulkarni,Hiran Sarkar,Varun Jampani,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Concurrent Subsidiary Supervision for Unsupervised Source-Free Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无监督无源域适应的并行附属监督
abstract: The prime challenge in unsupervised domain adaptation (DA) is to mitigate the domain shift between the source and target domains. Prior DA works show that pretext tasks could be used to mitigate this domain shift by learning domain invariant representations. However, in practice, we find that most existing pretext tasks are ineffective against other established techniques. Thus, we theoretically analyze how and when a subsidiary pretext task could be leveraged to assist the goal task of a given DA problem and develop objective subsidiary task suitability criteria. Based on this criteria, we devise a novel process of sticker intervention and cast sticker classification as a supervised subsidiary DA problem concurrent to the goal task unsupervised DA. Our approach not only improves goal task adaptation performance, but also facilitates privacy-oriented source-free DA i.e. without concurrent source-target access. Experiments on the standard Office-31, Office-Home, DomainNet, and VisDA benchmarks demonstrate our superiority for both single-source and multi-source source-free DA. Our approach also complements existing non-source-free works, achieving leading performance.
summary: The prime challenge in unsupervised domain adaptation (DA) is to mitigate the domain shift between the source and target domains. Prior DA works show that pretext tasks could be used to mitigate this domain shift by learning domain invariant representations. However, in practice, we find that most existing pretext tasks are ineffective against other established techniques. Thus, we theoretically analyze how and when a subsidiary pretext task could be leveraged to assist the goal task of a given DA problem and develop objective subsidiary task suitability criteria. Based on this criteria, we devise a novel process of sticker intervention and cast sticker classification as a supervised subsidiary DA problem concurrent to the goal task unsupervised DA. Our approach not only improves goal task adaptation performance, but also facilitates privacy-oriented source-free DA i.e. without concurrent source-target access. Experiments on the standard Office-31, Office-Home, DomainNet, and VisDA benchmarks demonstrate our superiority for both single-source and multi-source source-free DA. Our approach also complements existing non-source-free works, achieving leading performance.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应 (DA) 的主要挑战是减轻源域和目标域之间的域转移。先前的 DA 工作表明，借口任务可以通过学习域不变表示来减轻这种域转移。然而，在实践中，我们发现大多数现有的借口任务对于其他已建立的技术无效。因此，我们从理论上分析了如何以及何时可以利用辅助借口任务来协助给定 DA 问题的目标任务，并制定客观的辅助任务适用性标准。基于这个标准，我们设计了一种新颖的贴纸干预过程，并将贴纸分类作为与目标任务无监督 DA 并行的有监督辅助 DA 问题。我们的方法不仅提高了目标任务适应性能，而且还促进了面向隐私的无源 DA，即无需并发源-目标访问。标准 Office-31、Office-Home、DomainNet 和 VisDA 基准测试的实验证明了我们在单源和多源无源 DA 方面的优势。我们的方法还补充了现有的非无源作品，实现了领先的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过并发辅助监督任务解决无监督源自由域适应问题的新方法，旨在提升目标域适应性能并实现隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法中预训练任务效果有限，且难以有效辅助主任务，需理论分析辅助任务适用性并设计新框架以提升源自由场景下的适应能力。
AI.method: 通过理论分析确定辅助任务适用标准，设计贴纸干预机制将贴纸分类作为监督辅助任务，与主任务并行优化，无需源域数据即可提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在Office-31、Office-Home等基准数据集上，方法在单源和多源源自由域适应中均优于现有技术，同时可补充非源自由方法实现领先性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的并发辅助监督框架有效解决了源自由域适应的挑战，通过理论指导的辅助任务设计显著提升了模型适应性与隐私保护能力。

authors_text: Tilman Räuker,Anson Ho,Stephen Casper,Dylan Hadfield-Menell
title: Toward Transparent AI: A Survey on Interpreting the Inner Structures of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 迈向透明人工智能：解释深度神经网络内部结构的调查
abstract: The last decade of machine learning has seen drastic increases in scale and capabilities. Deep neural networks (DNNs) are increasingly being deployed in the real world. However, they are difficult to analyze, raising concerns about using them without a rigorous understanding of how they function. Effective tools for interpreting them will be important for building more trustworthy AI by helping to identify problems, fix bugs, and improve basic understanding. In particular, "inner" interpretability techniques, which focus on explaining the internal components of DNNs, are well-suited for developing a mechanistic understanding, guiding manual modifications, and reverse engineering solutions. Much recent work has focused on DNN interpretability, and rapid progress has thus far made a thorough systematization of methods difficult. In this survey, we review over 300 works with a focus on inner interpretability tools. We introduce a taxonomy that classifies methods by what part of the network they help to explain (weights, neurons, subnetworks, or latent representations) and whether they are implemented during (intrinsic) or after (post hoc) training. To our knowledge, we are also the first to survey a number of connections between interpretability research and work in adversarial robustness, continual learning, modularity, network compression, and studying the human visual system. We discuss key challenges and argue that the status quo in interpretability research is largely unproductive. Finally, we highlight the importance of future work that emphasizes diagnostics, debugging, adversaries, and benchmarking in order to make interpretability tools more useful to engineers in practical applications.
summary: The last decade of machine learning has seen drastic increases in scale and capabilities. Deep neural networks (DNNs) are increasingly being deployed in the real world. However, they are difficult to analyze, raising concerns about using them without a rigorous understanding of how they function. Effective tools for interpreting them will be important for building more trustworthy AI by helping to identify problems, fix bugs, and improve basic understanding. In particular, "inner" interpretability techniques, which focus on explaining the internal components of DNNs, are well-suited for developing a mechanistic understanding, guiding manual modifications, and reverse engineering solutions. Much recent work has focused on DNN interpretability, and rapid progress has thus far made a thorough systematization of methods difficult. In this survey, we review over 300 works with a focus on inner interpretability tools. We introduce a taxonomy that classifies methods by what part of the network they help to explain (weights, neurons, subnetworks, or latent representations) and whether they are implemented during (intrinsic) or after (post hoc) training. To our knowledge, we are also the first to survey a number of connections between interpretability research and work in adversarial robustness, continual learning, modularity, network compression, and studying the human visual system. We discuss key challenges and argue that the status quo in interpretability research is largely unproductive. Finally, we highlight the importance of future work that emphasizes diagnostics, debugging, adversaries, and benchmarking in order to make interpretability tools more useful to engineers in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 过去十年，机器学习的规模和能力都出现了大幅增长。深度神经网络 (DNN) 越来越多地部署在现实世界中。然而，它们很难分析，如果不严格了解它们的功能，就会引发人们对使用它们的担忧。解释它们的有效工具对于通过帮助识别问题、修复错误和提高基本理解来构建更值得信赖的人工智能非常重要。特别是“内部”可解释性技术，专注于解释 DNN 的内部组件，非常适合发展机械理解、指导手动修改和逆向工程解决方案。最近的许多工作都集中在 DNN 可解释性上，但迄今为止的快速进展使得方法的彻底系统化变得困难。在本次调查中，我们回顾了 300 多件作品，重点关注内部可解释性工具。我们引入了一种分类法，根据方法有助于解释网络的哪些部分（权重、神经元、子网络或潜在表示）以及它们是在（内在）训练期间还是在（事后）训练期间实施，对方法进行分类。据我们所知，我们也是第一个调查可解释性研究与对抗鲁棒性、持续学习、模块化、网络压缩和研究人类视觉系统工作之间的许多联系的人。我们讨论了关键挑战，并认为可解释性研究的现状基本上是没有成效的。最后，我们强调未来工作的重要性，强调诊断、调试、对手和基准测试，以使可解释性工具对实际应用中的工程师更有用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度神经网络（DNN）内部结构解释方法，旨在提高AI透明性。
AI.motivation: 随着DNN在现实世界的广泛应用，其内部机制难以理解，亟需可解释性工具以增强AI可信度。
AI.method: 通过分类300余篇文献，提出基于解释对象（权重、神经元等）及实施阶段（训练中或后）的双重分类法，并关联可解释性与对抗鲁棒性等领域的研究。
AI.result: 构建了系统化的解释方法分类体系，指出当前研究在诊断、调试等实用方向存在不足。
AI.conclusion: 现有可解释性研究效率低下，未来需聚焦工程化工具开发及基准测试以提升实用性。

Finally, we highlight the importance of future work that emphasizes diagnostics, debugging, adversaries, and benchmarking in order to make interpretability tools more useful to engineers in practical applications. 过去十年，机器学习的规模和能力都出现了大幅增长。深度神经网络 (DNN) 越来越多地部署在现实世界中。然而，它们很难分析，如果不严格了解它们的功能，就会引发人们对使用它们的担忧。解释它们的有效工具对于通过帮助识别问题、修复错误和提高基本理解来构建更值得信赖的人工智能非常重要。特别是“内部”可解释性技术，专注于解释 DNN 的内部组件，非常适合发展机械理解、指导手动修改和逆向工程解决方案。最近的许多工作都集中在 DNN 可解释性上，但迄今为止的快速进展使得方法的彻底系统化变得困难。在本次调查中，我们回顾了 300 多件作品，重点关注内部可解释性工具。我们引入了一种分类法，根据方法有助于解释网络的哪些部分（权重、神经元、子网络或潜在表示）以及它们是在（内在）训练期间还是在（事后）训练期间实施，对方法进行分类。据我们所知，我们也是第一个调查可解释性研究与对抗鲁棒性、持续学习、模块化、网络压缩和研究人类视觉系统工作之间的许多联系的人。我们讨论了关键挑战，并认为可解释性研究的现状基本上是没有成效的。最后，我们强调未来工作的重要性，强调诊断、调试、对手和基准测试，以使可解释性工具对实际应用中的工程师更有用。 本文综述了深度神经网络（DNN）内部结构解释方法，旨在提高AI透明性。 Tilman Räuker,Anson Ho,Stephen Casper,Dylan Hadfield-Menell cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Jinyeong Chae,Jihie Kim
title: Uncertainty-based Visual Question Answering: Estimating Semantic Inconsistency between Image and Knowledge Base
title_zh: 基于不确定性的视觉问答：估计图像和知识库之间的语义不一致
comment: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KVQA) task aims to answer questions that require additional external knowledge as well as an understanding of images and questions. Recent studies on KVQA inject an external knowledge in a multi-modal form, and as more knowledge is used, irrelevant information may be added and can confuse the question answering. In order to properly use the knowledge, this study proposes the following: 1) we introduce a novel semantic inconsistency measure computed from caption uncertainty and semantic similarity; 2) we suggest a new external knowledge assimilation method based on the semantic inconsistency measure and apply it to integrate explicit knowledge and implicit knowledge for KVQA; 3) the proposed method is evaluated with the OK-VQA dataset and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Knowledge-based visual question answering (KVQA) task aims to answer questions that require additional external knowledge as well as an understanding of images and questions. Recent studies on KVQA inject an external knowledge in a multi-modal form, and as more knowledge is used, irrelevant information may be added and can confuse the question answering. In order to properly use the knowledge, this study proposes the following: 1) we introduce a novel semantic inconsistency measure computed from caption uncertainty and semantic similarity; 2) we suggest a new external knowledge assimilation method based on the semantic inconsistency measure and apply it to integrate explicit knowledge and implicit knowledge for KVQA; 3) the proposed method is evaluated with the OK-VQA dataset and achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的视觉问答（KVQA）任务旨在回答需要额外外部知识以及对图像和问题的理解的问题。最近关于 KVQA 的研究以多模态形式注入外部知识，随着使用更多的知识，可能会添加不相关的信息，从而使问题回答变得混乱。为了正确使用这些知识，本研究提出以下建议：1）我们引入了一种根据标题不确定性和语义相似性计算的新颖的语义不一致度量； 2）我们提出了一种新的基于语义不一致度量的外部知识同化方法，并将其应用于KVQA的显性知识和隐性知识的整合； 3）所提出的方法使用 OK-VQA 数据集进行评估，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的视觉问答方法，通过估计图像与知识库间的语义不一致性来提升知识增强型视觉问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在引入外部知识时可能引入无关信息导致混淆，需通过量化语义不一致性来更有效地整合知识。
AI.method: 1) 提出结合字幕不确定性与语义相似度的语义不一致度量方法；2) 基于该度量提出显性/隐性知识融合方法；3) 在OK-VQA数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 在OK-VQA数据集上达到当时最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化语义不一致性有效过滤无关知识，证明了所提方法在知识增强型视觉问答任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Xinrong Hu,Corey Wang,Yiyu Shi
title: Contrastive Image Synthesis and Self-supervised Feature Adaptation for Cross-Modality Biomedical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 跨模态生物医学图像分割的对比图像合成和自监督特征适应
abstract: This work presents a novel framework CISFA (Contrastive Image synthesis and Self-supervised Feature Adaptation)that builds on image domain translation and unsupervised feature adaptation for cross-modality biomedical image segmentation. Different from existing works, we use a one-sided generative model and add a weighted patch-wise contrastive loss between sampled patches of the input image and the corresponding synthetic image, which serves as shape constraints. Moreover, we notice that the generated images and input images share similar structural information but are in different modalities. As such, we enforce contrastive losses on the generated images and the input images to train the encoder of a segmentation model to minimize the discrepancy between paired images in the learned embedding space. Compared with existing works that rely on adversarial learning for feature adaptation, such a method enables the encoder to learn domain-independent features in a more explicit way. We extensively evaluate our methods on segmentation tasks containing CT and MRI images for abdominal cavities and whole hearts. Experimental results show that the proposed framework not only outputs synthetic images with less distortion of organ shapes, but also outperforms state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods by a large margin.
summary: This work presents a novel framework CISFA (Contrastive Image synthesis and Self-supervised Feature Adaptation)that builds on image domain translation and unsupervised feature adaptation for cross-modality biomedical image segmentation. Different from existing works, we use a one-sided generative model and add a weighted patch-wise contrastive loss between sampled patches of the input image and the corresponding synthetic image, which serves as shape constraints. Moreover, we notice that the generated images and input images share similar structural information but are in different modalities. As such, we enforce contrastive losses on the generated images and the input images to train the encoder of a segmentation model to minimize the discrepancy between paired images in the learned embedding space. Compared with existing works that rely on adversarial learning for feature adaptation, such a method enables the encoder to learn domain-independent features in a more explicit way. We extensively evaluate our methods on segmentation tasks containing CT and MRI images for abdominal cavities and whole hearts. Experimental results show that the proposed framework not only outputs synthetic images with less distortion of organ shapes, but also outperforms state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新颖的框架 CISFA（对比图像合成和自监督特征适应），该框架建立在图像域翻译和无监督特征适应的基础上，用于跨模态生物医学图像分割。与现有的工作不同，我们使用单边生成模型，并在输入图像的采样补丁和相应的合成图像之间添加加权补丁对比损失，作为形状约束。此外，我们注意到生成的图像和输入图像共享相似的结构信息，但具有不同的模式。因此，我们对生成的图像和输入图像实施对比损失，以训练分割模型的编码器，以最小化学习的嵌入空间中配对图像之间的差异。与依赖对抗性学习进行特征适应的现有工作相比，这种方法使编码器能够以更明确的方式学习与领域无关的特征。我们在包含腹腔和整个心脏的 CT 和 MRI 图像的分割任务上广泛评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，所提出的框架不仅输出器官形状失真较小的合成图像，而且大大优于最先进的域适应方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CISFA的新型框架，用于跨模态生物医学图像分割，结合对比图像合成与自监督特征适应技术。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态图像分割方法依赖对抗学习，难以显式学习领域无关特征，且合成图像器官形状失真较大。
AI.method: 采用单向生成模型与加权块级对比损失约束形状，通过对比输入图像与合成图像的嵌入空间差异，训练分割模型编码器。
AI.result: 在腹部和心脏的CT/MRI分割任务中，合成图像器官形状失真显著减少，且优于现有领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: CISFA框架通过显式对比学习有效缓解跨模态差异，在生物医学图像分割中展现出优越性能。

authors_text: Zheng Zhou,Guangyao Dou,Xiaodong Qu
title: BrainActivity1: A Framework of EEG Data Collection and Machine Learning Analysis for College Students
title_zh: BrainActivity1：大学生脑电数据采集和机器学习分析框架
abstract: Using Machine Learning and Deep Learning to predict cognitive tasks from electroencephalography (EEG) signals has been a fast-developing area in Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI). However, during the COVID-19 pandemic, data collection and analysis could be more challenging than before. This paper explored machine learning algorithms that can run efficiently on personal computers for BCI classification tasks. Also, we investigated a way to conduct such BCI experiments remotely via Zoom. The results showed that Random Forest and RBF SVM performed well for EEG classification tasks. The remote experiment during the pandemic yielded several challenges, and we discussed the possible solutions; nevertheless, we developed a protocol that grants non-experts who are interested a guideline for such data collection.
summary: Using Machine Learning and Deep Learning to predict cognitive tasks from electroencephalography (EEG) signals has been a fast-developing area in Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI). However, during the COVID-19 pandemic, data collection and analysis could be more challenging than before. This paper explored machine learning algorithms that can run efficiently on personal computers for BCI classification tasks. Also, we investigated a way to conduct such BCI experiments remotely via Zoom. The results showed that Random Forest and RBF SVM performed well for EEG classification tasks. The remote experiment during the pandemic yielded several challenges, and we discussed the possible solutions; nevertheless, we developed a protocol that grants non-experts who are interested a guideline for such data collection.
abstract_zh: 使用机器学习和深度学习根据脑电图 (EEG) 信号预测认知任务一直是脑机接口 (BCI) 中快速发展的领域。然而，在 COVID-19 大流行期间，数据收集和分析可能比以前更具挑战性。本文探讨了可以在个人计算机上高效运行 BCI 分类任务的机器学习算法。此外，我们还研究了一种通过 Zoom 远程进行此类 BCI 实验的方法。结果表明，随机森林和 RBF SVM 在脑电图分类任务中表现良好。疫情期间的远程实验遇到了一些挑战，我们讨论了可能的解决方案；尽管如此，我们还是制定了一项协议，为有兴趣的非专家提供此类数据收集的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对大学生的脑电图（EEG）数据采集与机器学习分析框架，并探讨了疫情期间通过Zoom进行远程BCI实验的可行性。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间传统的EEG数据采集与分析面临挑战，需开发可在个人电脑上高效运行的机器学习算法，并建立远程实验方案以适应新形势。
AI.method: 通过测试随机森林和RBF SVM等机器学习算法进行EEG分类任务，同时利用Zoom平台实施远程BCI实验，并制定非专家可操作的数据采集协议。
AI.result: 随机森林和RBF SVM在EEG分类任务中表现优异，远程实验虽面临挑战但成功制定了适用于非专家的实验指南。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了疫情期间远程BCI实验的可行性，为非专家提供了数据采集框架，并证明了传统机器学习算法在EEG分析中的有效性。

ai_content.result: 随机森林和RBF SVM在EEG分类任务中表现优异，远程实验虽面临挑战但成功制定了适用于非专家的实验指南。
ai_content.conclusion: 本文验证了疫情期间远程BCI实验的可行性，为非专家提供了数据采集框架，并证明了传统机器学习算法在EEG分析中的有效性。

search_text: BrainActivity1: A Framework of EEG Data Collection and Machine Learning Analysis for College Students BrainActivity1：大学生脑电数据采集和机器学习分析框架 Using Machine Learning and Deep Learning to predict cognitive tasks from electroencephalography (EEG) signals has been a fast-developing area in Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCI). However, during the COVID-19 pandemic, data collection and analysis could be more challenging than before. This paper explored machine learning algorithms that can run efficiently on personal computers for BCI classification tasks. Also, we investigated a way to conduct such BCI experiments remotely via Zoom. The results showed that Random Forest and RBF SVM performed well for EEG classification tasks. The remote experiment during the pandemic yielded several challenges, and we discussed the possible solutions; nevertheless, we developed a protocol that grants non-experts who are interested a guideline for such data collection. 使用机器学习和深度学习根据脑电图 (EEG) 信号预测认知任务一直是脑机接口 (BCI) 中快速发展的领域。然而，在 COVID-19 大流行期间，数据收集和分析可能比以前更具挑战性。本文探讨了可以在个人计算机上高效运行 BCI 分类任务的机器学习算法。此外，我们还研究了一种通过 Zoom 远程进行此类 BCI 实验的方法。结果表明，随机森林和 RBF SVM 在脑电图分类任务中表现良好。疫情期间的远程实验遇到了一些挑战，我们讨论了可能的解决方案；尽管如此，我们还是制定了一项协议，为有兴趣的非专家提供此类数据收集的指南。 本文提出了一种针对大学生的脑电图（EEG）数据采集与机器学习分析框架，并探讨了疫情期间通过Zoom进行远程BCI实验的可行性。 Zheng Zhou,Guangyao Dou,Xiaodong Qu cs.DB,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Jie Lei,Zhao Liu,Zeyu Zou,Tong Li,Xu Juan,Shuaiwei Wang,Guoyu Yang,Zunlei Feng
title: Mid-level Representation Enhancement and Graph Embedded Uncertainty Suppressing for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部表情识别的中级表示增强和图形嵌入不确定性抑制
abstract: Facial expression is an essential factor in conveying human emotional states and intentions. Although remarkable advancement has been made in facial expression recognition (FER) task, challenges due to large variations of expression patterns and unavoidable data uncertainties still remain. In this paper, we propose mid-level representation enhancement (MRE) and graph embedded uncertainty suppressing (GUS) addressing these issues. On one hand, MRE is introduced to avoid expression representation learning being dominated by a limited number of highly discriminative patterns. On the other hand, GUS is introduced to suppress the feature ambiguity in the representation space. The proposed method not only has stronger generalization capability to handle different variations of expression patterns but also more robustness to capture expression representations. Experimental evaluation on Aff-Wild2 have verified the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Facial expression is an essential factor in conveying human emotional states and intentions. Although remarkable advancement has been made in facial expression recognition (FER) task, challenges due to large variations of expression patterns and unavoidable data uncertainties still remain. In this paper, we propose mid-level representation enhancement (MRE) and graph embedded uncertainty suppressing (GUS) addressing these issues. On one hand, MRE is introduced to avoid expression representation learning being dominated by a limited number of highly discriminative patterns. On the other hand, GUS is introduced to suppress the feature ambiguity in the representation space. The proposed method not only has stronger generalization capability to handle different variations of expression patterns but also more robustness to capture expression representations. Experimental evaluation on Aff-Wild2 have verified the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 面部表情是传达人类情感状态和意图的重要因素。尽管面部表情识别（FER）任务取得了显着的进步，但由于表情模式的巨大变化和不可避免的数据不确定性而带来的挑战仍然存在。在本文中，我们提出了中级表示增强（MRE）和图嵌入不确定性抑制（GUS）来解决这些问题。一方面，引入 MRE 是为了避免表达表示学习被有限数量的高度辨别模式所主导。另一方面，引入GUS来抑制表示空间中的特征模糊性。所提出的方法不仅具有更强的泛化能力来处理表达模式的不同变化，而且在捕获表达表示方面也具有更强的鲁棒性。在Aff-Wild2上的实验评估验证了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合中层表示增强和图嵌入不确定性抑制的方法，以提升面部表情识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别面临表情模式变化大和数据不确定性等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理这些因素导致的特征模糊和泛化不足问题。
AI.method: 提出中层表示增强（MRE）避免模型过度依赖少数判别性模式，并通过图嵌入不确定性抑制（GUS）在表示空间中抑制特征模糊性。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2数据集上的实验验证了该方法在处理表情变化和不确定性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过增强中层表示和图嵌入不确定性抑制，显著提升了面部表情识别的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

authors_text: Kexue Fu,Mingzhi Yuan,Manning Wang
title: Boosting Point-BERT by Multi-choice Tokens
title_zh: 通过多选代币提升 Point-BERT
abstract: Masked language modeling (MLM) has become one of the most successful self-supervised pre-training task. Inspired by its success, Point-BERT, as a pioneer work in point cloud, proposed masked point modeling (MPM) to pre-train point transformer on large scale unanotated dataset. Despite its great performance, we find the inherent difference between language and point cloud tends to cause ambiguous tokenization for point cloud. For point cloud, there doesn't exist a gold standard for point cloud tokenization. Point-BERT use a discrete Variational AutoEncoder (dVAE) as tokenizer, but it might generate different token ids for semantically-similar patches and generate the same token ids for semantically-dissimilar patches. To tackle above problem, we propose our McP-BERT, a pre-training framework with multi-choice tokens. Specifically, we ease the previous single-choice constraint on patch token ids in Point-BERT, and provide multi-choice token ids for each patch as supervision. Moreover, we utilitze the high-level semantics learned by transformer to further refine our supervision signals. Extensive experiments on point cloud classification, few-shot classification and part segmentation tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained transformer achieves 94.1% accuracy on ModelNet40, 84.28% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN and new state-of-the-art performance on few-shot learning. We also demonstrate that our method not only improves the performance of Point-BERT on all downstream tasks, but also incurs almost no extra computational overhead. The code will be released in https://github.com/fukexue/McP-BERT.
summary: Masked language modeling (MLM) has become one of the most successful self-supervised pre-training task. Inspired by its success, Point-BERT, as a pioneer work in point cloud, proposed masked point modeling (MPM) to pre-train point transformer on large scale unanotated dataset. Despite its great performance, we find the inherent difference between language and point cloud tends to cause ambiguous tokenization for point cloud. For point cloud, there doesn't exist a gold standard for point cloud tokenization. Point-BERT use a discrete Variational AutoEncoder (dVAE) as tokenizer, but it might generate different token ids for semantically-similar patches and generate the same token ids for semantically-dissimilar patches. To tackle above problem, we propose our McP-BERT, a pre-training framework with multi-choice tokens. Specifically, we ease the previous single-choice constraint on patch token ids in Point-BERT, and provide multi-choice token ids for each patch as supervision. Moreover, we utilitze the high-level semantics learned by transformer to further refine our supervision signals. Extensive experiments on point cloud classification, few-shot classification and part segmentation tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained transformer achieves 94.1% accuracy on ModelNet40, 84.28% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN and new state-of-the-art performance on few-shot learning. We also demonstrate that our method not only improves the performance of Point-BERT on all downstream tasks, but also incurs almost no extra computational overhead. The code will be released in https://github.com/fukexue/McP-BERT.
abstract_zh: 掩码语言建模（MLM）已成为最成功的自监督预训练任务之一。受其成功的启发，Point-BERT 作为点云领域的先驱，提出了掩模点建模（MPM），用于在大规模未注释数据集上预训练点变换器。尽管其性能出色，但我们发现语言和点云之间的固有差异往往会导致点云的标记化不明确。对于点云，不存在点云标记化的黄金标准。 Point-BERT 使用离散变分自动编码器 (dVAE) 作为分词器，但它可能会为语义相似的补丁生成不同的 token id，并为语义不相似的补丁生成相同的 token id。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了 McP-BERT，一种具有多选择标记的预训练框架。具体来说，我们放松了之前 Point-BERT 中对补丁 token id 的单选约束，并为每个补丁提供多选 token id 作为监督。此外，我们利用 Transformer 学到的高级语义来进一步细化我们的监督信号。在点云分类、少样本分类和零件分割任务上的大量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，例如，预训练的 Transformer 在 ModelNet40 上实现了 94.1% 的准确率，在 ScanObjectNN 最困难的设置上实现了 84.28% 的准确率，并且在少样本学习上实现了新的最先进的性能。我们还证明，我们的方法不仅提高了 Point-BERT 在所有下游任务上的性能，而且几乎不会产生额外的计算开销。代码将在 https://github.com/fukexue/McP-BERT 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出McP-BERT预训练框架，通过多选标记机制改进点云处理模型Point-BERT的性能。
AI.motivation: Point-BERT使用dVAE分词器时存在语义相似点云块生成不同标记、语义不同块生成相同标记的模糊性问题，影响模型表现。
AI.method: 放松单选标记约束，为每个点云块提供多选标记作为监督，并利用Transformer高层语义优化监督信号。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40达到94.1%准确率，在ScanObjectNN最难设置下达84.28%，少样本学习性能达新SOTA，且计算开销几乎不变。
AI.conclusion: McP-BERT有效提升Point-BERT在下游任务的表现，同时保持较低计算成本，验证了多选标记机制的有效性。

search_text: Boosting Point-BERT by Multi-choice Tokens 通过多选代币提升 Point-BERT Masked language modeling (MLM) has become one of the most successful self-supervised pre-training task. To tackle above problem, we propose our McP-BERT, a pre-training framework with multi-choice tokens. Extensive experiments on point cloud classification, few-shot classification and part segmentation tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method, e.g., the pre-trained transformer achieves 94.1% accuracy on ModelNet40, 84.28% accuracy on the hardest setting of ScanObjectNN and new state-of-the-art performance on few-shot learning. We also demonstrate that our method not only improves the performance of Point-BERT on all downstream tasks, but also incurs almost no extra computational overhead. The code will be released in https://github.com/fukexue/McP-BERT. 掩码语言建模（MLM）已成为最成功的自监督预训练任务之一。受其成功的启发，Point-BERT 作为点云领域的先驱，提出了掩模点建模（MPM），用于在大规模未注释数据集上预训练点变换器。尽管其性能出色，但我们发现语言和点云之间的固有差异往往会导致点云的标记化不明确。对于点云，不存在点云标记化的黄金标准。 Point-BERT 使用离散变分自动编码器 (dVAE) 作为分词器，但它可能会为语义相似的补丁生成不同的 token id，并为语义不相似的补丁生成相同的 token id。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了 McP-BERT，一种具有多选择标记的预训练框架。具体来说，我们放松了之前 Point-BERT 中对补丁 token id 的单选约束，并为每个补丁提供多选 token id 作为监督。此外，我们利用 Transformer 学到的高级语义来进一步细化我们的监督信号。在点云分类、少样本分类和零件分割任务上的大量实验证明了我们方法的优越性，例如，预训练的 Transformer 在 ModelNet40 上实现了 94.1% 的准确率，在 ScanObjectNN 最困难的设置上实现了 84.28% 的准确率，并且在少样本学习上实现了新的最先进的性能。我们还证明，我们的方法不仅提高了 Point-BERT 在所有下游任务上的性能，而且几乎不会产生额外的计算开销。代码将在 https://github.com/fukexue/McP-BERT 发布。 本文提出McP-BERT预训练框架，通过多选标记机制改进点云处理模型Point-BERT的性能。 Kexue Fu,Mingzhi Yuan,Manning Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Kuang-Huei Lee,Ofir Nachum,Tingnan Zhang,Sergio Guadarrama,Jie Tan,Wenhao Yu
title: PI-ARS: Accelerating Evolution-Learned Visual-Locomotion with Predictive Information Representations
title_zh: PI-ARS：通过预测信息表示加速进化学习的视觉运动
comment: To appear at IROS 2022. The supplementary video is available at https://kuanghuei.github.io/piars
comments: To appear at IROS 2022. The supplementary video is available at https://kuanghuei.github.io/piars
abstract: Evolution Strategy (ES) algorithms have shown promising results in training complex robotic control policies due to their massive parallelism capability, simple implementation, effective parameter-space exploration, and fast training time. However, a key limitation of ES is its scalability to large capacity models, including modern neural network architectures. In this work, we develop Predictive Information Augmented Random Search (PI-ARS) to mitigate this limitation by leveraging recent advancements in representation learning to reduce the parameter search space for ES. Namely, PI-ARS combines a gradient-based representation learning technique, Predictive Information (PI), with a gradient-free ES algorithm, Augmented Random Search (ARS), to train policies that can process complex robot sensory inputs and handle highly nonlinear robot dynamics. We evaluate PI-ARS on a set of challenging visual-locomotion tasks where a quadruped robot needs to walk on uneven stepping stones, quincuncial piles, and moving platforms, as well as to complete an indoor navigation task. Across all tasks, PI-ARS demonstrates significantly better learning efficiency and performance compared to the ARS baseline. We further validate our algorithm by demonstrating that the learned policies can successfully transfer to a real quadruped robot, for example, achieving a 100% success rate on the real-world stepping stone environment, dramatically improving prior results achieving 40% success.
summary: Evolution Strategy (ES) algorithms have shown promising results in training complex robotic control policies due to their massive parallelism capability, simple implementation, effective parameter-space exploration, and fast training time. However, a key limitation of ES is its scalability to large capacity models, including modern neural network architectures. In this work, we develop Predictive Information Augmented Random Search (PI-ARS) to mitigate this limitation by leveraging recent advancements in representation learning to reduce the parameter search space for ES. Namely, PI-ARS combines a gradient-based representation learning technique, Predictive Information (PI), with a gradient-free ES algorithm, Augmented Random Search (ARS), to train policies that can process complex robot sensory inputs and handle highly nonlinear robot dynamics. We evaluate PI-ARS on a set of challenging visual-locomotion tasks where a quadruped robot needs to walk on uneven stepping stones, quincuncial piles, and moving platforms, as well as to complete an indoor navigation task. Across all tasks, PI-ARS demonstrates significantly better learning efficiency and performance compared to the ARS baseline. We further validate our algorithm by demonstrating that the learned policies can successfully transfer to a real quadruped robot, for example, achieving a 100% success rate on the real-world stepping stone environment, dramatically improving prior results achieving 40% success.
abstract_zh: 进化策略（ES）算法由于其大规模并行能力、简单的实现、有效的参数空间探索和快速的训练时间，在训练复杂的机器人控制策略方面显示出了可喜的结果。然而，ES 的一个关键限制是它对大容量模型的可扩展性，包括现代神经网络架构。在这项工作中，我们开发了预测信息增强随机搜索（PI-ARS），通过利用表示学习的最新进展来减少 ES 的参数搜索空间，从而缓解这一限制。也就是说，PI-ARS 将基于梯度的表示学习技术、预测信息 (PI) 与无梯度 ES 算法、增强随机搜索 (ARS) 相结合，来训练能够处理复杂机器人感官输入并处理高度非线性机器人动力学的策略。我们在一系列具有挑战性的视觉运动任务上评估 PI-ARS，其中四足机器人需要在不平坦的踏脚石、梅花形桩和移动平台上行走，以及完成室内导航任务。在所有任务中，与 ARS 基线相比，PI-ARS 表现出明显更好的学习效率和表现。我们进一步验证了我们的算法，证明学习到的策略可以成功转移到真正的四足机器人上，例如，在现实世界的垫脚石环境中实现 100% 的成功率，显着改善先前的结果，实现 40% 的成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PI-ARS方法，通过结合预测信息表示与增强随机搜索算法，提升进化策略在复杂视觉运动控制任务中的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 进化策略（ES）虽具备高效训练复杂机器人控制策略的潜力，但难以扩展至大容量模型，限制了其在现代神经网络中的应用。
AI.method: 将基于梯度的预测信息（PI）表征学习技术与无梯度的增强随机搜索（ARS）算法结合，通过压缩参数搜索空间来优化视觉运动控制策略。
AI.result: 在四足机器人视觉运动任务中，PI-ARS相较ARS基线显著提升了学习效率与性能，并成功迁移至真实机器人，实现100%的石板环境通过率。
AI.conclusion: PI-ARS有效解决了ES算法的可扩展性问题，为复杂机器人控制策略的高效训练与实际应用提供了新方法。

authors_text: Ahmad Wisnu Mulyadi,Wonsik Jung,Kwanseok Oh,Jee Seok Yoon,Heung-Il Suk
title: XADLiME: eXplainable Alzheimer's Disease Likelihood Map Estimation via Clinically-guided Prototype Learning
title_zh: XADLiME：通过临床指导原型学习进行可解释的阿尔茨海默病可能性图估计
abstract: Diagnosing Alzheimer's disease (AD) involves a deliberate diagnostic process owing to its innate traits of irreversibility with subtle and gradual progression. These characteristics make AD biomarker identification from structural brain imaging (e.g., structural MRI) scans quite challenging. Furthermore, there is a high possibility of getting entangled with normal aging. We propose a novel deep-learning approach through eXplainable AD Likelihood Map Estimation (XADLiME) for AD progression modeling over 3D sMRIs using clinically-guided prototype learning. Specifically, we establish a set of topologically-aware prototypes onto the clusters of latent clinical features, uncovering an AD spectrum manifold. We then measure the similarities between latent clinical features and well-established prototypes, estimating a "pseudo" likelihood map. By considering this pseudo map as an enriched reference, we employ an estimating network to estimate the AD likelihood map over a 3D sMRI scan. Additionally, we promote the explainability of such a likelihood map by revealing a comprehensible overview from two perspectives: clinical and morphological. During the inference, this estimated likelihood map served as a substitute over unseen sMRI scans for effectively conducting the downstream task while providing thorough explainable states.
summary: Diagnosing Alzheimer's disease (AD) involves a deliberate diagnostic process owing to its innate traits of irreversibility with subtle and gradual progression. These characteristics make AD biomarker identification from structural brain imaging (e.g., structural MRI) scans quite challenging. Furthermore, there is a high possibility of getting entangled with normal aging. We propose a novel deep-learning approach through eXplainable AD Likelihood Map Estimation (XADLiME) for AD progression modeling over 3D sMRIs using clinically-guided prototype learning. Specifically, we establish a set of topologically-aware prototypes onto the clusters of latent clinical features, uncovering an AD spectrum manifold. We then measure the similarities between latent clinical features and well-established prototypes, estimating a "pseudo" likelihood map. By considering this pseudo map as an enriched reference, we employ an estimating network to estimate the AD likelihood map over a 3D sMRI scan. Additionally, we promote the explainability of such a likelihood map by revealing a comprehensible overview from two perspectives: clinical and morphological. During the inference, this estimated likelihood map served as a substitute over unseen sMRI scans for effectively conducting the downstream task while providing thorough explainable states.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 的诊断需要经过深思熟虑的诊断过程，因为其固有的不可逆性和微妙且渐进的进展特征。这些特征使得从结构性脑成像（例如结构性 MRI）扫描中识别 AD 生物标志物非常具有挑战性。此外，与正常衰老相关的可能性也很高。我们通过 eXplainable AD 似然图估计 (XADLiME) 提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于使用临床指导原型学习在 3D sMRI 上进行 AD 进展建模。具体来说，我们在潜在临床特征簇上建立了一组拓扑感知原型，揭示了 AD 谱流形。然后，我们测量潜在临床特征和成熟原型之间的相似性，估计“伪”似然图。通过将此伪图视为丰富的参考，我们采用估计网络来估计 3D sMRI 扫描上的 AD 似然图。此外，我们通过从临床和形态学两个角度揭示可理解的概述来提高这种可能性图的可解释性。在推理过程中，这个估计的似然图可以替代看不见的 sMRI 扫描，以有效地执行下游任务，同时提供彻底的可解释状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于临床引导原型学习的可解释阿尔茨海默病可能性图估计方法XADLiME，用于3D结构磁共振成像（sMRI）的AD进展建模。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）诊断具有不可逆性和隐匿性进展特征，其生物标志物识别易与正常衰老混淆，传统方法难以提供可解释的诊断依据。
AI.method: 通过建立拓扑感知原型集映射临床特征簇，构建AD谱流形；利用原型与临床特征的相似性生成伪可能性图，并以此作为参考训练估计网络生成3D sMRI的AD可能性图，从临床和形态学两方面增强可解释性。
AI.result: 在推理阶段，该估计图可替代未见sMRI扫描进行下游任务，实现诊断准确性与可解释性的双重提升。
AI.conclusion: XADLiME通过临床引导的原型学习框架，为AD诊断提供了兼具预测性能与可解释性的新型深度学习解决方案。

During the inference, this estimated likelihood map served as a substitute over unseen sMRI scans for effectively conducting the downstream task while providing thorough explainable states. 阿尔茨海默氏病 (AD) 的诊断需要经过深思熟虑的诊断过程，因为其固有的不可逆性和微妙且渐进的进展特征。这些特征使得从结构性脑成像（例如结构性 MRI）扫描中识别 AD 生物标志物非常具有挑战性。此外，与正常衰老相关的可能性也很高。我们通过 eXplainable AD 似然图估计 (XADLiME) 提出了一种新颖的深度学习方法，用于使用临床指导原型学习在 3D sMRI 上进行 AD 进展建模。具体来说，我们在潜在临床特征簇上建立了一组拓扑感知原型，揭示了 AD 谱流形。然后，我们测量潜在临床特征和成熟原型之间的相似性，估计“伪”似然图。通过将此伪图视为丰富的参考，我们采用估计网络来估计 3D sMRI 扫描上的 AD 似然图。此外，我们通过从临床和形态学两个角度揭示可理解的概述来提高这种可能性图的可解释性。在推理过程中，这个估计的似然图可以替代看不见的 sMRI 扫描，以有效地执行下游任务，同时提供彻底的可解释状态。 本文提出了一种基于临床引导原型学习的可解释阿尔茨海默病可能性图估计方法XADLiME，用于3D结构磁共振成像（sMRI）的AD进展建模。 Ahmad Wisnu Mulyadi,Wonsik Jung,Kwanseok Oh,Jee Seok Yoon,Heung-Il Suk cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Nihanth W Cherukuru,David A Bailey,Tiffany Fourment,Becca Hatheway,Marika M Holland,Matt Rehme
title: Beyond Visuals : Examining the Experiences of Geoscience Professionals With Vision Disabilities in Accessing Data Visualizations
title_zh: 超越视觉：检查有视力障碍的地球科学专业人员访问数据可视化的经验
abstract: Data visualizations are ubiquitous in all disciplines and have become the primary means of analysing data and communicating insights. However, the predominant reliance on visual encoding of data continues to create accessibility barriers for people who are blind/vision impaired resulting in their under representation in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM) disciplines. This research study seeks to understand the experiences of professionals who are blind/vision impaired in one such STEM discipline (geosciences) in accessing data visualizations. In-depth, semi-structured interviews with seven professionals were conducted to examine the accessibility barriers and areas for improvement to inform accessibility research pertaining to data visualizations through a socio-technical lens. A reflexive thematic analysis revealed the negative impact of visualizations in influencing their career path, lack of data exploration tools for research, barriers in accessing works of peers and mismatched pace of visualization and accessibility research. The article also includes recommendations from the participants to address some of these accessibility barriers.
summary: Data visualizations are ubiquitous in all disciplines and have become the primary means of analysing data and communicating insights. However, the predominant reliance on visual encoding of data continues to create accessibility barriers for people who are blind/vision impaired resulting in their under representation in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM) disciplines. This research study seeks to understand the experiences of professionals who are blind/vision impaired in one such STEM discipline (geosciences) in accessing data visualizations. In-depth, semi-structured interviews with seven professionals were conducted to examine the accessibility barriers and areas for improvement to inform accessibility research pertaining to data visualizations through a socio-technical lens. A reflexive thematic analysis revealed the negative impact of visualizations in influencing their career path, lack of data exploration tools for research, barriers in accessing works of peers and mismatched pace of visualization and accessibility research. The article also includes recommendations from the participants to address some of these accessibility barriers.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化在所有学科中普遍存在，并已成为分析数据和交流见解的主要手段。然而，对数据视觉编码的主要依赖继续为盲人/视力受损者造成访问障碍，导致他们在科学、技术、工程和数学 (STEM) 学科中的代表性不足。这项研究旨在了解 STEM 学科（地球科学）中盲人/视力受损的专业人士在访问数据可视化方面的体验。我们对七名专业人士进行了深入的半结构化访谈，以检查可访问性障碍和需要改进的领域，以便通过社会技术视角为与数据可视化相关的可访问性研究提供信息。反思性主题分析揭示了可视化对职业道路的负面影响、缺乏研究数据探索工具、访问同行作品的障碍以及可视化和可访问性研究的步伐不匹配。本文还包括参与者提出的解决其中一些可访问性障碍的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究地质学领域视障专业人士在获取数据可视化信息中的体验，探讨数据可视化对视障人士的可访问性障碍及改进方向。
AI.motivation: 数据可视化在STEM领域广泛应用，但依赖视觉编码的特性导致视障人士面临显著的可访问性障碍，进而影响其职业发展与学科参与度。
AI.method: 采用半结构化深度访谈法，对七位地质学领域视障专业人士进行访谈，并通过反思性主题分析法提取关键主题。
AI.result: 研究发现数据可视化对视障人士职业路径产生负面影响，缺乏数据探索工具、同行研究成果获取障碍及可视化与无障碍研究进展不匹配等问题。
AI.conclusion: 需从社会技术视角出发，开发适配工具、优化数据呈现方式，并推动跨学科合作以消除数据可视化领域的可访问性壁垒。

authors_text: Ezra Tal,Sertac Karaman
title: Global Incremental Flight Control for Agile Maneuvering of a Tailsitter Flying Wing
title_zh: 用于尾座飞翼敏捷操纵的全局增量飞行控制
comment: 24 pages, 11 figures, videos of the experiments at https://aera.mit.edu/projects/TailsitterAerobatics
comments: 24 pages, 11 figures, videos of the experiments at https://aera.mit.edu/projects/TailsitterAerobatics
abstract: This paper proposes a novel control law for accurate tracking of agile trajectories using a tailsitter flying wing unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that transitions between vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) and forward flight. The global control formulation enables maneuvering throughout the flight envelope, including uncoordinated flight with sideslip. Differential flatness of the nonlinear tailsitter dynamics with a simplified aerodynamics model is shown. Using the flatness transform, the proposed controller incorporates tracking of the position reference along with its derivatives velocity, acceleration and jerk, as well as the yaw reference and yaw rate. The inclusion of jerk and yaw rate references through an angular velocity feedforward term improves tracking of trajectories with fast-changing accelerations. The controller does not depend on extensive aerodynamic modeling but instead uses incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion (INDI) to compute control updates based on only a local input-output relation, resulting in robustness against discrepancies in the simplified aerodynamics equations. Exact inversion of the nonlinear input-output relation is achieved through the derived flatness transform. The resulting control algorithm is extensively evaluated in flight tests, where it demonstrates accurate trajectory tracking and challenging agile maneuvers, such as sideways flight and aggressive transitions while turning.
summary: This paper proposes a novel control law for accurate tracking of agile trajectories using a tailsitter flying wing unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) that transitions between vertical take-off and landing (VTOL) and forward flight. The global control formulation enables maneuvering throughout the flight envelope, including uncoordinated flight with sideslip. Differential flatness of the nonlinear tailsitter dynamics with a simplified aerodynamics model is shown. Using the flatness transform, the proposed controller incorporates tracking of the position reference along with its derivatives velocity, acceleration and jerk, as well as the yaw reference and yaw rate. The inclusion of jerk and yaw rate references through an angular velocity feedforward term improves tracking of trajectories with fast-changing accelerations. The controller does not depend on extensive aerodynamic modeling but instead uses incremental nonlinear dynamic inversion (INDI) to compute control updates based on only a local input-output relation, resulting in robustness against discrepancies in the simplified aerodynamics equations. Exact inversion of the nonlinear input-output relation is achieved through the derived flatness transform. The resulting control algorithm is extensively evaluated in flight tests, where it demonstrates accurate trajectory tracking and challenging agile maneuvers, such as sideways flight and aggressive transitions while turning.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的控制律，使用在垂直起降（VTOL）和前飞之间转换的尾座飞翼无人机（UAV）精确跟踪敏捷轨迹。全局控制公式可以在整个飞行包线内进行机动，包括带有侧滑的不协调飞行。显示了具有简化空气动力学模型的非线性尾座动力学的微分平坦度。使用平坦度变换，所提出的控制器结合了位置参考及其导数速度、加速度和加加速度的跟踪，以及偏航参考和偏航率。通过角速度前馈项包含加加速度和偏航率参考可以改善对快速变化加速度的轨迹的跟踪。该控制器不依赖于广泛的空气动力学建模，而是使用增量非线性动态反演（INDI）来仅基于局部输入输出关系来计算控制更新，从而对简化的空气动力学方程中的差异具有鲁棒性。通过导出的平坦度变换实现了非线性输入输出关系的精确反演。由此产生的控制算法在飞行测试中得到了广泛的评估，它展示了精确的轨迹跟踪和具有挑战性的敏捷机动，例如侧向飞行和转弯时的激进过渡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对尾座飞翼无人机的全局增量飞行控制方法，以实现敏捷轨迹跟踪和垂直起降与前飞模式的过渡。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在复杂飞行包线（如侧滑、快速机动）中存在局限性，且依赖精确气动模型难以适应实际偏差。
AI.method: 基于微分平坦理论和增量非线性动态逆（INDI），通过局部输入输出关系计算控制量，结合位置、速度、加速度、加加速度及偏航角等参考轨迹的前馈补偿。
AI.result: 飞行测试验证了控制器在侧飞、激进转向等高难度机动中的轨迹跟踪精度和鲁棒性，无需复杂气动模型即可实现高敏捷性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过微分平坦变换与INDI结合，实现了无需精确气动建模的全局飞行控制，适用于尾座飞翼无人机的敏捷机动任务。

authors_text: Shirin Shoushtari,Jiaming Liu,Yuyang Hu,Ulugbek S. Kamilov
title: Deep Model-Based Architectures for Inverse Problems under Mismatched Priors
title_zh: 不匹配先验下逆问题的基于深度模型的架构
abstract: There is a growing interest in deep model-based architectures (DMBAs) for solving imaging inverse problems by combining physical measurement models and learned image priors specified using convolutional neural nets (CNNs). For example, well-known frameworks for systematically designing DMBAs include plug-and-play priors (PnP), deep unfolding (DU), and deep equilibrium models (DEQ). While the empirical performance and theoretical properties of DMBAs have been widely investigated, the existing work in the area has primarily focused on their performance when the desired image prior is known exactly. This work addresses the gap in the prior work by providing new theoretical and numerical insights into DMBAs under mismatched CNN priors. Mismatched priors arise naturally when there is a distribution shift between training and testing data, for example, due to test images being from a different distribution than images used for training the CNN prior. They also arise when the CNN prior used for inference is an approximation of some desired statistical estimator (MAP or MMSE). Our theoretical analysis provides explicit error bounds on the solution due to the mismatched CNN priors under a set of clearly specified assumptions. Our numerical results compare the empirical performance of DMBAs under realistic distribution shifts and approximate statistical estimators.
summary: There is a growing interest in deep model-based architectures (DMBAs) for solving imaging inverse problems by combining physical measurement models and learned image priors specified using convolutional neural nets (CNNs). For example, well-known frameworks for systematically designing DMBAs include plug-and-play priors (PnP), deep unfolding (DU), and deep equilibrium models (DEQ). While the empirical performance and theoretical properties of DMBAs have been widely investigated, the existing work in the area has primarily focused on their performance when the desired image prior is known exactly. This work addresses the gap in the prior work by providing new theoretical and numerical insights into DMBAs under mismatched CNN priors. Mismatched priors arise naturally when there is a distribution shift between training and testing data, for example, due to test images being from a different distribution than images used for training the CNN prior. They also arise when the CNN prior used for inference is an approximation of some desired statistical estimator (MAP or MMSE). Our theoretical analysis provides explicit error bounds on the solution due to the mismatched CNN priors under a set of clearly specified assumptions. Our numerical results compare the empirical performance of DMBAs under realistic distribution shifts and approximate statistical estimators.
abstract_zh: 人们对基于深度模型的架构 (DMBA) 越来越感兴趣，该架构通过结合物理测量模型和使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 指定的学习图像先验来解决成像逆问题。例如，用于系统设计 DMBA 的著名框架包括即插即用先验 (PnP)、深度展开 (DU) 和深度均衡模型 (DEQ)。虽然 DMBA 的经验性能和理论特性已被广泛研究，但该领域的现有工作主要集中在准确已知所需图像先验时的性能。 This work addresses the gap in the prior work by providing new theoretical and numerical insights into DMBAs under mismatched CNN priors.当训练数据和测试数据之间存在分布变化时，先验不匹配自然会出现，例如，由于测试图像与用于训练 CNN 先验的图像来自不同的分布。当用于推理的 CNN 先验是某些所需统计估计量（MAP 或 MMSE）的近似值时，也会出现这种情况。由于在一组明确指定的假设下 CNN 先验不匹配，我们的理论分析提供了解决方案的明确误差范围。我们的数值结果比较了 DMBA 在实际分布变化和近似统计估计下的经验表现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在深度模型基于架构（DMBAs）解决逆问题时，当卷积神经网络（CNN）先验与真实分布不匹配时的理论与数值分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注DMBAs在先验已知且精确匹配时的性能，但实际中常因训练与测试数据分布差异或先验近似导致先验不匹配，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 通过理论分析推导不匹配CNN先验下的显式误差界，并设计数值实验比较真实分布偏移和近似统计估计器下的DMBAs性能。
AI.result: 理论推导了误差界，数值实验验证了分布偏移和先验近似对DMBAs性能的影响，揭示了不匹配场景下的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 研究为DMBAs在不匹配先验下的性能提供了理论保障与实证依据，强调了先验与真实分布对齐的重要性。
