authors_text: Rui Duan,Zhe Qu,Shangqing Zhao,Leah Ding,Yao Liu,Zhuo Lu
title: Perception-Aware Attack: Creating Adversarial Music via Reverse-Engineering Human Perception
title_zh: 感知感知攻击：通过逆向工程人类感知来创建对抗性音乐
abstract: Recently, adversarial machine learning attacks have posed serious security threats against practical audio signal classification systems, including speech recognition, speaker recognition, and music copyright detection. Previous studies have mainly focused on ensuring the effectiveness of attacking an audio signal classifier via creating a small noise-like perturbation on the original signal. It is still unclear if an attacker is able to create audio signal perturbations that can be well perceived by human beings in addition to its attack effectiveness. This is particularly important for music signals as they are carefully crafted with human-enjoyable audio characteristics. In this work, we formulate the adversarial attack against music signals as a new perception-aware attack framework, which integrates human study into adversarial attack design. Specifically, we conduct a human study to quantify the human perception with respect to a change of a music signal. We invite human participants to rate their perceived deviation based on pairs of original and perturbed music signals, and reverse-engineer the human perception process by regression analysis to predict the human-perceived deviation given a perturbed signal. The perception-aware attack is then formulated as an optimization problem that finds an optimal perturbation signal to minimize the prediction of perceived deviation from the regressed human perception model. We use the perception-aware framework to design a realistic adversarial music attack against YouTube's copyright detector. Experiments show that the perception-aware attack produces adversarial music with significantly better perceptual quality than prior work.
summary: Recently, adversarial machine learning attacks have posed serious security threats against practical audio signal classification systems, including speech recognition, speaker recognition, and music copyright detection. Previous studies have mainly focused on ensuring the effectiveness of attacking an audio signal classifier via creating a small noise-like perturbation on the original signal. It is still unclear if an attacker is able to create audio signal perturbations that can be well perceived by human beings in addition to its attack effectiveness. This is particularly important for music signals as they are carefully crafted with human-enjoyable audio characteristics. In this work, we formulate the adversarial attack against music signals as a new perception-aware attack framework, which integrates human study into adversarial attack design. Specifically, we conduct a human study to quantify the human perception with respect to a change of a music signal. We invite human participants to rate their perceived deviation based on pairs of original and perturbed music signals, and reverse-engineer the human perception process by regression analysis to predict the human-perceived deviation given a perturbed signal. The perception-aware attack is then formulated as an optimization problem that finds an optimal perturbation signal to minimize the prediction of perceived deviation from the regressed human perception model. We use the perception-aware framework to design a realistic adversarial music attack against YouTube's copyright detector. Experiments show that the perception-aware attack produces adversarial music with significantly better perceptual quality than prior work.
abstract_zh: 最近，对抗性机器学习攻击对实际的音频信号分类系统（包括语音识别、说话人识别和音乐版权检测）构成了严重的安全威胁。以前的研究主要集中在通过对原始信号产生小的类似噪声的扰动来确保攻击音频信号分类器的有效性。目前尚不清楚攻击者除了攻击效果之外是否能够产生人类可以很好感知的音频信号扰动。这对于音乐信号尤其重要，因为它们是根据人类喜爱的音频特性精心制作的。在这项工作中，我们将针对音乐信号的对抗性攻击制定为一种新的感知感知攻击框架，它将人类研究融入到对抗性攻击设计中。具体来说，我们进行了一项人体研究，以量化人类对音乐信号变化的感知。我们邀请人类参与者根据原始和扰动的音乐信号对来评估他们的感知偏差，并通过回归分析对人类感知过程进行逆向工程，以预测给定扰动信号的人类感知偏差。然后，感知感知攻击被表述为一个优化问题，该问题找到最佳扰动信号，以最小化对回归人类感知模型的感知偏差的预测。我们使用感知感知框架来设计针对 YouTube 版权检测器的真实对抗性音乐攻击。实验表明，感知感知攻击产生的对抗性音乐的感知质量明显优于之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种感知感知的对抗攻击框架，通过逆向工程人类听觉感知机制，生成对人类听觉影响小但能有效攻击音频分类系统的对抗音乐。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法生成的音频扰动难以平衡攻击有效性与人类感知隐蔽性，尤其在音乐领域需兼顾人类听觉特性与系统攻击性。
AI.method: 通过人类实验量化音乐信号变化的感知差异，构建回归模型预测感知偏差，并将其作为优化目标，生成最小化人类感知差异的对抗扰动。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法生成的对抗音乐在保持攻击效果的同时，显著优于传统方法的感知隐蔽性，成功攻击YouTube版权检测系统。
AI.conclusion: 融合人类感知模型的对抗攻击框架可有效提升对抗样本的隐蔽性，为音频安全领域提供新的研究方向与防御挑战。

authors_text: Alessandro Casella,Sophia Bano,Francisco Vasconcelos,Anna L. David,Dario Paladini,Jan Deprest,Elena De Momi,Leonardo S. Mattos,Sara Moccia,Danail Stoyanov
title: Learning-Based Keypoint Registration for Fetoscopic Mosaicking
title_zh: 基于学习的胎儿镜镶嵌关键点注册
abstract: In Twin-to-Twin Transfusion Syndrome (TTTS), abnormal vascular anastomoses in the monochorionic placenta can produce uneven blood flow between the two fetuses. In the current practice, TTTS is treated surgically by closing abnormal anastomoses using laser ablation. This surgery is minimally invasive and relies on fetoscopy. Limited field of view makes anastomosis identification a challenging task for the surgeon. To tackle this challenge, we propose a learning-based framework for in-vivo fetoscopy frame registration for field-of-view expansion. The novelties of this framework relies on a learning-based keypoint proposal network and an encoding strategy to filter (i) irrelevant keypoints based on fetoscopic image segmentation and (ii) inconsistent homographies. We validate of our framework on a dataset of 6 intraoperative sequences from 6 TTTS surgeries from 6 different women against the most recent state of the art algorithm, which relies on the segmentation of placenta vessels. The proposed framework achieves higher performance compared to the state of the art, paving the way for robust mosaicking to provide surgeons with context awareness during TTTS surgery.
summary: In Twin-to-Twin Transfusion Syndrome (TTTS), abnormal vascular anastomoses in the monochorionic placenta can produce uneven blood flow between the two fetuses. In the current practice, TTTS is treated surgically by closing abnormal anastomoses using laser ablation. This surgery is minimally invasive and relies on fetoscopy. Limited field of view makes anastomosis identification a challenging task for the surgeon. To tackle this challenge, we propose a learning-based framework for in-vivo fetoscopy frame registration for field-of-view expansion. The novelties of this framework relies on a learning-based keypoint proposal network and an encoding strategy to filter (i) irrelevant keypoints based on fetoscopic image segmentation and (ii) inconsistent homographies. We validate of our framework on a dataset of 6 intraoperative sequences from 6 TTTS surgeries from 6 different women against the most recent state of the art algorithm, which relies on the segmentation of placenta vessels. The proposed framework achieves higher performance compared to the state of the art, paving the way for robust mosaicking to provide surgeons with context awareness during TTTS surgery.
abstract_zh: 在双胎输血综合症（TTTS）中，单绒毛膜胎盘中的异常血管吻合会导致两个胎儿之间的血流不均匀。在目前的实践中，TTTS 通过使用激光消融闭合异常吻合进行手术治疗。该手术是微创手术，依靠胎儿镜检查。有限的视野使得吻合口识别对于外科医生来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于学习的框架，用于体内胎儿镜框架注册以扩展视野。该框架的新颖之处在于基于学习的关键点提议网络和编码策略来过滤（i）基于胎儿图像分割的不相关关键点和（ii）不一致的单应性。我们在来自 6 位不同女性的 6 次 TTTS 手术的 6 个术中序列数据集上，根据最新的最先进算法（依赖于胎盘血管的分割）验证了我们的框架。与现有技术相比，所提出的框架实现了更高的性能，为稳健的镶嵌铺平了道路，从而为外科医生在 TTTS 手术期间提供上下文感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的特征点注册框架，用于胎儿内窥镜拼接，以解决TTTS手术中视野受限导致的异常血管吻合识别难题。
AI.motivation: TTTS手术依赖胎儿镜观察，但受限的视野使异常血管吻合识别困难，需通过拼接技术扩展视野以辅助手术决策。
AI.method: 设计基于深度学习的特征点提案网络，结合分割信息过滤无关特征点，并通过编码策略剔除不一致的单应性变换，实现鲁棒的图像注册。
AI.result: 在6例TTTS手术数据集上验证，相较最新基于胎盘血管分割的算法，所提框架在拼接精度和稳定性上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为胎儿镜手术提供更准确的视野扩展方案，有助于提升TTTS手术中异常血管吻合的识别效率与安全性。

authors_text: Armando Cabrera,Miriam Cha,Prafull Sharma,Michael Newey
title: SAR-to-EO Image Translation with Multi-Conditional Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用多条件对抗网络进行 SAR 到 EO 图像转换
abstract: This paper explores the use of multi-conditional adversarial networks for SAR-to-EO image translation. Previous methods condition adversarial networks only on the input SAR. We show that incorporating multiple complementary modalities such as Google maps and IR can further improve SAR-to-EO image translation especially on preserving sharp edges of manmade objects. We demonstrate effectiveness of our approach on a diverse set of datasets including SEN12MS, DFC2020, and SpaceNet6. Our experimental results suggest that additional information provided by complementary modalities improves the performance of SAR-to-EO image translation compared to the models trained on paired SAR and EO data only. To best of our knowledge, our approach is the first to leverage multiple modalities for improving SAR-to-EO image translation performance.
summary: This paper explores the use of multi-conditional adversarial networks for SAR-to-EO image translation. Previous methods condition adversarial networks only on the input SAR. We show that incorporating multiple complementary modalities such as Google maps and IR can further improve SAR-to-EO image translation especially on preserving sharp edges of manmade objects. We demonstrate effectiveness of our approach on a diverse set of datasets including SEN12MS, DFC2020, and SpaceNet6. Our experimental results suggest that additional information provided by complementary modalities improves the performance of SAR-to-EO image translation compared to the models trained on paired SAR and EO data only. To best of our knowledge, our approach is the first to leverage multiple modalities for improving SAR-to-EO image translation performance.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了使用多条件对抗网络进行 SAR 到 EO 图像转换。以前的方法仅根据输入 SAR 来调节对抗网络。我们表明，结合多种互补模式（例如谷歌地图和红外）可以进一步改善 SAR 到 EO 图像转换，特别是在保留人造物体的锐利边缘方面。我们在包括 SEN12MS、DFC2020 和 SpaceNet6 在内的各种数据集上证明了我们的方法的有效性。我们的实验结果表明，与仅在配对 SAR 和 EO 数据上训练的模型相比，补充模态提供的附加信息提高了 SAR 到 EO 图像转换的性能。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个利用多种模式来提高 SAR 到 EO 图像转换性能的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多条件对抗网络的合成孔径雷达（SAR）到光学（EO）图像翻译方法，通过引入多模态信息提升翻译效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅以SAR图像作为对抗网络条件，难以有效保留人造物体的锐利边缘，而多模态信息可提供互补数据增强翻译质量。
AI.method: 构建多条件对抗网络，结合SAR图像与Google地图、红外（IR）等多模态数据作为条件输入，训练图像翻译模型。
AI.result: 在SEN12MS、DFC2020和SpaceNet6数据集上验证，多模态方法相比仅使用配对SAR/EO数据的模型，在边缘保留和整体视觉质量上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 首次将多模态信息引入SAR-to-EO翻译任务，证明互补模态数据能显著提升图像翻译性能，为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Kevin Osanlou,Christophe Guettier,Tristan Cazenave,Eric Jacopin
title: Planning and Learning: Path-Planning for Autonomous Vehicles, a Review of the Literature
title_zh: 规划与学习：自动驾驶车辆的路径规划，文献综述
abstract: This short review aims to make the reader familiar with state-of-the-art works relating to planning, scheduling and learning. First, we study state-of-the-art planning algorithms. We give a brief introduction of neural networks. Then we explore in more detail graph neural networks, a recent variant of neural networks suited for processing graph-structured inputs. We describe briefly the concept of reinforcement learning algorithms and some approaches designed to date. Next, we study some successful approaches combining neural networks for path-planning. Lastly, we focus on temporal planning problems with uncertainty.
summary: This short review aims to make the reader familiar with state-of-the-art works relating to planning, scheduling and learning. First, we study state-of-the-art planning algorithms. We give a brief introduction of neural networks. Then we explore in more detail graph neural networks, a recent variant of neural networks suited for processing graph-structured inputs. We describe briefly the concept of reinforcement learning algorithms and some approaches designed to date. Next, we study some successful approaches combining neural networks for path-planning. Lastly, we focus on temporal planning problems with uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 这篇简短的评论旨在让读者熟悉与计划、日程安排和学习相关的最新作品。首先，我们研究最先进的规划算法。我们简要介绍神经网络。然后我们更详细地探索图神经网络，这是神经网络的最新变体，适合处理图结构输入。我们简要描述强化学习算法的概念和迄今为止设计的一些方法。接下来，我们研究一些结合神经网络进行路径规划的成功方法。最后，我们关注具有不确定性的时间规划问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶车辆路径规划领域的最新文献，涵盖规划算法、神经网络及强化学习等方法。
AI.motivation: 旨在帮助读者了解路径规划、调度与学习的前沿技术，为自动驾驶研究提供方法论参考。
AI.method: 通过文献分析，系统梳理传统规划算法、神经网络（含图神经网络）、强化学习及混合方法，并探讨不确定性下的时序规划问题。
AI.result: 总结了各类方法的适用场景与局限性，指出深度学习与规划算法结合是当前研究热点，未来需解决动态环境下的鲁棒性问题。
AI.conclusion: 路径规划需融合学习与规划优势，未来研究应关注不确定性建模与实时决策优化，以提升自动驾驶安全性与适应性。

method: 通过文献分析，系统梳理传统规划算法、神经网络（含图神经网络）、强化学习及混合方法，并探讨不确定性下的时序规划问题。
result: 总结了各类方法的适用场景与局限性，指出深度学习与规划算法结合是当前研究热点，未来需解决动态环境下的鲁棒性问题。
conclusion: 路径规划需融合学习与规划优势，未来研究应关注不确定性建模与实时决策优化，以提升自动驾驶安全性与适应性。
search_text: Planning and Learning: Path-Planning for Autonomous Vehicles, a Review of the Literature 规划与学习：自动驾驶车辆的路径规划，文献综述 This short review aims to make the reader familiar with state-of-the-art works relating to planning, scheduling and learning. First, we study state-of-the-art planning algorithms. We give a brief introduction of neural networks. Then we explore in more detail graph neural networks, a recent variant of neural networks suited for processing graph-structured inputs. We describe briefly the concept of reinforcement learning algorithms and some approaches designed to date. Next, we study some successful approaches combining neural networks for path-planning. Lastly, we focus on temporal planning problems with uncertainty. 这篇简短的评论旨在让读者熟悉与计划、日程安排和学习相关的最新作品。首先，我们研究最先进的规划算法。我们简要介绍神经网络。然后我们更详细地探索图神经网络，这是神经网络的最新变体，适合处理图结构输入。我们简要描述强化学习算法的概念和迄今为止设计的一些方法。接下来，我们研究一些结合神经网络进行路径规划的成功方法。最后，我们关注具有不确定性的时间规划问题。 本文综述了自动驾驶车辆路径规划领域的最新文献，涵盖规划算法、神经网络及强化学习等方法。 Kevin Osanlou,Christophe Guettier,Tristan Cazenave,Eric Jacopin cs.AI

authors_text: Alireza Aliahmadi,Hamed Nozari,Javid Ghahremani-Nahr,Agnieszka Szmelter-Jarosz
title: Evaluation of key impression of resilient supply chain based on artificial intelligence of things (AIoT)
title_zh: 基于物联网的弹性供应链关键印象评估
abstract: In recent years, the high complexity of the business environment, dynamism and environmental change, uncertainty and concepts such as globalization and increasing competition of organizations in the national and international arena have caused many changes in the equations governing the supply chain. In this case, supply chain organizations must always be prepared for a variety of challenges and dynamic environmental changes. One of the effective solutions to face these challenges is to create a resilient supply chain. Resilient supply chain is able to overcome uncertainties and disruptions in the business environment. The competitive advantage of this supply chain does not depend only on low costs, high quality, reduced latency and high level of service. Rather, it has the ability of the chain to avoid catastrophes and overcome critical situations, and this is the resilience of the supply chain. AI and IoT technologies and their combination, called AIoT, have played a key role in improving supply chain performance in recent years and can therefore increase supply chain resilience. For this reason, in this study, an attempt was made to better understand the impact of these technologies on equity by examining the dimensions and components of the Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT)-based supply chain. Finally, using nonlinear fuzzy decision making method, the most important components of the impact on the resilient smart supply chain are determined. Understanding this assessment can help empower the smart supply chain.
summary: In recent years, the high complexity of the business environment, dynamism and environmental change, uncertainty and concepts such as globalization and increasing competition of organizations in the national and international arena have caused many changes in the equations governing the supply chain. In this case, supply chain organizations must always be prepared for a variety of challenges and dynamic environmental changes. One of the effective solutions to face these challenges is to create a resilient supply chain. Resilient supply chain is able to overcome uncertainties and disruptions in the business environment. The competitive advantage of this supply chain does not depend only on low costs, high quality, reduced latency and high level of service. Rather, it has the ability of the chain to avoid catastrophes and overcome critical situations, and this is the resilience of the supply chain. AI and IoT technologies and their combination, called AIoT, have played a key role in improving supply chain performance in recent years and can therefore increase supply chain resilience. For this reason, in this study, an attempt was made to better understand the impact of these technologies on equity by examining the dimensions and components of the Artificial Intelligence of Things (AIoT)-based supply chain. Finally, using nonlinear fuzzy decision making method, the most important components of the impact on the resilient smart supply chain are determined. Understanding this assessment can help empower the smart supply chain.
abstract_zh: 近年来，商业环境的高度复杂性、活力和环境变化、不确定性和全球化等概念以及国内和国际舞台上组织竞争的加剧导致了供应链管理方程的许多变化。 In this case, supply chain organizations must always be prepared for a variety of challenges and dynamic environmental changes. One of the effective solutions to face these challenges is to create a resilient supply chain. Resilient supply chain is able to overcome uncertainties and disruptions in the business environment. The competitive advantage of this supply chain does not depend only on low costs, high quality, reduced latency and high level of service. Rather, it has the ability of the chain to avoid catastrophes and overcome critical situations, and this is the resilience of the supply chain.近年来，人工智能和物联网技术及其组合（称为 AIoT）在改善供应链绩效方面发挥了关键作用，因此可以提高供应链的弹性。因此，本研究试图通过研究基于人工智能物联网（AIoT）的供应链的维度和组成部分，更好地了解这些技术对公平的影响。最后，利用非线性模糊决策方法，确定了对弹性智能供应链影响最重要的组成部分。 Understanding this assessment can help empower the smart supply chain.

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估基于人工智能物联网（AIoT）的弹性供应链关键影响因素，通过分析AIoT技术对供应链韧性的贡献。
AI.motivation: 由于商业环境复杂性增加和不确定性上升，传统供应链模式难以应对动态变化，需通过AIoT技术提升供应链韧性以增强企业竞争力。
AI.method: 采用非线性模糊决策方法，分析AIoT技术在供应链中的维度与组件，确定对弹性智能供应链影响最大的关键因素。
AI.result: 识别出AIoT技术中对弹性供应链影响最显著的组件，为优化供应链管理提供理论依据。
AI.conclusion: AIoT技术通过关键组件的优化可显著提升供应链韧性，帮助组织应对不确定性并维持竞争优势。

authors_text: Siddharth Ganjoo
title: YOLO and Mask R-CNN for Vehicle Number Plate Identification
title_zh: YOLO 和 Mask R-CNN 用于车牌识别
abstract: License plate scanners have grown in popularity in parking lots during the past few years. In order to quickly identify license plates, traditional plate recognition devices used in parking lots employ a fixed source of light and shooting angles. For skewed angles, such as license plate images taken with ultra-wide angle or fisheye lenses, deformation of the license plate recognition plate can also be quite severe, impairing the ability of standard license plate recognition systems to identify the plate. Mask RCNN gadget that may be utilised for oblique pictures and various shooting angles. The results of the experiments show that the suggested design will be capable of classifying license plates with bevel angles larger than 0/60. Character recognition using the suggested Mask R-CNN approach has advanced significantly as well. The proposed Mask R-CNN method has also achieved significant progress in character recognition, which is tilted more than 45 degrees as compared to the strategy of employing the YOLOv2 model. Experiment results also suggest that the methodology presented in the open data plate collecting is better than other techniques (known as the AOLP dataset).
summary: License plate scanners have grown in popularity in parking lots during the past few years. In order to quickly identify license plates, traditional plate recognition devices used in parking lots employ a fixed source of light and shooting angles. For skewed angles, such as license plate images taken with ultra-wide angle or fisheye lenses, deformation of the license plate recognition plate can also be quite severe, impairing the ability of standard license plate recognition systems to identify the plate. Mask RCNN gadget that may be utilised for oblique pictures and various shooting angles. The results of the experiments show that the suggested design will be capable of classifying license plates with bevel angles larger than 0/60. Character recognition using the suggested Mask R-CNN approach has advanced significantly as well. The proposed Mask R-CNN method has also achieved significant progress in character recognition, which is tilted more than 45 degrees as compared to the strategy of employing the YOLOv2 model. Experiment results also suggest that the methodology presented in the open data plate collecting is better than other techniques (known as the AOLP dataset).
abstract_zh: 过去几年，车牌扫描仪在停车场越来越受欢迎。为了快速识别车牌，传统的停车场车牌识别设备采用固定的光源和拍摄角度。对于倾斜角度，例如使用超广角或鱼眼镜头拍摄的车牌图像，车牌识别板的变形也会相当严重，从而损害标准车牌识别系统识别车牌的能力。 Mask RCNN 小工具，可用于倾斜图像和各种拍摄角度。实验结果表明，所建议的设计能够对斜角大于 0/60 的车牌进行分类。使用建议的 Mask R-CNN 方法进行字符识别也取得了显着进展。所提出的Mask R-CNN方法在字符识别方面也取得了显着的进步，与采用YOLOv2模型的策略相比倾斜了45度以上。实验结果还表明，开放数据板收集中提出的方法优于其他技术（称为 AOLP 数据集）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Mask R-CNN和YOLOv2的车牌识别方法，解决传统设备在倾斜角度下的识别难题。
AI.motivation: 传统停车设备使用固定光源和角度，难以处理超广角或鱼眼镜头导致的车牌变形问题。
AI.method: 采用Mask R-CNN处理倾斜车牌检测，结合AOLP数据集进行优化，并与YOLOv2方法对比验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可识别60度倾斜车牌，字符识别在45度倾斜时优于YOLOv2，AOLP数据集表现更优。
AI.conclusion: Mask R-CNN在倾斜车牌识别任务中优于传统方法，提出的方案有效提升了复杂场景下的识别性能。

authors_text: Sara Sarto,Marcella Cornia,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara
title: Retrieval-Augmented Transformer for Image Captioning
title_zh: 用于图像字幕的检索增强变压器
abstract: Image captioning models aim at connecting Vision and Language by providing natural language descriptions of input images. In the past few years, the task has been tackled by learning parametric models and proposing visual feature extraction advancements or by modeling better multi-modal connections. In this paper, we investigate the development of an image captioning approach with a kNN memory, with which knowledge can be retrieved from an external corpus to aid the generation process. Our architecture combines a knowledge retriever based on visual similarities, a differentiable encoder, and a kNN-augmented attention layer to predict tokens based on the past context and on text retrieved from the external memory. Experimental results, conducted on the COCO dataset, demonstrate that employing an explicit external memory can aid the generation process and increase caption quality. Our work opens up new avenues for improving image captioning models at larger scale.
summary: Image captioning models aim at connecting Vision and Language by providing natural language descriptions of input images. In the past few years, the task has been tackled by learning parametric models and proposing visual feature extraction advancements or by modeling better multi-modal connections. In this paper, we investigate the development of an image captioning approach with a kNN memory, with which knowledge can be retrieved from an external corpus to aid the generation process. Our architecture combines a knowledge retriever based on visual similarities, a differentiable encoder, and a kNN-augmented attention layer to predict tokens based on the past context and on text retrieved from the external memory. Experimental results, conducted on the COCO dataset, demonstrate that employing an explicit external memory can aid the generation process and increase caption quality. Our work opens up new avenues for improving image captioning models at larger scale.
abstract_zh: 图像字幕模型旨在通过提供输入图像的自然语言描述来连接视觉和语言。在过去的几年中，该任务是通过学习参数模型并提出视觉特征提取进步或通过建模更好的多模态连接来解决的。在本文中，我们研究了使用 kNN 存储器的图像字幕方法的开发，利用该方法可以从外部语料库中检索知识以帮助生成过程。我们的架构结合了基于视觉相似性的知识检索器、可微分编码器和 kNN 增强注意力层，以根据过去的上下文和从外部记忆检索的文本来预测标记。在 COCO 数据集上进行的实验结果表明，使用显式外部存储器可以帮助生成过程并提高字幕质量。我们的工作为大规模改进图像字幕模型开辟了新途径。

AI.conclusion: 该方法通过外部记忆增强模型，为大规模提升图像描述生成提供了新方向。

search_text: Retrieval-Augmented Transformer for Image Captioning 用于图像字幕的检索增强变压器 Image captioning models aim at connecting Vision and Language by providing natural language descriptions of input images. In the past few years, the task has been tackled by learning parametric models and proposing visual feature extraction advancements or by modeling better multi-modal connections. In this paper, we investigate the development of an image captioning approach with a kNN memory, with which knowledge can be retrieved from an external corpus to aid the generation process. Our architecture combines a knowledge retriever based on visual similarities, a differentiable encoder, and a kNN-augmented attention layer to predict tokens based on the past context and on text retrieved from the external memory. Experimental results, conducted on the COCO dataset, demonstrate that employing an explicit external memory can aid the generation process and increase caption quality. Our work opens up new avenues for improving image captioning models at larger scale. 图像字幕模型旨在通过提供输入图像的自然语言描述来连接视觉和语言。在过去的几年中，该任务是通过学习参数模型并提出视觉特征提取进步或通过建模更好的多模态连接来解决的。在本文中，我们研究了使用 kNN 存储器的图像字幕方法的开发，利用该方法可以从外部语料库中检索知识以帮助生成过程。我们的架构结合了基于视觉相似性的知识检索器、可微分编码器和 kNN 增强注意力层，以根据过去的上下文和从外部记忆检索的文本来预测标记。在 COCO 数据集上进行的实验结果表明，使用显式外部存储器可以帮助生成过程并提高字幕质量。我们的工作为大规模改进图像字幕模型开辟了新途径。 本文提出一种结合外部记忆的图像描述生成方法，通过检索外部语料库中的知识来增强生成过程。 Sara Sarto,Marcella Cornia,Lorenzo Baraldi,Rita Cucchiara cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.MM

authors_text: Andrea Codegoni,Gabriele Lombardi,Alessandro Ferrari
title: TINYCD: A (Not So) Deep Learning Model For Change Detection
title_zh: TINYCD：用于变化检测的（并非如此）深度学习模型
abstract: In this paper, we present a lightweight and effective change detection model, called TinyCD. This model has been designed to be faster and smaller than current state-of-the-art change detection models due to industrial needs. Despite being from 13 to 140 times smaller than the compared change detection models, and exposing at least a third of the computational complexity, our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art models by at least $1\%$ on both F1 score and IoU on the LEVIR-CD dataset, and more than $8\%$ on the WHU-CD dataset. To reach these results, TinyCD uses a Siamese U-Net architecture exploiting low-level features in a globally temporal and locally spatial way. In addition, it adopts a new strategy to mix features in the space-time domain both to merge the embeddings obtained from the Siamese backbones, and, coupled with an MLP block, it forms a novel space-semantic attention mechanism, the Mix and Attention Mask Block (MAMB). Source code, models and results are available here: https://github.com/AndreaCodegoni/Tiny_model_4_CD
summary: In this paper, we present a lightweight and effective change detection model, called TinyCD. This model has been designed to be faster and smaller than current state-of-the-art change detection models due to industrial needs. Despite being from 13 to 140 times smaller than the compared change detection models, and exposing at least a third of the computational complexity, our model outperforms the current state-of-the-art models by at least $1\%$ on both F1 score and IoU on the LEVIR-CD dataset, and more than $8\%$ on the WHU-CD dataset. To reach these results, TinyCD uses a Siamese U-Net architecture exploiting low-level features in a globally temporal and locally spatial way. In addition, it adopts a new strategy to mix features in the space-time domain both to merge the embeddings obtained from the Siamese backbones, and, coupled with an MLP block, it forms a novel space-semantic attention mechanism, the Mix and Attention Mask Block (MAMB). Source code, models and results are available here: https://github.com/AndreaCodegoni/Tiny_model_4_CD
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级且有效的变更检测模型，称为 TinyCD。由于工业需求，该模型被设计为比当前最先进的变化检测模型更快、更小。尽管比比较的变化检测模型小 13 到 140 倍，并且计算复杂度至少为三分之一，但我们的模型在 LEVIR-CD 数据集上的 F1 分数和 IoU 上都比当前最先进的模型至少高出 $1\%$，在 WHU-CD 数据集上超过 $8\%$。为了达到这些结果，TinyCD 使用 Siamese U-Net 架构，以全局时间和局部空间的方式利用低级特征。此外，它采用了一种新的策略来混合时空域中的特征，以合并从 Siamese 主干网络获得的嵌入，并与 MLP 块相结合，形成一种新颖的空间语义注意机制，即混合和注意掩模块（MAMB）。源代码、模型和结果可在此处获取：https://github.com/AndreaCodegoni/Tiny_model_4_CD

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级且高效的遥感影像变化检测模型TinyCD，旨在满足工业应用中对速度和模型规模的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有变化检测模型体积大、计算复杂度高，难以满足工业场景对实时性和资源效率的要求，因此需要开发更轻量且性能优越的模型。
AI.method: 基于Siamese U-Net架构，结合时空域特征混合策略与新型空间语义注意力机制（MAMB），通过低级特征的全局时序与局部空间利用实现高效检测。
AI.result: 在LEVIR-CD数据集上，TinyCD较现有模型F1分数和IoU提升至少1%；在WHU-CD数据集上提升超过8%，同时模型体积缩小13-140倍，计算复杂度降低至少1/3。
AI.conclusion: TinyCD通过创新架构设计在保持高性能的同时显著压缩模型规模，为工业级变化检测提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Soumen Basu,Somanshu Singla,Mayank Gupta,Pratyaksha Rana,Pankaj Gupta,Chetan Arora
title: Unsupervised Contrastive Learning of Image Representations from Ultrasound Videos with Hard Negative Mining
title_zh: 通过硬负挖掘从超声视频中进行图像表示的无监督对比学习
abstract: Rich temporal information and variations in viewpoints make video data an attractive choice for learning image representations using unsupervised contrastive learning (UCL) techniques. State-of-the-art (SOTA) contrastive learning techniques consider frames within a video as positives in the embedding space, whereas the frames from other videos are considered negatives. We observe that unlike multiple views of an object in natural scene videos, an Ultrasound (US) video captures different 2D slices of an organ. Hence, there is almost no similarity between the temporally distant frames of even the same US video. In this paper we propose to instead utilize such frames as hard negatives. We advocate mining both intra-video and cross-video negatives in a hardness-sensitive negative mining curriculum in a UCL framework to learn rich image representations. We deploy our framework to learn the representations of Gallbladder (GB) malignancy from US videos. We also construct the first large-scale US video dataset containing 64 videos and 15,800 frames for learning GB representations. We show that the standard ResNet50 backbone trained with our framework improves the accuracy of models pretrained with SOTA UCL techniques as well as supervised pretrained models on ImageNet for the GB malignancy detection task by 2-6%. We further validate the generalizability of our method on a publicly available lung US image dataset of COVID-19 pathologies and show an improvement of 1.5% compared to SOTA. Source code, dataset, and models are available at https://gbc-iitd.github.io/usucl.
summary: Rich temporal information and variations in viewpoints make video data an attractive choice for learning image representations using unsupervised contrastive learning (UCL) techniques. State-of-the-art (SOTA) contrastive learning techniques consider frames within a video as positives in the embedding space, whereas the frames from other videos are considered negatives. We observe that unlike multiple views of an object in natural scene videos, an Ultrasound (US) video captures different 2D slices of an organ. Hence, there is almost no similarity between the temporally distant frames of even the same US video. In this paper we propose to instead utilize such frames as hard negatives. We advocate mining both intra-video and cross-video negatives in a hardness-sensitive negative mining curriculum in a UCL framework to learn rich image representations. We deploy our framework to learn the representations of Gallbladder (GB) malignancy from US videos. We also construct the first large-scale US video dataset containing 64 videos and 15,800 frames for learning GB representations. We show that the standard ResNet50 backbone trained with our framework improves the accuracy of models pretrained with SOTA UCL techniques as well as supervised pretrained models on ImageNet for the GB malignancy detection task by 2-6%. We further validate the generalizability of our method on a publicly available lung US image dataset of COVID-19 pathologies and show an improvement of 1.5% compared to SOTA. Source code, dataset, and models are available at https://gbc-iitd.github.io/usucl.
abstract_zh: 丰富的时间信息和视点的变化使视频数据成为使用无监督对比学习（UCL）技术学习图像表示的有吸引力的选择。最先进的 (SOTA) 对比学习技术将视频中的帧视为嵌入空间中的正数，而其他视频中的帧则视为负数。我们观察到，与自然场景视频中对象的多个视图不同，超声（美国）视频捕获器官的不同 2D 切片。因此，即使是同一个美国视频，时间上遥远的帧之间也几乎不存在相似性。在本文中，我们建议改用此类框架作为硬底片。我们主张在伦敦大学学院框架中的硬度敏感负片挖掘课程中挖掘视频内和跨视频负片，以学习丰富的图像表示。我们部署我们的框架来学习美国视频中胆囊 (GB) 恶性肿瘤的表征。我们还构建了第一个包含 64 个视频和 15,800 帧的美国大型视频数据集，用于学习 GB 表示。我们表明，使用我们的框架训练的标准 ResNet50 主干网将使用 SOTA UCL 技术预训练的模型以及 ImageNet 上用于 GB 恶性肿瘤检测任务的监督预训练模型的准确性提高了 2-6%。我们在公开的 COVID-19 病理学肺部美国图像数据集上进一步验证了我们的方法的普遍性，并显示与 SOTA 相比提高了 1.5%。源代码、数据集和模型可在 https://gbc-iitd.github.io/usucl 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于硬负样本挖掘的无监督对比学习框架，用于从超声视频中学习图像表示以检测胆囊恶性肿瘤。
AI.motivation: 超声视频中帧间相似度低，传统对比学习方法将同一视频帧视为正样本存在局限，需通过挖掘更有效的负样本提升表示学习效果。
AI.method: 设计硬度敏感的负样本挖掘课程，在无监督对比学习框架中同时利用视频内时序远距离帧（硬负样本）和跨视频帧作为负样本，并构建包含64个视频的胆囊超声数据集。
AI.result: ResNet50主干网络在胆囊恶性肿瘤检测任务上较SOTA无监督方法和ImageNet监督预训练模型提升2-6%，在肺部超声数据集上提升1.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用超声视频的时序特性进行负样本挖掘，可显著提升医学图像表示学习效果，并具有跨任务泛化能力。

ai_content_json.method: 设计硬度敏感的负样本挖掘课程，在无监督对比学习框架中同时利用视频内时序远距离帧（硬负样本）和跨视频帧作为负样本，并构建包含64个视频的胆囊超声数据集。
ai_content_json.result: ResNet50主干网络在胆囊恶性肿瘤检测任务上较SOTA无监督方法和ImageNet监督预训练模型提升2-6%，在肺部超声数据集上提升1.5%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过有效利用超声视频的时序特性进行负样本挖掘，可显著提升医学图像表示学习效果，并具有跨任务泛化能力。

search_text: Unsupervised Contrastive Learning of Image Representations from Ultrasound Videos with Hard Negative Mining 通过硬负挖掘从超声视频中进行图像表示的无监督对比学习 Rich temporal information and variations in viewpoints make video data an attractive choice for learning image representations using unsupervised contrastive learning (UCL) techniques. State-of-the-art (SOTA) contrastive learning techniques consider frames within a video as positives in the embedding space, whereas the frames from other videos are considered negatives. We observe that unlike multiple views of an object in natural scene videos, an Ultrasound (US) video captures different 2D slices of an organ. Hence, there is almost no similarity between the temporally distant frames of even the same US video. In this paper we propose to instead utilize such frames as hard negatives. We advocate mining both intra-video and cross-video negatives in a hardness-sensitive negative mining curriculum in a UCL framework to learn rich image representations. We deploy our framework to learn the representations of Gallbladder (GB) malignancy from US videos. We also construct the first large-scale US video dataset containing 64 videos and 15,800 frames for learning GB representations. We show that the standard ResNet50 backbone trained with our framework improves the accuracy of models pretrained with SOTA UCL techniques as well as supervised pretrained models on ImageNet for the GB malignancy detection task by 2-6%. We further validate the generalizability of our method on a publicly available lung US image dataset of COVID-19 pathologies and show an improvement of 1.5% compared to SOTA. Source code, dataset, and models are available at https://gbc-iitd.github.io/usucl. 丰富的时间信息和视点的变化使视频数据成为使用无监督对比学习（UCL）技术学习图像表示的有吸引力的选择。最先进的 (SOTA) 对比学习技术将视频中的帧视为嵌入空间中的正数，而其他视频中的帧则视为负数。我们观察到，与自然场景视频中对象的多个视图不同，超声（美国）视频捕获器官的不同 2D 切片。因此，即使是同一个美国视频，时间上遥远的帧之间也几乎不存在相似性。在本文中，我们建议改用此类框架作为硬底片。我们主张在伦敦大学学院框架中的硬度敏感负片挖掘课程中挖掘视频内和跨视频负片，以学习丰富的图像表示。我们部署我们的框架来学习美国视频中胆囊 (GB) 恶性肿瘤的表征。我们还构建了第一个包含 64 个视频和 15,800 帧的美国大型视频数据集，用于学习 GB 表示。我们表明，使用我们的框架训练的标准 ResNet50 主干网将使用 SOTA UCL 技术预训练的模型以及 ImageNet 上用于 GB 恶性肿瘤检测任务的监督预训练模型的准确性提高了 2-6%。我们在公开的 COVID-19 病理学肺部美国图像数据集上进一步验证了我们的方法的普遍性，并显示与 SOTA 相比提高了 1.5%。源代码、数据集和模型可在 https://gbc-iitd.github.io/usucl 获取。 本文提出一种基于硬负样本挖掘的无监督对比学习框架，用于从超声视频中学习图像表示以检测胆囊恶性肿瘤。 Soumen Basu,Somanshu Singla,Mayank Gupta,Pratyaksha Rana,Pankaj Gupta,Chetan Arora eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiongkun Linghu,Yan Bai,Yihang Lou,Shengsen Wu,Jinze Li,Jianzhong He,Tao Bai
title: Bayesian Evidential Learning for Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: 用于少样本分类的贝叶斯证据学习
abstract: Few-Shot Classification(FSC) aims to generalize from base classes to novel classes given very limited labeled samples, which is an important step on the path toward human-like machine learning. State-of-the-art solutions involve learning to find a good metric and representation space to compute the distance between samples. Despite the promising accuracy performance, how to model uncertainty for metric-based FSC methods effectively is still a challenge. To model uncertainty, We place a distribution over class probability based on the theory of evidence. As a result, uncertainty modeling and metric learning can be decoupled. To reduce the uncertainty of classification, we propose a Bayesian evidence fusion theorem. Given observed samples, the network learns to get posterior distribution parameters given the prior parameters produced by the pre-trained network. Detailed gradient analysis shows that our method provides a smooth optimization target and can capture the uncertainty. The proposed method is agnostic to metric learning strategies and can be implemented as a plug-and-play module. We integrate our method into several newest FSC methods and demonstrate the improved accuracy and uncertainty quantification on standard FSC benchmarks.
summary: Few-Shot Classification(FSC) aims to generalize from base classes to novel classes given very limited labeled samples, which is an important step on the path toward human-like machine learning. State-of-the-art solutions involve learning to find a good metric and representation space to compute the distance between samples. Despite the promising accuracy performance, how to model uncertainty for metric-based FSC methods effectively is still a challenge. To model uncertainty, We place a distribution over class probability based on the theory of evidence. As a result, uncertainty modeling and metric learning can be decoupled. To reduce the uncertainty of classification, we propose a Bayesian evidence fusion theorem. Given observed samples, the network learns to get posterior distribution parameters given the prior parameters produced by the pre-trained network. Detailed gradient analysis shows that our method provides a smooth optimization target and can capture the uncertainty. The proposed method is agnostic to metric learning strategies and can be implemented as a plug-and-play module. We integrate our method into several newest FSC methods and demonstrate the improved accuracy and uncertainty quantification on standard FSC benchmarks.
abstract_zh: Few-Shot Classification（FSC）旨在在给定非常有限的标记样本的情况下从基类推广到新类，这是迈向类人机器学习道路上的重要一步。最先进的解决方案包括学习找到一个好的度量和表示空间来计算样本之间的距离。尽管精度性能很有前景，但如何有效地对基于度量的 FSC 方法的不确定性进行建模仍然是一个挑战。为了对不确定性进行建模，我们根据证据理论对类别概率进行分布。因此，不确定性建模和度量学习可以解耦。为了减少分类的不确定性，我们提出了贝叶斯证据融合定理。给定观察到的样本，网络根据预训练网络产生的先验参数学习获得后验分布参数。详细的梯度分析表明，我们的方法提供了平滑的优化目标，并且可以捕获不确定性。所提出的方法与度量学习策略无关，并且可以作为即插即用模块来实现。我们将我们的方法集成到几种最新的 FSC 方法中，并在标准 FSC 基准上展示了改进的准确性和不确定性量化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯证据学习的少样本分类方法，通过建模不确定性提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法虽在准确率上表现良好，但如何有效建模不确定性仍存在挑战，需改进不确定性量化能力。
AI.method: 基于证据理论对类别概率建模，提出贝叶斯证据融合定理，通过先验-后验参数学习实现不确定性解耦，并设计可插拔模块集成到现有方法中。
AI.result: 在标准少样本分类基准上，方法在准确率和不确定性量化方面均优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解耦了不确定性建模与度量学习，具有通用性且能提升多种少样本分类模型的性能。

authors_text: Yuri Chervonyi,Praneet Dutta,Piotr Trochim,Octavian Voicu,Cosmin Paduraru,Crystal Qian,Emre Karagozler,Jared Quincy Davis,Richard Chippendale,Gautam Bajaj,Sims Witherspoon,Jerry Luo
title: Semi-analytical Industrial Cooling System Model for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于强化学习的半解析工业冷却系统模型
abstract: We present a hybrid industrial cooling system model that embeds analytical solutions within a multi-physics simulation. This model is designed for reinforcement learning (RL) applications and balances simplicity with simulation fidelity and interpretability. The model's fidelity is evaluated against real world data from a large scale cooling system. This is followed by a case study illustrating how the model can be used for RL research. For this, we develop an industrial task suite that allows specifying different problem settings and levels of complexity, and use it to evaluate the performance of different RL algorithms.
summary: We present a hybrid industrial cooling system model that embeds analytical solutions within a multi-physics simulation. This model is designed for reinforcement learning (RL) applications and balances simplicity with simulation fidelity and interpretability. The model's fidelity is evaluated against real world data from a large scale cooling system. This is followed by a case study illustrating how the model can be used for RL research. For this, we develop an industrial task suite that allows specifying different problem settings and levels of complexity, and use it to evaluate the performance of different RL algorithms.
abstract_zh: We present a hybrid industrial cooling system model that embeds analytical solutions within a multi-physics simulation. This model is designed for reinforcement learning (RL) applications and balances simplicity with simulation fidelity and interpretability. The model's fidelity is evaluated against real world data from a large scale cooling system. This is followed by a case study illustrating how the model can be used for RL research.为此，我们开发了一个工业任务套件，允许指定不同的问题设置和复杂程度，并用它来评估不同 RL 算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种嵌入解析解的混合工业冷却系统模型，用于强化学习研究，平衡模型简化与仿真保真度。
AI.motivation: 传统工业仿真模型存在计算复杂度高或保真度不足的问题，难以满足强化学习算法训练需求。
AI.method: 将解析解嵌入多物理场仿真构建半解析模型，通过真实工业冷却系统数据验证模型保真度，并开发工业任务套件测试RL算法性能。
AI.result: 模型验证显示具有较高保真度，案例研究证明可有效支持RL算法在工业场景的训练与评估。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为工业强化学习提供了兼顾效率与准确性的仿真工具，任务套件可促进RL算法在工业控制领域的研究与应用。

authors_text: Martin Gubri,Maxime Cordy,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon,Koushik Sen
title: LGV: Boosting Adversarial Example Transferability from Large Geometric Vicinity
title_zh: LGV：提高大几何邻近的对抗性示例的可转移性
abstract: We propose transferability from Large Geometric Vicinity (LGV), a new technique to increase the transferability of black-box adversarial attacks. LGV starts from a pretrained surrogate model and collects multiple weight sets from a few additional training epochs with a constant and high learning rate. LGV exploits two geometric properties that we relate to transferability. First, models that belong to a wider weight optimum are better surrogates. Second, we identify a subspace able to generate an effective surrogate ensemble among this wider optimum. Through extensive experiments, we show that LGV alone outperforms all (combinations of) four established test-time transformations by 1.8 to 59.9 percentage points. Our findings shed new light on the importance of the geometry of the weight space to explain the transferability of adversarial examples.
summary: We propose transferability from Large Geometric Vicinity (LGV), a new technique to increase the transferability of black-box adversarial attacks. LGV starts from a pretrained surrogate model and collects multiple weight sets from a few additional training epochs with a constant and high learning rate. LGV exploits two geometric properties that we relate to transferability. First, models that belong to a wider weight optimum are better surrogates. Second, we identify a subspace able to generate an effective surrogate ensemble among this wider optimum. Through extensive experiments, we show that LGV alone outperforms all (combinations of) four established test-time transformations by 1.8 to 59.9 percentage points. Our findings shed new light on the importance of the geometry of the weight space to explain the transferability of adversarial examples.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了大几何邻近（LGV）的可转移性，这是一种提高黑盒对抗攻击可转移性的新技术。 LGV 从预训练的代理模型开始，以恒定且高的学习率从几个额外的训练时期收集多个权重集。 LGV 利用了与可转移性相关的两个几何特性。首先，属于更广泛权重最佳值的模型是更好的替代品。其次，我们确定了一个能够在这个更广泛的最优值中生成有效代理集合的子空间。通过大量的实验，我们表明仅 LGV 就比所有四种已建立的测试时间转换（组合）表现好 1.8 到 59.9 个百分点。我们的研究结果为权重空间的几何形状对于解释对抗性示例的可转移性的重要性提供了新的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LGV方法，通过利用权重空间的几何特性提升对抗样本在黑盒攻击中的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法在提升可迁移性方面存在局限，需探索新的几何视角优化代理模型选择。
AI.method: 从预训练模型出发，通过高学习率微调生成多个权重集，利用宽权重最优区域的代理模型和子空间集成提升攻击效果。
AI.result: LGV在多个数据集上超越现有四种测试时变换方法1.8-59.9个百分点，显著提升攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 权重空间几何结构对对抗样本可迁移性具有关键影响，为攻击方法设计提供新理论视角。

search_text: LGV: Boosting Adversarial Example Transferability from Large Geometric Vicinity LGV：提高大几何邻近的对抗性示例的可转移性 We propose transferability from Large Geometric Vicinity (LGV), a new technique to increase the transferability of black-box adversarial attacks. LGV starts from a pretrained surrogate model and collects multiple weight sets from a few additional training epochs with a constant and high learning rate. LGV exploits two geometric properties that we relate to transferability. First, models that belong to a wider weight optimum are better surrogates. Second, we identify a subspace able to generate an effective surrogate ensemble among this wider optimum. Through extensive experiments, we show that LGV alone outperforms all (combinations of) four established test-time transformations by 1.8 to 59.9 percentage points. Our findings shed new light on the importance of the geometry of the weight space to explain the transferability of adversarial examples. 我们提出了大几何邻近（LGV）的可转移性，这是一种提高黑盒对抗攻击可转移性的新技术。 LGV 从预训练的代理模型开始，以恒定且高的学习率从几个额外的训练时期收集多个权重集。 LGV 利用了与可转移性相关的两个几何特性。首先，属于更广泛权重最佳值的模型是更好的替代品。其次，我们确定了一个能够在这个更广泛的最优值中生成有效代理集合的子空间。通过大量的实验，我们表明仅 LGV 就比所有四种已建立的测试时间转换（组合）表现好 1.8 到 59.9 个百分点。我们的研究结果为权重空间的几何形状对于解释对抗性示例的可转移性的重要性提供了新的启示。 本文提出LGV方法，通过利用权重空间的几何特性提升对抗样本在黑盒攻击中的可迁移性。 Martin Gubri,Maxime Cordy,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon,Koushik Sen cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Rajmohan Rajaraman,David Stalfa,Sheng Yang
title: Scheduling under Non-Uniform Job and Machine Delays
title_zh: 非均匀作业和机器延迟下的调度
abstract: We study the problem of scheduling precedence-constrained jobs on heterogenous machines in the presence of non-uniform job and machine communication delays. We are given as input $n$ unit size precedence-ordered jobs and $m$ related machines such that machine $i$ can execute up to $m_i$ jobs at a time. Each machine $i$ has an in-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i$ and out-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_i$. Likewise, each job $v$ has an in-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v$ and out-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_v$. In a schedule, job $v$ may be executed on machine $i$ at time $t$ if each predecessor $u$ of $v$ is completed on $i$ before time $t$ or on any machine $j$ before time $t - (ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_j + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_u + ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v)$. The goal is to construct a schedule that minimizes makespan. We consider schedules that allow duplication of jobs as well as schedules which do not. When duplication is allowed, we provide an asymptotic $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$-approximation algorithms both when duplication is allowed and when it is not. We also obtain a true $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$-approximation for symmetric machine and job delays. These are the first polylogarithmic approximation algorithms for scheduling with non-uniform communication delays. We also consider a more general model, where the delay can be an arbitrary function of the job and the machine executing it: job $v$ can be executed on machine $i$ at time $t$ if all of $v$'s predecessors are executed on $i$ by time $t-1$ or on any machine by time $t - ρ_{v,i}$. We present an approximation-preserving reduction from the Unique Machines Precedence-constrained Scheduling (UMPS) problem, first defined in [DKRSTZ22], to this job-machine delay model. The reduction entails logarithmic hardness for this delay setting, as well as polynomial hardness if the conjectured hardness of UMPS holds.
summary: We study the problem of scheduling precedence-constrained jobs on heterogenous machines in the presence of non-uniform job and machine communication delays. We are given as input $n$ unit size precedence-ordered jobs and $m$ related machines such that machine $i$ can execute up to $m_i$ jobs at a time. Each machine $i$ has an in-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i$ and out-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_i$. Likewise, each job $v$ has an in-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v$ and out-delay $ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_v$. In a schedule, job $v$ may be executed on machine $i$ at time $t$ if each predecessor $u$ of $v$ is completed on $i$ before time $t$ or on any machine $j$ before time $t - (ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_j + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_u + ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v)$. The goal is to construct a schedule that minimizes makespan. We consider schedules that allow duplication of jobs as well as schedules which do not. When duplication is allowed, we provide an asymptotic $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$-approximation algorithms both when duplication is allowed and when it is not. We also obtain a true $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$-approximation for symmetric machine and job delays. These are the first polylogarithmic approximation algorithms for scheduling with non-uniform communication delays. We also consider a more general model, where the delay can be an arbitrary function of the job and the machine executing it: job $v$ can be executed on machine $i$ at time $t$ if all of $v$'s predecessors are executed on $i$ by time $t-1$ or on any machine by time $t - ρ_{v,i}$. We present an approximation-preserving reduction from the Unique Machines Precedence-constrained Scheduling (UMPS) problem, first defined in [DKRSTZ22], to this job-machine delay model. The reduction entails logarithmic hardness for this delay setting, as well as polynomial hardness if the conjectured hardness of UMPS holds.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了在存在不一致作业和机器通信延迟的情况下在异构机器上调度优先级受限作业的问题。我们给出输入 $n$ 单位大小的优先顺序作业和 $m$ 相关机器，以便机器 $i$ 一次最多可以执行 $m_i$ 作业。每台机器$i$都有一个输入延迟$ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i$和输出延迟$ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_i$。同样，每个作业 $v$ 都有一个输入延迟 $ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v$ 和输出延迟 $ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_v$。在调度中，如果 $v$ 的每个前驱 $u$ 在时间 $t$ 之前在 $i$ 上完成，或者在时间 $t 之前在任何机器 $j$ 上完成，则作业 $v$ 可以在时间 $t$ 在机器 $i$ 上执行 - (ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_i + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_j + ρ^{\mathrm{out}}_u + ρ^{\mathrm{in}}_v)$。目标是制定一个最大限度缩短完工时间的时间表。我们考虑允许重复作业的时间表以及不允许重复作业的时间表。当允许重复时，我们在允许重复和不允许重复时都提供渐近 $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$ 逼近算法。我们还获得了对称机器和作业延迟的真实 $\mathrm{polylog}(n)$ 近似值。这些是第一个用于非均匀通信延迟调度的多对数近似算法。我们还考虑一个更通用的模型，其中延迟可以是作业和执行它的机器的任意函数：如果$v$的所有前辈都在时间$t-1$在$i$上执行，或者在时间$t - ρ_{v,i}$在任何机器上执行，则作业$v$可以在时间$t$在机器$i$上执行。我们提出了从[DKRSTZ22]中首次定义的独特机器优先约束调度（UMPS）问题到此作业机器延迟模型的近似保留减少。如果 UMPS 的推测硬度成立，则减少需要此延迟设置的对数硬度以及多项式硬度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在非均匀作业和机器通信延迟的情况下，对具有优先级约束的作业进行异构机器调度的问题，目标是构建最小化makespan的调度方案。
AI.motivation: 现实中的分布式计算系统中，机器异构性和通信延迟普遍存在问题，传统调度算法难以有效处理非均匀延迟带来的复杂性，因此需要设计新的近似算法。
AI.method: 提出允许和不允许作业复制的两种调度模型，结合对称延迟特性设计对数多项式近似算法，并通过将Unique Machines Precedence-constrained Scheduling问题约简到该模型，证明其计算复杂性下界。
AI.result: 首次提出处理非均匀通信延迟的对数多项式近似算法，同时证明了该模型在UMPS问题假设下的对数硬度和多项式硬度下界。
AI.conclusion: 本文为非均匀通信延迟调度问题提供了理论突破，既给出了高效近似算法，又揭示了问题的计算复杂性本质，为后续研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Nirmal Roy,David Maxwell,Claudia Hauff
title: Users and Contemporary SERPs: A (Re-)Investigation Examining User Interactions and Experiences
title_zh: 用户和当代 SERP：检查用户交互和体验的（重新）调查
comment: Figure 2 in the SIGIR proceedings version has a mistake---the legends of Remember and Navigation are flipped. This submission has the correct version of the plot
comments: Figure 2 in the SIGIR proceedings version has a mistake---the legends of Remember and Navigation are flipped. This submission has the correct version of the plot
abstract: The Search Engine Results Page (SERP) has evolved significantly over the last two decades, moving away from the simple ten blue links paradigm to considerably more complex presentations that contain results from multiple verticals and granularities of textual information. Prior works have investigated how user interactions on the SERP are influenced by the presence or absence of heterogeneous content (e.g., images, videos, or news content), the layout of the SERP (list vs. grid layout), and task complexity. In this paper, we reproduce the user studies conducted in prior works-specifically those of Arguello et al. [4] and Siu and Chaparro [29]-to explore to what extent the findings from research conducted five to ten years ago still hold today as the average web user has become accustomed to SERPs with ever-increasing presentational complexity. To this end, we designed and ran a user study with four different SERP interfaces: (i) a heterogeneous grid; (ii) a heterogeneous list; (iii) a simple grid; and (iv) a simple list. We collected the interactions of 41 study participants over 12 search tasks for our analyses. We observed that SERP types and task complexity affect user interactions with search results. We also find evidence to support most (6 out of 8) observations from [4 , 29] indicating that user interactions with different interfaces and to solve tasks of different complexity have remained mostly similar over time.

[4] and Siu and Chaparro [29]-to explore to what extent the findings from research conducted five to ten years ago still hold today as the average web user has become accustomed to SERPs with ever-increasing presentational complexity. To this end, we designed and ran a user study with four different SERP interfaces: (i) a heterogeneous grid; (ii) a heterogeneous list; (iii) a simple grid; and (iv) a simple list. We collected the interactions of 41 study participants over 12 search tasks for our analyses. We observed that SERP types and task complexity affect user interactions with search results. We also find evidence to support most (6 out of 8) observations from [4 , 29] indicating that user interactions with different interfaces and to solve tasks of different complexity have remained mostly similar over time.
abstract_zh: 搜索引擎结果页面 (SERP) 在过去二十年中发生了显着发展，从简单的十个蓝色链接范式转变为包含来自多个垂直和文本信息粒度的结果的相当复杂的演示。先前的工作研究了异构内容（例如图像、视频或新闻内容）的存在或不存在、SERP 的布局（列表与网格布局）和任务复杂性如何影响 SERP 上的用户交互。在本文中，我们重现了先前作品中进行的用户研究，特别是 Arguello 等人的作品。 [4] 以及 Siu 和 Chaparro [29]——探索五到十年前的研究结果在多大程度上仍然适用于今天，因为普通网络用户已经习惯了表现复杂性不断增加的 SERP。为此，我们设计并运行了具有四种不同 SERP 界面的用户研究：(i) 异构网格； (ii) 异构列表； (iii) 一个简单的网格； (iv) 一个简单的清单。我们收集了 41 名研究参与者在 12 项搜索任务中的互动情况以进行分析。我们观察到 SERP 类型和任务复杂性会影响用户与搜索结果的交互。我们还发现证据支持[4, 29]中的大多数（八分之六）观察结果，表明随着时间的推移，用户与不同界面的交互以及解决不同复杂性的任务基本上保持相似。

AI.tldr: 重新检验过去五年至十年间关于用户与复杂SERP互动的研究发现是否仍然适用
AI.motivation: 验证早期研究结果在当今复杂SERP环境下是否依然成立
AI.method: 设计四种SERP界面（异构网格/列表、简单网格/列表），收集41名用户在12个任务中的交互数据
AI.result: 发现SERP类型和任务复杂度影响用户互动，且6项早期观察结果仍成立
AI.conclusion: 用户与不同SERP界面的互动模式随时间变化不大，多数早期发现仍适用

search_text: Users and Contemporary SERPs: A (Re-)Investigation Examining User Interactions and Experiences 用户和当代 SERP：检查用户交互和体验的（重新）调查 The Search Engine Results Page (SERP) has evolved significantly over the last two decades, moving away from the simple ten blue links paradigm to considerably more complex presentations that contain results from multiple verticals and granularities of textual information. Prior works have investigated how user interactions on the SERP are influenced by the presence or absence of heterogeneous content (e.g., images, videos, or news content), the layout of the SERP (list vs. grid layout), and task complexity. In this paper, we reproduce the user studies conducted in prior works-specifically those of Arguello et al. [4] and Siu and Chaparro [29]-to explore to what extent the findings from research conducted five to ten years ago still hold today as the average web user has become accustomed to SERPs with ever-increasing presentational complexity. To this end, we designed and ran a user study with four different SERP interfaces: (i) a heterogeneous grid; (ii) a heterogeneous list; (iii) a simple grid; and (iv) a simple list. We collected the interactions of 41 study participants over 12 search tasks for our analyses. We observed that SERP types and task complexity affect user interactions with search results. We also find evidence to support most (6 out of 8) observations from [4 , 29] indicating that user interactions with different interfaces and to solve tasks of different complexity have remained mostly similar over time. 搜索引擎结果页面 (SERP) 在过去二十年中发生了显着发展，从简单的十个蓝色链接范式转变为包含来自多个垂直和文本信息粒度的结果的相当复杂的演示。先前的工作研究了异构内容（例如图像、视频或新闻内容）的存在或不存在、SERP 的布局（列表与网格布局）和任务复杂性如何影响 SERP 上的用户交互。在本文中，我们重现了先前作品中进行的用户研究，特别是 Arguello 等人的作品。 [4] 以及 Siu 和 Chaparro [29]——探索五到十年前的研究结果在多大程度上仍然适用于今天，因为普通网络用户已经习惯了表现复杂性不断增加的 SERP。为此，我们设计并运行了具有四种不同 SERP 界面的用户研究：(i) 异构网格； (ii) 异构列表； (iii) 一个简单的网格； (iv) 一个简单的清单。我们收集了 41 名研究参与者在 12 项搜索任务中的互动情况以进行分析。我们观察到 SERP 类型和任务复杂性会影响用户与搜索结果的交互。我们还发现证据支持[4, 29]中的大多数（八分之六）观察结果，表明随着时间的推移，用户与不同界面的交互以及解决不同复杂性的任务基本上保持相似。 重新检验过去五年至十年间关于用户与复杂SERP互动的研究发现是否仍然适用 Nirmal Roy,David Maxwell,Claudia Hauff cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Neng Shi,Jiayi Xu,Haoyu Li,Hanqi Guo,Jonathan Woodring,Han-Wei Shen
title: VDL-Surrogate: A View-Dependent Latent-based Model for Parameter Space Exploration of Ensemble Simulations
title_zh: VDL-Surrogate：用于集成仿真参数空间探索的基于视图的潜在模型
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (Proc. IEEE VIS 2022)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics (Proc. IEEE VIS 2022)
abstract: We propose VDL-Surrogate, a view-dependent neural-network-latent-based surrogate model for parameter space exploration of ensemble simulations that allows high-resolution visualizations and user-specified visual mappings. Surrogate-enabled parameter space exploration allows domain scientists to preview simulation results without having to run a large number of computationally costly simulations. Limited by computational resources, however, existing surrogate models may not produce previews with sufficient resolution for visualization and analysis. To improve the efficient use of computational resources and support high-resolution exploration, we perform ray casting from different viewpoints to collect samples and produce compact latent representations. This latent encoding process reduces the cost of surrogate model training while maintaining the output quality. In the model training stage, we select viewpoints to cover the whole viewing sphere and train corresponding VDL-Surrogate models for the selected viewpoints. In the model inference stage, we predict the latent representations at previously selected viewpoints and decode the latent representations to data space. For any given viewpoint, we make interpolations over decoded data at selected viewpoints and generate visualizations with user-specified visual mappings. We show the effectiveness and efficiency of VDL-Surrogate in cosmological and ocean simulations with quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/VDL-Surrogate.
summary: We propose VDL-Surrogate, a view-dependent neural-network-latent-based surrogate model for parameter space exploration of ensemble simulations that allows high-resolution visualizations and user-specified visual mappings. Surrogate-enabled parameter space exploration allows domain scientists to preview simulation results without having to run a large number of computationally costly simulations. Limited by computational resources, however, existing surrogate models may not produce previews with sufficient resolution for visualization and analysis. To improve the efficient use of computational resources and support high-resolution exploration, we perform ray casting from different viewpoints to collect samples and produce compact latent representations. This latent encoding process reduces the cost of surrogate model training while maintaining the output quality. In the model training stage, we select viewpoints to cover the whole viewing sphere and train corresponding VDL-Surrogate models for the selected viewpoints. In the model inference stage, we predict the latent representations at previously selected viewpoints and decode the latent representations to data space. For any given viewpoint, we make interpolations over decoded data at selected viewpoints and generate visualizations with user-specified visual mappings. We show the effectiveness and efficiency of VDL-Surrogate in cosmological and ocean simulations with quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/VDL-Surrogate.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 VDL-Surrogate，一种基于视图的神经网络潜在代理模型，用于集成模拟的参数空间探索，允许高分辨率可视化和用户指定的视觉映射。支持代理的参数空间探索允许领域科学家预览模拟结果，而无需运行大量计算成本较高的模拟。然而，受计算资源的限制，现有的替代模型可能无法生成具有足够分辨率的预览来进行可视化和分析。为了提高计算资源的有效利用并支持高分辨率探索，我们从不同的角度进行射线投射以收集样本并生成紧凑的潜在表示。 This latent encoding process reduces the cost of surrogate model training while maintaining the output quality.在模型训练阶段，我们选择覆盖整个视域的视点，并为所选视点训练相应的VDL-Surrogate模型。在模型推理阶段，我们预测先前选择的视点的潜在表示并将潜在表示解码到数据空间。对于任何给定的视点，我们对选定视点的解码数据进行插值，并使用用户指定的视觉映射生成可视化效果。 We show the effectiveness and efficiency of VDL-Surrogate in cosmological and ocean simulations with quantitative and qualitative evaluations. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/trainsn/VDL-Surrogate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VDL-Surrogate，一种基于视角的潜在变量代理模型，用于高效探索集成模拟的参数空间，支持高分辨率可视化。
AI.motivation: 现有代理模型受限于计算资源，难以生成足够分辨率的可视化结果，无法满足科学分析需求。
AI.method: 通过多视角光线投射采集样本生成紧凑潜在表示，训练视角相关的代理模型，并在推理阶段通过视角插值生成用户自定义的可视化结果。
AI.result: 在宇宙学和海洋模拟中通过定量与定性评估验证了VDL-Surrogate的有效性和效率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: VDL-Surrogate通过潜在表示与视角插值技术，在降低计算成本的同时实现了高分辨率参数空间探索，适用于科学可视化领域。

authors_text: Qiang Chen,Xiaokang Chen,Jian Wang,Shan Zhang,Kun Yao,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Gang Zeng,Jingdong Wang
title: Group DETR: Fast DETR Training with Group-Wise One-to-Many Assignment
title_zh: Group DETR：通过分组一对多分配进行快速 DETR 训练
abstract: Detection transformer (DETR) relies on one-to-one assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to one prediction, for end-to-end detection without NMS post-processing. It is known that one-to-many assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to multiple predictions, succeeds in detection methods such as Faster R-CNN and FCOS. While the naive one-to-many assignment does not work for DETR, and it remains challenging to apply one-to-many assignment for DETR training. In this paper, we introduce Group DETR, a simple yet efficient DETR training approach that introduces a group-wise way for one-to-many assignment. This approach involves using multiple groups of object queries, conducting one-to-one assignment within each group, and performing decoder self-attention separately. It resembles data augmentation with automatically-learned object query augmentation. It is also equivalent to simultaneously training parameter-sharing networks of the same architecture, introducing more supervision and thus improving DETR training. The inference process is the same as DETR trained normally and only needs one group of queries without any architecture modification. Group DETR is versatile and is applicable to various DETR variants. The experiments show that Group DETR significantly speeds up the training convergence and improves the performance of various DETR-based models. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Atten4Vis/GroupDETR}.
summary: Detection transformer (DETR) relies on one-to-one assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to one prediction, for end-to-end detection without NMS post-processing. It is known that one-to-many assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to multiple predictions, succeeds in detection methods such as Faster R-CNN and FCOS. While the naive one-to-many assignment does not work for DETR, and it remains challenging to apply one-to-many assignment for DETR training. In this paper, we introduce Group DETR, a simple yet efficient DETR training approach that introduces a group-wise way for one-to-many assignment. This approach involves using multiple groups of object queries, conducting one-to-one assignment within each group, and performing decoder self-attention separately. It resembles data augmentation with automatically-learned object query augmentation. It is also equivalent to simultaneously training parameter-sharing networks of the same architecture, introducing more supervision and thus improving DETR training. The inference process is the same as DETR trained normally and only needs one group of queries without any architecture modification. Group DETR is versatile and is applicable to various DETR variants. The experiments show that Group DETR significantly speeds up the training convergence and improves the performance of various DETR-based models. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Atten4Vis/GroupDETR}.
abstract_zh: 检测变换器 (DETR) 依赖于一对一分配，将一个真实对象分配给一个预测，以进行端到端检测，无需 NMS 后处理。众所周知，一对多分配（将一个真实对象分配给多个预测）在 Faster R-CNN 和 FCOS 等检测方法中取得了成功。虽然简单的一对多分配不适用于 DETR，但将一对多分配应用于 DETR 训练仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 Group DETR，这是一种简单而高效的 DETR 训练方法，它引入了一种用于一对多分配的分组方式。这种方法涉及使用多组对象查询，在每组内进行一对一分配，并分别执行解码器自注意力。它类似于通过自动学习的对象查询增强来进行数据增强。也相当于同时训练相同架构的参数共享网络，引入更多的监督，从而改进DETR训练。推理过程与正常训练的DETR相同，只需要一组查询，无需任何架构修改。 DETR 组用途广泛，适用于各种 DETR 变体。实验表明，Group DETR 显着加快了训练收敛速度，并提高了各种基于 DETR 的模型的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Atten4Vis/GroupDETR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Group DETR方法，通过分组的一对多分配策略加速DETR训练并提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: DETR传统的一对一匹配导致训练效率低，而其他检测方法的一对多分配在DETR中难以直接应用，需探索更高效的训练策略。
AI.method: 将对象查询分组，组内执行一对一匹配并独立处理解码器自注意力，等效于参数共享网络的并行训练，增强监督信号。
AI.result: 显著加快训练收敛速度，提升多种DETR变体的检测性能，且推理过程无需修改架构。
AI.conclusion: Group DETR通过简单分组机制有效解决了DETR训练效率问题，具有通用性且代码已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Group DETR方法，通过分组的一对多分配策略加速DETR训练并提升检测性能。
ai_content.motivation: DETR传统的一对一匹配导致训练效率低，而其他检测方法的一对多分配在DETR中难以直接应用，需探索更高效的训练策略。

search_text: Group DETR: Fast DETR Training with Group-Wise One-to-Many Assignment Group DETR：通过分组一对多分配进行快速 DETR 训练 Detection transformer (DETR) relies on one-to-one assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to one prediction, for end-to-end detection without NMS post-processing. It is known that one-to-many assignment, assigning one ground-truth object to multiple predictions, succeeds in detection methods such as Faster R-CNN and FCOS. While the naive one-to-many assignment does not work for DETR, and it remains challenging to apply one-to-many assignment for DETR training. In this paper, we introduce Group DETR, a simple yet efficient DETR training approach that introduces a group-wise way for one-to-many assignment. This approach involves using multiple groups of object queries, conducting one-to-one assignment within each group, and performing decoder self-attention separately. It resembles data augmentation with automatically-learned object query augmentation. It is also equivalent to simultaneously training parameter-sharing networks of the same architecture, introducing more supervision and thus improving DETR training. The inference process is the same as DETR trained normally and only needs one group of queries without any architecture modification. Group DETR is versatile and is applicable to various DETR variants. The experiments show that Group DETR significantly speeds up the training convergence and improves the performance of various DETR-based models. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Atten4Vis/GroupDETR}. 检测变换器 (DETR) 依赖于一对一分配，将一个真实对象分配给一个预测，以进行端到端检测，无需 NMS 后处理。众所周知，一对多分配（将一个真实对象分配给多个预测）在 Faster R-CNN 和 FCOS 等检测方法中取得了成功。虽然简单的一对多分配不适用于 DETR，但将一对多分配应用于 DETR 训练仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们介绍了 Group DETR，这是一种简单而高效的 DETR 训练方法，它引入了一种用于一对多分配的分组方式。这种方法涉及使用多组对象查询，在每组内进行一对一分配，并分别执行解码器自注意力。它类似于通过自动学习的对象查询增强来进行数据增强。也相当于同时训练相同架构的参数共享网络，引入更多的监督，从而改进DETR训练。推理过程与正常训练的DETR相同，只需要一组查询，无需任何架构修改。 DETR 组用途广泛，适用于各种 DETR 变体。实验表明，Group DETR 显着加快了训练收敛速度，并提高了各种基于 DETR 的模型的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Atten4Vis/GroupDETR} 获取。 本文提出Group DETR方法，通过分组的一对多分配策略加速DETR训练并提升检测性能。 Qiang Chen,Xiaokang Chen,Jian Wang,Shan Zhang,Kun Yao,Haocheng Feng,Junyu Han,Errui Ding,Gang Zeng,Jingdong Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Radhika Dua,Seongjun Yang,Yixuan Li,Edward Choi
title: Task Agnostic and Post-hoc Unseen Distribution Detection
title_zh: 任务无关和事后未见分布检测
abstract: Despite the recent advances in out-of-distribution(OOD) detection, anomaly detection, and uncertainty estimation tasks, there do not exist a task-agnostic and post-hoc approach. To address this limitation, we design a novel clustering-based ensembling method, called Task Agnostic and Post-hoc Unseen Distribution Detection (TAPUDD) that utilizes the features extracted from the model trained on a specific task. Explicitly, it comprises of TAP-Mahalanobis, which clusters the training datasets' features and determines the minimum Mahalanobis distance of the test sample from all clusters. Further, we propose the Ensembling module that aggregates the computation of iterative TAP-Mahalanobis for a different number of clusters to provide reliable and efficient cluster computation. Through extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, we observe that our approach can detect unseen samples effectively across diverse tasks and performs better or on-par with the existing baselines. To this end, we eliminate the necessity of determining the optimal value of the number of clusters and demonstrate that our method is more viable for large-scale classification tasks.
summary: Despite the recent advances in out-of-distribution(OOD) detection, anomaly detection, and uncertainty estimation tasks, there do not exist a task-agnostic and post-hoc approach. To address this limitation, we design a novel clustering-based ensembling method, called Task Agnostic and Post-hoc Unseen Distribution Detection (TAPUDD) that utilizes the features extracted from the model trained on a specific task. Explicitly, it comprises of TAP-Mahalanobis, which clusters the training datasets' features and determines the minimum Mahalanobis distance of the test sample from all clusters. Further, we propose the Ensembling module that aggregates the computation of iterative TAP-Mahalanobis for a different number of clusters to provide reliable and efficient cluster computation. Through extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets, we observe that our approach can detect unseen samples effectively across diverse tasks and performs better or on-par with the existing baselines. To this end, we eliminate the necessity of determining the optimal value of the number of clusters and demonstrate that our method is more viable for large-scale classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在分布外（OOD）检测、异常检测和不确定性估计任务方面取得了进展，但不存在任务不可知和事后方法。为了解决这个限制，我们设计了一种新颖的基于聚类的集成方法，称为任务无关和事后未见分布检测（TAPUDD），它利用从特定任务训练的模型中提取的特征。明确地，它由 TAP-Mahalanobis 组成，它将训练数据集的特征进行聚类，并确定测试样本与所有聚类的最小 Mahalanobis 距离。此外，我们提出了 Ensembling 模块，该模块聚合不同数量集群的迭代 TAP-Mahalanobis 计算，以提供可靠且高效的集群计算。通过对合成数据集和真实世界数据集的广泛实验，我们观察到我们的方法可以在不同的任务中有效地检测看不见的样本，并且表现更好或与现有基线相当。为此，我们消除了确定聚类数量最佳值的必要性，并证明我们的方法对于大规模分类任务更可行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种任务无关且事后处理的未见分布检测方法TAPUDD，通过聚类集成策略提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖特定任务先验知识，且需预先确定聚类数量，限制了方法的通用性与实用性。
AI.method: 设计基于聚类的集成框架TAPUDD，包含TAP-Mahalanobis模块（计算测试样本到各聚类的最小马氏距离）和集成模块（聚合不同聚类数的计算结果）。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法有效性，检测性能优于或媲美现有基线，且无需人工设定聚类数量。
AI.conclusion: TAPUDD消除了聚类数量选择依赖，为大规模分类任务提供了更实用的未见分布检测方案。

authors_text: Kaylee Burns,Tianhe Yu,Chelsea Finn,Karol Hausman
title: Offline Reinforcement Learning at Multiple Frequencies
title_zh: 多频率离线强化学习
abstract: Leveraging many sources of offline robot data requires grappling with the heterogeneity of such data. In this paper, we focus on one particular aspect of heterogeneity: learning from offline data collected at different control frequencies. Across labs, the discretization of controllers, sampling rates of sensors, and demands of a task of interest may differ, giving rise to a mixture of frequencies in an aggregated dataset. We study how well offline reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms can accommodate data with a mixture of frequencies during training. We observe that the $Q$-value propagates at different rates for different discretizations, leading to a number of learning challenges for off-the-shelf offline RL. We present a simple yet effective solution that enforces consistency in the rate of $Q$-value updates to stabilize learning. By scaling the value of $N$ in $N$-step returns with the discretization size, we effectively balance $Q$-value propagation, leading to more stable convergence. On three simulated robotic control problems, we empirically find that this simple approach outperforms naïve mixing by 50% on average.
summary: Leveraging many sources of offline robot data requires grappling with the heterogeneity of such data. In this paper, we focus on one particular aspect of heterogeneity: learning from offline data collected at different control frequencies. Across labs, the discretization of controllers, sampling rates of sensors, and demands of a task of interest may differ, giving rise to a mixture of frequencies in an aggregated dataset. We study how well offline reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms can accommodate data with a mixture of frequencies during training. We observe that the $Q$-value propagates at different rates for different discretizations, leading to a number of learning challenges for off-the-shelf offline RL. We present a simple yet effective solution that enforces consistency in the rate of $Q$-value updates to stabilize learning. By scaling the value of $N$ in $N$-step returns with the discretization size, we effectively balance $Q$-value propagation, leading to more stable convergence. On three simulated robotic control problems, we empirically find that this simple approach outperforms naïve mixing by 50% on average.
abstract_zh: 利用许多离线机器人数据源需要解决此类数据的异构性。在本文中，我们关注异质性的一个特定方面：从以不同控制频率收集的离线数据中学习。在各个实验室中，控制器的离散化、传感器的采样率以及感兴趣的任务的要求可能会有所不同，从而导致聚合数据集中出现频率混合。我们研究离线强化学习 (RL) 算法在训练期间如何适应混合频率的数据。我们观察到，对于不同的离散化，$Q$ 值以不同的速率传播，这给现成的离线强化学习带来了许多学习挑战。我们提出了一个简单而有效的解决方案，可以强制 $Q$ 值更新速率的一致性以稳定学习。通过将 $N$ 步长回报中的 $N$ 值与离散化大小进行缩放，我们有效地平衡了 $Q$ 值传播，从而实现更稳定的收敛。在三个模拟的机器人控制问题上，我们凭经验发现这种简单的方法平均比朴素混合高 50%。

AI.tldr: 研究离线强化学习中处理多频率数据的挑战及解决方案
AI.motivation: 不同控制频率导致的数据异质性问题，现有方法难以有效处理
AI.method: 通过根据离散化大小缩放N步回报中的N值，平衡Q值传播速率，提升学习稳定性
AI.result: 在三个模拟任务中，该方法平均比简单混合方法提升50%
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了多频率数据下的学习挑战，提升了离线强化学习的性能

authors_text: Ding Jia,Yuhui Yuan,Haodi He,Xiaopei Wu,Haojun Yu,Weihong Lin,Lei Sun,Chao Zhang,Han Hu
title: DETRs with Hybrid Matching
title_zh: 具有混合匹配的 DETR
comment: CVPR 2023. The code is available at: https://github.com/HDETR
comments: CVPR 2023. The code is available at: https://github.com/HDETR
abstract: One-to-one set matching is a key design for DETR to establish its end-to-end capability, so that object detection does not require a hand-crafted NMS (non-maximum suppression) to remove duplicate detections. This end-to-end signature is important for the versatility of DETR, and it has been generalized to broader vision tasks. However, we note that there are few queries assigned as positive samples and the one-to-one set matching significantly reduces the training efficacy of positive samples. We propose a simple yet effective method based on a hybrid matching scheme that combines the original one-to-one matching branch with an auxiliary one-to-many matching branch during training. Our hybrid strategy has been shown to significantly improve accuracy. In inference, only the original one-to-one match branch is used, thus maintaining the end-to-end merit and the same inference efficiency of DETR. The method is named H-DETR, and it shows that a wide range of representative DETR methods can be consistently improved across a wide range of visual tasks, including DeformableDETR, PETRv2, PETR, and TransTrack, among others. The code is available at: https://github.com/HDETR
summary: One-to-one set matching is a key design for DETR to establish its end-to-end capability, so that object detection does not require a hand-crafted NMS (non-maximum suppression) to remove duplicate detections. This end-to-end signature is important for the versatility of DETR, and it has been generalized to broader vision tasks. However, we note that there are few queries assigned as positive samples and the one-to-one set matching significantly reduces the training efficacy of positive samples. We propose a simple yet effective method based on a hybrid matching scheme that combines the original one-to-one matching branch with an auxiliary one-to-many matching branch during training. Our hybrid strategy has been shown to significantly improve accuracy. In inference, only the original one-to-one match branch is used, thus maintaining the end-to-end merit and the same inference efficiency of DETR. The method is named H-DETR, and it shows that a wide range of representative DETR methods can be consistently improved across a wide range of visual tasks, including DeformableDETR, PETRv2, PETR, and TransTrack, among others. The code is available at: https://github.com/HDETR

authors_text: Maryam T. Abdulkhaleq,Tarik A. Rashid,Abeer Alsadoon,Bryar A. Hassan,Mokhtar Mohammadi,Jaza M. Abdullah,Amit Chhabra,Sazan L. Ali,Rawshan N. Othman,Hadil A. Hasan,Sara Azad,Naz A. Mahmood,Sivan S. Abdalrahman,Hezha O. Rasul,Nebojsa Bacanin,S. Vimal
title: Harmony Search: Current Studies and Uses on Healthcare Systems
title_zh: 和谐搜索：医疗保健系统的当前研究和使用
abstract: One of the popular metaheuristic search algorithms is Harmony Search (HS). It has been verified that HS can find solutions to optimization problems due to its balanced exploratory and convergence behavior and its simple and flexible structure. This capability makes the algorithm preferable to be applied in several real-world applications in various fields, including healthcare systems, different engineering fields, and computer science. The popularity of HS urges us to provide a comprehensive survey of the literature on HS and its variants on health systems, analyze its strengths and weaknesses, and suggest future research directions. In this review paper, the current studies and uses of harmony search are studied in four main domains. (i) The variants of HS, including its modifications and hybridization. (ii) Summary of the previous review works. (iii) Applications of HS in healthcare systems. (iv) And finally, an operational framework is proposed for the applications of HS in healthcare systems. The main contribution of this review is intended to provide a thorough examination of HS in healthcare systems while also serving as a valuable resource for prospective scholars who want to investigate or implement this method.
summary: One of the popular metaheuristic search algorithms is Harmony Search (HS). The popularity of HS urges us to provide a comprehensive survey of the literature on HS and its variants on health systems, analyze its strengths and weaknesses, and suggest future research directions. In this review paper, the current studies and uses of harmony search are studied in four main domains. (i) The variants of HS, including its modifications and hybridization. (ii) Summary of the previous review works. (iii) Applications of HS in healthcare systems. (iv) And finally, an operational framework is proposed for the applications of HS in healthcare systems. The main contribution of this review is intended to provide a thorough examination of HS in healthcare systems while also serving as a valuable resource for prospective scholars who want to investigate or implement this method.
abstract_zh: 流行的元启发式搜索算法之一是 Harmony Search (HS)。事实证明，HS由于其平衡的探索和收敛行为以及简单灵活的结构，能够找到优化问题的解决方案。这种能力使得该算法更适合应用于各个领域的多个实际应用，包括医疗保健系统、不同的工程领域和计算机科学。 HS 的流行促使我们对 HS 及其变体卫生系统的文献进行全面调查，分析其优点和缺点，并提出未来的研究方向。在这篇综述论文中，和声搜索的当前研究和应用在四个主要领域进行了研究。 (i) HS 的变体，包括其修饰和杂交。 （二）前期评审工作总结。 (iii) HS 在医疗保健系统中的应用。 (iv) 最后，提出了 HS 在医疗保健系统中应用的操作框架。这篇综述的主要贡献是对医疗保健系统中的 HS 进行彻底的检查，同时也为想要研究或实施该方法的未来学者提供宝贵的资源。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了和声搜索（HS）算法及其变体在医疗系统中的当前研究与应用，分析其优缺点并提出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: HS算法因平衡探索与收敛能力及简单灵活的结构，在医疗系统等多领域应用广泛，需系统梳理其研究现状以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，从HS变体、现有综述总结、医疗系统应用及操作框架四个维度展开分析，并提出适用于医疗系统的HS应用框架。
AI.result: 全面总结了HS在医疗系统的应用案例，识别其优势与局限性，并构建了HS在医疗场景中的操作实施框架。
AI.conclusion: HS算法在医疗优化问题中展现潜力，但需进一步探索其改进变体与跨领域应用，本文为后续研究提供了系统性参考。
