authors_text: Deeraj Nagothu,Ronghua Xu,Yu Chen,Erik Blasch,Alexander Aved
title: DeFakePro: Decentralized DeepFake Attacks Detection using ENF Authentication
title_zh: DeFakePro：使用 ENF 身份验证的去中心化 DeepFake 攻击检测
comment: ef:the IEEE IT Professional, Special Issue on Information Hygiene and the Fight against the Misinformation Info-demic, 2022
comments: ef:the IEEE IT Professional, Special Issue on Information Hygiene and the Fight against the Misinformation Info-demic, 2022
abstract: Advancements in generative models, like Deepfake allows users to imitate a targeted person and manipulate online interactions. It has been recognized that disinformation may cause disturbance in society and ruin the foundation of trust. This article presents DeFakePro, a decentralized consensus mechanism-based Deepfake detection technique in online video conferencing tools. Leveraging Electrical Network Frequency (ENF), an environmental fingerprint embedded in digital media recording, affords a consensus mechanism design called Proof-of-ENF (PoENF) algorithm. The similarity in ENF signal fluctuations is utilized in the PoENF algorithm to authenticate the media broadcasted in conferencing tools. By utilizing the video conferencing setup with malicious participants to broadcast deep fake video recordings to other participants, the DeFakePro system verifies the authenticity of the incoming media in both audio and video channels.
summary: Advancements in generative models, like Deepfake allows users to imitate a targeted person and manipulate online interactions. It has been recognized that disinformation may cause disturbance in society and ruin the foundation of trust. This article presents DeFakePro, a decentralized consensus mechanism-based Deepfake detection technique in online video conferencing tools. Leveraging Electrical Network Frequency (ENF), an environmental fingerprint embedded in digital media recording, affords a consensus mechanism design called Proof-of-ENF (PoENF) algorithm. The similarity in ENF signal fluctuations is utilized in the PoENF algorithm to authenticate the media broadcasted in conferencing tools. By utilizing the video conferencing setup with malicious participants to broadcast deep fake video recordings to other participants, the DeFakePro system verifies the authenticity of the incoming media in both audio and video channels.
abstract_zh: Deepfake 等生成模型的进步允许用户模仿目标人物并操纵在线互动。人们已经认识到，虚假信息可能会引起社会骚乱并破坏信任的基础。本文介绍了 DeFakePro，一种在线视频会议工具中基于去中心化共识机制的 Deepfake 检测技术。利用电网频率（ENF）（一种嵌入数字媒体记录中的环境指纹）提供了一种称为 ENF 证明（PoENF）算法的共识机制设计。 PoENF 算法利用 ENF 信号波动的相似性来验证会议工具中广播的媒体。通过利用与恶意参与者的视频会议设置向其他参与者广播深度伪造的视频记录，DeFakePro 系统验证音频和视频通道中传入媒体的真实性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeFakePro，一种基于ENF认证的去中心化深度伪造检测系统，用于在线视频会议中的媒体真实性验证。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造技术可能导致社会信任危机，现有检测方法存在中心化缺陷，需更可靠且分布式的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析媒体中的电力网络频率（ENF）信号波动，设计Proof-of-ENF共识算法，在音频和视频通道中验证媒体真实性。
AI.result: 系统能有效检测恶意参与者传播的深度伪造视频，提升在线会议中媒体内容的可信度。
AI.conclusion: DeFakePro利用ENF信号与去中心化共识机制，为深度伪造攻击提供了新型检测方案，增强了数字媒体的信任基础。

tldr: 本文提出DeFakePro，一种基于ENF认证的去中心化深度伪造检测系统，用于在线视频会议中的媒体真实性验证。
motivation: 深度伪造技术可能导致社会信任危机，现有检测方法存在中心化缺陷，需更可靠且分布式的解决方案。
method: 通过分析媒体中的电力网络频率（ENF）信号波动，设计Proof-of-ENF共识算法，在音频和视频通道中验证媒体真实性。
result: 系统能有效检测恶意参与者传播的深度伪造视频，提升在线会议中媒体内容的可信度。
conclusion: DeFakePro利用ENF信号与去中心化共识机制，为深度伪造攻击提供了新型检测方案，增强了数字媒体的信任基础。
search_text: DeFakePro: Decentralized DeepFake Attacks Detection using ENF Authentication DeFakePro：使用 ENF 身份验证的去中心化 DeepFake 攻击检测 Advancements in generative models, like Deepfake allows users to imitate a targeted person and manipulate online interactions. It has been recognized that disinformation may cause disturbance in society and ruin the foundation of trust. This article presents DeFakePro, a decentralized consensus mechanism-based Deepfake detection technique in online video conferencing tools. Leveraging Electrical Network Frequency (ENF), an environmental fingerprint embedded in digital media recording, affords a consensus mechanism design called Proof-of-ENF (PoENF) algorithm. The similarity in ENF signal fluctuations is utilized in the PoENF algorithm to authenticate the media broadcasted in conferencing tools. By utilizing the video conferencing setup with malicious participants to broadcast deep fake video recordings to other participants, the DeFakePro system verifies the authenticity of the incoming media in both audio and video channels. Deepfake 等生成模型的进步允许用户模仿目标人物并操纵在线互动。人们已经认识到，虚假信息可能会引起社会骚乱并破坏信任的基础。本文介绍了 DeFakePro，一种在线视频会议工具中基于去中心化共识机制的 Deepfake 检测技术。利用电网频率（ENF）（一种嵌入数字媒体记录中的环境指纹）提供了一种称为 ENF 证明（PoENF）算法的共识机制设计。 PoENF 算法利用 ENF 信号波动的相似性来验证会议工具中广播的媒体。通过利用与恶意参与者的视频会议设置向其他参与者广播深度伪造的视频记录，DeFakePro 系统验证音频和视频通道中传入媒体的真实性。 本文提出DeFakePro，一种基于ENF认证的去中心化深度伪造检测系统，用于在线视频会议中的媒体真实性验证。 Deeraj Nagothu,Ronghua Xu,Yu Chen,Erik Blasch,Alexander Aved cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Trisha Mittal,Ritwik Sinha,Viswanathan Swaminathan,John Collomosse,Dinesh Manocha
title: Video Manipulations Beyond Faces: A Dataset with Human-Machine Analysis
title_zh: 超越面部的视频操作：具有人机分析的数据集
comment: Accepted to WACV2023 - Workshop on Manipulation, Adversarial, and Presentation Attacks in Biometrics
comments: Accepted to WACV2023 - Workshop on Manipulation, Adversarial, and Presentation Attacks in Biometrics
abstract: As tools for content editing mature, and artificial intelligence (AI) based algorithms for synthesizing media grow, the presence of manipulated content across online media is increasing. This phenomenon causes the spread of misinformation, creating a greater need to distinguish between ``real'' and ``manipulated'' content. To this end, we present VideoSham, a dataset consisting of 826 videos (413 real and 413 manipulated). Many of the existing deepfake datasets focus exclusively on two types of facial manipulations -- swapping with a different subject's face or altering the existing face. VideoSham, on the other hand, contains more diverse, context-rich, and human-centric, high-resolution videos manipulated using a combination of 6 different spatial and temporal attacks. Our analysis shows that state-of-the-art manipulation detection algorithms only work for a few specific attacks and do not scale well on VideoSham. We performed a user study on Amazon Mechanical Turk with 1200 participants to understand if they can differentiate between the real and manipulated videos in VideoSham. Finally, we dig deeper into the strengths and weaknesses of performances by humans and SOTA-algorithms to identify gaps that need to be filled with better AI algorithms. We present the dataset at https://github.com/adobe-research/VideoSham-dataset.
summary: As tools for content editing mature, and artificial intelligence (AI) based algorithms for synthesizing media grow, the presence of manipulated content across online media is increasing. This phenomenon causes the spread of misinformation, creating a greater need to distinguish between ``real'' and ``manipulated'' content. To this end, we present VideoSham, a dataset consisting of 826 videos (413 real and 413 manipulated). Many of the existing deepfake datasets focus exclusively on two types of facial manipulations -- swapping with a different subject's face or altering the existing face. VideoSham, on the other hand, contains more diverse, context-rich, and human-centric, high-resolution videos manipulated using a combination of 6 different spatial and temporal attacks. Our analysis shows that state-of-the-art manipulation detection algorithms only work for a few specific attacks and do not scale well on VideoSham. We performed a user study on Amazon Mechanical Turk with 1200 participants to understand if they can differentiate between the real and manipulated videos in VideoSham. Finally, we dig deeper into the strengths and weaknesses of performances by humans and SOTA-algorithms to identify gaps that need to be filled with better AI algorithms. We present the dataset at https://github.com/adobe-research/VideoSham-dataset.
abstract_zh: 随着内容编辑工具的成熟，以及基于人工智能 (AI) 的媒体合成算法的发展，在线媒体上被操纵的内容越来越多。这种现象导致错误信息的传播，从而更需要区分“真实”和“操纵”内容。为此，我们提出了 VideoSham，一个由 826 个视频组成的数据集（413 个真实视频和 413 个经过处理的视频）。许多现有的深度伪造数据集专门关注两种类型的面部操作——与不同主体的面部交换或改变现有的面部。另一方面，VideoSham 包含更加多样化、上下文丰富且以人为中心的高分辨率视频，使用 6 种不同的空间和时间攻击的组合进行操纵。我们的分析表明，最先进的操纵检测算法仅适用于少数特定攻击，并且在 VideoSham 上无法很好地扩展。我们在 Amazon Mechanical Turk 上对 1200 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，以了解他们是否能够区分 VideoSham 中的真实视频和经过处理的视频。最后，我们更深入地研究人类和 SOTA 算法性能的优缺点，以确定需要用更好的人工智能算法来填补的差距。我们在 https://github.com/adobe-research/VideoSham-dataset 上展示该数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VideoSham数据集，包含826个视频（413个真实和413个被篡改），用于分析超越面部的视频篡改检测方法。
AI.motivation: 随着媒体合成技术的发展，网络上的虚假内容增多，亟需有效区分真实与篡改内容，但现有数据集仅关注面部篡改，缺乏多样性。
AI.method: 构建包含6种空间和时间攻击的高分辨率视频数据集，并通过Amazon Mechanical Turk对1200名用户进行测试，对比人类与现有算法的检测性能。
AI.result: 现有先进算法仅对少数攻击有效，人类检测准确率有限，揭示了当前检测技术在复杂场景下的不足。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更鲁棒的AI算法以应对多样化视频篡改，同时强调了数据集对推动研究的重要性。

This phenomenon causes the spread of misinformation, creating a greater need to distinguish between ``real'' and ``manipulated'' content. To this end, we present VideoSham, a dataset consisting of 826 videos (413 real and 413 manipulated). Finally, we dig deeper into the strengths and weaknesses of performances by humans and SOTA-algorithms to identify gaps that need to be filled with better AI algorithms. authors_text: Reuben Tan,Bryan A. Plummer,Kate Saenko,JP Lewis,Avneesh Sud,Thomas Leung
title: NewsStories: Illustrating articles with visual summaries
title_zh: 新闻报道：用视觉摘要来说明文章
abstract: Recent self-supervised approaches have used large-scale image-text datasets to learn powerful representations that transfer to many tasks without finetuning. These methods often assume that there is one-to-one correspondence between its images and their (short) captions. However, many tasks require reasoning about multiple images and long text narratives, such as describing news articles with visual summaries. Thus, we explore a novel setting where the goal is to learn a self-supervised visual-language representation that is robust to varying text length and the number of images. In addition, unlike prior work which assumed captions have a literal relation to the image, we assume images only contain loose illustrative correspondence with the text. To explore this problem, we introduce a large-scale multimodal dataset containing over 31M articles, 22M images and 1M videos. We show that state-of-the-art image-text alignment methods are not robust to longer narratives with multiple images. Finally, we introduce an intuitive baseline that outperforms these methods on zero-shot image-set retrieval by 10% on the GoodNews dataset.
summary: Recent self-supervised approaches have used large-scale image-text datasets to learn powerful representations that transfer to many tasks without finetuning. These methods often assume that there is one-to-one correspondence between its images and their (short) captions. However, many tasks require reasoning about multiple images and long text narratives, such as describing news articles with visual summaries. Thus, we explore a novel setting where the goal is to learn a self-supervised visual-language representation that is robust to varying text length and the number of images. In addition, unlike prior work which assumed captions have a literal relation to the image, we assume images only contain loose illustrative correspondence with the text. To explore this problem, we introduce a large-scale multimodal dataset containing over 31M articles, 22M images and 1M videos. We show that state-of-the-art image-text alignment methods are not robust to longer narratives with multiple images. Finally, we introduce an intuitive baseline that outperforms these methods on zero-shot image-set retrieval by 10% on the GoodNews dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近的自监督方法使用大规模图像文本数据集来学习强大的表示，无需微调即可转移到许多任务。这些方法通常假设其图像与其（短）标题之间存在一一对应的关系。然而，许多任务需要对多个图像和长文本叙述进行推理，例如用视觉摘要描述新闻文章。因此，我们探索了一种新颖的设置，其目标是学习一种自我监督的视觉语言表示，该表示对于不同的文本长度和图像数量具有鲁棒性。此外，与假设标题与图像具有字面关系的先前工作不同，我们假设图像仅包含与文本的松散说明性对应关系。为了探索这个问题，我们引入了一个大规模多模态数据集，其中包含超过 3100 万篇文章、2200 万张图像和 100 万个视频。我们表明，最先进的图像文本对齐方法对于具有多个图像的较长叙述来说并不稳健。最后，我们引入了一个直观的基线，它在 GoodNews 数据集上的零样本图像集检索性能比这些方法高出 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督视觉-语言表示学习方法，用于处理多图像和长文本叙事任务，如新闻文章的视觉摘要生成。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法假设图像与短文本存在一一对应关系，但新闻摘要等任务需要处理多图像和长文本，且图像与文本仅有松散的对应关系，现有方法对此不鲁棒。
AI.method: 引入包含31M文章、22M图像和1M视频的大规模多模态数据集，设计对文本长度和图像数量鲁棒的自监督学习框架，并提出基于松散对应关系的直观基线方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有最先进的图像-文本对齐方法在多图像长文本任务中表现不佳，而本文提出的基线方法在GoodNews数据集的零样本图像集检索任务中提升10%。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为处理复杂多模态叙事任务提供了更鲁棒的视觉-语言表示学习方案，验证了松散对应关系建模的有效性。

Finally, we introduce an intuitive baseline that outperforms these methods on zero-shot image-set retrieval by 10% on the GoodNews dataset. 最近的自监督方法使用大规模图像文本数据集来学习强大的表示，无需微调即可转移到许多任务。这些方法通常假设其图像与其（短）标题之间存在一一对应的关系。然而，许多任务需要对多个图像和长文本叙述进行推理，例如用视觉摘要描述新闻文章。因此，我们探索了一种新颖的设置，其目标是学习一种自我监督的视觉语言表示，该表示对于不同的文本长度和图像数量具有鲁棒性。此外，与假设标题与图像具有字面关系的先前工作不同，我们假设图像仅包含与文本的松散说明性对应关系。为了探索这个问题，我们引入了一个大规模多模态数据集，其中包含超过 3100 万篇文章、2200 万张图像和 100 万个视频。我们表明，最先进的图像文本对齐方法对于具有多个图像的较长叙述来说并不稳健。最后，我们引入了一个直观的基线，它在 GoodNews 数据集上的零样本图像集检索性能比这些方法高出 10%。 本文提出一种自监督视觉-语言表示学习方法，用于处理多图像和长文本叙事任务，如新闻文章的视觉摘要生成。 Reuben Tan,Bryan A. Plummer,Kate Saenko,JP Lewis,Avneesh Sud,Thomas Leung cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Al-Akhir Nayan,Boonserm Kijsirikul,Yuji Iwahori
title: Coronavirus disease situation analysis and prediction using machine learning: a study on Bangladeshi population
title_zh: 使用机器学习进行冠状病毒疾病情况分析和预测：对孟加拉国人口的研究
comment: ef:International Journal of Electrical and Computer Engineering (IJECE), 2022
comments: ef:International Journal of Electrical and Computer Engineering (IJECE), 2022
abstract: During a pandemic, early prognostication of patient infected rates can reduce the death by ensuring treatment facility and proper resource allocation. In recent months, the number of death and infected rates has increased more distinguished than before in Bangladesh. The country is struggling to provide moderate medical treatment to many patients. This study distinguishes machine learning models and creates a prediction system to anticipate the infected and death rate for the coming days. Equipping a dataset with data from March 1, 2020, to August 10, 2021, a multi-layer perceptron (MLP) model was trained. The data was managed from a trusted government website and concocted manually for training purposes. Several test cases determine the model's accuracy and prediction capability. The comparison between specific models assumes that the MLP model has more reliable prediction capability than the support vector regression (SVR) and linear regression model. The model presents a report about the risky situation and impending coronavirus disease (COVID-19) attack. According to the prediction produced by the model, Bangladesh may suffer another COVID-19 attack, where the number of infected cases can be between 929 to 2443 and death cases between 19 to 57.

The comparison between specific models assumes that the MLP model has more reliable prediction capability than the support vector regression (SVR) and linear regression model. The model presents a report about the risky situation and impending coronavirus disease (COVID-19) attack. According to the prediction produced by the model, Bangladesh may suffer another COVID-19 attack, where the number of infected cases can be between 929 to 2443 and death cases between 19 to 57.
abstract_zh: 在大流行期间，早期预测患者感染率可以通过确保治疗设施和适当的资源分配来减少死亡。近几个月来，孟加拉国的死亡人数和感染率比以前增加得更加明显。该国正在努力为许多患者提供适度的医疗服务。这项研究区分了机器学习模型，并创建了一个预测系统来预测未来几天的感染率和死亡率。使用 2020 年 3 月 1 日至 2021 年 8 月 10 日的数据配备数据集，训练多层感知器 (MLP) 模型。这些数据是通过值得信赖的政府网站进行管理的，并出于培训目的而手动编制。几个测试用例决定了模型的准确性和预测能力。具体模型之间的比较假设MLP模型比支持向量回归（SVR）和线性回归模型具有更可靠的预测能力。该模型提供了有关危险情况和即将发生的冠状病毒疾病 (COVID-19) 攻击的报告。根据该模型的预测，孟加拉国可能会再次遭受 COVID-19 袭击，感染病例数可能在 929 至 2443 例之间，死亡病例在 19 至 57 例之间。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用机器学习模型预测孟加拉国新冠感染和死亡人数，以应对医疗资源紧张问题。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情期间，孟加拉国医疗资源不足，需通过预测感染和死亡率提前规划资源分配，减少死亡。
AI.method: 基于2020年3月至2021年8月的政府公开数据，训练多层感知机（MLP）模型，并与支持向量回归（SVR）和线性回归模型对比。
AI.result: 预测孟加拉国可能面临新一轮疫情，感染人数预计929-2443例，死亡人数19-57例，MLP模型预测效果优于其他模型。
AI.conclusion: MLP模型可有效预测疫情趋势，建议政府根据预测结果提前部署医疗资源以应对潜在风险。

authors_text: Arian Bakhtiarnia,Qi Zhang,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Efficient High-Resolution Deep Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 高效高分辨率深度学习：调查
abstract: Cameras in modern devices such as smartphones, satellites and medical equipment are capable of capturing very high resolution images and videos. Such high-resolution data often need to be processed by deep learning models for cancer detection, automated road navigation, weather prediction, surveillance, optimizing agricultural processes and many other applications. Using high-resolution images and videos as direct inputs for deep learning models creates many challenges due to their high number of parameters, computation cost, inference latency and GPU memory consumption. Simple approaches such as resizing the images to a lower resolution are common in the literature, however, they typically significantly decrease accuracy. Several works in the literature propose better alternatives in order to deal with the challenges of high-resolution data and improve accuracy and speed while complying with hardware limitations and time restrictions. This survey describes such efficient high-resolution deep learning methods, summarizes real-world applications of high-resolution deep learning, and provides comprehensive information about available high-resolution datasets.
summary: Cameras in modern devices such as smartphones, satellites and medical equipment are capable of capturing very high resolution images and videos. Such high-resolution data often need to be processed by deep learning models for cancer detection, automated road navigation, weather prediction, surveillance, optimizing agricultural processes and many other applications. Using high-resolution images and videos as direct inputs for deep learning models creates many challenges due to their high number of parameters, computation cost, inference latency and GPU memory consumption. Simple approaches such as resizing the images to a lower resolution are common in the literature, however, they typically significantly decrease accuracy. Several works in the literature propose better alternatives in order to deal with the challenges of high-resolution data and improve accuracy and speed while complying with hardware limitations and time restrictions. This survey describes such efficient high-resolution deep learning methods, summarizes real-world applications of high-resolution deep learning, and provides comprehensive information about available high-resolution datasets.
abstract_zh: 智能手机、卫星和医疗设备等现代设备中的相机能够捕捉非常高分辨率的图像和视频。此类高分辨率数据通常需要通过深度学习模型进行处理，以用于癌症检测、自动道路导航、天气预报、监视、优化农业流程和许多其他应用。使用高分辨率图像和视频作为深度学习模型的直接输入，由于其大量参数、计算成本、推理延迟和 GPU 内存消耗，带来了许多挑战。将图像大小调整为较低分辨率等简单方法在文献中很常见，但是它们通常会显着降低准确性。文献中的一些作品提出了更好的替代方案，以应对高分辨率数据的挑战，提高准确性和速度，同时遵守硬件限制和时间限制。这项调查描述了这种高效的高分辨率深度学习方法，总结了高分辨率深度学习的实际应用，并提供了有关可用高分辨率数据集的全面信息。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了高效处理高分辨率数据的深度学习方法，总结了其应用及数据集。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率图像和视频在医疗、卫星等领域的应用广泛，但直接输入深度学习模型存在计算成本高、内存消耗大等挑战，传统降分辨率方法会损失精度。
AI.method: 系统梳理并分类现有高效高分辨率深度学习技术，总结实际应用场景及公开数据集。
AI.result: 提供了高分辨率深度学习方法的全面分类、典型应用案例及主流数据集的详细信息。
AI.conclusion: 高效处理高分辨率数据的方法在多个领域具有重要价值，未来需进一步优化算法以适应硬件限制。

authors_text: Robin Rombach,Andreas Blattmann,Björn Ommer
title: Text-Guided Synthesis of Artistic Images with Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用检索增强扩散模型进行文本引导的艺术图像合成
abstract: Novel architectures have recently improved generative image synthesis leading to excellent visual quality in various tasks. Of particular note is the field of ``AI-Art'', which has seen unprecedented growth with the emergence of powerful multimodal models such as CLIP. By combining speech and image synthesis models, so-called ``prompt-engineering'' has become established, in which carefully selected and composed sentences are used to achieve a certain visual style in the synthesized image. In this note, we present an alternative approach based on retrieval-augmented diffusion models (RDMs). In RDMs, a set of nearest neighbors is retrieved from an external database during training for each training instance, and the diffusion model is conditioned on these informative samples. During inference (sampling), we replace the retrieval database with a more specialized database that contains, for example, only images of a particular visual style. This provides a novel way to prompt a general trained model after training and thereby specify a particular visual style. As shown by our experiments, this approach is superior to specifying the visual style within the text prompt. We open-source code and model weights at https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion .
summary: Novel architectures have recently improved generative image synthesis leading to excellent visual quality in various tasks. Of particular note is the field of ``AI-Art'', which has seen unprecedented growth with the emergence of powerful multimodal models such as CLIP. By combining speech and image synthesis models, so-called ``prompt-engineering'' has become established, in which carefully selected and composed sentences are used to achieve a certain visual style in the synthesized image. In this note, we present an alternative approach based on retrieval-augmented diffusion models (RDMs). In RDMs, a set of nearest neighbors is retrieved from an external database during training for each training instance, and the diffusion model is conditioned on these informative samples. During inference (sampling), we replace the retrieval database with a more specialized database that contains, for example, only images of a particular visual style. This provides a novel way to prompt a general trained model after training and thereby specify a particular visual style. As shown by our experiments, this approach is superior to specifying the visual style within the text prompt. We open-source code and model weights at https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion .
abstract_zh: 新颖的架构最近改进了生成图像合成，从而在各种任务中实现了出色的视觉质量。特别值得注意的是“人工智能艺术”领域，随着 CLIP 等强大的多模式模型的出现，该领域出现了前所未有的增长。通过将语音和图像合成模型相结合，建立了所谓的“即时工程”，其中使用精心选择和组合的句子来在合成图像中实现某种视觉风格。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于检索增强扩散模型（RDM）的替代方法。在 RDM 中，在每个训练实例的训练期间从外部数据库检索一组最近邻，并且扩散模型以这些信息样本为条件。在推理（采样）过程中，我们将检索数据库替换为更专业的数据库，例如仅包含特定视觉风格的图像。这提供了一种新颖的方法来在训练后提示一般训练模型，从而指定特定的视觉风格。正如我们的实验所示，这种方法优于在文本提示中指定视觉样式。我们在 https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion 开源代码和模型权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于检索增强扩散模型（RDMs）的文本引导艺术图像合成方法，通过训练时检索外部数据库样本并推理时替换为特定风格数据库，实现对生成图像视觉风格的灵活控制。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法依赖文本提示直接指定风格，存在表达局限性。而通过检索增强机制可在模型训练后动态调整风格条件，提供更灵活的控制方式。
AI.method: 在训练阶段为每个样本检索外部数据库的最近邻样本作为条件；推理阶段替换为包含特定视觉风格的专用数据库，通过扩散模型的条件输入实现风格控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在视觉风格指定任务上优于传统文本提示方式，生成图像更符合目标风格且保持高质量。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强扩散模型为艺术图像生成提供了新的条件控制范式，通过分离训练与推理阶段的数据库实现灵活的风格迁移，代码与模型已开源。

search_text: Text-Guided Synthesis of Artistic Images with Retrieval-Augmented Diffusion Models 使用检索增强扩散模型进行文本引导的艺术图像合成 Novel architectures have recently improved generative image synthesis leading to excellent visual quality in various tasks. Of particular note is the field of ``AI-Art'', which has seen unprecedented growth with the emergence of powerful multimodal models such as CLIP. By combining speech and image synthesis models, so-called ``prompt-engineering'' has become established, in which carefully selected and composed sentences are used to achieve a certain visual style in the synthesized image. In this note, we present an alternative approach based on retrieval-augmented diffusion models (RDMs). In RDMs, a set of nearest neighbors is retrieved from an external database during training for each training instance, and the diffusion model is conditioned on these informative samples. During inference (sampling), we replace the retrieval database with a more specialized database that contains, for example, only images of a particular visual style. This provides a novel way to prompt a general trained model after training and thereby specify a particular visual style. As shown by our experiments, this approach is superior to specifying the visual style within the text prompt. We open-source code and model weights at https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion . 新颖的架构最近改进了生成图像合成，从而在各种任务中实现了出色的视觉质量。特别值得注意的是“人工智能艺术”领域，随着 CLIP 等强大的多模式模型的出现，该领域出现了前所未有的增长。通过将语音和图像合成模型相结合，建立了所谓的“即时工程”，其中使用精心选择和组合的句子来在合成图像中实现某种视觉风格。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于检索增强扩散模型（RDM）的替代方法。在 RDM 中，在每个训练实例的训练期间从外部数据库检索一组最近邻，并且扩散模型以这些信息样本为条件。在推理（采样）过程中，我们将检索数据库替换为更专业的数据库，例如仅包含特定视觉风格的图像。这提供了一种新颖的方法来在训练后提示一般训练模型，从而指定特定的视觉风格。正如我们的实验所示，这种方法优于在文本提示中指定视觉样式。我们在 https://github.com/CompVis/latent-diffusion 开源代码和模型权重。 本文提出一种基于检索增强扩散模型（RDMs）的文本引导艺术图像合成方法，通过训练时检索外部数据库样本并推理时替换为特定风格数据库，实现对生成图像视觉风格的灵活控制。 Robin Rombach,Andreas Blattmann,Björn Ommer cs.CV

authors_text: Lin Wu,Lingqiao Liu,Yang Wang,Zheng Zhang,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: Learning Resolution-Adaptive Representations for Cross-Resolution Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 学习跨分辨率人员重新识别的分辨率自适应表示
abstract: The cross-resolution person re-identification (CRReID) problem aims to match low-resolution (LR) query identity images against high resolution (HR) gallery images. It is a challenging and practical problem since the query images often suffer from resolution degradation due to the different capturing conditions from real-world cameras. To address this problem, state-of-the-art (SOTA) solutions either learn the resolution-invariant representation or adopt super-resolution (SR) module to recover the missing information from the LR query. This paper explores an alternative SR-free paradigm to directly compare HR and LR images via a dynamic metric, which is adaptive to the resolution of a query image. We realize this idea by learning resolution-adaptive representations for cross-resolution comparison. Specifically, we propose two resolution-adaptive mechanisms. The first one disentangles the resolution-specific information into different sub-vectors in the penultimate layer of the deep neural networks, and thus creates a varying-length representation. To better extract resolution-dependent information, we further propose to learn resolution-adaptive masks for intermediate residual feature blocks. A novel progressive learning strategy is proposed to train those masks properly. These two mechanisms are combined to boost the performance of CRReID. Experimental results show that the proposed method is superior to existing approaches and achieves SOTA performance on multiple CRReID benchmarks.
summary: The cross-resolution person re-identification (CRReID) problem aims to match low-resolution (LR) query identity images against high resolution (HR) gallery images. It is a challenging and practical problem since the query images often suffer from resolution degradation due to the different capturing conditions from real-world cameras. To address this problem, state-of-the-art (SOTA) solutions either learn the resolution-invariant representation or adopt super-resolution (SR) module to recover the missing information from the LR query. This paper explores an alternative SR-free paradigm to directly compare HR and LR images via a dynamic metric, which is adaptive to the resolution of a query image. We realize this idea by learning resolution-adaptive representations for cross-resolution comparison. Specifically, we propose two resolution-adaptive mechanisms. The first one disentangles the resolution-specific information into different sub-vectors in the penultimate layer of the deep neural networks, and thus creates a varying-length representation. To better extract resolution-dependent information, we further propose to learn resolution-adaptive masks for intermediate residual feature blocks. A novel progressive learning strategy is proposed to train those masks properly. These two mechanisms are combined to boost the performance of CRReID. Experimental results show that the proposed method is superior to existing approaches and achieves SOTA performance on multiple CRReID benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 跨分辨率行人重新识别（CRReID）问题旨在将低分辨率（LR）查询身份图像与高分辨率（HR）图库图像进行匹配。这是一个具有挑战性且实际的问题，因为由于与现实世界相机的捕获条件不同，查询图像经常会遭受分辨率下降的影响。为了解决这个问题，最先进的（SOTA）解决方案要么学习分辨率不变表示，要么采用超分辨率（SR）模块来从 LR 查询中恢复丢失的信息。本文探索了一种替代的无 SR 范例，通过动态指标直接比较 HR 和 LR 图像，该指标可适应查询图像的分辨率。我们通过学习用于跨分辨率比较的分辨率自适应表示来实现这个想法。具体来说，我们提出了两种分辨率自适应机制。第一个将特定于分辨率的信息分解为深度神经网络倒数第二层中的不同子向量，从而创建不同长度的表示。为了更好地提取与分辨率相关的信息，我们进一步建议学习中间残差特征块的分辨率自适应掩模。提出了一种新颖的渐进学习策略来正确训练这些掩模。这两种机制结合起来可以提高 CRReID 的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有方法，并在多个 CRReID 基准上实现了 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需超分辨率模块的跨分辨率行人重识别方法，通过动态适应查询图像分辨率的度量方式直接比较高低分辨率图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖超分辨率恢复或学习分辨率不变表示，但存在计算开销大或信息丢失问题。本文旨在探索更高效且适应分辨率变化的直接比较方案。
AI.method: 提出两种分辨率自适应机制：1) 在网络倒数第二层分离分辨率特定信息为可变长度子向量；2) 为中间残差块设计分辨率自适应掩码，并采用渐进式学习策略训练掩码。
AI.result: 在多个跨分辨率基准测试中取得优于现有方法的SOTA性能，验证了无需超分辨率的自适应表示有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过分辨率自适应表示与掩码机制的结合，实现了高效准确的跨分辨率行人重识别，为CRReID提供了新思路。

authors_text: Deyin Liu,Lin Wu,Haifeng Zhao,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun,Xianghua Xie
title: Jacobian Norm with Selective Input Gradient Regularization for Improved and Interpretable Adversarial Defense
title_zh: 具有选择性输入梯度正则化的雅可比范数，用于改进和可解释的对抗性防御
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples that are crafted with imperceptible perturbations, i.e., a small change in an input image can induce a mis-classification, and thus threatens the reliability of deep learning based deployment systems. Adversarial training (AT) is often adopted to improve robustness through training a mixture of corrupted and clean data. However, most of AT based methods are ineffective in dealing with transferred adversarial examples which are generated to fool a wide spectrum of defense models, and thus cannot satisfy the generalization requirement raised in real-world scenarios. Moreover, adversarially training a defense model in general cannot produce interpretable predictions towards the inputs with perturbations, whilst a highly interpretable robust model is required by different domain experts to understand the behaviour of a DNN. In this work, we propose a novel approach based on Jacobian norm and Selective Input Gradient Regularization (J-SIGR), which suggests the linearized robustness through Jacobian normalization and also regularizes the perturbation-based saliency maps to imitate the model's interpretable predictions. As such, we achieve both the improved defense and high interpretability of DNNs. Finally, we evaluate our method across different architectures against powerful adversarial attacks. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed J-SIGR confers improved robustness against transferred adversarial attacks, and we also show that the predictions from the neural network are easy to interpret.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples that are crafted with imperceptible perturbations, i.e., a small change in an input image can induce a mis-classification, and thus threatens the reliability of deep learning based deployment systems. Adversarial training (AT) is often adopted to improve robustness through training a mixture of corrupted and clean data. However, most of AT based methods are ineffective in dealing with transferred adversarial examples which are generated to fool a wide spectrum of defense models, and thus cannot satisfy the generalization requirement raised in real-world scenarios. Moreover, adversarially training a defense model in general cannot produce interpretable predictions towards the inputs with perturbations, whilst a highly interpretable robust model is required by different domain experts to understand the behaviour of a DNN. In this work, we propose a novel approach based on Jacobian norm and Selective Input Gradient Regularization (J-SIGR), which suggests the linearized robustness through Jacobian normalization and also regularizes the perturbation-based saliency maps to imitate the model's interpretable predictions. As such, we achieve both the improved defense and high interpretability of DNNs. Finally, we evaluate our method across different architectures against powerful adversarial attacks. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed J-SIGR confers improved robustness against transferred adversarial attacks, and we also show that the predictions from the neural network are easy to interpret.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到带有难以察觉的扰动的对抗性示例的影响，即输入图像的微小变化可能会导致错误分类，从而威胁到基于深度学习的部署系统的可靠性。通常采用对抗性训练（AT）来通过训练损坏数据和干净数据的混合来提高鲁棒性。然而，大多数基于 AT 的方法在处理转移的对抗样本方面效果不佳，这些样本是为了欺骗广泛的防御模型而生成的，因此无法满足现实场景中提出的泛化要求。此外，对抗性训练防御模型通常无法对带有扰动的输入产生可解释的预测，而不同领域专家需要高度可解释的鲁棒模型来理解 DNN 的行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于雅可比范数和选择性输入梯度正则化（J-SIGR）的新方法，该方法通过雅可比标准化提出了线性鲁棒性，并且还正则化了基于扰动的显着图以模仿模型的可解释预测。因此，我们实现了 DNN 的改进防御和高可解释性。最后，我们针对强大的对抗性攻击跨不同架构评估了我们的方法。实验表明，所提出的 J-SIGR 提高了针对转移对抗攻击的鲁棒性，并且我们还表明神经网络的预测很容易解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合雅可比范数与选择性输入梯度正则化（J-SIGR）的方法，以提升深度神经网络对抗样本防御能力并增强模型可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在应对跨模型转移攻击时效果有限，且难以生成可解释的预测结果，无法满足实际应用中对模型鲁棒性与可解释性的双重需求。
AI.method: 通过雅可比矩阵归一化实现线性化鲁棒性，并利用选择性输入梯度正则化对扰动显著性图进行约束，使模型预测结果更易解释。
AI.result: 实验表明，J-SIGR方法在多种网络架构下均能有效提升对转移攻击的防御能力，同时显著增强模型预测的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: J-SIGR通过平衡鲁棒性与可解释性，为对抗样本防御提供了更实用的解决方案，适用于需要透明决策的领域场景。

search_text: Jacobian Norm with Selective Input Gradient Regularization for Improved and Interpretable Adversarial Defense 具有选择性输入梯度正则化的雅可比范数，用于改进和可解释的对抗性防御 Deep neural networks (DNNs) are known to be vulnerable to adversarial examples that are crafted with imperceptible perturbations, i.e., a small change in an input image can induce a mis-classification, and thus threatens the reliability of deep learning based deployment systems. Adversarial training (AT) is often adopted to improve robustness through training a mixture of corrupted and clean data. However, most of AT based methods are ineffective in dealing with transferred adversarial examples which are generated to fool a wide spectrum of defense models, and thus cannot satisfy the generalization requirement raised in real-world scenarios. Moreover, adversarially training a defense model in general cannot produce interpretable predictions towards the inputs with perturbations, whilst a highly interpretable robust model is required by different domain experts to understand the behaviour of a DNN. In this work, we propose a novel approach based on Jacobian norm and Selective Input Gradient Regularization (J-SIGR), which suggests the linearized robustness through Jacobian normalization and also regularizes the perturbation-based saliency maps to imitate the model's interpretable predictions. As such, we achieve both the improved defense and high interpretability of DNNs. Finally, we evaluate our method across different architectures against powerful adversarial attacks. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed J-SIGR confers improved robustness against transferred adversarial attacks, and we also show that the predictions from the neural network are easy to interpret. 众所周知，深度神经网络（DNN）很容易受到带有难以察觉的扰动的对抗性示例的影响，即输入图像的微小变化可能会导致错误分类，从而威胁到基于深度学习的部署系统的可靠性。通常采用对抗性训练（AT）来通过训练损坏数据和干净数据的混合来提高鲁棒性。然而，大多数基于 AT 的方法在处理转移的对抗样本方面效果不佳，这些样本是为了欺骗广泛的防御模型而生成的，因此无法满足现实场景中提出的泛化要求。此外，对抗性训练防御模型通常无法对带有扰动的输入产生可解释的预测，而不同领域专家需要高度可解释的鲁棒模型来理解 DNN 的行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于雅可比范数和选择性输入梯度正则化（J-SIGR）的新方法，该方法通过雅可比标准化提出了线性鲁棒性，并且还正则化了基于扰动的显着图以模仿模型的可解释预测。因此，我们实现了 DNN 的改进防御和高可解释性。最后，我们针对强大的对抗性攻击跨不同架构评估了我们的方法。实验表明，所提出的 J-SIGR 提高了针对转移对抗攻击的鲁棒性，并且我们还表明神经网络的预测很容易解释。 本文提出了一种结合雅可比范数与选择性输入梯度正则化（J-SIGR）的方法，以提升深度神经网络对抗样本防御能力并增强模型可解释性。 Deyin Liu,Lin Wu,Haifeng Zhao,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun,Xianghua Xie cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Lin Wu,Deyin Liu,Wenying Zhang,Dapeng Chen,Zongyuan Ge,Farid Boussaid,Mohammed Bennamoun,Jialie Shen
title: Pseudo-Pair based Self-Similarity Learning for Unsupervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 基于伪对的自相似性学习用于无监督人员重新识别
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) is of great importance to video surveillance systems by estimating the similarity between a pair of cross-camera person shorts. Current methods for estimating such similarity require a large number of labeled samples for supervised training. In this paper, we present a pseudo-pair based self-similarity learning approach for unsupervised person re-ID without human annotations. Unlike conventional unsupervised re-ID methods that use pseudo labels based on global clustering, we construct patch surrogate classes as initial supervision, and propose to assign pseudo labels to images through the pairwise gradient-guided similarity separation. This can cluster images in pseudo pairs, and the pseudos can be updated during training. Based on pseudo pairs, we propose to improve the generalization of similarity function via a novel self-similarity learning:it learns local discriminative features from individual images via intra-similarity, and discovers the patch correspondence across images via inter-similarity. The intra-similarity learning is based on channel attention to detect diverse local features from an image. The inter-similarity learning employs a deformable convolution with a non-local block to align patches for cross-image similarity. Experimental results on several re-ID benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-arts.
summary: Person re-identification (re-ID) is of great importance to video surveillance systems by estimating the similarity between a pair of cross-camera person shorts. Current methods for estimating such similarity require a large number of labeled samples for supervised training. In this paper, we present a pseudo-pair based self-similarity learning approach for unsupervised person re-ID without human annotations. Unlike conventional unsupervised re-ID methods that use pseudo labels based on global clustering, we construct patch surrogate classes as initial supervision, and propose to assign pseudo labels to images through the pairwise gradient-guided similarity separation. This can cluster images in pseudo pairs, and the pseudos can be updated during training. Based on pseudo pairs, we propose to improve the generalization of similarity function via a novel self-similarity learning:it learns local discriminative features from individual images via intra-similarity, and discovers the patch correspondence across images via inter-similarity. The intra-similarity learning is based on channel attention to detect diverse local features from an image. The inter-similarity learning employs a deformable convolution with a non-local block to align patches for cross-image similarity. Experimental results on several re-ID benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别（re-ID）通过估计一对跨摄像头人员短裤之间的相似性，对于视频监控系统非常重要。当前估计这种相似性的方法需要大量标记样本进行监督训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于伪对的自相似性学习方法，用于无需人工注释的无监督人员重新识别。与使用基于全局聚类的伪标签的传统无监督重识别方法不同，我们构建补丁代理类作为初始监督，并提出通过成对梯度引导的相似性分离为图像分配伪标签。这可以将图像聚类成伪对，并且可以在训练期间更新伪对。基于伪对，我们提出通过一种新颖的自相似性学习来提高相似性函数的泛化：它通过内部相似性从单个图像中学习局部判别特征，并通过内部相似性发现图像之间的补丁对应关系。内部相似性学习基于通道注意来检测图像中的不同局部特征。相互相似性学习采用具有非局部块的可变形卷积来对齐补丁以实现跨图像相似性。几个 re-ID 基准数据集的实验结果证明了所提出的方法相对于现有技术的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于伪对的自相似性学习方法，用于无需人工标注的无监督行人重识别任务。
AI.motivation: 现有行人重识别方法依赖大量标注数据，而实际场景中获取标注成本高昂。本文旨在通过无监督学习解决此问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过构建补丁代理类生成初始伪标签，利用成对梯度引导相似性分离动态更新伪对。提出内相似性学习（通道注意力提取局部特征）与跨图像相似性学习（可变形卷积+非局部块对齐补丁）的自相似性学习框架。
AI.result: 在多个重识别基准数据集上实验验证，所提方法性能优于当前最优算法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过伪对构建与自相似性学习机制，有效解决了无监督行人重识别中的特征对齐与判别性提升问题，实验结果验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Dhananjay Joshi,Bhupesh Kumar Singh,Kapil Kumar Nagwanshi,Nitin S. Choubey
title: CTVR-EHO TDA-IPH Topological Optimized Convolutional Visual Recurrent Network for Brain Tumor Segmentation and Classification
title_zh: CTVR-EHO TDA-IPH 用于脑肿瘤分割和分类的拓扑优化卷积视觉循环网络
abstract: In today's world of health care, brain tumor detection has become common. However, the manual brain tumor classification approach is time-consuming. So Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) is used by many researchers in the medical field for making accurate diagnoses and aiding in the patient's treatment. The traditional techniques have problems such as overfitting and the inability to extract necessary features. To overcome these problems, we developed the Topological Data Analysis based Improved Persistent Homology (TDA-IPH) and Convolutional Transfer learning and Visual Recurrent learning with Elephant Herding Optimization hyper-parameter tuning (CTVR-EHO) models for brain tumor segmentation and classification. Initially, the Topological Data Analysis based Improved Persistent Homology is designed to segment the brain tumor image. Then, from the segmented image, features are extracted using TL via the AlexNet model and Bidirectional Visual Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-VLSTM). Next, elephant Herding Optimization (EHO) is used to tune the hyperparameters of both networks to get an optimal result. Finally, extracted features are concatenated and classified using the softmax activation layer. The simulation result of this proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH method is analyzed based on precision, accuracy, recall, loss, and F score metrics. When compared to other existing brain tumor segmentation and classification models, the proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH approaches show high accuracy (99.8%), high recall (99.23%), high precision (99.67%), and high F score (99.59%).

Then, from the segmented image, features are extracted using TL via the AlexNet model and Bidirectional Visual Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-VLSTM). Next, elephant Herding Optimization (EHO) is used to tune the hyperparameters of both networks to get an optimal result. Finally, extracted features are concatenated and classified using the softmax activation layer. The simulation result of this proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH method is analyzed based on precision, accuracy, recall, loss, and F score metrics. When compared to other existing brain tumor segmentation and classification models, the proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH approaches show high accuracy (99.8%), high recall (99.23%), high precision (99.67%), and high F score (99.59%).
abstract_zh: 在当今的医疗保健领域，脑肿瘤检测已变得很常见。然而，手动脑肿瘤分类方法非常耗时。因此，深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）被医学领域的许多研究人员用来做出准确的诊断和帮助患者的治疗。传统技术存在过拟合、无法提取必要特征等问题。为了克服这些问题，我们开发了基于拓扑数据分析的改进持久同源性（TDA-IPH）以及卷积迁移学习和视觉循环学习与大象群优化超参数调整（CTVR-EHO）模型，用于脑肿瘤分割和分类。最初，基于改进的持久同源性的拓扑数据分析被设计用于分割脑肿瘤图像。然后，通过 AlexNet 模型和双向视觉长短期记忆 (Bi-VLSTM) 使用 TL 从分割图像中提取特征。接下来，使用大象群优化（EHO）来调整两个网络的超参数以获得最佳结果。最后，使用 softmax 激活层对提取的特征进行连接和分类。基于精度、准确度、召回率、损失和 F 分数指标分析了所提出的 CTVR-EHO 和 TDA-IPH 方法的模拟结果。与其他现有的脑肿瘤分割和分类模型相比，所提出的 CTVR-EHO 和 TDA-IPH 方法显示出高准确率（99.8％）、高召回率（99.23％）、高精度（99.67％）和高 F 分数（99.59％）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合拓扑数据分析和优化算法的卷积视觉循环网络，用于脑肿瘤的分割与分类。
AI.motivation: 传统脑肿瘤分类方法耗时且存在过拟合和特征提取不足的问题，需更高效的深度学习模型提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 设计基于改进持续同调（TDA-IPH）的拓扑数据分析模型进行分割，结合AlexNet和双向视觉LSTM提取特征，并通过象群优化算法（EHO）调参，最终通过softmax分类器实现分类。
AI.result: 在精度、准确率、召回率、F值等指标上达到99.67%、99.8%、99.23%和99.59%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提CTVR-EHO与TDA-IPH方法在脑肿瘤分割分类任务中表现出优越性能，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: CTVR-EHO TDA-IPH Topological Optimized Convolutional Visual Recurrent Network for Brain Tumor Segmentation and Classification CTVR-EHO TDA-IPH 用于脑肿瘤分割和分类的拓扑优化卷积视觉循环网络 In today's world of health care, brain tumor detection has become common. However, the manual brain tumor classification approach is time-consuming. So Deep Convolutional Neural Network (DCNN) is used by many researchers in the medical field for making accurate diagnoses and aiding in the patient's treatment. The traditional techniques have problems such as overfitting and the inability to extract necessary features. To overcome these problems, we developed the Topological Data Analysis based Improved Persistent Homology (TDA-IPH) and Convolutional Transfer learning and Visual Recurrent learning with Elephant Herding Optimization hyper-parameter tuning (CTVR-EHO) models for brain tumor segmentation and classification. Initially, the Topological Data Analysis based Improved Persistent Homology is designed to segment the brain tumor image. Then, from the segmented image, features are extracted using TL via the AlexNet model and Bidirectional Visual Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-VLSTM). Next, elephant Herding Optimization (EHO) is used to tune the hyperparameters of both networks to get an optimal result. Finally, extracted features are concatenated and classified using the softmax activation layer. The simulation result of this proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH method is analyzed based on precision, accuracy, recall, loss, and F score metrics. When compared to other existing brain tumor segmentation and classification models, the proposed CTVR-EHO and TDA-IPH approaches show high accuracy (99.8%), high recall (99.23%), high precision (99.67%), and high F score (99.59%). 在当今的医疗保健领域，脑肿瘤检测已变得很常见。然而，手动脑肿瘤分类方法非常耗时。因此，深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）被医学领域的许多研究人员用来做出准确的诊断和帮助患者的治疗。传统技术存在过拟合、无法提取必要特征等问题。为了克服这些问题，我们开发了基于拓扑数据分析的改进持久同源性（TDA-IPH）以及卷积迁移学习和视觉循环学习与大象群优化超参数调整（CTVR-EHO）模型，用于脑肿瘤分割和分类。最初，基于改进的持久同源性的拓扑数据分析被设计用于分割脑肿瘤图像。然后，通过 AlexNet 模型和双向视觉长短期记忆 (Bi-VLSTM) 使用 TL 从分割图像中提取特征。接下来，使用大象群优化（EHO）来调整两个网络的超参数以获得最佳结果。最后，使用 softmax 激活层对提取的特征进行连接和分类。基于精度、准确度、召回率、损失和 F 分数指标分析了所提出的 CTVR-EHO 和 TDA-IPH 方法的模拟结果。与其他现有的脑肿瘤分割和分类模型相比，所提出的 CTVR-EHO 和 TDA-IPH 方法显示出高准确率（99.8％）、高召回率（99.23％）、高精度（99.67％）和高 F 分数（99.59％）。 本文提出了一种结合拓扑数据分析和优化算法的卷积视觉循环网络，用于脑肿瘤的分割与分类。 Dhananjay Joshi,Bhupesh Kumar Singh,Kapil Kumar Nagwanshi,Nitin S. Choubey eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Houari Mahfoud
title: Revisited Containment for Graph Patterns
title_zh: 重新审视图模式的遏制
abstract: We consider the class of conditional graph patterns (\emph{CGPs}) that allow user to query data graphs with complex patterns that contain negation and predicates. To overcome the prohibitive cost of subgraph isomorphism, we consider matching of \emph{CGPs} under simulation semantics which can be conducted in quadratic time. In emerging applications, one would like to reduce more this matching time, and the static analysis of patterns may allow ensuring part of this reduction. We study the containment problem of \emph{CGPs} that aims to check whether the matches of some pattern $P_1$, over any data graph, are contained in those of another pattern $P_2$ (written $P_1\sqsubseteq P_2$). The optimization process consists to extract matches of $P_1$ only from those of $P_2$ without querying the (possibly large) data graph. We show that the traditional semantics of containment is decidable in quadratic time, but it fails to meet the optimization goal in the presence of negation and predicates. To overcome this limit, we propose a new semantics of containment, called \emph{strong containment}, that is more suitable for \emph{CGPs} and allows to reduce their matching time. We show that \emph{strong containment} can be decided in cubic time by providing such an algorithm. We are planing to use results of this paper to answer \emph{CGPs} using views. This paper is part of an ongoing project that aims to design a caching system for complex graph patterns.
summary: We consider the class of conditional graph patterns (\emph{CGPs}) that allow user to query data graphs with complex patterns that contain negation and predicates. To overcome the prohibitive cost of subgraph isomorphism, we consider matching of \emph{CGPs} under simulation semantics which can be conducted in quadratic time. In emerging applications, one would like to reduce more this matching time, and the static analysis of patterns may allow ensuring part of this reduction. We study the containment problem of \emph{CGPs} that aims to check whether the matches of some pattern $P_1$, over any data graph, are contained in those of another pattern $P_2$ (written $P_1\sqsubseteq P_2$). The optimization process consists to extract matches of $P_1$ only from those of $P_2$ without querying the (possibly large) data graph. We show that the traditional semantics of containment is decidable in quadratic time, but it fails to meet the optimization goal in the presence of negation and predicates. To overcome this limit, we propose a new semantics of containment, called \emph{strong containment}, that is more suitable for \emph{CGPs} and allows to reduce their matching time. We show that \emph{strong containment} can be decided in cubic time by providing such an algorithm. We are planing to use results of this paper to answer \emph{CGPs} using views. This paper is part of an ongoing project that aims to design a caching system for complex graph patterns.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一类条件图模式（\emph{CGPs}），它允许用户使用包含否定和谓词的复杂模式查询数据图。为了克服子图同构的高昂成本，我们考虑在模拟语义下匹配\emph{CGPs}，这可以在二次时间内进行。在新兴应用中，人们希望减少更多的匹配时间，并且模式的静态分析可以确保部分减少。我们研究 \emph{CGPs} 的包含问题，旨在检查任何数据图上某些模式 $P_1$ 的匹配是否包含在另一个模式 $P_2$ （写作 $P_1\sqsubseteq P_2$）的匹配中。优化过程包括仅从 $P_2$ 中提取 $P_1$ 的匹配项，而不查询（可能很大）数据图。我们证明了传统的包含语义在二次时间内是可判定的，但在存在否定和谓词的情况下无法满足优化目标。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一种新的包含语义，称为 \emph{strong containment}，它更适合 \emph{CGPs} 并允许减少它们的匹配时间。我们证明，通过提供这样的算法，可以在立方时间内决定\emph{强遏制}。我们计划使用本文的结果来使用视图来回答 \emph{CGPs}。本文是一个正在进行的项目的一部分，该项目旨在为复杂的图形模式设计一个缓存系统。

AI.tldr: 本文研究条件图模式（CGPs）的包含性问题，提出一种新的强包含性语义以优化复杂图模式的匹配效率。
AI.motivation: 传统子图同构匹配成本过高，而现有包含性语义在存在否定和谓词时无法有效减少匹配时间，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出强包含性语义并设计立方时间算法，通过静态分析模式确保匹配优化，避免直接查询大规模数据图。
AI.result: 证明强包含性可在立方时间内判定，并计划将其应用于基于视图的CGP回答及缓存系统设计。
AI.conclusion: 强包含性语义有效解决了CGPs匹配优化问题，为复杂图查询和缓存系统提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Xingqun Qi,Zhuojie Wu,Min Ren,Muyi Sun,Caifeng Shan,Zhenan Sun
title: Exploring Generalizable Distillation for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 探索可推广的蒸馏以实现高效的医学图像分割
abstract: Efficient medical image segmentation aims to provide accurate pixel-wise predictions for medical images with a lightweight implementation framework. However, lightweight frameworks generally fail to achieve superior performance and suffer from poor generalizable ability on cross-domain tasks. In this paper, we explore the generalizable knowledge distillation for the efficient segmentation of cross-domain medical images. Considering the domain gaps between different medical datasets, we propose the Model-Specific Alignment Networks (MSAN) to obtain the domain-invariant representations. Meanwhile, a customized Alignment Consistency Training (ACT) strategy is designed to promote the MSAN training. Considering the domain-invariant representative vectors in MSAN, we propose two generalizable knowledge distillation schemes for cross-domain distillation, Dual Contrastive Graph Distillation (DCGD) and Domain-Invariant Cross Distillation (DICD). Specifically, in DCGD, two types of implicit contrastive graphs are designed to represent the intra-coupling and inter-coupling semantic correlations from the perspective of data distribution. In DICD, the domain-invariant semantic vectors from the two models (i.e., teacher and student) are leveraged to cross-reconstruct features by the header exchange of MSAN, which achieves improvement in the generalization of both the encoder and decoder in the student model. Furthermore, a metric named Frechet Semantic Distance (FSD) is tailored to verify the effectiveness of the regularized domain-invariant features. Extensive experiments conducted on the Liver and Retinal Vessel Segmentation datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method, in terms of performance and generalization on lightweight frameworks.
summary: Efficient medical image segmentation aims to provide accurate pixel-wise predictions for medical images with a lightweight implementation framework. However, lightweight frameworks generally fail to achieve superior performance and suffer from poor generalizable ability on cross-domain tasks. In this paper, we explore the generalizable knowledge distillation for the efficient segmentation of cross-domain medical images. Considering the domain gaps between different medical datasets, we propose the Model-Specific Alignment Networks (MSAN) to obtain the domain-invariant representations. Meanwhile, a customized Alignment Consistency Training (ACT) strategy is designed to promote the MSAN training. Considering the domain-invariant representative vectors in MSAN, we propose two generalizable knowledge distillation schemes for cross-domain distillation, Dual Contrastive Graph Distillation (DCGD) and Domain-Invariant Cross Distillation (DICD). Specifically, in DCGD, two types of implicit contrastive graphs are designed to represent the intra-coupling and inter-coupling semantic correlations from the perspective of data distribution. In DICD, the domain-invariant semantic vectors from the two models (i.e., teacher and student) are leveraged to cross-reconstruct features by the header exchange of MSAN, which achieves improvement in the generalization of both the encoder and decoder in the student model. Furthermore, a metric named Frechet Semantic Distance (FSD) is tailored to verify the effectiveness of the regularized domain-invariant features. Extensive experiments conducted on the Liver and Retinal Vessel Segmentation datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method, in terms of performance and generalization on lightweight frameworks.
abstract_zh: 高效的医学图像分割旨在通过轻量级的实现框架为医学图像提供准确的像素级预测。然而，轻量级框架通常无法实现卓越的性能，并且在跨领域任务上的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们探索了用于跨域医学图像有效分割的通用知识蒸馏。考虑到不同医学数据集之间的领域差距，我们提出了模型特定对齐网络（MSAN）来获得领域不变的表示。同时，还设计了定制的一致性一致性训练（ACT）策略来促进MSAN训练。考虑到MSAN中的域不变代表向量，我们提出了两种可推广的跨域知识蒸馏方案，即对偶对比图蒸馏（DCGD）和域不变交叉蒸馏（DICD）。具体来说，在DCGD中，设计了两种隐式对比图，从数据分布的角度来表示内耦合和间耦合的语义相关性。在 DICD 中，来自两个模型（即教师和学生）的域不变语义向量通过 MSAN 的标头交换来交叉重建特征，从而提高了学生模型中编码器和解码器的泛化能力。此外，还定制了一个名为 Frechet 语义距离（FSD）的度量来验证正则化的域不变特征的有效性。在肝脏和视网膜血管分割数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法在轻量级框架的性能和泛化方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过可推广的知识蒸馏方法，提升轻量级医学图像分割模型在跨域任务中的性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 轻量级医学图像分割框架在跨域任务中普遍面临性能不足和泛化能力差的问题，亟需有效方法解决领域差异带来的挑战。
AI.method: 提出模型特定对齐网络（MSAN）与对齐一致性训练（ACT）策略，设计双对比图蒸馏（DCGD）和领域不变交叉蒸馏（DICD）两种方案，并引入弗雷歇语义距离（FSD）指标验证效果。
AI.result: 在肝脏和视网膜血管分割数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在轻量级框架下实现了优于现有方法的分割性能与跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域不变表征学习与新型蒸馏策略，本文有效提升了轻量级医学图像分割模型的跨域适应性与实用性。

search_text: Exploring Generalizable Distillation for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation 探索可推广的蒸馏以实现高效的医学图像分割 Efficient medical image segmentation aims to provide accurate pixel-wise predictions for medical images with a lightweight implementation framework. However, lightweight frameworks generally fail to achieve superior performance and suffer from poor generalizable ability on cross-domain tasks. In this paper, we explore the generalizable knowledge distillation for the efficient segmentation of cross-domain medical images. Considering the domain gaps between different medical datasets, we propose the Model-Specific Alignment Networks (MSAN) to obtain the domain-invariant representations. Meanwhile, a customized Alignment Consistency Training (ACT) strategy is designed to promote the MSAN training. Considering the domain-invariant representative vectors in MSAN, we propose two generalizable knowledge distillation schemes for cross-domain distillation, Dual Contrastive Graph Distillation (DCGD) and Domain-Invariant Cross Distillation (DICD). Specifically, in DCGD, two types of implicit contrastive graphs are designed to represent the intra-coupling and inter-coupling semantic correlations from the perspective of data distribution. In DICD, the domain-invariant semantic vectors from the two models (i.e., teacher and student) are leveraged to cross-reconstruct features by the header exchange of MSAN, which achieves improvement in the generalization of both the encoder and decoder in the student model. Furthermore, a metric named Frechet Semantic Distance (FSD) is tailored to verify the effectiveness of the regularized domain-invariant features. Extensive experiments conducted on the Liver and Retinal Vessel Segmentation datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method, in terms of performance and generalization on lightweight frameworks. 高效的医学图像分割旨在通过轻量级的实现框架为医学图像提供准确的像素级预测。然而，轻量级框架通常无法实现卓越的性能，并且在跨领域任务上的泛化能力较差。在本文中，我们探索了用于跨域医学图像有效分割的通用知识蒸馏。考虑到不同医学数据集之间的领域差距，我们提出了模型特定对齐网络（MSAN）来获得领域不变的表示。同时，还设计了定制的一致性一致性训练（ACT）策略来促进MSAN训练。考虑到MSAN中的域不变代表向量，我们提出了两种可推广的跨域知识蒸馏方案，即对偶对比图蒸馏（DCGD）和域不变交叉蒸馏（DICD）。具体来说，在DCGD中，设计了两种隐式对比图，从数据分布的角度来表示内耦合和间耦合的语义相关性。在 DICD 中，来自两个模型（即教师和学生）的域不变语义向量通过 MSAN 的标头交换来交叉重建特征，从而提高了学生模型中编码器和解码器的泛化能力。此外，还定制了一个名为 Frechet 语义距离（FSD）的度量来验证正则化的域不变特征的有效性。在肝脏和视网膜血管分割数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法在轻量级框架的性能和泛化方面的优越性。 本文旨在通过可推广的知识蒸馏方法，提升轻量级医学图像分割模型在跨域任务中的性能与泛化能力。 Xingqun Qi,Zhuojie Wu,Min Ren,Muyi Sun,Caifeng Shan,Zhenan Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Wenhao Wang,Yifan Sun,Zongxin Yang,Yi Yang
title: V$^2$L: Leveraging Vision and Vision-language Models into Large-scale Product Retrieval
title_zh: V$^2$L：利用视觉和视觉语言模型进行大规模产品检索
comment: CVPR FGVC9 eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge Rank 1st solution
comments: CVPR FGVC9 eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge Rank 1st solution
abstract: Product retrieval is of great importance in the ecommerce domain. This paper introduces our 1st-place solution in eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge (FGVC9), which is featured for an ensemble of about 20 models from vision models and vision-language models. While model ensemble is common, we show that combining the vision models and vision-language models brings particular benefits from their complementarity and is a key factor to our superiority. Specifically, for the vision models, we use a two-stage training pipeline which first learns from the coarse labels provided in the training set and then conducts fine-grained self-supervised training, yielding a coarse-to-fine metric learning manner. For the vision-language models, we use the textual description of the training image as the supervision signals for fine-tuning the image-encoder (feature extractor). With these designs, our solution achieves 0.7623 MAR@10, ranking the first place among all the competitors. The code is available at: \href{https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/V2L}{V$^2$L}.
summary: Product retrieval is of great importance in the ecommerce domain. This paper introduces our 1st-place solution in eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge (FGVC9), which is featured for an ensemble of about 20 models from vision models and vision-language models. While model ensemble is common, we show that combining the vision models and vision-language models brings particular benefits from their complementarity and is a key factor to our superiority. Specifically, for the vision models, we use a two-stage training pipeline which first learns from the coarse labels provided in the training set and then conducts fine-grained self-supervised training, yielding a coarse-to-fine metric learning manner. For the vision-language models, we use the textual description of the training image as the supervision signals for fine-tuning the image-encoder (feature extractor). With these designs, our solution achieves 0.7623 MAR@10, ranking the first place among all the competitors. The code is available at: \href{https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/V2L}{V$^2$L}.
abstract_zh: 产品检索在电子商务领域非常重要。本文介绍了我们在 eBay eProduct 视觉搜索挑战赛 (FGVC9) 中获得第一名的解决方案，该解决方案针对视觉模型和视觉语言模型中约 20 个模型的集成。虽然模型集成很常见，但我们表明，将视觉模型和视觉语言模型结合起来可以从它们的互补性中带来特殊的好处，并且是我们优势的关键因素。具体来说，对于视觉模型，我们使用两阶段训练管道，首先从训练集中提供的粗标签中学习，然后进行细粒度的自监督训练，产生从粗到细的度量学习方式。对于视觉语言模型，我们使用训练图像的文本描述作为监督信号来微调图像编码器（特征提取器）。通过这些设计，我们的解决方案达到了 0.7623 MAR@10，在所有竞争对手中排名第一。代码位于：\href{https://github.com/WangWenhao0716/V2L}{V$^2$L}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉模型和视觉-语言模型的解决方案，用于提升电商领域大规模产品检索的性能。
AI.motivation: 通过融合视觉模型与视觉-语言模型的互补性，解决传统模型在细粒度产品检索中的局限性，从而提升检索准确率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段训练策略：视觉模型先基于粗粒度标签训练，再通过自监督学习细化；视觉-语言模型则利用图像文本描述作为监督信号微调图像编码器，最终通过模型集成提升效果。
AI.result: 在eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge中取得0.7623的MAR@10成绩，排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉与视觉-语言模型的互补优势，并通过分阶段训练策略，能显著提升大规模产品检索的性能。

This paper introduces our 1st-place solution in eBay eProduct Visual Search Challenge (FGVC9), which is featured for an ensemble of about 20 models from vision models and vision-language models. While model ensemble is common, we show that combining the vision models and vision-language models brings particular benefits from their complementarity and is a key factor to our superiority. Specifically, for the vision models, we use a two-stage training pipeline which first learns from the coarse labels provided in the training set and then conducts fine-grained self-supervised training, yielding a coarse-to-fine metric learning manner. For the vision-language models, we use the textual description of the training image as the supervision signals for fine-tuning the image-encoder (feature extractor). With these designs, our solution achieves 0.7623 MAR@10, ranking the first place among all the competitors. authors_text: Tai Wang,Jiangmiao Pang,Dahua Lin
title: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Depth from Motion
title_zh: 具有运动深度的单目 3D 物体检测
abstract: Perceiving 3D objects from monocular inputs is crucial for robotic systems, given its economy compared to multi-sensor settings. It is notably difficult as a single image can not provide any clues for predicting absolute depth values. Motivated by binocular methods for 3D object detection, we take advantage of the strong geometry structure provided by camera ego-motion for accurate object depth estimation and detection. We first make a theoretical analysis on this general two-view case and notice two challenges: 1) Cumulative errors from multiple estimations that make the direct prediction intractable; 2) Inherent dilemmas caused by static cameras and matching ambiguity. Accordingly, we establish the stereo correspondence with a geometry-aware cost volume as the alternative for depth estimation and further compensate it with monocular understanding to address the second problem. Our framework, named Depth from Motion (DfM), then uses the established geometry to lift 2D image features to the 3D space and detects 3D objects thereon. We also present a pose-free DfM to make it usable when the camera pose is unavailable. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on the KITTI benchmark. Detailed quantitative and qualitative analyses also validate our theoretical conclusions. The code will be released at https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion.
summary: Perceiving 3D objects from monocular inputs is crucial for robotic systems, given its economy compared to multi-sensor settings. It is notably difficult as a single image can not provide any clues for predicting absolute depth values. Motivated by binocular methods for 3D object detection, we take advantage of the strong geometry structure provided by camera ego-motion for accurate object depth estimation and detection. We first make a theoretical analysis on this general two-view case and notice two challenges: 1) Cumulative errors from multiple estimations that make the direct prediction intractable; 2) Inherent dilemmas caused by static cameras and matching ambiguity. Accordingly, we establish the stereo correspondence with a geometry-aware cost volume as the alternative for depth estimation and further compensate it with monocular understanding to address the second problem. Our framework, named Depth from Motion (DfM), then uses the established geometry to lift 2D image features to the 3D space and detects 3D objects thereon. We also present a pose-free DfM to make it usable when the camera pose is unavailable. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on the KITTI benchmark. Detailed quantitative and qualitative analyses also validate our theoretical conclusions. The code will be released at https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion.
abstract_zh: 考虑到与多传感器设置相比的经济性，从单眼输入感知 3D 对象对于机器人系统至关重要。这是非常困难的，因为单个图像不能提供任何预测绝对深度值的线索。受 3D 物体检测双目方法的启发，我们利用相机自运动提供的强大几何结构来进行准确的物体深度估计和检测。我们首先对这种一般的双视图情况进行理论分析，并注意到两个挑战：1）多次估计的累积误差使得直接预测变得困难； 2）静态摄像机和匹配模糊性造成的固有困境。因此，我们建立了与几何感知成本体积的立体对应关系作为深度估计的替代方案，并通过单目理解进一步对其进行补偿以解决第二个问题。我们的框架名为运动深度 (DfM)，然后使用已建立的几何结构将 2D 图像特征提升到 3D 空间并检测其上的 3D 对象。我们还提出了一个无姿态 DfM，使其在相机姿态不可用时可用。我们的框架在 KITTI 基准测试中大幅优于最先进的方法。详细的定量和定性分析也验证了我们的理论结论。代码将在 https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目视觉的3D目标检测方法，利用相机运动信息进行深度估计。
AI.motivation: 单目视觉在经济性上优于多传感器系统，但难以直接预测绝对深度值。本文受双目方法启发，利用相机自身运动提供的几何结构进行深度估计。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Depth from Motion (DfM)的框架，通过几何感知的成本体积建立立体对应关系，并结合单目理解解决静态相机和匹配模糊问题，最后将2D图像特征提升到3D空间进行目标检测。
AI.result: 该框架在KITTI基准测试中显著优于现有最先进的方法，定量和定性分析也验证了理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DfM方法通过利用相机运动提供的几何信息，有效解决了单目3D目标检测中的深度估计问题，并在实际测试中表现优异。

search_text: Monocular 3D Object Detection with Depth from Motion 具有运动深度的单目 3D 物体检测 Perceiving 3D objects from monocular inputs is crucial for robotic systems, given its economy compared to multi-sensor settings. It is notably difficult as a single image can not provide any clues for predicting absolute depth values. Motivated by binocular methods for 3D object detection, we take advantage of the strong geometry structure provided by camera ego-motion for accurate object depth estimation and detection. We first make a theoretical analysis on this general two-view case and notice two challenges: 1) Cumulative errors from multiple estimations that make the direct prediction intractable; 2) Inherent dilemmas caused by static cameras and matching ambiguity. Accordingly, we establish the stereo correspondence with a geometry-aware cost volume as the alternative for depth estimation and further compensate it with monocular understanding to address the second problem. Our framework, named Depth from Motion (DfM), then uses the established geometry to lift 2D image features to the 3D space and detects 3D objects thereon. We also present a pose-free DfM to make it usable when the camera pose is unavailable. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods by a large margin on the KITTI benchmark. Detailed quantitative and qualitative analyses also validate our theoretical conclusions. The code will be released at https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion. 考虑到与多传感器设置相比的经济性，从单眼输入感知 3D 对象对于机器人系统至关重要。这是非常困难的，因为单个图像不能提供任何预测绝对深度值的线索。受 3D 物体检测双目方法的启发，我们利用相机自运动提供的强大几何结构来进行准确的物体深度估计和检测。我们首先对这种一般的双视图情况进行理论分析，并注意到两个挑战：1）多次估计的累积误差使得直接预测变得困难； 2）静态摄像机和匹配模糊性造成的固有困境。因此，我们建立了与几何感知成本体积的立体对应关系作为深度估计的替代方案，并通过单目理解进一步对其进行补偿以解决第二个问题。我们的框架名为运动深度 (DfM)，然后使用已建立的几何结构将 2D 图像特征提升到 3D 空间并检测其上的 3D 对象。我们还提出了一个无姿态 DfM，使其在相机姿态不可用时可用。我们的框架在 KITTI 基准测试中大幅优于最先进的方法。详细的定量和定性分析也验证了我们的理论结论。代码将在 https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion 发布。 本文提出了一种基于单目视觉的3D目标检测方法，利用相机运动信息进行深度估计。 Tai Wang,Jiangmiao Pang,Dahua Lin cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jawad Tayyub,Muhammad Sarmad,Nicolas Schönborn
title: Explaining Deep Neural Networks for Point Clouds using Gradient-based Visualisations
title_zh: 使用基于梯度的可视化解释点云的深度神经网络
abstract: Explaining decisions made by deep neural networks is a rapidly advancing research topic. In recent years, several approaches have attempted to provide visual explanations of decisions made by neural networks designed for structured 2D image input data. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate coarse visual explanations of networks designed to classify unstructured 3D data, namely point clouds. Our method uses gradients flowing back to the final feature map layers and maps these values as contributions of the corresponding points in the input point cloud. Due to dimensionality disagreement and lack of spatial consistency between input points and final feature maps, our approach combines gradients with points dropping to compute explanations of different parts of the point cloud iteratively. The generality of our approach is tested on various point cloud classification networks, including 'single object' networks PointNet, PointNet++, DGCNN, and a 'scene' network VoteNet. Our method generates symmetric explanation maps that highlight important regions and provide insight into the decision-making process of network architectures. We perform an exhaustive evaluation of trust and interpretability of our explanation method against comparative approaches using quantitative, quantitative and human studies. All our code is implemented in PyTorch and will be made publicly available.
summary: Explaining decisions made by deep neural networks is a rapidly advancing research topic. In recent years, several approaches have attempted to provide visual explanations of decisions made by neural networks designed for structured 2D image input data. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to generate coarse visual explanations of networks designed to classify unstructured 3D data, namely point clouds. Our method uses gradients flowing back to the final feature map layers and maps these values as contributions of the corresponding points in the input point cloud. Due to dimensionality disagreement and lack of spatial consistency between input points and final feature maps, our approach combines gradients with points dropping to compute explanations of different parts of the point cloud iteratively. The generality of our approach is tested on various point cloud classification networks, including 'single object' networks PointNet, PointNet++, DGCNN, and a 'scene' network VoteNet. Our method generates symmetric explanation maps that highlight important regions and provide insight into the decision-making process of network architectures. We perform an exhaustive evaluation of trust and interpretability of our explanation method against comparative approaches using quantitative, quantitative and human studies. All our code is implemented in PyTorch and will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 解释深度神经网络做出的决策是一个快速发展的研究课题。近年来，有几种方法尝试为针对结构化 2D 图像输入数据设计的神经网络所做的决策提供视觉解释。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来生成网络的粗略视觉解释，旨在对非结构化 3D 数据（即点云）进行分类。我们的方法使用梯度流回最终的特征映射层，并将这些值映射为输入点云中相应点的贡献。由于维度不一致以及输入点和最终特征图之间缺乏空间一致性，我们的方法将梯度与点滴结合起来，迭代地计算点云不同部分的解释。我们的方法的通用性在各种点云分类网络上进行了测试，包括“单对象”网络 PointNet、PointNet++、DGCNN 和“场景”网络 VoteNet。我们的方法生成对称解释图，突出显示重要区域并提供对网络架构决策过程的洞察。我们使用定量、定量和人类研究的比较方法对我们的解释方法的可信度和可解释性进行了详尽的评估。我们所有的代码都在 PyTorch 中实现，并将公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于梯度的可视化方法，用于解释针对点云数据的深度神经网络的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量针对2D图像的神经网络解释方法，但缺乏针对3D点云数据的有效解释技术，而点云分类网络的可解释性研究仍处于起步阶段。
AI.method: 通过反向传播获取最终特征图层的梯度，将梯度值映射到输入点云中对应点的贡献度，并结合点云降采样技术迭代生成不同区域的解释图。
AI.result: 方法在PointNet、PointNet++、DGCNN和VoteNet等多种点云分类网络上验证有效，生成的对称性解释图能突出关键区域，且通过定量评估和人类实验验证了其可信度与可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为点云分类网络提供了通用的可视化解释框架，代码已开源，有助于提升3D深度学习模型的透明度与可信度。

authors_text: Jiajun Liang,Linze Li,Zhaodong Bing,Borui Zhao,Yao Tang,Bo Lin,Haoqiang Fan
title: Efficient One Pass Self-distillation with Zipf's Label Smoothing
title_zh: 利用 Zipf 的标签平滑实现高效的一次性自蒸馏
abstract: Self-distillation exploits non-uniform soft supervision from itself during training and improves performance without any runtime cost. However, the overhead during training is often overlooked, and yet reducing time and memory overhead during training is increasingly important in the giant models' era. This paper proposes an efficient self-distillation method named Zipf's Label Smoothing (Zipf's LS), which uses the on-the-fly prediction of a network to generate soft supervision that conforms to Zipf distribution without using any contrastive samples or auxiliary parameters. Our idea comes from an empirical observation that when the network is duly trained the output values of a network's final softmax layer, after sorting by the magnitude and averaged across samples, should follow a distribution reminiscent to Zipf's Law in the word frequency statistics of natural languages. By enforcing this property on the sample level and throughout the whole training period, we find that the prediction accuracy can be greatly improved. Using ResNet50 on the INAT21 fine-grained classification dataset, our technique achieves +3.61% accuracy gain compared to the vanilla baseline, and 0.88% more gain against the previous label smoothing or self-distillation strategies. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/megvii-research/zipfls.
summary: Self-distillation exploits non-uniform soft supervision from itself during training and improves performance without any runtime cost. However, the overhead during training is often overlooked, and yet reducing time and memory overhead during training is increasingly important in the giant models' era. This paper proposes an efficient self-distillation method named Zipf's Label Smoothing (Zipf's LS), which uses the on-the-fly prediction of a network to generate soft supervision that conforms to Zipf distribution without using any contrastive samples or auxiliary parameters. Our idea comes from an empirical observation that when the network is duly trained the output values of a network's final softmax layer, after sorting by the magnitude and averaged across samples, should follow a distribution reminiscent to Zipf's Law in the word frequency statistics of natural languages. By enforcing this property on the sample level and throughout the whole training period, we find that the prediction accuracy can be greatly improved. Using ResNet50 on the INAT21 fine-grained classification dataset, our technique achieves +3.61% accuracy gain compared to the vanilla baseline, and 0.88% more gain against the previous label smoothing or self-distillation strategies. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/megvii-research/zipfls.
abstract_zh: 自蒸馏在训练过程中利用自身的非均匀软监督，并在没有任何运行时成本的情况下提高性能。然而，训练期间的开销经常被忽视，但在巨型模型时代，减少训练期间的时间和内存开销变得越来越重要。本文提出了一种名为 Zipf 标签平滑（Zipf's LS）的高效自蒸馏方法，该方法使用网络的即时预测来生成符合 Zipf 分布的软监督，而不使用任何对比样本或辅助参数。我们的想法来自于经验观察，即当网络经过适当的训练后，网络最终 softmax 层的输出值在按幅度排序并在样本之间取平均值后，应该遵循自然语言词频统计中的齐普夫定律的分布。通过在样本级别和整个训练期间强制执行此属性，我们发现可以大大提高预测精度。在 INAT21 细粒度分类数据集上使用 ResNet50，与普通基线相比，我们的技术实现了 +3.61% 的准确率增益，并且比之前的标签平滑或自蒸馏策略提高了 0.88% 的增益。该实现可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/zipfls 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Zipf's Label Smoothing的高效自蒸馏方法，在无需额外参数或对比样本的情况下，通过利用网络实时预测生成符合Zipf分布的软监督，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自蒸馏方法在训练过程中常被忽视计算开销，而大模型时代对降低训练时间和内存消耗的需求日益迫切。
AI.method: 通过观察训练充分的网络输出符合Zipf分布的特性，在样本层面和整个训练周期中强制该分布规律，利用网络实时预测生成软监督，无需对比样本或辅助参数。
AI.result: 在INAT21细粒度分类数据集上，使用ResNet50实现比基线模型+3.61%的准确率提升，较之前标签平滑或自蒸馏策略多提升0.88%。
AI.conclusion: Zipf's LS通过引入Zipf分布约束有效提升了自蒸馏效率，在保持低成本的同时显著提高模型性能，为大模型训练提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Zipf's Label Smoothing的高效自蒸馏方法，在无需额外参数或对比样本的情况下，通过利用网络实时预测生成符合Zipf分布的软监督，提升模型性能。

search_text: Efficient One Pass Self-distillation with Zipf's Label Smoothing 利用 Zipf 的标签平滑实现高效的一次性自蒸馏 Self-distillation exploits non-uniform soft supervision from itself during training and improves performance without any runtime cost. However, the overhead during training is often overlooked, and yet reducing time and memory overhead during training is increasingly important in the giant models' era. This paper proposes an efficient self-distillation method named Zipf's Label Smoothing (Zipf's LS), which uses the on-the-fly prediction of a network to generate soft supervision that conforms to Zipf distribution without using any contrastive samples or auxiliary parameters. Our idea comes from an empirical observation that when the network is duly trained the output values of a network's final softmax layer, after sorting by the magnitude and averaged across samples, should follow a distribution reminiscent to Zipf's Law in the word frequency statistics of natural languages. By enforcing this property on the sample level and throughout the whole training period, we find that the prediction accuracy can be greatly improved. Using ResNet50 on the INAT21 fine-grained classification dataset, our technique achieves +3.61% accuracy gain compared to the vanilla baseline, and 0.88% more gain against the previous label smoothing or self-distillation strategies. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/megvii-research/zipfls. 自蒸馏在训练过程中利用自身的非均匀软监督，并在没有任何运行时成本的情况下提高性能。然而，训练期间的开销经常被忽视，但在巨型模型时代，减少训练期间的时间和内存开销变得越来越重要。本文提出了一种名为 Zipf 标签平滑（Zipf's LS）的高效自蒸馏方法，该方法使用网络的即时预测来生成符合 Zipf 分布的软监督，而不使用任何对比样本或辅助参数。我们的想法来自于经验观察，即当网络经过适当的训练后，网络最终 softmax 层的输出值在按幅度排序并在样本之间取平均值后，应该遵循自然语言词频统计中的齐普夫定律的分布。通过在样本级别和整个训练期间强制执行此属性，我们发现可以大大提高预测精度。在 INAT21 细粒度分类数据集上使用 ResNet50，与普通基线相比，我们的技术实现了 +3.61% 的准确率增益，并且比之前的标签平滑或自蒸馏策略提高了 0.88% 的增益。该实现可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/zipfls 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为Zipf's Label Smoothing的高效自蒸馏方法，在无需额外参数或对比样本的情况下，通过利用网络实时预测生成符合Zipf分布的软监督，提升模型性能。 Jiajun Liang,Linze Li,Zhaodong Bing,Borui Zhao,Yao Tang,Bo Lin,Haoqiang Fan cs.CV

authors_text: Siyuan Li,Martin Danelljan,Henghui Ding,Thomas E. Huang,Fisher Yu
title: Tracking Every Thing in the Wild
title_zh: 追踪野外的一切
abstract: Current multi-category Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) metrics use class labels to group tracking results for per-class evaluation. Similarly, MOT methods typically only associate objects with the same class predictions. These two prevalent strategies in MOT implicitly assume that the classification performance is near-perfect. However, this is far from the case in recent large-scale MOT datasets, which contain large numbers of classes with many rare or semantically similar categories. Therefore, the resulting inaccurate classification leads to sub-optimal tracking and inadequate benchmarking of trackers. We address these issues by disentangling classification from tracking. We introduce a new metric, Track Every Thing Accuracy (TETA), breaking tracking measurement into three sub-factors: localization, association, and classification, allowing comprehensive benchmarking of tracking performance even under inaccurate classification. TETA also deals with the challenging incomplete annotation problem in large-scale tracking datasets. We further introduce a Track Every Thing tracker (TETer), that performs association using Class Exemplar Matching (CEM). Our experiments show that TETA evaluates trackers more comprehensively, and TETer achieves significant improvements on the challenging large-scale datasets BDD100K and TAO compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Current multi-category Multiple Object Tracking (MOT) metrics use class labels to group tracking results for per-class evaluation. Similarly, MOT methods typically only associate objects with the same class predictions. These two prevalent strategies in MOT implicitly assume that the classification performance is near-perfect. However, this is far from the case in recent large-scale MOT datasets, which contain large numbers of classes with many rare or semantically similar categories. Therefore, the resulting inaccurate classification leads to sub-optimal tracking and inadequate benchmarking of trackers. We address these issues by disentangling classification from tracking. We introduce a new metric, Track Every Thing Accuracy (TETA), breaking tracking measurement into three sub-factors: localization, association, and classification, allowing comprehensive benchmarking of tracking performance even under inaccurate classification. TETA also deals with the challenging incomplete annotation problem in large-scale tracking datasets. We further introduce a Track Every Thing tracker (TETer), that performs association using Class Exemplar Matching (CEM). Our experiments show that TETA evaluates trackers more comprehensively, and TETer achieves significant improvements on the challenging large-scale datasets BDD100K and TAO compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 当前的多类别多对象跟踪 (MOT) 指标使用类标签对跟踪结果进行分组以进行每类评估。类似地，MOT 方法通常仅将对象与相同类别的预测相关联。 MOT 中的这两种流行策略隐含地假设分类性能近乎完美。然而，在最近的大规模 MOT 数据集中，情况远非如此，这些数据集中包含大量具有许多罕见或语义相似类别的类。因此，由此产生的不准确分类会导致跟踪效果不佳和跟踪器基准测试不充分。我们通过将分类与跟踪分开来解决这些问题。我们引入了一个新的指标，即跟踪每件事的准确性（TETA），将跟踪测量分解为三个子因素：定位、关联和分类，即使在分类不准确的情况下也可以对跟踪性能进行全面的基准测试。 TETA 还处理大规模跟踪数据集中具有挑战性的不完整注释问题。我们进一步引入了 Track Every Thing 跟踪器 (TETer)，它使用类示例匹配 (CEM) 执行关联。我们的实验表明，TETA 可以更全面地评估跟踪器，并且与最先进的技术相比，TETer 在具有挑战性的大规模数据集 BDD100K 和 TAO 上取得了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多类别多目标跟踪评估指标TETA及跟踪器TETer，以解决大规模数据集中分类误差导致的跟踪性能评估不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MOT方法依赖完美分类假设，但大规模数据集中存在大量类别及语义相似类别，导致分类误差影响跟踪效果与评估准确性。
AI.method: 引入TETA指标将跟踪性能分解为定位、关联和分类三个子因素，并设计基于类别示例匹配（CEM）的TETer跟踪器实现跨类别关联。
AI.result: 实验表明，TETA能更全面评估跟踪器性能，TETer在BDD100K和TAO数据集上较现有方法取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦分类与跟踪，本文方法有效提升了大规模多类别场景下的跟踪评估准确性与跟踪器性能。
