authors_text: Bin Sun
title: TransFiner: A Full-Scale Refinement Approach for Multiple Object Tracking
title_zh: TransFiner：多目标跟踪的全面细化方法
abstract: Multiple object tracking (MOT) is the task containing detection and association. Plenty of trackers have achieved competitive performance. Unfortunately, for the lack of informative exchange on these subtasks, they are often biased toward one of the two and underperform in complex scenarios, such as the inevitable misses and mistaken trajectories of targets when tracking individuals within a crowd. This paper proposes TransFiner, a transformer-based approach to post-refining MOT. It is a generic attachment framework that depends on query pairs, the bridge between an original tracker and TransFiner. Each query pair, through the fusion decoder, produces refined detection and motion clues for a specific object. Before that, they are feature-aligned and group-labeled under the guidance of tracking results (locations and class predictions) from the original tracker, finishing tracking refinement with focus and comprehensively. Experiments show that our design is effective, on the MOT17 benchmark, we elevate the CenterTrack from 67.8% MOTA and 64.7% IDF1 to 71.5% MOTA and 66.8% IDF1.
summary: Multiple object tracking (MOT) is the task containing detection and association. Plenty of trackers have achieved competitive performance. Unfortunately, for the lack of informative exchange on these subtasks, they are often biased toward one of the two and underperform in complex scenarios, such as the inevitable misses and mistaken trajectories of targets when tracking individuals within a crowd. This paper proposes TransFiner, a transformer-based approach to post-refining MOT. It is a generic attachment framework that depends on query pairs, the bridge between an original tracker and TransFiner. Each query pair, through the fusion decoder, produces refined detection and motion clues for a specific object. Before that, they are feature-aligned and group-labeled under the guidance of tracking results (locations and class predictions) from the original tracker, finishing tracking refinement with focus and comprehensively. Experiments show that our design is effective, on the MOT17 benchmark, we elevate the CenterTrack from 67.8% MOTA and 64.7% IDF1 to 71.5% MOTA and 66.8% IDF1.
abstract_zh: 多目标跟踪（MOT）是包含检测和关联的任务。许多追踪器都取得了有竞争力的表现。不幸的是，由于这些子任务缺乏信息交流，它们往往偏向于两者之一，并且在复杂的场景中表现不佳，例如在跟踪人群中的个人时不可避免的错过目标和错误的目标轨迹。本文提出了 TransFiner，一种基于变压器的后精炼 MOT 方法。它是一个依赖于查询对的通用附件框架，是原始跟踪器和 TransFiner 之间的桥梁。每个查询对通过融合解码器为特定对象生成精细的检测和运动线索。在此之前，它们在原始跟踪器的跟踪结果（位置和类别预测）的指导下进行特征对齐和分组标记，有针对性地、全面地完成跟踪细化。实验表明我们的设计是有效的，在MOT17基准上，我们将CenterTrack从67.8% MOTA和64.7% IDF1提升到71.5% MOTA和66.8% IDF1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransFiner，一种基于Transformer的多目标跟踪后处理方法，通过融合检测与关联信息提升复杂场景下的跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪器常因检测与关联子任务间信息交互不足，导致在拥挤等复杂场景中出现轨迹错误或漏检问题。
AI.method: 设计通用框架TransFiner，利用原始跟踪器结果对查询对进行特征对齐与分组标记，通过融合解码器生成精细化检测与运动线索。
AI.result: 在MOT17基准上，将CenterTrack的MOTA从67.8%提升至71.5%，IDF1从64.7%提升至66.8%。
AI.conclusion: TransFiner通过整合检测与关联信息，有效解决了复杂场景下的多目标跟踪性能瓶颈。

search_text: TransFiner: A Full-Scale Refinement Approach for Multiple Object Tracking TransFiner：多目标跟踪的全面细化方法 Multiple object tracking (MOT) is the task containing detection and association. Plenty of trackers have achieved competitive performance. Unfortunately, for the lack of informative exchange on these subtasks, they are often biased toward one of the two and underperform in complex scenarios, such as the inevitable misses and mistaken trajectories of targets when tracking individuals within a crowd. This paper proposes TransFiner, a transformer-based approach to post-refining MOT. It is a generic attachment framework that depends on query pairs, the bridge between an original tracker and TransFiner. Each query pair, through the fusion decoder, produces refined detection and motion clues for a specific object. Before that, they are feature-aligned and group-labeled under the guidance of tracking results (locations and class predictions) from the original tracker, finishing tracking refinement with focus and comprehensively. Experiments show that our design is effective, on the MOT17 benchmark, we elevate the CenterTrack from 67.8% MOTA and 64.7% IDF1 to 71.5% MOTA and 66.8% IDF1. 多目标跟踪（MOT）是包含检测和关联的任务。许多追踪器都取得了有竞争力的表现。不幸的是，由于这些子任务缺乏信息交流，它们往往偏向于两者之一，并且在复杂的场景中表现不佳，例如在跟踪人群中的个人时不可避免的错过目标和错误的目标轨迹。本文提出了 TransFiner，一种基于变压器的后精炼 MOT 方法。它是一个依赖于查询对的通用附件框架，是原始跟踪器和 TransFiner 之间的桥梁。每个查询对通过融合解码器为特定对象生成精细的检测和运动线索。在此之前，它们在原始跟踪器的跟踪结果（位置和类别预测）的指导下进行特征对齐和分组标记，有针对性地、全面地完成跟踪细化。实验表明我们的设计是有效的，在MOT17基准上，我们将CenterTrack从67.8% MOTA和64.7% IDF1提升到71.5% MOTA和66.8% IDF1。 本文提出TransFiner，一种基于Transformer的多目标跟踪后处理方法，通过融合检测与关联信息提升复杂场景下的跟踪性能。 Bin Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Yijun Yan,Jinchang Ren,He Sun
title: Nondestructive Quality Control in Powder Metallurgy using Hyperspectral Imaging
title_zh: 使用高光谱成像进行粉末冶金无损质量控制
abstract: Measuring the purity in the metal powder is critical for preserving the quality of additive manufacturing products. Contamination is one of the most headache problems which can be caused by multiple reasons and lead to the as-built components cracking and malfunctions. Existing methods for metallurgical condition assessment are mostly time-consuming and mainly focus on the physical integrity of structure rather than material composition. Through capturing spectral data from a wide frequency range along with the spatial information, hyperspectral imaging (HSI) can detect minor differences in terms of temperature, moisture and chemical composition. Therefore, HSI can provide a unique way to tackle this challenge. In this paper, with the use of a near-infrared HSI camera, applications of HSI for the non-destructive inspection of metal powders are introduced. Technical assumptions and solutions on three step-by-step case studies are presented in detail, including powder characterization, contamination detection, and band selection analysis. Experimental results have fully demonstrated the great potential of HSI and related AI techniques for NDT of powder metallurgy, especially the potential to satisfy the industrial manufacturing environment.
summary: Measuring the purity in the metal powder is critical for preserving the quality of additive manufacturing products. Contamination is one of the most headache problems which can be caused by multiple reasons and lead to the as-built components cracking and malfunctions. Existing methods for metallurgical condition assessment are mostly time-consuming and mainly focus on the physical integrity of structure rather than material composition. Through capturing spectral data from a wide frequency range along with the spatial information, hyperspectral imaging (HSI) can detect minor differences in terms of temperature, moisture and chemical composition. Therefore, HSI can provide a unique way to tackle this challenge. In this paper, with the use of a near-infrared HSI camera, applications of HSI for the non-destructive inspection of metal powders are introduced. Technical assumptions and solutions on three step-by-step case studies are presented in detail, including powder characterization, contamination detection, and band selection analysis. Experimental results have fully demonstrated the great potential of HSI and related AI techniques for NDT of powder metallurgy, especially the potential to satisfy the industrial manufacturing environment.
abstract_zh: 测量金属粉末的纯度对于保持增材制造产品的质量至关重要。污染是最令人头痛的问题之一，它可能由多种原因引起，并导致竣工部件破裂和故障。现有的冶金状况评估方法大多耗时且主要关注结构的物理完整性而不是材料成分。通过捕获宽频率范围的光谱数据以及空间信息，高光谱成像 (HSI) 可以检测温度、湿度和化学成分方面的微小差异。因此，恒生指数可以提供一种独特的方式来应对这一挑战。本文利用近红外HSI相机，介绍了HSI在金属粉末无损检测中的应用。详细介绍了三个分步案例研究的技术假设和解决方案，包括粉末表征、污染物检测和谱带选择分析。实验结果充分证明了HSI及相关人工智能技术在粉末冶金无损检测方面的巨大潜力，特别是满足工业制造环境的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用高光谱成像技术实现粉末冶金材料的非破坏性质量检测，重点解决金属粉末污染与成分差异问题。
AI.motivation: 传统冶金检测方法耗时且无法有效评估材料成分，而粉末污染可能导致增材制造产品开裂或失效，亟需更精确的无损检测技术。
AI.method: 采用近红外高光谱成像相机，通过三个案例研究（粉末表征、污染检测、波段选择分析）结合AI技术，实现对温度、湿度及化学成分的非破坏性检测。
AI.result: 实验验证了高光谱成像与AI技术结合在粉末冶金无损检测中的有效性，展示了其在工业制造环境中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 高光谱成像技术为粉末冶金质量控制提供了高效、非破坏性的解决方案，具备显著的工业应用价值。

authors_text: Guangchen Shi,Yirui Wu,Jun Liu,Shaohua Wan,Wenhai Wang,Tong Lu
title: Incremental Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation via Embedding Adaptive-Update and Hyper-class Representation
title_zh: 通过嵌入自适应更新和超类表示进行增量少样本语义分割
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia 2022
abstract: Incremental few-shot semantic segmentation (IFSS) targets at incrementally expanding model's capacity to segment new class of images supervised by only a few samples. However, features learned on old classes could significantly drift, causing catastrophic forgetting. Moreover, few samples for pixel-level segmentation on new classes lead to notorious overfitting issues in each learning session. In this paper, we explicitly represent class-based knowledge for semantic segmentation as a category embedding and a hyper-class embedding, where the former describes exclusive semantical properties, and the latter expresses hyper-class knowledge as class-shared semantic properties. Aiming to solve IFSS problems, we present EHNet, i.e., Embedding adaptive-update and Hyper-class representation Network from two aspects. First, we propose an embedding adaptive-update strategy to avoid feature drift, which maintains old knowledge by hyper-class representation, and adaptively update category embeddings with a class-attention scheme to involve new classes learned in individual sessions. Second, to resist overfitting issues caused by few training samples, a hyper-class embedding is learned by clustering all category embeddings for initialization and aligned with category embedding of the new class for enhancement, where learned knowledge assists to learn new knowledge, thus alleviating performance dependence on training data scale. Significantly, these two designs provide representation capability for classes with sufficient semantics and limited biases, enabling to perform segmentation tasks requiring high semantic dependence. Experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO datasets show that EHNet achieves new state-of-the-art performance with remarkable advantages.
summary: Incremental few-shot semantic segmentation (IFSS) targets at incrementally expanding model's capacity to segment new class of images supervised by only a few samples. However, features learned on old classes could significantly drift, causing catastrophic forgetting. Moreover, few samples for pixel-level segmentation on new classes lead to notorious overfitting issues in each learning session. In this paper, we explicitly represent class-based knowledge for semantic segmentation as a category embedding and a hyper-class embedding, where the former describes exclusive semantical properties, and the latter expresses hyper-class knowledge as class-shared semantic properties. Aiming to solve IFSS problems, we present EHNet, i.e., Embedding adaptive-update and Hyper-class representation Network from two aspects. First, we propose an embedding adaptive-update strategy to avoid feature drift, which maintains old knowledge by hyper-class representation, and adaptively update category embeddings with a class-attention scheme to involve new classes learned in individual sessions. Second, to resist overfitting issues caused by few training samples, a hyper-class embedding is learned by clustering all category embeddings for initialization and aligned with category embedding of the new class for enhancement, where learned knowledge assists to learn new knowledge, thus alleviating performance dependence on training data scale. Significantly, these two designs provide representation capability for classes with sufficient semantics and limited biases, enabling to perform segmentation tasks requiring high semantic dependence. Experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO datasets show that EHNet achieves new state-of-the-art performance with remarkable advantages.
abstract_zh: 增量少镜头语义分割（IFSS）的目标是逐步扩展模型的能力，以分割仅由少数样本监督的新类别图像。然而，在旧课程中学到的功能可能会发生显着变化，从而导致灾难性的遗忘。此外，新类别的像素级分割样本很少，导致每个学习会话中都存在臭名昭著的过度拟合问题。在本文中，我们将用于语义分割的基于类的知识明确表示为类别嵌入和超类嵌入，其中前者描述排他的语义属性，后者将超类知识表示为类共享的语义属性。针对IFSS问题，我们从两个方面提出了EHNet，即嵌入自适应更新网络和超类表示网络。首先，我们提出了一种嵌入自适应更新策略来避免特征漂移，该策略通过超类表示来维护旧知识，并使用类注意方案自适应更新类别嵌入，以涉及在各个会话中学习的新类。其次，为了抵抗训练样本较少引起的过拟合问题，通过对所有类别嵌入进行聚类进行初始化，并与新类的类别嵌入进行对齐来进行增强，从而学习超类嵌入，其中学到的知识有助于学习新知识，从而减轻性能对训练数据规模的依赖。值得注意的是，这两种设计为具有足够语义和有限偏差的类提供了表示能力，从而能够执行需要高度语义依赖性的分割任务。在PASCAL-5i和COCO数据集上的实验表明，EHNet实现了新的state-of-the-art性能，具有显着的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EHNet方法，通过嵌入自适应更新和超类表示解决增量少样本语义分割中的灾难性遗忘与过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 增量少样本分割面临旧类特征漂移导致的灾难性遗忘，以及新类样本稀缺引发的过拟合问题，现有方法难以有效平衡新旧知识学习。
AI.method: 设计EHNet框架：1) 嵌入自适应更新策略通过超类表示保留旧知识，结合类注意力机制动态更新新类嵌入；2) 超类嵌入通过聚类初始化并增强新类表示，减少对训练数据量的依赖。
AI.result: 在PASCAL-5i和COCO数据集上达到新状态-of-the-art性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: EHNet通过双嵌入机制有效解决了增量少样本分割中的关键挑战，为高语义依赖分割任务提供了鲁棒的表示学习方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出EHNet方法，通过嵌入自适应更新和超类表示解决增量少样本语义分割中的灾难性遗忘与过拟合问题。

Second, to resist overfitting issues caused by few training samples, a hyper-class embedding is learned by clustering all category embeddings for initialization and aligned with category embedding of the new class for enhancement, where learned knowledge assists to learn new knowledge, thus alleviating performance dependence on training data scale. Significantly, these two designs provide representation capability for classes with sufficient semantics and limited biases, enabling to perform segmentation tasks requiring high semantic dependence. Experiments on PASCAL-5i and COCO datasets show that EHNet achieves new state-of-the-art performance with remarkable advantages. 增量少镜头语义分割（IFSS）的目标是逐步扩展模型的能力，以分割仅由少数样本监督的新类别图像。然而，在旧课程中学到的功能可能会发生显着变化，从而导致灾难性的遗忘。此外，新类别的像素级分割样本很少，导致每个学习会话中都存在臭名昭著的过度拟合问题。在本文中，我们将用于语义分割的基于类的知识明确表示为类别嵌入和超类嵌入，其中前者描述排他的语义属性，后者将超类知识表示为类共享的语义属性。针对IFSS问题，我们从两个方面提出了EHNet，即嵌入自适应更新网络和超类表示网络。首先，我们提出了一种嵌入自适应更新策略来避免特征漂移，该策略通过超类表示来维护旧知识，并使用类注意方案自适应更新类别嵌入，以涉及在各个会话中学习的新类。其次，为了抵抗训练样本较少引起的过拟合问题，通过对所有类别嵌入进行聚类进行初始化，并与新类的类别嵌入进行对齐来进行增强，从而学习超类嵌入，其中学到的知识有助于学习新知识，从而减轻性能对训练数据规模的依赖。值得注意的是，这两种设计为具有足够语义和有限偏差的类提供了表示能力，从而能够执行需要高度语义依赖性的分割任务。在PASCAL-5i和COCO数据集上的实验表明，EHNet实现了新的state-of-the-art性能，具有显着的优势。 本文提出EHNet方法，通过嵌入自适应更新和超类表示解决增量少样本语义分割中的灾难性遗忘与过拟合问题。 Guangchen Shi,Yirui Wu,Jun Liu,Shaohua Wan,Wenhai Wang,Tong Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Chuhui Xue,Jiaxing Huang,Shijian Lu,Changhu Wang,Song Bai
title: Contextual Text Block Detection towards Scene Text Understanding
title_zh: 用于场景文本理解的上下文文本块检测
abstract: Most existing scene text detectors focus on detecting characters or words that only capture partial text messages due to missing contextual information. For a better understanding of text in scenes, it is more desired to detect contextual text blocks (CTBs) which consist of one or multiple integral text units (e.g., characters, words, or phrases) in natural reading order and transmit certain complete text messages. This paper presents contextual text detection, a new setup that detects CTBs for better understanding of texts in scenes. We formulate the new setup by a dual detection task which first detects integral text units and then groups them into a CTB. To this end, we design a novel scene text clustering technique that treats integral text units as tokens and groups them (belonging to the same CTB) into an ordered token sequence. In addition, we create two datasets SCUT-CTW-Context and ReCTS-Context to facilitate future research, where each CTB is well annotated by an ordered sequence of integral text units. Further, we introduce three metrics that measure contextual text detection in local accuracy, continuity, and global accuracy. Extensive experiments show that our method accurately detects CTBs which effectively facilitates downstream tasks such as text classification and translation. The project is available at https://sg-vilab.github.io/publication/xue2022contextual/.
summary: Most existing scene text detectors focus on detecting characters or words that only capture partial text messages due to missing contextual information. For a better understanding of text in scenes, it is more desired to detect contextual text blocks (CTBs) which consist of one or multiple integral text units (e.g., characters, words, or phrases) in natural reading order and transmit certain complete text messages. This paper presents contextual text detection, a new setup that detects CTBs for better understanding of texts in scenes. We formulate the new setup by a dual detection task which first detects integral text units and then groups them into a CTB. To this end, we design a novel scene text clustering technique that treats integral text units as tokens and groups them (belonging to the same CTB) into an ordered token sequence. In addition, we create two datasets SCUT-CTW-Context and ReCTS-Context to facilitate future research, where each CTB is well annotated by an ordered sequence of integral text units. Further, we introduce three metrics that measure contextual text detection in local accuracy, continuity, and global accuracy. Extensive experiments show that our method accurately detects CTBs which effectively facilitates downstream tasks such as text classification and translation. The project is available at https://sg-vilab.github.io/publication/xue2022contextual/.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的场景文本检测器专注于检测由于缺少上下文信息而仅捕获部分文本消息的字符或单词。为了更好地理解场景中的文本，更需要检测由一个或多个按自然阅读顺序的完整文本单元（例如字符、单词或短语）组成的上下文文本块（CTB）并传输某些完整的文本消息。本文介绍了上下文文本检测，这是一种检测 CTB 以更好地理解场景中文本的新设置。我们通过双重检测任务制定新的设置，该任务首先检测完整的文本单元，然后将它们分组为 CTB。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的场景文本聚类技术，将完整的文本单元视为令牌并将它们（属于同一 CTB）分组为有序的令牌序列。此外，我们创建了两个数据集 SCUT-CTW-Context 和 ReCTS-Context 以促进未来的研究，其中每个 CTB 都由完整文本单元的有序序列进行了很好的注释。此外，我们引入了三个衡量上下文文本检测局部准确性、连续性和全局准确性的指标。大量实验表明，我们的方法可以准确地检测 CTB，从而有效地促进文本分类和翻译等下游任务。该项目位于 https://sg-vilab.github.io/publication/xue2022contextual/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的场景文本理解方法，旨在检测上下文文本块（CTBs），以更好地理解场景中的文本信息。
AI.motivation: 现有的场景文本检测方法主要关注字符或单词的检测，由于缺乏上下文信息，无法捕捉完整的文本信息。为了更好地理解场景中的文本，需要检测包含多个完整文本单元（如字符、单词或短语）的上下文文本块。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的检测设置，通过双检测任务来检测CTBs：首先检测完整的文本单元，然后将它们分组为CTB。为此，设计了一种新的场景文本聚类技术，将完整文本单元视为标记，并将它们（属于同一CTB）聚合成有序的标记序列。此外，创建了两个数据集SCUT-CTW-Context和ReCTS-Context，并引入了三个指标来衡量上下文文本检测的局部准确性、连续性和全局准确性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能够准确检测CTBs，从而有效促进下游任务如文本分类和翻译。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在场景文本理解中具有重要意义，能够更准确地检测上下文文本块，为未来的研究提供了新的方向和数据集支持。

authors_text: Xuyang Shen,Jo Plested,Sabrina Caldwell,Yiran Zhong,Tom Gedeon
title: AMF: Adaptable Weighting Fusion with Multiple Fine-tuning for Image Classification
title_zh: AMF：具有多重微调的自适应加权融合，用于图像分类
abstract: Fine-tuning is widely applied in image classification tasks as a transfer learning approach. It re-uses the knowledge from a source task to learn and obtain a high performance in target tasks. Fine-tuning is able to alleviate the challenge of insufficient training data and expensive labelling of new data. However, standard fine-tuning has limited performance in complex data distributions. To address this issue, we propose the Adaptable Multi-tuning method, which adaptively determines each data sample's fine-tuning strategy. In this framework, multiple fine-tuning settings and one policy network are defined. The policy network in Adaptable Multi-tuning can dynamically adjust to an optimal weighting to feed different samples into models that are trained using different fine-tuning strategies. Our method outperforms the standard fine-tuning approach by 1.69%, 2.79% on the datasets FGVC-Aircraft, and Describable Texture, yielding comparable performance on the datasets Stanford Cars, CIFAR-10, and Fashion-MNIST.
summary: Fine-tuning is widely applied in image classification tasks as a transfer learning approach. It re-uses the knowledge from a source task to learn and obtain a high performance in target tasks. Fine-tuning is able to alleviate the challenge of insufficient training data and expensive labelling of new data. However, standard fine-tuning has limited performance in complex data distributions. To address this issue, we propose the Adaptable Multi-tuning method, which adaptively determines each data sample's fine-tuning strategy. In this framework, multiple fine-tuning settings and one policy network are defined. The policy network in Adaptable Multi-tuning can dynamically adjust to an optimal weighting to feed different samples into models that are trained using different fine-tuning strategies. Our method outperforms the standard fine-tuning approach by 1.69%, 2.79% on the datasets FGVC-Aircraft, and Describable Texture, yielding comparable performance on the datasets Stanford Cars, CIFAR-10, and Fashion-MNIST.
abstract_zh: 微调作为一种迁移学习方法广泛应用于图像分类任务中。它重用源任务中的知识来学习并在目标任务中获得高性能。微调能够缓解训练数据不足和新数据标签成本高昂的挑战。然而，标准微调在复杂数据分布中的性能有限。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了自适应多重调整方法，它自适应地确定每个数据样本的微调策略。在此框架中，定义了多个微调设置和一个策略网络。自适应多重调整中的策略网络可以动态调整到最佳权重，将不同的样本输入到使用不同微调策略训练的模型中。我们的方法在 FGVC-Aircraft 和 DESribable Texture 数据集上的性能分别比标准微调方法高 1.69% 和 2.79%，在斯坦福汽车、CIFAR-10 和 Fashion-MNIST 数据集上的性能相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AMF的可适应加权融合方法，通过多策略微调提升图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统微调在复杂数据分布下表现有限，无法有效应对不同样本的特性差异，需设计自适应策略优化模型性能。
AI.method: 构建包含多种微调设置和策略网络的框架，策略网络动态分配样本至不同微调模型，实现加权融合。
AI.result: 在FGVC-Aircraft和Describable Texture数据集上分别超越标准微调1.69%和2.79%，其他数据集表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 自适应多策略微调能有效应对复杂数据分布，证明了动态权重分配在提升图像分类性能中的价值。

authors_text: Fengjun Li,Xin Feng,Fanglin Chen,Guangming Lu,Wenjie Pei
title: Learning Generalizable Latent Representations for Novel Degradations in Super Resolution
title_zh: 学习超分辨率中新退化的可概括潜在表示
abstract: Typical methods for blind image super-resolution (SR) focus on dealing with unknown degradations by directly estimating them or learning the degradation representations in a latent space. A potential limitation of these methods is that they assume the unknown degradations can be simulated by the integration of various handcrafted degradations (e.g., bicubic downsampling), which is not necessarily true. The real-world degradations can be beyond the simulation scope by the handcrafted degradations, which are referred to as novel degradations. In this work, we propose to learn a latent representation space for degradations, which can be generalized from handcrafted (base) degradations to novel degradations. The obtained representations for a novel degradation in this latent space are then leveraged to generate degraded images consistent with the novel degradation to compose paired training data for SR model. Furthermore, we perform variational inference to match the posterior of degradations in latent representation space with a prior distribution (e.g., Gaussian distribution). Consequently, we are able to sample more high-quality representations for a novel degradation to augment the training data for SR model. We conduct extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets to validate the effectiveness and advantages of our method for blind super-resolution with novel degradations.

In this work, we propose to learn a latent representation space for degradations, which can be generalized from handcrafted (base) degradations to novel degradations. The obtained representations for a novel degradation in this latent space are then leveraged to generate degraded images consistent with the novel degradation to compose paired training data for SR model. Furthermore, we perform variational inference to match the posterior of degradations in latent representation space with a prior distribution (e.g., Gaussian distribution). Consequently, we are able to sample more high-quality representations for a novel degradation to augment the training data for SR model. abstract_zh: 盲图像超分辨率（SR）的典型方法侧重于通过直接估计未知的退化或学习潜在空间中的退化表示来处理未知的退化。这些方法的一个潜在限制是，它们假设未知的退化可以通过集成各种手工退化（例如双三次下采样）来模拟，但这不一定是正确的。现实世界的降级可以通过手工降级超出模拟范围，这被称为新颖的降级。在这项工作中，我们建议学习退化的潜在表示空间，它可以从手工（基础）退化推广到新颖的退化。然后，利用所获得的该潜在空间中新退化的表示来生成与新退化一致的退化图像，以构成 SR 模型的配对训练数据。此外，我们执行变分推理，将潜在表示空间中的退化后验与先验分布（例如高斯分布）进行匹配。因此，我们能够为新的降级采样更多高质量的表示，以增强 SR 模型的训练数据。我们对合成数据集和真实数据集进行了广泛的实验，以验证我们的方法在具有新颖降级的盲超分辨率方面的有效性和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习可泛化潜在表示的方法，以解决超分辨率中新型退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有盲超分辨率方法依赖手工设计退化模拟，但现实中的新型退化超出其模拟范围，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 构建潜在退化表示空间，将手工退化推广至新型退化，并通过变分推断匹配先验分布以增强训练数据。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法对新型退化的有效性，提升了盲超分辨率性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在表示空间与变分推断，模型能有效处理未知新型退化，优于传统方法。

A potential limitation of these methods is that they assume the unknown degradations can be simulated by the integration of various handcrafted degradations (e.g., bicubic downsampling), which is not necessarily true. Furthermore, we perform variational inference to match the posterior of degradations in latent representation space with a prior distribution (e.g., Gaussian distribution). Consequently, we are able to sample more high-quality representations for a novel degradation to augment the training data for SR model. authors_text: Senay Cakir,Marcel Gauß,Kai Häppeler,Yassine Ounajjar,Fabian Heinle,Reiner Marchthaler
title: Semantic Segmentation for Autonomous Driving: Model Evaluation, Dataset Generation, Perspective Comparison, and Real-Time Capability
title_zh: 自动驾驶语义分割：模型评估、数据集生成、视角比较和实时能力
abstract: Environmental perception is an important aspect within the field of autonomous vehicles that provides crucial information about the driving domain, including but not limited to identifying clear driving areas and surrounding obstacles. Semantic segmentation is a widely used perception method for self-driving cars that associates each pixel of an image with a predefined class. In this context, several segmentation models are evaluated regarding accuracy and efficiency. Experimental results on the generated dataset confirm that the segmentation model FasterSeg is fast enough to be used in realtime on lowpower computational (embedded) devices in self-driving cars. A simple method is also introduced to generate synthetic training data for the model. Moreover, the accuracy of the first-person perspective and the bird's eye view perspective are compared. For a $320 \times 256$ input in the first-person perspective, FasterSeg achieves $65.44\,\%$ mean Intersection over Union (mIoU), and for a $320 \times 256$ input from the bird's eye view perspective, FasterSeg achieves $64.08\,\%$ mIoU. Both perspectives achieve a frame rate of $247.11$ Frames per Second (FPS) on the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier. Lastly, the frame rate and the accuracy with respect to the arithmetic 16-bit Floating Point (FP16) and 32-bit Floating Point (FP32) of both perspectives are measured and compared on the target hardware.
summary: Environmental perception is an important aspect within the field of autonomous vehicles that provides crucial information about the driving domain, including but not limited to identifying clear driving areas and surrounding obstacles. Semantic segmentation is a widely used perception method for self-driving cars that associates each pixel of an image with a predefined class. Experimental results on the generated dataset confirm that the segmentation model FasterSeg is fast enough to be used in realtime on lowpower computational (embedded) devices in self-driving cars. A simple method is also introduced to generate synthetic training data for the model. Moreover, the accuracy of the first-person perspective and the bird's eye view perspective are compared. For a $320 \times 256$ input in the first-person perspective, FasterSeg achieves $65.44\,\%$ mean Intersection over Union (mIoU), and for a $320 \times 256$ input from the bird's eye view perspective, FasterSeg achieves $64.08\,\%$ mIoU. Both perspectives achieve a frame rate of $247.11$ Frames per Second (FPS) on the NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier. Lastly, the frame rate and the accuracy with respect to the arithmetic 16-bit Floating Point (FP16) and 32-bit Floating Point (FP32) of both perspectives are measured and compared on the target hardware.
abstract_zh: 环境感知是自动驾驶汽车领域的一个重要方面，它提供有关驾驶领域的重要信息，包括但不限于识别清晰的驾驶区域和周围障碍物。语义分割是自动驾驶汽车广泛使用的感知方法，它将图像的每个像素与预定义的类别相关联。在这种情况下，评估了几种分割模型的准确性和效率。生成的数据集的实验结果证实，分割模型 FasterSeg 足够快，可以在自动驾驶汽车的低功耗计算（嵌入式）设备上实时使用。还介绍了一种简单的方法来生成模型的合成训练数据。而且，还比较了第一人称视角和鸟瞰视角的准确度。对于第一人称视角下的 $320 × 256$ 输入，FasterSeg 实现了 $65.44\,\%$ 并集平均交集 (mIoU)，而对于鸟瞰视角下的 $320 \times 256$ 输入，FasterSeg 实现了 $64.08\,\%$ mIoU。两个视角在 NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier 上均达到了 247.11 美元每秒帧数 (FPS)。最后，在目标硬件上测量并比较了两个视角的算术16位浮点（FP16）和32位浮点（FP32）的帧率和精度。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了自动驾驶中的语义分割模型，生成数据集，比较视角差异，并验证实时性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要高效准确的环境感知，语义分割在低功耗设备上的实时性与精度是关键挑战。
AI.method: 评估多种分割模型，生成合成训练数据，对比第一视角与鸟瞰视角的精度，使用FasterSeg在NVIDIA Jetson AGX Xavier上测试FPS及FP16/FP32性能。
AI.result: FasterSeg在第一视角达65.44%mIoU，鸟瞰视角64.08%mIoU，均实现247.11 FPS；FP16与FP32在精度和速度上存在差异。
AI.conclusion: FasterSeg满足自动驾驶嵌入式设备的实时性需求，合成数据生成方法有效，视角选择影响分割精度。

authors_text: Xiaofu Jin,Mingming Fan
title: "I Used To Carry A Wallet, Now I Just Need To Carry My Phone": Understanding Current Banking Practices and Challenges Among Older Adults in China
title_zh: “以前带钱包，现在只需要带手机”：了解中国老年人当前的银行业务实践和挑战
comment: The 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '22)
comments: The 24th International ACM SIGACCESS Conference on Computers and Accessibility (ASSETS '22)
abstract: Managing finances is crucial for older adults who are retired and may rely on savings to ensure their life quality. As digital banking platforms (e.g., mobile apps, electronic payment) gradually replace physical ones, it is critical to understand how they adapt to digital banking and the potential frictions they experience. We conducted semi-structured interviews with 16 older adults in China, where the aging population is the largest and digital banking grows fast. We also interviewed bank employees to gain complementary perspectives of these help givers. Our findings show that older adults used both physical and digital platforms as an ecosystem based on perceived pros and cons. Perceived usefulness, self-confidence, and social influence were key motivators for learning digital banking. They experienced app-related (e.g., insufficient error-recovery support) and user-related challenges (e.g., trust, security and privacy concerns, low perceived self-efficacy) and developed coping strategies. We discuss design considerations to improve their banking experiences.
summary: Managing finances is crucial for older adults who are retired and may rely on savings to ensure their life quality. As digital banking platforms (e.g., mobile apps, electronic payment) gradually replace physical ones, it is critical to understand how they adapt to digital banking and the potential frictions they experience. We conducted semi-structured interviews with 16 older adults in China, where the aging population is the largest and digital banking grows fast. We also interviewed bank employees to gain complementary perspectives of these help givers. Our findings show that older adults used both physical and digital platforms as an ecosystem based on perceived pros and cons. Perceived usefulness, self-confidence, and social influence were key motivators for learning digital banking. They experienced app-related (e.g., insufficient error-recovery support) and user-related challenges (e.g., trust, security and privacy concerns, low perceived self-efficacy) and developed coping strategies. We discuss design considerations to improve their banking experiences.
abstract_zh: 财务管理对于退休的老年人来说至关重要，他们可能依靠储蓄来确保他们的生活质量。随着数字银行平台（例如移动应用程序、电子支付）逐渐取代实体银行平台，了解它们如何适应数字银行以及它们遇到的潜在摩擦至关重要。我们对中国的 16 名老年人进行了半结构化访谈，中国是老龄化人口最多、数字银行发展最快的国家。我们还采访了银行员工，以获得这些帮助者的互补观点。我们的研究结果表明，老年人根据感知的利弊使用物理和数字平台作为生态系统。感知有用性、自信和社会影响力是学习数字银行业务的关键动力。他们经历了与应用程序相关的（例如，错误恢复支持不足）和用户相关的挑战（例如，信任、安全和隐私问题、自我效能感低），并制定了应对策略。我们讨论改善银行体验的设计注意事项。

AI.tldr: 研究中国老年人在数字银行使用中的适应策略与挑战，分析其对数字银行平台的接受度及面临的障碍。
AI.motivation: 随着数字银行取代传统实体银行，老年人因技术适应能力不足可能面临金融管理困难，需探索其适应机制与改进方案。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈16位中国老年人及银行员工，结合用户行为与服务提供者视角，分析数字银行使用现状与挑战。
AI.result: 老年人基于利弊选择物理与数字平台结合的生态系统，关键动因包括感知有用性、自信心及社会影响，但存在应用功能缺陷、安全顾虑及自我效能感低等挑战，并发展出应对策略。
AI.conclusion: 需优化数字银行设计，增强错误恢复支持、隐私保障及用户引导，以提升老年用户金融体验与数字包容性。

search_text: "I Used To Carry A Wallet, Now I Just Need To Carry My Phone": Understanding Current Banking Practices and Challenges Among Older Adults in China “以前带钱包，现在只需要带手机”：了解中国老年人当前的银行业务实践和挑战 Managing finances is crucial for older adults who are retired and may rely on savings to ensure their life quality. As digital banking platforms (e.g., mobile apps, electronic payment) gradually replace physical ones, it is critical to understand how they adapt to digital banking and the potential frictions they experience. We conducted semi-structured interviews with 16 older adults in China, where the aging population is the largest and digital banking grows fast. We also interviewed bank employees to gain complementary perspectives of these help givers. Our findings show that older adults used both physical and digital platforms as an ecosystem based on perceived pros and cons. Perceived usefulness, self-confidence, and social influence were key motivators for learning digital banking. They experienced app-related (e.g., insufficient error-recovery support) and user-related challenges (e.g., trust, security and privacy concerns, low perceived self-efficacy) and developed coping strategies. We discuss design considerations to improve their banking experiences. 财务管理对于退休的老年人来说至关重要，他们可能依靠储蓄来确保他们的生活质量。随着数字银行平台（例如移动应用程序、电子支付）逐渐取代实体银行平台，了解它们如何适应数字银行以及它们遇到的潜在摩擦至关重要。我们对中国的 16 名老年人进行了半结构化访谈，中国是老龄化人口最多、数字银行发展最快的国家。我们还采访了银行员工，以获得这些帮助者的互补观点。我们的研究结果表明，老年人根据感知的利弊使用物理和数字平台作为生态系统。感知有用性、自信和社会影响力是学习数字银行业务的关键动力。他们经历了与应用程序相关的（例如，错误恢复支持不足）和用户相关的挑战（例如，信任、安全和隐私问题、自我效能感低），并制定了应对策略。我们讨论改善银行体验的设计注意事项。 研究中国老年人在数字银行使用中的适应策略与挑战，分析其对数字银行平台的接受度及面临的障碍。 Xiaofu Jin,Mingming Fan cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Yiming Qian,James H. Elder
title: A Reliable Online Method for Joint Estimation of Focal Length and Camera Rotation
title_zh: 一种可靠的焦距和相机旋转联合估计在线方法
abstract: Linear perspectivecues deriving from regularities of the built environment can be used to recalibrate both intrinsic and extrinsic camera parameters online, but these estimates can be unreliable due to irregularities in the scene, uncertainties in line segment estimation and background clutter. Here we address this challenge through four initiatives. First, we use the PanoContext panoramic image dataset [27] to curate a novel and realistic dataset of planar projections over a broad range of scenes, focal lengths and camera poses. Second, we use this novel dataset and the YorkUrbanDB [4] to systematically evaluate the linear perspective deviation measures frequently found in the literature and show that the choice of deviation measure and likelihood model has a huge impact on reliability. Third, we use these findings to create a novel system for online camera calibration we call fR, and show that it outperforms the prior state of the art, substantially reducing error in estimated camera rotation and focal length. Our fourth contribution is a novel and efficient approach to estimating uncertainty that can dramatically improve online reliability for performance-critical applications by strategically selecting which frames to use for recalibration.
summary: Linear perspectivecues deriving from regularities of the built environment can be used to recalibrate both intrinsic and extrinsic camera parameters online, but these estimates can be unreliable due to irregularities in the scene, uncertainties in line segment estimation and background clutter. Here we address this challenge through four initiatives. First, we use the PanoContext panoramic image dataset [27] to curate a novel and realistic dataset of planar projections over a broad range of scenes, focal lengths and camera poses. Second, we use this novel dataset and the YorkUrbanDB [4] to systematically evaluate the linear perspective deviation measures frequently found in the literature and show that the choice of deviation measure and likelihood model has a huge impact on reliability. Third, we use these findings to create a novel system for online camera calibration we call fR, and show that it outperforms the prior state of the art, substantially reducing error in estimated camera rotation and focal length. Our fourth contribution is a novel and efficient approach to estimating uncertainty that can dramatically improve online reliability for performance-critical applications by strategically selecting which frames to use for recalibration.
abstract_zh: 源自建筑环境规律的线性透视线索可用于在线重新校准内部和外部相机参数，但由于场景中的不规则性、线段估计的不确定性和背景杂乱，这些估计可能不可靠。 Here we address this challenge through four initiatives.首先，我们使用 PanoContext 全景图像数据集 [27] 来策划一个新颖且真实的平面投影数据集，涵盖广泛的场景、焦距和相机姿势。其次，我们使用这个新颖的数据集和 YorkUrbanDB [4] 系统地评估文献中常见的线性透视偏差度量，并表明偏差度量和似然模型的选择对可靠性有巨大影响。第三，我们利用这些发现创建了一种新颖的在线相机校准系统，我们称之为 fR，并表明它优于现有技术，大大减少了估计相机旋转和焦距的误差。我们的第四个贡献是一种新颖且有效的方法来估计不确定性，该方法可以通过战略性地选择用于重新校准的框架来显着提高性能关键型应用程序的在线可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可靠的在线方法，用于联合估计相机焦距和旋转参数。
AI.motivation: 现有基于线性透视线索的在线相机标定方法因场景不规则性、线段估计不确定性和背景杂乱而可靠性不足。
AI.method: 构建全景投影数据集，系统评估偏差度量方法，开发新型在线标定系统fR，并提出高效不确定性估计策略。
AI.result: fR系统显著降低相机旋转和焦距估计误差，不确定性估计方法提升关键应用的在线可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据集构建、度量优化和算法创新，实现了更可靠且高效的在线相机参数联合估计方案。

authors_text: Dongning Ma,Xun Jiao
title: Hyperdimensional Computing vs. Neural Networks: Comparing Architecture and Learning Process
title_zh: 超维计算与神经网络：比较架构和学习过程
abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) has obtained abundant attention as an emerging non von Neumann computing paradigm. Inspired by the way human brain functions, HDC leverages high dimensional patterns to perform learning tasks. Compared to neural networks, HDC has shown advantages such as energy efficiency and smaller model size, but sub-par learning capabilities in sophisticated applications. Recently, researchers have observed when combined with neural network components, HDC can achieve better performance than conventional HDC models. This motivates us to explore the deeper insights behind theoretical foundations of HDC, particularly the connection and differences with neural networks. In this paper, we make a comparative study between HDC and neural network to provide a different angle where HDC can be derived from an extremely compact neural network trained upfront. Experimental results show such neural network-derived HDC model can achieve up to 21% and 5% accuracy increase from conventional and learning-based HDC models respectively. This paper aims to provide more insights and shed lights on future directions for researches on this popular emerging learning scheme.
summary: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) has obtained abundant attention as an emerging non von Neumann computing paradigm. Inspired by the way human brain functions, HDC leverages high dimensional patterns to perform learning tasks. Compared to neural networks, HDC has shown advantages such as energy efficiency and smaller model size, but sub-par learning capabilities in sophisticated applications. Recently, researchers have observed when combined with neural network components, HDC can achieve better performance than conventional HDC models. This motivates us to explore the deeper insights behind theoretical foundations of HDC, particularly the connection and differences with neural networks. In this paper, we make a comparative study between HDC and neural network to provide a different angle where HDC can be derived from an extremely compact neural network trained upfront. Experimental results show such neural network-derived HDC model can achieve up to 21% and 5% accuracy increase from conventional and learning-based HDC models respectively. This paper aims to provide more insights and shed lights on future directions for researches on this popular emerging learning scheme.
abstract_zh: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) has obtained abundant attention as an emerging non von Neumann computing paradigm. Inspired by the way human brain functions, HDC leverages high dimensional patterns to perform learning tasks.与神经网络相比，HDC 显示了能源效率和较小模型尺寸等优势，但在复杂应用中的学习能力低于标准。最近，研究人员观察到，当与神经网络组件结合时，HDC 可以实现比传统 HDC 模型更好的性能。这促使我们探索 HDC 理论基础背后更深入的见解，特别是与神经网络的联系和差异。在本文中，我们对 HDC 和神经网络进行了比较研究，以提供一个不同的角度，从预先训练的极其紧凑的神经网络中导出 HDC。实验结果表明，与传统 HDC 模型和基于学习的 HDC 模型相比，这种神经网络衍生的 HDC 模型的准确率分别提高了 21% 和 5%。 This paper aims to provide more insights and shed lights on future directions for researches on this popular emerging learning scheme.

AI.tldr: 比较超维计算（HDC）与神经网络的架构和学习过程，探索HDC如何从预训练的极简神经网络中衍生以提升性能。
AI.motivation: HDC在复杂任务中学习能力不足，但结合神经网络组件后性能提升，需深入探讨其理论基础及与神经网络的关联。
AI.method: 通过比较分析，将HDC模型视为由预训练的极简神经网络衍生，并进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验显示，神经网络衍生的HDC模型在准确率上分别比传统和基于学习的HDC模型提升21%和5%。
AI.conclusion: HDC可借鉴神经网络优势，融合两者可提升性能，为未来研究提供新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 比较超维计算（HDC）与神经网络的架构和学习过程，探索HDC如何从预训练的极简神经网络中衍生以提升性能。

This paper aims to provide more insights and shed lights on future directions for researches on this popular emerging learning scheme. Inspired by the way human brain functions, HDC leverages high dimensional patterns to perform learning tasks.与神经网络相比，HDC 显示了能源效率和较小模型尺寸等优势，但在复杂应用中的学习能力低于标准。最近，研究人员观察到，当与神经网络组件结合时，HDC 可以实现比传统 HDC 模型更好的性能。这促使我们探索 HDC 理论基础背后更深入的见解，特别是与神经网络的联系和差异。在本文中，我们对 HDC 和神经网络进行了比较研究，以提供一个不同的角度，从预先训练的极其紧凑的神经网络中导出 HDC。实验结果表明，与传统 HDC 模型和基于学习的 HDC 模型相比，这种神经网络衍生的 HDC 模型的准确率分别提高了 21% 和 5%。 This paper aims to provide more insights and shed lights on future directions for researches on this popular emerging learning scheme. 比较超维计算（HDC）与神经网络的架构和学习过程，探索HDC如何从预训练的极简神经网络中衍生以提升性能。 Dongning Ma,Xun Jiao cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Aref Miri Rekavandi,Lian Xu,Farid Boussaid,Abd-Krim Seghouane,Stephen Hoefs,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: A Guide to Image and Video based Small Object Detection using Deep Learning : Case Study of Maritime Surveillance
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行基于图像和视频的小物体检测指南：海上监视案例研究
abstract: Small object detection (SOD) in optical images and videos is a challenging problem that even state-of-the-art generic object detection methods fail to accurately localize and identify such objects. Typically, small objects appear in real-world due to large camera-object distance. Because small objects occupy only a small area in the input image (e.g., less than 10%), the information extracted from such a small area is not always rich enough to support decision making. Multidisciplinary strategies are being developed by researchers working at the interface of deep learning and computer vision to enhance the performance of SOD deep learning based methods. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive review of over 160 research papers published between 2017 and 2022 in order to survey this growing subject. This paper summarizes the existing literature and provide a taxonomy that illustrates the broad picture of current research. We investigate how to improve the performance of small object detection in maritime environments, where increasing performance is critical. By establishing a connection between generic and maritime SOD research, future directions have been identified. In addition, the popular datasets that have been used for SOD for generic and maritime applications are discussed, and also well-known evaluation metrics for the state-of-the-art methods on some of the datasets are provided.
summary: Small object detection (SOD) in optical images and videos is a challenging problem that even state-of-the-art generic object detection methods fail to accurately localize and identify such objects. abstract_zh: 光学图像和视频中的小物体检测（SOD）是一个具有挑战性的问题，即使是最先进的通用物体检测方法也无法准确定位和识别此类物体。通常，由于相机与物体之间的距离较大，因此在现实世界中会出现小物体。由于小物体仅占据输入图像中的一小部分区域（例如，小于 10%），因此从如此小的区域中提取的信息并不总是足够丰富以支持决策。研究深度学习和计算机视觉接口的研究人员正在开发多学科策略，以提高基于 SOD 深度学习方法的性能。在本文中，我们对 2017 年至 2022 年间发表的 160 多篇研究论文进行了全面回顾，以调查这一不断发展的主题。本文总结了现有文献并提供了一个分类法来说明当前研究的概况。我们研究如何提高海洋环境中小物体检测的性能，其中提高性能至关重要。通过在通用 SOD 研究和海事 SOD 研究之间建立联系，未来的方向已经确定。此外，还讨论了用于通用和海事应用的 SOD 的流行数据集，并且还提供了一些数据集上最先进方法的众所周知的评估指标。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在图像和视频中基于小物体检测的方法，并探讨其在海上监视中的应用。
AI.motivation: 小物体检测在海上监视中面临挑战，现有方法效果不佳，需系统综述以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过综述2017-2022年的160余篇文献，总结现有方法，建立分类体系，分析海上环境下的改进策略，并讨论数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 总结了当前研究现状，提出了分类法，明确了未来研究方向，并提供了常用数据集和评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 需针对海上环境优化检测方法，并促进深度学习与计算机视觉的跨学科研究。

authors_text: Adam Polak,Maksym Zub
title: Learning-Augmented Maximum Flow
title_zh: 学习增强最大流
abstract: We propose a framework for speeding up maximum flow computation by using predictions. A prediction is a flow, i.e., an assignment of non-negative flow values to edges, which satisfies the flow conservation property, but does not necessarily respect the edge capacities of the actual instance (since these were unknown at the time of learning). We present an algorithm that, given an $m$-edge flow network and a predicted flow, computes a maximum flow in $O(mη)$ time, where $η$ is the $\ell_1$ error of the prediction, i.e., the sum over the edges of the absolute difference between the predicted and optimal flow values. Moreover, we prove that, given an oracle access to a distribution over flow networks, it is possible to efficiently PAC-learn a prediction minimizing the expected $\ell_1$ error over that distribution. Our results fit into the recent line of research on learning-augmented algorithms, which aims to improve over worst-case bounds of classical algorithms by using predictions, e.g., machine-learned from previous similar instances. So far, the main focus in this area was on improving competitive ratios for online problems. Following Dinitz et al. (NeurIPS 2021), our results are one of the firsts to improve the running time of an offline problem.
summary: We propose a framework for speeding up maximum flow computation by using predictions. A prediction is a flow, i.e., an assignment of non-negative flow values to edges, which satisfies the flow conservation property, but does not necessarily respect the edge capacities of the actual instance (since these were unknown at the time of learning). We present an algorithm that, given an $m$-edge flow network and a predicted flow, computes a maximum flow in $O(mη)$ time, where $η$ is the $\ell_1$ error of the prediction, i.e., the sum over the edges of the absolute difference between the predicted and optimal flow values. Moreover, we prove that, given an oracle access to a distribution over flow networks, it is possible to efficiently PAC-learn a prediction minimizing the expected $\ell_1$ error over that distribution. Our results fit into the recent line of research on learning-augmented algorithms, which aims to improve over worst-case bounds of classical algorithms by using predictions, e.g., machine-learned from previous similar instances. So far, the main focus in this area was on improving competitive ratios for online problems. Following Dinitz et al. (NeurIPS 2021), our results are one of the firsts to improve the running time of an offline problem.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个通过使用预测来加速最大流计算的框架。预测是一个流，即将非负流值分配给边缘，它满足流守恒性质，但不一定尊重实际实例的边缘容量（因为这些在学习时是未知的）。我们提出了一种算法，给定 $m$ 边流网络和预测流，在 $O(mη)$ 时间内计算最大流，其中 $η$ 是预测的 $\ell_1$ 误差，即预测流值与最佳流值之间的绝对差的边缘总和。此外，我们证明，如果预言机访问流网络上的分布，则可以有效地 PAC 学习预测，从而最小化该分布上的预期 $\ell_1$ 误差。我们的结果符合最近关于学习增强算法的研究，该算法旨在通过使用预测（例如从以前的类似实例中进行机器学习）来改进经典算法的最坏情况范围。到目前为止，该领域的主要重点是提高在线问题的竞争率。继迪尼茨等人之后。 （NeurIPS 2021），我们的结果是第一个改善离线问题运行时间的结果之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用预测加速最大流计算的框架，通过结合机器学习预测与经典算法，降低计算时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统最大流算法时间复杂度较高，而学习增强算法通过引入预测可优化性能，但此前研究多聚焦在线问题，针对离线问题的探索较少。
AI.method: 设计基于预测流量的算法，时间复杂度为O(mη)（η为预测ℓ1误差），并证明可通过PAC学习高效获取最优预测模型。
AI.result: 实现依赖预测误差的加速算法，且证明在给定网络分布下可PAC学习最小化预期误差的预测模型，为离线问题提供新思路。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次将学习增强方法应用于离线最大流问题，展示了机器学习与经典算法结合在优化运行时间上的潜力。

authors_text: Zerui Chen,Yana Hasson,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev
title: AlignSDF: Pose-Aligned Signed Distance Fields for Hand-Object Reconstruction
title_zh: AlignSDF：用于手部物体重建的姿势对齐有符号距离场
abstract: Recent work achieved impressive progress towards joint reconstruction of hands and manipulated objects from monocular color images. Existing methods focus on two alternative representations in terms of either parametric meshes or signed distance fields (SDFs). On one side, parametric models can benefit from prior knowledge at the cost of limited shape deformations and mesh resolutions. Mesh models, hence, may fail to precisely reconstruct details such as contact surfaces of hands and objects. SDF-based methods, on the other side, can represent arbitrary details but are lacking explicit priors. In this work we aim to improve SDF models using priors provided by parametric representations. In particular, we propose a joint learning framework that disentangles the pose and the shape. We obtain hand and object poses from parametric models and use them to align SDFs in 3D space. We show that such aligned SDFs better focus on reconstructing shape details and improve reconstruction accuracy both for hands and objects. We evaluate our method and demonstrate significant improvements over the state of the art on the challenging ObMan and DexYCB benchmarks.
summary: Recent work achieved impressive progress towards joint reconstruction of hands and manipulated objects from monocular color images. Existing methods focus on two alternative representations in terms of either parametric meshes or signed distance fields (SDFs). On one side, parametric models can benefit from prior knowledge at the cost of limited shape deformations and mesh resolutions. Mesh models, hence, may fail to precisely reconstruct details such as contact surfaces of hands and objects. SDF-based methods, on the other side, can represent arbitrary details but are lacking explicit priors. In this work we aim to improve SDF models using priors provided by parametric representations. In particular, we propose a joint learning framework that disentangles the pose and the shape. We obtain hand and object poses from parametric models and use them to align SDFs in 3D space. We show that such aligned SDFs better focus on reconstructing shape details and improve reconstruction accuracy both for hands and objects. We evaluate our method and demonstrate significant improvements over the state of the art on the challenging ObMan and DexYCB benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作在从单眼彩色图像联合重建手和操纵物体方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展。现有方法侧重于参数化网格或有符号距离场 (SDF) 方面的两种替代表示。一方面，参数化模型可以从先验知识中受益，但代价是形状变形和网格分辨率有限。因此，网格模型可能无法精确重建细节，例如手和物体的接触表面。另一方面，基于 SDF 的方法可以表示任意细节，但缺乏明确的先验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是使用参数表示提供的先验来改进 SDF 模型。特别是，我们提出了一个联合学习框架，可以解开姿势和形状。我们从参数模型中获取手部和物体的姿势，并使用它们在 3D 空间中对齐 SDF。我们表明，这种对齐的 SDF 可以更好地专注于重建形状细节，并提高手和物体的重建精度。我们评估了我们的方法，并在具有挑战性的 ObMan 和 DexYCB 基准上展示了相对于现有技术的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AlignSDF方法，通过姿态对齐的符号距离场（SDF）实现手部与物体的联合重建。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化网格模型受限于形状变形能力，而SDF方法缺乏显式先验，难以精确重建手部与物体接触细节。
AI.method: 设计联合学习框架分离姿态与形状，利用参数模型获取手部和物体姿态，基于姿态对齐SDF空间表示。
AI.result: 在ObMan和DexYCB基准测试中，手部和物体重建精度较现有方法显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 姿态对齐的SDF能有效整合参数模型先验，提升复杂交互场景下的几何细节重建能力。

search_text: AlignSDF: Pose-Aligned Signed Distance Fields for Hand-Object Reconstruction AlignSDF：用于手部物体重建的姿势对齐有符号距离场 Recent work achieved impressive progress towards joint reconstruction of hands and manipulated objects from monocular color images. Existing methods focus on two alternative representations in terms of either parametric meshes or signed distance fields (SDFs). On one side, parametric models can benefit from prior knowledge at the cost of limited shape deformations and mesh resolutions. Mesh models, hence, may fail to precisely reconstruct details such as contact surfaces of hands and objects. SDF-based methods, on the other side, can represent arbitrary details but are lacking explicit priors. In this work we aim to improve SDF models using priors provided by parametric representations. In particular, we propose a joint learning framework that disentangles the pose and the shape. We obtain hand and object poses from parametric models and use them to align SDFs in 3D space. We show that such aligned SDFs better focus on reconstructing shape details and improve reconstruction accuracy both for hands and objects. We evaluate our method and demonstrate significant improvements over the state of the art on the challenging ObMan and DexYCB benchmarks. 最近的工作在从单眼彩色图像联合重建手和操纵物体方面取得了令人印象深刻的进展。现有方法侧重于参数化网格或有符号距离场 (SDF) 方面的两种替代表示。一方面，参数化模型可以从先验知识中受益，但代价是形状变形和网格分辨率有限。因此，网格模型可能无法精确重建细节，例如手和物体的接触表面。另一方面，基于 SDF 的方法可以表示任意细节，但缺乏明确的先验。在这项工作中，我们的目标是使用参数表示提供的先验来改进 SDF 模型。特别是，我们提出了一个联合学习框架，可以解开姿势和形状。我们从参数模型中获取手部和物体的姿势，并使用它们在 3D 空间中对齐 SDF。我们表明，这种对齐的 SDF 可以更好地专注于重建形状细节，并提高手和物体的重建精度。我们评估了我们的方法，并在具有挑战性的 ObMan 和 DexYCB 基准上展示了相对于现有技术的显着改进。 本文提出AlignSDF方法，通过姿态对齐的符号距离场（SDF）实现手部与物体的联合重建。 Zerui Chen,Yana Hasson,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev cs.CV

authors_text: Hyowon Lee,Mingming Liu,Michael Scriney,Alan F. Smeaton
title: Playback-centric visualisations of video usage using weighted interactions to guide where to watch in an educational context
title_zh: 以播放为中心的视频使用可视化，使用加权交互来指导在教育环境中观看的位置
abstract: The increase in use of online educational tools has led to a large amount of educational video materials made available for students. Finding the right video content is usually supported by the overarching learning management system and its interface that organises video items by course, categories and weeks, and makes them searchable. However, once a video is found, students are left without further guidance as to what parts in that video they should focus on. In this article, an additional timeline visualisation to augment the conventional playback timeline is introduced which employs a novel playback weighting strategy in which the history of different video interactions generate scores based on the context of each playback. The resultant scores are presented on the additional timeline, making it in effect a playback-centric usage graph nuanced by how each playback was executed. Students can selectively watch those portions which the contour of the usage visualisation suggests. The visualisation was implemented and deployed in an undergraduate course at a university for two full semesters. 270 students used the system throughout both semesters watching 52 videos, guided by visualisations on what to watch. Analysis of playback logs revealed students selectively watched corresponding to the most important portions of the videos as assessed by the instructor who created the videos. The characteristics of this as a way of guiding students as to where to watch as well as a complementary tool for playback analysis, are discussed. Further insights into the potential values of this visualisation and its underlying playback weighting strategy are also discussed.

Finding the right video content is usually supported by the overarching learning management system and its interface that organises video items by course, categories and weeks, and makes them searchable. However, once a video is found, students are left without further guidance as to what parts in that video they should focus on. In this article, an additional timeline visualisation to augment the conventional playback timeline is introduced which employs a novel playback weighting strategy in which the history of different video interactions generate scores based on the context of each playback. The resultant scores are presented on the additional timeline, making it in effect a playback-centric usage graph nuanced by how each playback was executed. Students can selectively watch those portions which the contour of the usage visualisation suggests. The visualisation was implemented and deployed in an undergraduate course at a university for two full semesters. 270 students used the system throughout both semesters watching 52 videos, guided by visualisations on what to watch. Analysis of playback logs revealed students selectively watched corresponding to the most important portions of the videos as assessed by the instructor who created the videos. The characteristics of this as a way of guiding students as to where to watch as well as a complementary tool for playback analysis, are discussed. Further insights into the potential values of this visualisation and its underlying playback weighting strategy are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 在线教育工具使用的增加导致向学生提供了大量的教育视频材料。总体学习管理系统及其界面通常支持查找正确的视频内容，该系统按课程、类别和周数组织视频项目，并使其可搜索。然而，一旦找到视频，学生就无法进一步指导他们应该关注该视频中的哪些部分。在本文中，介绍了一种附加的时间线可视化来增强传统的播放时间线，该策略采用新颖的播放加权策略，其中不同视频交互的历史记录基于每次播放的上下文生成分数。结果分数显示在附加时间线上，使其实际上成为以回放为中心的使用图，并根据每次回放的执行方式进行细微差别。学生可以有选择地观看使用可视化轮廓所暗示的那些部分。该可视化在一所大学的本科课程中实施并部署了两个完整学期。两个学期都有 270 名学生使用该系统观看了 52 个视频，并以可视化方式指导观看内容。对播放日志的分析显示，学生有选择地观看了由创建视频的教师评估的视频中最重要的部分。讨论了其作为指导学生在哪里观看的方式以及回放分析的补充工具的特点。还讨论了对该可视化的潜在价值及其底层播放权重策略的进一步见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于播放历史的可视化工具，用于指导学生在观看教育视频时关注重点内容。
AI.motivation: 在线教育工具的普及使得大量视频资源可供学生使用，但学生在找到视频后缺乏进一步指导，不知道应关注哪些部分。
AI.method: 引入了一种增强型时间轴可视化工具，利用播放历史生成权重，根据播放上下文计算得分，并在时间轴上展示，以指导学生观看重点内容。
AI.result: 在大学本科课程中实施并部署了该系统，270名学生在两个学期中观看了52个视频，分析播放日志显示学生确实根据可视化工具选择了视频的重要部分。
AI.conclusion: 该可视化工具及其播放权重策略能够有效指导学生观看重点内容，并作为播放分析的补充工具，具有潜在价值。

authors_text: Qianye Yang,David Atkinson,Yunguan Fu,Tom Syer,Wen Yan,Shonit Punwani,Matthew J. Clarkson,Dean C. Barratt,Tom Vercauteren,Yipeng Hu
title: Cross-Modality Image Registration using a Training-Time Privileged Third Modality
title_zh: 使用训练时间特权第三模态的跨模态图像配准
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI, 2022)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI, 2022)
abstract: In this work, we consider the task of pairwise cross-modality image registration, which may benefit from exploiting additional images available only at training time from an additional modality that is different to those being registered. As an example, we focus on aligning intra-subject multiparametric Magnetic Resonance (mpMR) images, between T2-weighted (T2w) scans and diffusion-weighted scans with high b-value (DWI$_{high-b}$). For the application of localising tumours in mpMR images, diffusion scans with zero b-value (DWI$_{b=0}$) are considered easier to register to T2w due to the availability of corresponding features. We propose a learning from privileged modality algorithm, using a training-only imaging modality DWI$_{b=0}$, to support the challenging multi-modality registration problems. We present experimental results based on 369 sets of 3D multiparametric MRI images from 356 prostate cancer patients and report, with statistical significance, a lowered median target registration error of 4.34 mm, when registering the holdout DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w image pairs, compared with that of 7.96 mm before registration. Results also show that the proposed learning-based registration networks enabled efficient registration with comparable or better accuracy, compared with a classical iterative algorithm and other tested learning-based methods with/without the additional modality. These compared algorithms also failed to produce any significantly improved alignment between DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w in this challenging application.
summary: In this work, we consider the task of pairwise cross-modality image registration, which may benefit from exploiting additional images available only at training time from an additional modality that is different to those being registered. As an example, we focus on aligning intra-subject multiparametric Magnetic Resonance (mpMR) images, between T2-weighted (T2w) scans and diffusion-weighted scans with high b-value (DWI$_{high-b}$). For the application of localising tumours in mpMR images, diffusion scans with zero b-value (DWI$_{b=0}$) are considered easier to register to T2w due to the availability of corresponding features. We propose a learning from privileged modality algorithm, using a training-only imaging modality DWI$_{b=0}$, to support the challenging multi-modality registration problems. We present experimental results based on 369 sets of 3D multiparametric MRI images from 356 prostate cancer patients and report, with statistical significance, a lowered median target registration error of 4.34 mm, when registering the holdout DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w image pairs, compared with that of 7.96 mm before registration. Results also show that the proposed learning-based registration networks enabled efficient registration with comparable or better accuracy, compared with a classical iterative algorithm and other tested learning-based methods with/without the additional modality. These compared algorithms also failed to produce any significantly improved alignment between DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w in this challenging application.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑成对跨模态图像配准的任务，这可能受益于利用仅在训练时可用的附加图像，这些图像来自与正在注册的附加模态不同的附加图像。例如，我们专注于在 T2 加权 (T2w) 扫描和具有高 b 值 (DWI$_{high-b}$) 的扩散加权扫描之间对齐受试者体内多参数磁共振 (mpMR) 图像。对于 mpMR 图像中肿瘤定位的应用，由于相应特征的可用性，具有零 b 值 (DWI$_{b=0}$) 的扩散扫描被认为更容易注册到 T2w。我们提出了一种从特权模态算法中学习的方法，使用仅训练的成像模态 DWI$_{b=0}$，来支持具有挑战性的多模态配准问题。我们基于来自 356 名前列腺癌患者的 369 组 3D 多参数 MRI 图像提供了实验结果，并报告称，在配准保留 DWI$_{high-b}$ 和 T2w 图像对时，与配准前的 7.96 mm 相比，中位目标配准误差降低了 4.34 mm，具有统计学意义。结果还表明，与经典迭代算法和其他经过测试的有/没有附加模态的基于学习的方法相比，所提出的基于学习的配准网络能够以相当或更好的精度进行有效配准。在这个具有挑战性的应用中，这些比较算法也未能在 DWI$_{high-b}$ 和 T2w 之间产生任何显着改善的对齐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用训练时特权第三模态信息的跨模态图像配准方法，用于对齐不同模态的医学图像。
AI.motivation: 在医学图像配准任务中，不同模态的图像配准具有挑战性，而特权模态信息（如DWI$_{b=0}$）可以在训练过程中提供额外的辅助信息，从而提升配准效果。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于特权模态的深度学习方法，利用训练时可用的DWI$_{b=0}$图像作为辅助信息，提升跨模态图像配准的性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在369组前列腺癌患者的3D多参数MRI图像上，显著降低了目标配准误差，从7.96 mm降至4.34 mm，并优于经典迭代算法和其他学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过利用训练时的特权模态信息，有效提升了跨模态图像配准的准确性，为医学图像分析提供了新的解决方案。

search_text: Cross-Modality Image Registration using a Training-Time Privileged Third Modality 使用训练时间特权第三模态的跨模态图像配准 In this work, we consider the task of pairwise cross-modality image registration, which may benefit from exploiting additional images available only at training time from an additional modality that is different to those being registered. As an example, we focus on aligning intra-subject multiparametric Magnetic Resonance (mpMR) images, between T2-weighted (T2w) scans and diffusion-weighted scans with high b-value (DWI$_{high-b}$). For the application of localising tumours in mpMR images, diffusion scans with zero b-value (DWI$_{b=0}$) are considered easier to register to T2w due to the availability of corresponding features. We propose a learning from privileged modality algorithm, using a training-only imaging modality DWI$_{b=0}$, to support the challenging multi-modality registration problems. We present experimental results based on 369 sets of 3D multiparametric MRI images from 356 prostate cancer patients and report, with statistical significance, a lowered median target registration error of 4.34 mm, when registering the holdout DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w image pairs, compared with that of 7.96 mm before registration. Results also show that the proposed learning-based registration networks enabled efficient registration with comparable or better accuracy, compared with a classical iterative algorithm and other tested learning-based methods with/without the additional modality. These compared algorithms also failed to produce any significantly improved alignment between DWI$_{high-b}$ and T2w in this challenging application. 在这项工作中，我们考虑成对跨模态图像配准的任务，这可能受益于利用仅在训练时可用的附加图像，这些图像来自与正在注册的附加模态不同的附加图像。例如，我们专注于在 T2 加权 (T2w) 扫描和具有高 b 值 (DWI$_{high-b}$) 的扩散加权扫描之间对齐受试者体内多参数磁共振 (mpMR) 图像。对于 mpMR 图像中肿瘤定位的应用，由于相应特征的可用性，具有零 b 值 (DWI$_{b=0}$) 的扩散扫描被认为更容易注册到 T2w。我们提出了一种从特权模态算法中学习的方法，使用仅训练的成像模态 DWI$_{b=0}$，来支持具有挑战性的多模态配准问题。我们基于来自 356 名前列腺癌患者的 369 组 3D 多参数 MRI 图像提供了实验结果，并报告称，在配准保留 DWI$_{high-b}$ 和 T2w 图像对时，与配准前的 7.96 mm 相比，中位目标配准误差降低了 4.34 mm，具有统计学意义。结果还表明，与经典迭代算法和其他经过测试的有/没有附加模态的基于学习的方法相比，所提出的基于学习的配准网络能够以相当或更好的精度进行有效配准。在这个具有挑战性的应用中，这些比较算法也未能在 DWI$_{high-b}$ 和 T2w 之间产生任何显着改善的对齐。 本文提出了一种利用训练时特权第三模态信息的跨模态图像配准方法，用于对齐不同模态的医学图像。 Qianye Yang,David Atkinson,Yunguan Fu,Tom Syer,Wen Yan,Shonit Punwani,Matthew J. Clarkson,Dean C. Barratt,Tom Vercauteren,Yipeng Hu cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Bhan Lam,Kenneth Ooi,Zhen-Ting Ong,Karn N. Watcharasupat,Trevor Wong,Woon-Seng Gan
title: Assessment of a cost-effective headphone calibration procedure for soundscape evaluations
title_zh: 评估用于声景评估的经济有效的耳机校准程序
abstract: To increase the availability and adoption of the soundscape standard, a low-cost calibration procedure for reproduction of audio stimuli over headphones was proposed as part of the global ``Soundscape Attributes Translation Project'' (SATP) for validating ISO/TS~12913-2:2018 perceived affective quality (PAQ) attribute translations. A previous preliminary study revealed significant deviations from the intended equivalent continuous A-weighted sound pressure levels ($L_{\text{A,eq}}$) using the open-circuit voltage (OCV) calibration procedure. For a more holistic human-centric perspective, the OCV method is further investigated here in terms of psychoacoustic parameters, including relevant exceedance levels to account for temporal effects on the same 27 stimuli from the SATP. Moreover, a within-subjects experiment with 36 participants was conducted to examine the effects of OCV calibration on the PAQ attributes in ISO/TS~12913-2:2018. Bland-Altman analysis of the objective indicators revealed large biases in the OCV method across all weighted sound level and loudness indicators; and roughness indicators at \SI{5}{\%} and \SI{10}{\%} exceedance levels. Significant perceptual differences due to the OCV method were observed in about \SI{20}{\%} of the stimuli, which did not correspond clearly with the biased acoustic indicators. A cautioned interpretation of the objective and perceptual differences due to small and unpaired samples nevertheless provide grounds for further investigation.
summary: To increase the availability and adoption of the soundscape standard, a low-cost calibration procedure for reproduction of audio stimuli over headphones was proposed as part of the global ``Soundscape Attributes Translation Project'' (SATP) for validating ISO/TS~12913-2:2018 perceived affective quality (PAQ) attribute translations. A previous preliminary study revealed significant deviations from the intended equivalent continuous A-weighted sound pressure levels ($L_{\text{A,eq}}$) using the open-circuit voltage (OCV) calibration procedure. For a more holistic human-centric perspective, the OCV method is further investigated here in terms of psychoacoustic parameters, including relevant exceedance levels to account for temporal effects on the same 27 stimuli from the SATP. Moreover, a within-subjects experiment with 36 participants was conducted to examine the effects of OCV calibration on the PAQ attributes in ISO/TS~12913-2:2018. Bland-Altman analysis of the objective indicators revealed large biases in the OCV method across all weighted sound level and loudness indicators; and roughness indicators at \SI{5}{\%} and \SI{10}{\%} exceedance levels. Significant perceptual differences due to the OCV method were observed in about \SI{20}{\%} of the stimuli, which did not correspond clearly with the biased acoustic indicators. A cautioned interpretation of the objective and perceptual differences due to small and unpaired samples nevertheless provide grounds for further investigation.
abstract_zh: 为了提高声景标准的可用性和采用率，作为全球“声景属性翻译项目”(SATP) 的一部分，提出了一种通过耳机再现音频刺激的低成本校准程序，用于验证 ISO/TS~12913-2:2018 感知情感质量 (PAQ) 属性翻译。先前的初步研究表明，使用开路电压 (OCV) 校准程序与预期的等效连续 A 计权声压级 ($L_{\text{A,eq}}$) 存在显着偏差。为了获得更全面的以人为中心的视角，本文在心理声学参数方面进一步研究了 OCV 方法，包括相关超越水平，以解释对来自 SATP 的相同 27 种刺激的时间影响。此外，还进行了 36 名参与者的受试者内实验，以检查 OCV 校准对 ISO/TS~12913-2:2018 中 PAQ 属性的影响。对客观指标的 Bland-Altman 分析揭示了 OCV 方法在所有加权声级和响度指标中存在很大偏差；以及 \SI{5}{\%} 和 \SI{10}{\%} 超出水平的粗糙度指标。在大约 \SI{20}{\%} 的刺激中观察到由于 OCV 方法导致的显着感知差异，这与有偏差的声学指标没有明显对应。然而，对由于小且不成对的样本而导致的客观和感知差异的谨慎解释为进一步调查提供了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了一种低成本的耳机校准方法，用于声音景观评价，以验证ISO/TS 12913-2:2018标准中感知情感质量属性的翻译。
AI.motivation: 为提高声音景观标准的可用性和采用率，需开发一种低成本的耳机音频刺激再现校准方法，以解决现有开路电压校准法的偏差问题。
AI.method: 通过27个SATP刺激物的时域效应分析及36名参与者的被试内实验，结合Bland-Altman分析客观指标与感知差异。
AI.result: OCV方法在声压级、响度及粗糙度指标上存在显著偏差，约20%的刺激物产生不一致的感知差异，且样本量小限制结论可靠性。
AI.conclusion: OCV校准法存在客观与感知差异，需谨慎解读结果，并建议进一步扩大样本量研究以优化校准方法。

authors_text: Yoonhyung Lee,Seunghyun Yoon,Kyomin Jung
title: Multimodal Speech Emotion Recognition using Cross Attention with Aligned Audio and Text
title_zh: 使用交叉注意力与对齐音频和文本的多模态语音情感识别
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel speech emotion recognition model called Cross Attention Network (CAN) that uses aligned audio and text signals as inputs. It is inspired by the fact that humans recognize speech as a combination of simultaneously produced acoustic and textual signals. First, our method segments the audio and the underlying text signals into equal number of steps in an aligned way so that the same time steps of the sequential signals cover the same time span in the signals. Together with this technique, we apply the cross attention to aggregate the sequential information from the aligned signals. In the cross attention, each modality is aggregated independently by applying the global attention mechanism onto each modality. Then, the attention weights of each modality are applied directly to the other modality in a crossed way, so that the CAN gathers the audio and text information from the same time steps based on each modality. In the experiments conducted on the standard IEMOCAP dataset, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art systems by 2.66% and 3.18% relatively in terms of the weighted and unweighted accuracy.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel speech emotion recognition model called Cross Attention Network (CAN) that uses aligned audio and text signals as inputs. It is inspired by the fact that humans recognize speech as a combination of simultaneously produced acoustic and textual signals. First, our method segments the audio and the underlying text signals into equal number of steps in an aligned way so that the same time steps of the sequential signals cover the same time span in the signals. Together with this technique, we apply the cross attention to aggregate the sequential information from the aligned signals. In the cross attention, each modality is aggregated independently by applying the global attention mechanism onto each modality. Then, the attention weights of each modality are applied directly to the other modality in a crossed way, so that the CAN gathers the audio and text information from the same time steps based on each modality. In the experiments conducted on the standard IEMOCAP dataset, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art systems by 2.66% and 3.18% relatively in terms of the weighted and unweighted accuracy.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we propose a novel speech emotion recognition model called Cross Attention Network (CAN) that uses aligned audio and text signals as inputs.它的灵感来自于人类将语音识别为同时产生的声音和文本信号的组合的事实。 First, our method segments the audio and the underlying text signals into equal number of steps in an aligned way so that the same time steps of the sequential signals cover the same time span in the signals.与该技术一起，我们应用交叉注意力来聚合来自对齐信号的顺序信息。在交叉注意力中，通过将全局注意力机制应用于每个模态，每个模态被独立聚合。 Then, the attention weights of each modality are applied directly to the other modality in a crossed way, so that the CAN gathers the audio and text information from the same time steps based on each modality. In the experiments conducted on the standard IEMOCAP dataset, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art systems by 2.66% and 3.18% relatively in terms of the weighted and unweighted accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Cross Attention Network (CAN)的多模态语音情感识别模型，通过对齐音频和文本信号并结合交叉注意力机制提升情感识别效果。
AI.motivation: 人类识别语音时会同时处理伴随的声学信号和文本信息，但现有方法未能有效对齐多模态信号并融合其时序特征。
AI.method: 将音频和文本信号分割为对齐的时间步，通过交叉注意力机制分别对各模态进行全局注意力聚合，再将不同模态的注意力权重交叉应用以融合信息。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP数据集上，CAN模型相较现有最优方法分别提升加权准确率2.66%和非加权准确率3.18%。
AI.conclusion: 通过时序对齐与交叉注意力机制的有效融合，CAN模型验证了多模态时序特征协同建模对语音情感识别的提升价值。

search_text: Multimodal Speech Emotion Recognition using Cross Attention with Aligned Audio and Text 使用交叉注意力与对齐音频和文本的多模态语音情感识别 In this paper, we propose a novel speech emotion recognition model called Cross Attention Network (CAN) that uses aligned audio and text signals as inputs. It is inspired by the fact that humans recognize speech as a combination of simultaneously produced acoustic and textual signals. First, our method segments the audio and the underlying text signals into equal number of steps in an aligned way so that the same time steps of the sequential signals cover the same time span in the signals. Together with this technique, we apply the cross attention to aggregate the sequential information from the aligned signals. In the cross attention, each modality is aggregated independently by applying the global attention mechanism onto each modality. Then, the attention weights of each modality are applied directly to the other modality in a crossed way, so that the CAN gathers the audio and text information from the same time steps based on each modality. In the experiments conducted on the standard IEMOCAP dataset, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art systems by 2.66% and 3.18% relatively in terms of the weighted and unweighted accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel speech emotion recognition model called Cross Attention Network (CAN) that uses aligned audio and text signals as inputs.它的灵感来自于人类将语音识别为同时产生的声音和文本信号的组合的事实。 First, our method segments the audio and the underlying text signals into equal number of steps in an aligned way so that the same time steps of the sequential signals cover the same time span in the signals.与该技术一起，我们应用交叉注意力来聚合来自对齐信号的顺序信息。在交叉注意力中，通过将全局注意力机制应用于每个模态，每个模态被独立聚合。 Then, the attention weights of each modality are applied directly to the other modality in a crossed way, so that the CAN gathers the audio and text information from the same time steps based on each modality. In the experiments conducted on the standard IEMOCAP dataset, our model outperforms the state-of-the-art systems by 2.66% and 3.18% relatively in terms of the weighted and unweighted accuracy. 本文提出一种名为Cross Attention Network (CAN)的多模态语音情感识别模型，通过对齐音频和文本信号并结合交叉注意力机制提升情感识别效果。 Yoonhyung Lee,Seunghyun Yoon,Kyomin Jung eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Zhuo Chen,Yufeng Huang,Jiaoyan Chen,Yuxia Geng,Yin Fang,Jeff Pan,Ningyu Zhang,Wen Zhang
title: LaKo: Knowledge-driven Visual Question Answering via Late Knowledge-to-Text Injection
title_zh: LaKo：通过后期知识到文本注入的知识驱动的视觉问答
abstract: Visual question answering (VQA) often requires an understanding of visual concepts and language semantics, which relies on external knowledge. Most existing methods exploit pre-trained language models or/and unstructured text, but the knowledge in these resources are often incomplete and noisy. Some other methods prefer to use knowledge graphs (KGs) which often have intensive structured knowledge, but the research is still quite preliminary. In this paper, we propose LaKo, a knowledge-driven VQA method via Late Knowledge-to-text Injection. To effectively incorporate an external KG, we transfer triples into textual format and propose a late injection mechanism for knowledge fusion. Finally we address VQA as a text generation task with an effective encoder-decoder paradigm, which achieves state-of-the-art results on OKVQA dataset.
summary: Visual question answering (VQA) often requires an understanding of visual concepts and language semantics, which relies on external knowledge. Most existing methods exploit pre-trained language models or/and unstructured text, but the knowledge in these resources are often incomplete and noisy. Some other methods prefer to use knowledge graphs (KGs) which often have intensive structured knowledge, but the research is still quite preliminary. In this paper, we propose LaKo, a knowledge-driven VQA method via Late Knowledge-to-text Injection. To effectively incorporate an external KG, we transfer triples into textual format and propose a late injection mechanism for knowledge fusion. Finally we address VQA as a text generation task with an effective encoder-decoder paradigm, which achieves state-of-the-art results on OKVQA dataset.
abstract_zh: Visual question answering (VQA) often requires an understanding of visual concepts and language semantics, which relies on external knowledge.大多数现有方法利用预先训练的语言模型或/和非结构化文本，但这些资源中的知识通常不完整且有噪音。其他一些方法更喜欢使用知识图谱（KG），它通常具有密集的结构化知识，但研究仍相当初步。 In this paper, we propose LaKo, a knowledge-driven VQA method via Late Knowledge-to-text Injection. To effectively incorporate an external KG, we transfer triples into textual format and propose a late injection mechanism for knowledge fusion.最后，我们将 VQA 视为具有有效编码器-解码器范式的文本生成任务，它在 OKVQA 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaKo方法，通过晚期知识到文本的注入机制，利用知识图谱提升视觉问答任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA方法依赖预训练模型或非结构化文本，存在知识不完整和噪声问题；知识图谱虽具结构化优势但相关研究尚不成熟。
AI.method: 将知识图谱三元组转换为文本格式，设计晚期知识注入机制，并采用编码器-解码器范式将VQA建模为文本生成任务。
AI.result: 在OKVQA数据集上取得当前最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效融合知识图谱结构化知识，LaKo验证了晚期注入机制与文本生成范式在VQA任务中的有效性，为知识驱动的视觉问答研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Mohamed Essam,Nagia M. Ghanem,Mohamed A. Ismail
title: Detection of road traffic crashes based on collision estimation
title_zh: 基于碰撞估计的道路交通事故检测
comment: arXiv admin note: This version has been removed by arXiv administrators as the submitter did not have the right to agree to the license at the time of submission. Journal link: https://www.csitcp.com/abstract/12/1212csit13
comments: arXiv admin note: This version has been removed by arXiv administrators as the submitter did not have the right to agree to the license at the time of submission. Journal link: https://www.csitcp.com/abstract/12/1212csit13
abstract: This paper introduces a framework based on computer vision that can detect road traffic crashes (RCTs) by using the installed surveillance/CCTV camera and report them to the emergency in real-time with the exact location and time of occurrence of the accident. The framework is built of five modules. We start with the detection of vehicles by using YOLO architecture; The second module is the tracking of vehicles using MOSSE tracker, Then the third module is a new approach to detect accidents based on collision estimation. Then the fourth module for each vehicle, we detect if there is a car accident or not based on the violent flow descriptor (ViF) followed by an SVM classifier for crash prediction. Finally, in the last stage, if there is a car accident, the system will send a notification to the emergency by using a GPS module that provides us with the location, time, and date of the accident to be sent to the emergency with the help of the GSM module. The main objective is to achieve higher accuracy with fewer false alarms and to implement a simple system based on pipelining technique.
summary: This paper introduces a framework based on computer vision that can detect road traffic crashes (RCTs) by using the installed surveillance/CCTV camera and report them to the emergency in real-time with the exact location and time of occurrence of the accident. The framework is built of five modules. We start with the detection of vehicles by using YOLO architecture; The second module is the tracking of vehicles using MOSSE tracker, Then the third module is a new approach to detect accidents based on collision estimation. Then the fourth module for each vehicle, we detect if there is a car accident or not based on the violent flow descriptor (ViF) followed by an SVM classifier for crash prediction. Finally, in the last stage, if there is a car accident, the system will send a notification to the emergency by using a GPS module that provides us with the location, time, and date of the accident to be sent to the emergency with the help of the GSM module. The main objective is to achieve higher accuracy with fewer false alarms and to implement a simple system based on pipelining technique.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于计算机视觉的框架，可以使用安装的监控/闭路电视摄像头检测道路交通事故（RCT），并实时向紧急情况报告事故发生的确切位置和时间。该框架由五个模块组成。我们首先使用YOLO架构来检测车辆；第二个模块是使用MOSSE跟踪器跟踪车辆，第三个模块是基于碰撞估计检测事故的新方法。然后是每辆车的第四个模块，我们根据暴力流描述符（ViF）检测是否发生车祸，然后使用 SVM 分类器进行碰撞预测。最后，在最后阶段，如果发生车祸，系统将通过GPS模块向紧急情况发送通知，该通知为我们提供事故发生的位置、时间和日期，以便借助GSM模块发送给紧急情况。主要目标是实现更高的准确度和更少的误报，并实现基于流水线技术的简单系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的框架，利用监控摄像头实时检测道路交通事故并通知紧急服务。
AI.motivation: 现有交通事故检测系统存在误报率高、响应延迟等问题，需开发高精度且简单的实时检测方案。
AI.method: 框架包含五个模块：YOLO车辆检测、MOSSE跟踪、碰撞估计、基于ViF描述符与SVM的事故分类，以及通过GPS/GSM模块发送警报。
AI.result: 实现了基于流水线技术的事故检测系统，但未明确给出具体精度或误报率数据。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多模块协作实现了交通事故的实时检测与报警，为智能交通系统提供了可行方案。
