authors_text: Tejumade Afonja,Lucas Bourtoule,Varun Chandrasekaran,Sageev Oore,Nicolas Papernot
title: Generative Extraction of Audio Classifiers for Speaker Identification
title_zh: 用于说话人识别的音频分类器的生成提取
abstract: It is perhaps no longer surprising that machine learning models, especially deep neural networks, are particularly vulnerable to attacks. One such vulnerability that has been well studied is model extraction: a phenomenon in which the attacker attempts to steal a victim's model by training a surrogate model to mimic the decision boundaries of the victim model. Previous works have demonstrated the effectiveness of such an attack and its devastating consequences, but much of this work has been done primarily for image and text processing tasks. Our work is the first attempt to perform model extraction on {\em audio classification models}. We are motivated by an attacker whose goal is to mimic the behavior of the victim's model trained to identify a speaker. This is particularly problematic in security-sensitive domains such as biometric authentication. We find that prior model extraction techniques, where the attacker \textit{naively} uses a proxy dataset to attack a potential victim's model, fail. We therefore propose the use of a generative model to create a sufficiently large and diverse pool of synthetic attack queries. We find that our approach is able to extract a victim's model trained on \texttt{LibriSpeech} using queries synthesized with a proxy dataset based off of \texttt{VoxCeleb}; we achieve a test accuracy of 84.41\% with a budget of 3 million queries.
summary: It is perhaps no longer surprising that machine learning models, especially deep neural networks, are particularly vulnerable to attacks. One such vulnerability that has been well studied is model extraction: a phenomenon in which the attacker attempts to steal a victim's model by training a surrogate model to mimic the decision boundaries of the victim model. Previous works have demonstrated the effectiveness of such an attack and its devastating consequences, but much of this work has been done primarily for image and text processing tasks. Our work is the first attempt to perform model extraction on {\em audio classification models}. We are motivated by an attacker whose goal is to mimic the behavior of the victim's model trained to identify a speaker. This is particularly problematic in security-sensitive domains such as biometric authentication. We find that prior model extraction techniques, where the attacker \textit{naively} uses a proxy dataset to attack a potential victim's model, fail. We therefore propose the use of a generative model to create a sufficiently large and diverse pool of synthetic attack queries. We find that our approach is able to extract a victim's model trained on \texttt{LibriSpeech} using queries synthesized with a proxy dataset based off of \texttt{VoxCeleb}; we achieve a test accuracy of 84.41\% with a budget of 3 million queries.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型，尤其是深度神经网络，特别容易受到攻击，这也许不再令人惊讶。模型提取是一种经过充分研究的漏洞：攻击者试图通过训练代理模型来模仿受害者模型的决策边界来窃取受害者的模型。以前的工作已经证明了这种攻击的有效性及其破坏性后果，但这项工作的大部分主要是针对图像和文本处理任务完成的。我们的工作是在音频分类模型上执行模型提取的首次尝试。我们的动机是攻击者的目标是模仿受过训练以识别说话者的受害者模型的行为。这在生物特征认证等安全敏感领域尤其成问题。我们发现先前的模型提取技术（攻击者\textit{天真地}使用代理数据集来攻击潜在受害者的模型）失败了。因此，我们建议使用生成模型来创建足够大且多样化的合成攻击查询池。我们发现我们的方法能够使用基于 \texttt{VoxCeleb} 的代理数据集合成的查询来提取在 \texttt{LibriSpeech} 上训练的受害者模型；我们以 300 万次查询的预算实现了 84.41% 的测试准确率。

AI.motivation: 现有模型提取技术在图像和文本领域效果显著，但音频分类模型因数据特性未被充分研究，而生物特征认证等安全场景亟需防范此类攻击。
AI.method: 采用生成模型构建多样化合成数据集，替代传统代理数据集生成攻击查询，提升模型提取效果。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上，使用VoxCeleb代理数据生成的攻击查询使提取模型达到84.41%测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 生成式方法有效解决了音频分类模型提取难题，揭示了语音安全领域的潜在风险，为防御策略研究提供新方向。

search_text: Generative Extraction of Audio Classifiers for Speaker Identification 用于说话人识别的音频分类器的生成提取 It is perhaps no longer surprising that machine learning models, especially deep neural networks, are particularly vulnerable to attacks. One such vulnerability that has been well studied is model extraction: a phenomenon in which the attacker attempts to steal a victim's model by training a surrogate model to mimic the decision boundaries of the victim model. Previous works have demonstrated the effectiveness of such an attack and its devastating consequences, but much of this work has been done primarily for image and text processing tasks. Our work is the first attempt to perform model extraction on {\em audio classification models}. We are motivated by an attacker whose goal is to mimic the behavior of the victim's model trained to identify a speaker. This is particularly problematic in security-sensitive domains such as biometric authentication. We find that prior model extraction techniques, where the attacker \textit{naively} uses a proxy dataset to attack a potential victim's model, fail. We therefore propose the use of a generative model to create a sufficiently large and diverse pool of synthetic attack queries. We find that our approach is able to extract a victim's model trained on \texttt{LibriSpeech} using queries synthesized with a proxy dataset based off of \texttt{VoxCeleb}; we achieve a test accuracy of 84.41\% with a budget of 3 million queries. 机器学习模型，尤其是深度神经网络，特别容易受到攻击，这也许不再令人惊讶。模型提取是一种经过充分研究的漏洞：攻击者试图通过训练代理模型来模仿受害者模型的决策边界来窃取受害者的模型。以前的工作已经证明了这种攻击的有效性及其破坏性后果，但这项工作的大部分主要是针对图像和文本处理任务完成的。我们的工作是在音频分类模型上执行模型提取的首次尝试。我们的动机是攻击者的目标是模仿受过训练以识别说话者的受害者模型的行为。这在生物特征认证等安全敏感领域尤其成问题。我们发现先前的模型提取技术（攻击者\textit{天真地}使用代理数据集来攻击潜在受害者的模型）失败了。因此，我们建议使用生成模型来创建足够大且多样化的合成攻击查询池。我们发现我们的方法能够使用基于 \texttt{VoxCeleb} 的代理数据集合成的查询来提取在 \texttt{LibriSpeech} 上训练的受害者模型；我们以 300 万次查询的预算实现了 84.41% 的测试准确率。 本文提出一种针对音频分类模型的生成式模型提取方法，用于说话人识别任务。 Tejumade Afonja,Lucas Bourtoule,Varun Chandrasekaran,Sageev Oore,Nicolas Papernot cs.CR,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Enhao Zhang,Chuanxing Geng,Songcan Chen
title: Class-Aware Universum Inspired Re-Balance Learning for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: 类感知 Universum 启发长尾识别的重新平衡学习
abstract: Data augmentation for minority classes is an effective strategy for long-tailed recognition, thus developing a large number of methods. Although these methods all ensure the balance in sample quantity, the quality of the augmented samples is not always satisfactory for recognition, being prone to such problems as over-fitting, lack of diversity, semantic drift, etc. For these issues, we propose the Class-aware Universum Inspired Re-balance Learning(CaUIRL) for long-tailed recognition, which endows the Universum with class-aware ability to re-balance individual minority classes from both sample quantity and quality. In particular, we theoretically prove that the classifiers learned by CaUIRL are consistent with those learned under the balanced condition from a Bayesian perspective. In addition, we further develop a higher-order mixup approach, which can automatically generate class-aware Universum(CaU) data without resorting to any external data. Unlike the traditional Universum, such generated Universum additionally takes the domain similarity, class separability, and sample diversity into account. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the surprising advantages of our method, especially the top1 accuracy in minority classes is improved by 1.9% 6% compared to the state-of-the-art method.
summary: Data augmentation for minority classes is an effective strategy for long-tailed recognition, thus developing a large number of methods. Although these methods all ensure the balance in sample quantity, the quality of the augmented samples is not always satisfactory for recognition, being prone to such problems as over-fitting, lack of diversity, semantic drift, etc. For these issues, we propose the Class-aware Universum Inspired Re-balance Learning(CaUIRL) for long-tailed recognition, which endows the Universum with class-aware ability to re-balance individual minority classes from both sample quantity and quality. In particular, we theoretically prove that the classifiers learned by CaUIRL are consistent with those learned under the balanced condition from a Bayesian perspective. In addition, we further develop a higher-order mixup approach, which can automatically generate class-aware Universum(CaU) data without resorting to any external data. Unlike the traditional Universum, such generated Universum additionally takes the domain similarity, class separability, and sample diversity into account. Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the surprising advantages of our method, especially the top1 accuracy in minority classes is improved by 1.9% 6% compared to the state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 针对少数类别的数据增强是长尾识别的有效策略，因此开发了大量方法。虽然这些方法都保证了样本数量的平衡，但增强样本的质量并不总是能够满足识别的要求，容易出现过拟合、缺乏多样性、语义漂移等问题。针对这些问题，我们提出了用于长尾识别的类感知Universum Inspired Re-balance Learning（CaUIRL），赋予Universum类感知能力，从样本数量和质量两方面重新平衡各个少数类。特别是，我们从理论上证明了 CaUIRL 学习到的分类器与贝叶斯视角下平衡条件下学习到的分类器是一致的。此外，我们进一步开发了一种高阶混合方法，它可以自动生成类感知的 Universum（CaU）数据，而无需借助任何外部数据。与传统的 Universum 不同，这种生成的 Universum 还考虑了域相似性、类可分离性和样本多样性。在基准数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们的方法具有令人惊讶的优势，特别是与最先进的方法相比，少数类中的 top1 准确率提高了 1.9% 6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CaUIRL的类感知宇宙启发式再平衡学习方法，用于解决长尾识别中少数类样本数量和质量不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法虽能平衡样本数量，但生成的少数类样本质量不佳，存在过拟合、多样性不足和语义漂移等问题。
AI.method: 通过赋予宇宙集类感知能力，从样本数量和质量两方面重新平衡少数类；提出高阶mixup方法自动生成类感知宇宙数据，考虑领域相似性、类别可分性和样本多样性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，少数类的top1准确率相比最先进方法提升了1.9%至6%。
AI.conclusion: CaUIRL从贝叶斯视角证明了其与平衡条件下的分类器一致性，有效提升了长尾识别中少数类的识别性能。

authors_text: Aldo Pacchiano,Drausin Wulsin,Robert A. Barton,Luis Voloch
title: Neural Design for Genetic Perturbation Experiments
title_zh: 遗传扰动实验的神经设计
abstract: The problem of how to genetically modify cells in order to maximize a certain cellular phenotype has taken center stage in drug development over the last few years (with, for example, genetically edited CAR-T, CAR-NK, and CAR-NKT cells entering cancer clinical trials). Exhausting the search space for all possible genetic edits (perturbations) or combinations thereof is infeasible due to cost and experimental limitations. This work provides a theoretically sound framework for iteratively exploring the space of perturbations in pooled batches in order to maximize a target phenotype under an experimental budget. Inspired by this application domain, we study the problem of batch query bandit optimization and introduce the Optimistic Arm Elimination ($\mathrm{OAE}$) principle designed to find an almost optimal arm under different functional relationships between the queries (arms) and the outputs (rewards). We analyze the convergence properties of $\mathrm{OAE}$ by relating it to the Eluder dimension of the algorithm's function class and validate that $\mathrm{OAE}$ outperforms other strategies in finding optimal actions in experiments on simulated problems, public datasets well-studied in bandit contexts, and in genetic perturbation datasets when the regression model is a deep neural network. OAE also outperforms the benchmark algorithms in 3 of 4 datasets in the GeneDisco experimental planning challenge.
summary: The problem of how to genetically modify cells in order to maximize a certain cellular phenotype has taken center stage in drug development over the last few years (with, for example, genetically edited CAR-T, CAR-NK, and CAR-NKT cells entering cancer clinical trials). Exhausting the search space for all possible genetic edits (perturbations) or combinations thereof is infeasible due to cost and experimental limitations. This work provides a theoretically sound framework for iteratively exploring the space of perturbations in pooled batches in order to maximize a target phenotype under an experimental budget. Inspired by this application domain, we study the problem of batch query bandit optimization and introduce the Optimistic Arm Elimination ($\mathrm{OAE}$) principle designed to find an almost optimal arm under different functional relationships between the queries (arms) and the outputs (rewards). We analyze the convergence properties of $\mathrm{OAE}$ by relating it to the Eluder dimension of the algorithm's function class and validate that $\mathrm{OAE}$ outperforms other strategies in finding optimal actions in experiments on simulated problems, public datasets well-studied in bandit contexts, and in genetic perturbation datasets when the regression model is a deep neural network. OAE also outperforms the benchmark algorithms in 3 of 4 datasets in the GeneDisco experimental planning challenge.
abstract_zh: 如何对细胞进行基因改造以最大化某种细胞表型的问题在过去几年中已成为药物开发的中心议题（例如，基因编辑的 CAR-T、CAR-NK 和 CAR-NKT 细胞进入癌症临床试验）。由于成本和实验限制，耗尽所有可能的基因编辑（扰动）或其组合的搜索空间是不可行的。这项工作提供了一个理论上合理的框架，用于迭代探索合并批次中的扰动空间，以便在实验预算下最大化目标表型。受此应用领域的启发，我们研究了批量查询强盗优化问题，并引入了乐观臂消除（$\mathrm{OAE}$）原理，旨在在查询（臂）和输出（奖励）之间的不同函数关系下找到几乎最优的臂。我们通过将 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 与算法函数类的 Eluder 维数联系起来来分析 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 的收敛特性，并验证 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 在模拟问题实验、在强盗环境中充分研究的公共数据集以及当回归模型是深度神经网络时在遗传扰动数据集中寻找最佳动作方面优于其他策略。在 GeneDisco 实验规划挑战赛中，OAE 在 4 个数据集中的 3 个数据集中也优于基准算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的框架，用于在遗传扰动实验中通过迭代探索优化细胞表型。
AI.motivation: 遗传编辑实验的搜索空间庞大，穷举所有可能的基因编辑组合成本高且实验受限，需高效优化方法。
AI.method: 引入乐观臂消除（OAE）原则，结合批量查询老虎机优化，利用深度神经网络回归模型分析扰动与表型的关系。
AI.result: OAE在模拟问题、公共数据集及遗传扰动数据集中表现优于基准算法，且在GeneDisco挑战中4个数据集中有3个胜出。
AI.conclusion: OAE通过理论分析和实验验证，为遗传扰动实验的高效优化提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的框架，用于在遗传扰动实验中通过迭代探索优化细胞表型。

ai_content.method: 引入乐观臂消除（OAE）原则，结合批量查询老虎机优化，利用深度神经网络回归模型分析扰动与表型的关系。
ai_content.result: OAE在模拟问题、公共数据集及遗传扰动数据集中表现优于基准算法，且在GeneDisco挑战中4个数据集中有3个胜出。

search_text: Neural Design for Genetic Perturbation Experiments 遗传扰动实验的神经设计 The problem of how to genetically modify cells in order to maximize a certain cellular phenotype has taken center stage in drug development over the last few years (with, for example, genetically edited CAR-T, CAR-NK, and CAR-NKT cells entering cancer clinical trials). Exhausting the search space for all possible genetic edits (perturbations) or combinations thereof is infeasible due to cost and experimental limitations. This work provides a theoretically sound framework for iteratively exploring the space of perturbations in pooled batches in order to maximize a target phenotype under an experimental budget. Inspired by this application domain, we study the problem of batch query bandit optimization and introduce the Optimistic Arm Elimination ($\mathrm{OAE}$) principle designed to find an almost optimal arm under different functional relationships between the queries (arms) and the outputs (rewards). We analyze the convergence properties of $\mathrm{OAE}$ by relating it to the Eluder dimension of the algorithm's function class and validate that $\mathrm{OAE}$ outperforms other strategies in finding optimal actions in experiments on simulated problems, public datasets well-studied in bandit contexts, and in genetic perturbation datasets when the regression model is a deep neural network. OAE also outperforms the benchmark algorithms in 3 of 4 datasets in the GeneDisco experimental planning challenge. 如何对细胞进行基因改造以最大化某种细胞表型的问题在过去几年中已成为药物开发的中心议题（例如，基因编辑的 CAR-T、CAR-NK 和 CAR-NKT 细胞进入癌症临床试验）。由于成本和实验限制，耗尽所有可能的基因编辑（扰动）或其组合的搜索空间是不可行的。这项工作提供了一个理论上合理的框架，用于迭代探索合并批次中的扰动空间，以便在实验预算下最大化目标表型。受此应用领域的启发，我们研究了批量查询强盗优化问题，并引入了乐观臂消除（$\mathrm{OAE}$）原理，旨在在查询（臂）和输出（奖励）之间的不同函数关系下找到几乎最优的臂。我们通过将 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 与算法函数类的 Eluder 维数联系起来来分析 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 的收敛特性，并验证 $\mathrm{OAE}$ 在模拟问题实验、在强盗环境中充分研究的公共数据集以及当回归模型是深度神经网络时在遗传扰动数据集中寻找最佳动作方面优于其他策略。在 GeneDisco 实验规划挑战赛中，OAE 在 4 个数据集中的 3 个数据集中也优于基准算法。 本文提出了一种基于神经网络的框架，用于在遗传扰动实验中通过迭代探索优化细胞表型。 Aldo Pacchiano,Drausin Wulsin,Robert A. Barton,Luis Voloch q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.GN

authors_text: Rui Qian,Shuangrui Ding,Xian Liu,Dahua Lin
title: Static and Dynamic Concepts for Self-supervised Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 自监督视频表示学习的静态和动态概念
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel learning scheme for self-supervised video representation learning. Motivated by how humans understand videos, we propose to first learn general visual concepts then attend to discriminative local areas for video understanding. Specifically, we utilize static frame and frame difference to help decouple static and dynamic concepts, and respectively align the concept distributions in latent space. We add diversity and fidelity regularizations to guarantee that we learn a compact set of meaningful concepts. Then we employ a cross-attention mechanism to aggregate detailed local features of different concepts, and filter out redundant concepts with low activations to perform local concept contrast. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method distills meaningful static and dynamic concepts to guide video understanding, and obtains state-of-the-art results on UCF-101, HMDB-51, and Diving-48.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel learning scheme for self-supervised video representation learning. Motivated by how humans understand videos, we propose to first learn general visual concepts then attend to discriminative local areas for video understanding. Specifically, we utilize static frame and frame difference to help decouple static and dynamic concepts, and respectively align the concept distributions in latent space. We add diversity and fidelity regularizations to guarantee that we learn a compact set of meaningful concepts. Then we employ a cross-attention mechanism to aggregate detailed local features of different concepts, and filter out redundant concepts with low activations to perform local concept contrast. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method distills meaningful static and dynamic concepts to guide video understanding, and obtains state-of-the-art results on UCF-101, HMDB-51, and Diving-48.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we propose a novel learning scheme for self-supervised video representation learning.受人类如何理解视频的启发，我们建议首先学习一般视觉概念，然后关注视频理解的辨别性局部区域。具体来说，我们利用静态框架和框架差异来帮助解耦静态和动态概念，并分别对齐潜在空间中的概念分布。 We add diversity and fidelity regularizations to guarantee that we learn a compact set of meaningful concepts.然后，我们采用交叉注意力机制来聚合不同概念的详细局部特征，并过滤掉激活值较低的冗余概念以进行局部概念对比。大量实验表明，我们的方法提取了有意义的静态和动态概念来指导视频理解，并在 UCF-101、HMDB-51 和 Diving-48 上获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督视频表征学习方法，通过分离静态和动态概念提升视频理解效果。
AI.motivation: 受人类理解视频的启发，先学习通用视觉概念再聚焦区分性局部区域，以更符合认知规律的方式建模视频特征。
AI.method: 利用静态帧与帧差分离动静概念，通过分布对齐和正则化约束学习紧凑概念集，结合交叉注意力机制聚合局部特征并过滤冗余概念。
AI.result: 在UCF-101、HMDB-51和Diving-48数据集上取得当时最优性能，验证了动静概念分离的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动静概念分离框架能有效指导视频理解，未来可拓展至其他视觉任务和跨模态场景。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Markus Fendler,Anton Batliner,Maurice Gerczuk,Shahin Amiriparian,Thomas M. Berghaus,Björn W. Schuller
title: Distinguishing between pre- and post-treatment in the speech of patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease
title_zh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者治疗前后言语的区分
abstract: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) causes lung inflammation and airflow blockage leading to a variety of respiratory symptoms; it is also a leading cause of death and affects millions of individuals around the world. Patients often require treatment and hospitalisation, while no cure is currently available. As COPD predominantly affects the respiratory system, speech and non-linguistic vocalisations present a major avenue for measuring the effect of treatment. In this work, we present results on a new COPD dataset of 20 patients, showing that, by employing personalisation through speaker-level feature normalisation, we can distinguish between pre- and post-treatment speech with an unweighted average recall (UAR) of up to 82\,\% in (nested) leave-one-speaker-out cross-validation. We further identify the most important features and link them to pathological voice properties, thus enabling an auditory interpretation of treatment effects. Monitoring tools based on such approaches may help objectivise the clinical status of COPD patients and facilitate personalised treatment plans.
summary: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) causes lung inflammation and airflow blockage leading to a variety of respiratory symptoms; it is also a leading cause of death and affects millions of individuals around the world. Patients often require treatment and hospitalisation, while no cure is currently available. As COPD predominantly affects the respiratory system, speech and non-linguistic vocalisations present a major avenue for measuring the effect of treatment. In this work, we present results on a new COPD dataset of 20 patients, showing that, by employing personalisation through speaker-level feature normalisation, we can distinguish between pre- and post-treatment speech with an unweighted average recall (UAR) of up to 82\,\% in (nested) leave-one-speaker-out cross-validation. We further identify the most important features and link them to pathological voice properties, thus enabling an auditory interpretation of treatment effects. Monitoring tools based on such approaches may help objectivise the clinical status of COPD patients and facilitate personalised treatment plans.
abstract_zh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）会引起肺部炎症和气流阻塞，从而导致各种呼吸道症状；它也是导致死亡的主要原因，影响着全世界数百万人。患者通常需要治疗和住院治疗，但目前尚无治愈方法。由于慢性阻塞性肺病主要影响呼吸系统，言语和非语言发声是衡量治疗效果的主要途径。在这项工作中，我们展示了包含 20 名患者的新 COPD 数据集的结果，结果表明，通过说话者级特征归一化进行个性化，我们可以区分治疗前和治疗后的语音，在（嵌套）留一说话者交叉验证中，未加权平均召回率 (UAR) 高达 82%。我们进一步确定了最重要的特征，并将它们与病理声音特性联系起来，从而能够对治疗效果进行听觉解释。基于此类方法的监测工具可能有助于客观化慢性阻塞性肺病患者的临床状况并促进个性化治疗计划。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过分析慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者治疗前后语音特征，探讨其治疗效果的客观评估方法。
AI.motivation: COPD目前无法治愈，需依赖治疗监测。传统临床评估主观性强，而语音和非语言发声可作为客观指标，有助于个性化治疗方案的制定。
AI.method: 构建包含20名患者的COPD语音数据集，采用说话人级特征归一化方法，并通过嵌套留一说话人交叉验证评估模型性能，识别关键语音特征与病理声学属性的关联。
AI.result: 在交叉验证中实现最高82%的无权重平均召回率（UAR），并识别出与病理声学特性相关的关键特征，可解释治疗效果的听觉变化。
AI.conclusion: 基于语音分析的监测工具可客观评估COPD患者临床状态，为个性化治疗提供数据支持，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Karthik Prasad,Sayan Ghosh,Graham Cormode,Ilya Mironov,Ashkan Yousefpour,Pierre Stock
title: Reconciling Security and Communication Efficiency in Federated Learning
title_zh: 协调联邦学习中的安全性和通信效率
abstract: Cross-device Federated Learning is an increasingly popular machine learning setting to train a model by leveraging a large population of client devices with high privacy and security guarantees. However, communication efficiency remains a major bottleneck when scaling federated learning to production environments, particularly due to bandwidth constraints during uplink communication. In this paper, we formalize and address the problem of compressing client-to-server model updates under the Secure Aggregation primitive, a core component of Federated Learning pipelines that allows the server to aggregate the client updates without accessing them individually. In particular, we adapt standard scalar quantization and pruning methods to Secure Aggregation and propose Secure Indexing, a variant of Secure Aggregation that supports quantization for extreme compression. We establish state-of-the-art results on LEAF benchmarks in a secure Federated Learning setup with up to 40$\times$ compression in uplink communication with no meaningful loss in utility compared to uncompressed baselines.
summary: Cross-device Federated Learning is an increasingly popular machine learning setting to train a model by leveraging a large population of client devices with high privacy and security guarantees. However, communication efficiency remains a major bottleneck when scaling federated learning to production environments, particularly due to bandwidth constraints during uplink communication. In this paper, we formalize and address the problem of compressing client-to-server model updates under the Secure Aggregation primitive, a core component of Federated Learning pipelines that allows the server to aggregate the client updates without accessing them individually. In particular, we adapt standard scalar quantization and pruning methods to Secure Aggregation and propose Secure Indexing, a variant of Secure Aggregation that supports quantization for extreme compression. We establish state-of-the-art results on LEAF benchmarks in a secure Federated Learning setup with up to 40$\times$ compression in uplink communication with no meaningful loss in utility compared to uncompressed baselines.
abstract_zh: 跨设备联合学习是一种越来越流行的机器学习设置，它通过利用大量具有高度隐私和安全保证的客户端设备来训练模型。然而，将联邦学习扩展到生产环境时，通信效率仍然是一个主要瓶颈，特别是由于上行链路通信期间的带宽限制。在本文中，我们形式化并解决了在安全聚合原语下压缩客户端到服务器模型更新的问题，安全聚合原语是联邦学习管道的核心组件，允许服务器聚合客户端更新而无需单独访问它们。特别是，我们将标准标量量化和修剪方法应用于安全聚合，并提出安全索引，这是安全聚合的一种变体，支持极端压缩的量化。我们在安全的联合学习设置中在 LEAF 基准上建立了最先进的结果，在上行链路通信中压缩高达 40$\times$，与未压缩的基线相比，效用没有明显损失。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决联邦学习中通信效率与安全性的平衡问题，提出在安全聚合框架下压缩客户端模型更新的方法。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习在生产环境中面临上行通信带宽限制导致的通信效率瓶颈，而现有压缩方法难以在保证安全性的同时实现高效压缩。
AI.method: 将标量量化与剪枝方法适配至安全聚合协议，并提出支持极端压缩的Secure Indexing变体实现模型更新压缩。
AI.result: 在LEAF基准测试中实现最高40倍压缩率，相比未压缩基线模型无显著性能损失，达到联邦学习安全场景下的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过安全聚合框架下的压缩技术创新，有效兼顾了联邦学习的通信效率与隐私安全性需求。

authors_text: Javier Civit-Masot,Francisco Luna-Perejon,Jose Maria Rodriguez Corral,Manuel Dominguez-Morales,Arturo Morgado-Estevez,Anton Civit
title: A Study on the Use of Edge TPUs for Eye Fundus Image Segmentation
title_zh: 使用边缘 TPU 进行眼底图像分割的研究
comment: Preprint of paper published in Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence
comments: Preprint of paper published in Engineering Applications of Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Medical image segmentation can be implemented using Deep Learning methods with fast and efficient segmentation networks. Single-board computers (SBCs) are difficult to use to train deep networks due to their memory and processing limitations. Specific hardware such as Google's Edge TPU makes them suitable for real time predictions using complex pre-trained networks. In this work, we study the performance of two SBCs, with and without hardware acceleration for fundus image segmentation, though the conclusions of this study can be applied to the segmentation by deep neural networks of other types of medical images. To test the benefits of hardware acceleration, we use networks and datasets from a previous published work and generalize them by testing with a dataset with ultrasound thyroid images. We measure prediction times in both SBCs and compare them with a cloud based TPU system. The results show the feasibility of Machine Learning accelerated SBCs for optic disc and cup segmentation obtaining times below 25 milliseconds per image using Edge TPUs.
summary: Medical image segmentation can be implemented using Deep Learning methods with fast and efficient segmentation networks. Single-board computers (SBCs) are difficult to use to train deep networks due to their memory and processing limitations. Specific hardware such as Google's Edge TPU makes them suitable for real time predictions using complex pre-trained networks. In this work, we study the performance of two SBCs, with and without hardware acceleration for fundus image segmentation, though the conclusions of this study can be applied to the segmentation by deep neural networks of other types of medical images. To test the benefits of hardware acceleration, we use networks and datasets from a previous published work and generalize them by testing with a dataset with ultrasound thyroid images. We measure prediction times in both SBCs and compare them with a cloud based TPU system. The results show the feasibility of Machine Learning accelerated SBCs for optic disc and cup segmentation obtaining times below 25 milliseconds per image using Edge TPUs.
abstract_zh: 医学图像分割可以使用深度学习方法和快速高效的分割网络来实现。由于内存和处理能力的限制，单板计算机（SBC）很难用来训练深度网络。特定硬件（例如 Google 的 Edge TPU）使它们适合使用复杂的预训练网络进行实时预测。在这项工作中，我们研究了两种 SBC 在有和没有硬件加速的情况下进行眼底图像分割的性能，尽管这项研究的结论可以应用于其他类型医学图像的深度神经网络的分割。为了测试硬件加速的好处，我们使用之前发表的作品中的网络和数据集，并通过使用超声甲状腺图像的数据集进行测试来概括它们。我们测量了两个 SBC 中的预测时间，并将其与基于云的 TPU 系统进行比较。结果表明，机器学习加速 SBC 用于视神经盘和视杯分割的可行性，使用 Edge TPU 获得每张图像的时间低于 25 毫秒。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了使用边缘TPU在眼底图像分割中的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于单板计算机在内存和处理能力上的限制，难以用于训练深度网络，而像Google的Edge TPU这样的特定硬件可以用于实时预测复杂预训练网络。
AI.method: 研究使用了两种单板计算机（有无硬件加速）进行眼底图像分割，并使用之前发表的工作中的网络和数据集，通过测试甲状腺超声图像数据集进行泛化。测量了两种单板计算机的预测时间，并与基于云的TPU系统进行比较。
AI.result: 结果表明，使用Edge TPU加速的单板计算机在视盘和视杯分割中，每张图像的处理时间低于25毫秒。
AI.conclusion: 结论是，使用机器学习加速的单板计算机在医学图像分割中是可行的，特别是在眼底图像分割任务中。

authors_text: Yukai Shi,Hao Li,Sen Zhang,Zhijing Yang,Xiao Wang
title: Criteria Comparative Learning for Real-scene Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 实景图像超分辨率标准比较学习
comment: To address the generalization on out-of-distribution (OOD) data, we also built a new RealSR-Zero dataset for an interesting OOD evaluation. Project address: https://github.com/House-Leo/RealSR-Zero
comments: To address the generalization on out-of-distribution (OOD) data, we also built a new RealSR-Zero dataset for an interesting OOD evaluation. Project address: https://github.com/House-Leo/RealSR-Zero
abstract: Real-scene image super-resolution aims to restore real-world low-resolution images into their high-quality versions. A typical RealSR framework usually includes the optimization of multiple criteria which are designed for different image properties, by making the implicit assumption that the ground-truth images can provide a good trade-off between different criteria. However, this assumption could be easily violated in practice due to the inherent contrastive relationship between different image properties. Contrastive learning (CL) provides a promising recipe to relieve this problem by learning discriminative features using the triplet contrastive losses. Though CL has achieved significant success in many computer vision tasks, it is non-trivial to introduce CL to RealSR due to the difficulty in defining valid positive image pairs in this case. Inspired by the observation that the contrastive relationship could also exist between the criteria, in this work, we propose a novel training paradigm for RealSR, named Criteria Comparative Learning (Cria-CL), by developing contrastive losses defined on criteria instead of image patches. In addition, a spatial projector is proposed to obtain a good view for Cria-CL in RealSR. Our experiments demonstrate that compared with the typical weighted regression strategy, our method achieves a significant improvement under similar parameter settings.
summary: Real-scene image super-resolution aims to restore real-world low-resolution images into their high-quality versions. A typical RealSR framework usually includes the optimization of multiple criteria which are designed for different image properties, by making the implicit assumption that the ground-truth images can provide a good trade-off between different criteria. However, this assumption could be easily violated in practice due to the inherent contrastive relationship between different image properties. Contrastive learning (CL) provides a promising recipe to relieve this problem by learning discriminative features using the triplet contrastive losses. Though CL has achieved significant success in many computer vision tasks, it is non-trivial to introduce CL to RealSR due to the difficulty in defining valid positive image pairs in this case. Inspired by the observation that the contrastive relationship could also exist between the criteria, in this work, we propose a novel training paradigm for RealSR, named Criteria Comparative Learning (Cria-CL), by developing contrastive losses defined on criteria instead of image patches. In addition, a spatial projector is proposed to obtain a good view for Cria-CL in RealSR. Our experiments demonstrate that compared with the typical weighted regression strategy, our method achieves a significant improvement under similar parameter settings.
abstract_zh: 实景图像超分辨率旨在将现实世界的低分辨率图像恢复为高质量版本。典型的 RealSR 框架通常包括针对不同图像属性设计的多个标准的优化，通过隐含假设地面实况图像可以在不同标准之间提供良好的权衡。然而，由于不同图像属性之间固有的对比关系，这种假设在实践中很容易被违反。对比学习（CL）通过使用三元组对比损失学习判别特征，为缓解这个问题提供了一种有前景的方法。尽管 CL 在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于在这种情况下定义有效的正图像对很困难，因此将 CL 引入 RealSR 并非易事。受到标准之间也可能存在对比关系的观察的启发，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 RealSR 训练范例，称为标准比较学习（Cria-CL），通过开发根据标准而不是图像块定义的对比损失。此外，还提出了一个空间投影仪，以便在 RealSR 中为 Cria-CL 获得良好的视图。我们的实验表明，与典型的加权回归策略相比，我们的方法在相似的参数设置下取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Cria-CL的准则比较学习方法，用于解决真实场景图像超分辨率中多准则优化的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有RealSR框架假设真实图像能平衡不同准则，但实际中图像属性的对比关系易破坏此假设，而对比学习在RealSR中因难以定义有效正样本对而难以应用。
AI.method: 通过开发基于准则而非图像块的对比损失，并引入空间投影器获取有效视角，提出Cria-CL训练范式。
AI.result: 在相似参数设置下，相比传统加权回归策略，Cria-CL在真实场景图像超分辨率任务中取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: Cria-CL通过准则间对比学习有效缓解多准则优化矛盾，为RealSR提供新思路并验证了方法的有效性。

search_text: Criteria Comparative Learning for Real-scene Image Super-Resolution 实景图像超分辨率标准比较学习 Real-scene image super-resolution aims to restore real-world low-resolution images into their high-quality versions. A typical RealSR framework usually includes the optimization of multiple criteria which are designed for different image properties, by making the implicit assumption that the ground-truth images can provide a good trade-off between different criteria. However, this assumption could be easily violated in practice due to the inherent contrastive relationship between different image properties. Contrastive learning (CL) provides a promising recipe to relieve this problem by learning discriminative features using the triplet contrastive losses. Though CL has achieved significant success in many computer vision tasks, it is non-trivial to introduce CL to RealSR due to the difficulty in defining valid positive image pairs in this case. Inspired by the observation that the contrastive relationship could also exist between the criteria, in this work, we propose a novel training paradigm for RealSR, named Criteria Comparative Learning (Cria-CL), by developing contrastive losses defined on criteria instead of image patches. In addition, a spatial projector is proposed to obtain a good view for Cria-CL in RealSR. Our experiments demonstrate that compared with the typical weighted regression strategy, our method achieves a significant improvement under similar parameter settings. 实景图像超分辨率旨在将现实世界的低分辨率图像恢复为高质量版本。典型的 RealSR 框架通常包括针对不同图像属性设计的多个标准的优化，通过隐含假设地面实况图像可以在不同标准之间提供良好的权衡。然而，由于不同图像属性之间固有的对比关系，这种假设在实践中很容易被违反。对比学习（CL）通过使用三元组对比损失学习判别特征，为缓解这个问题提供了一种有前景的方法。尽管 CL 在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功，但由于在这种情况下定义有效的正图像对很困难，因此将 CL 引入 RealSR 并非易事。受到标准之间也可能存在对比关系的观察的启发，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 RealSR 训练范例，称为标准比较学习（Cria-CL），通过开发根据标准而不是图像块定义的对比损失。此外，还提出了一个空间投影仪，以便在 RealSR 中为 Cria-CL 获得良好的视图。我们的实验表明，与典型的加权回归策略相比，我们的方法在相似的参数设置下取得了显着的改进。 本文提出一种名为Cria-CL的准则比较学习方法，用于解决真实场景图像超分辨率中多准则优化的挑战。 Yukai Shi,Hao Li,Sen Zhang,Zhijing Yang,Xiao Wang cs.CV

authors: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_json: Wil M. P. van der Aalst
authors_text: Anahita Farhang Ghahfarokhi,Fatemeh Akoochekian,Fareed Zandkarimi,Wil M. P. van der Aalst
title: Clustering Object-Centric Event Logs
title_zh: 集群以对象为中心的事件日志
abstract: Process mining provides various algorithms to analyze process executions based on event data. Process discovery, the most prominent category of process mining techniques, aims to discover process models from event logs, however, it leads to spaghetti models when working with real-life data. Therefore, several clustering techniques have been proposed on top of traditional event logs (i.e., event logs with a single case notion) to reduce the complexity of process models and discover homogeneous subsets of cases. Nevertheless, in real-life processes, particularly in the context of Business-to-Business (B2B) processes, multiple objects are involved in a process. Recently, Object-Centric Event Logs (OCELs) have been introduced to capture the information of such processes, and several process discovery techniques have been developed on top of OCELs. Yet, the output of the proposed discovery techniques on real OCELs leads to more informative but also more complex models. In this paper, we propose a clustering-based approach to cluster similar objects in OCELs to simplify the obtained process models. Using a case study of a real B2B process, we demonstrate that our approach reduces the complexity of the process models and generates coherent subsets of objects which help the end-users gain insights into the process.
summary: Process mining provides various algorithms to analyze process executions based on event data. Process discovery, the most prominent category of process mining techniques, aims to discover process models from event logs, however, it leads to spaghetti models when working with real-life data. Therefore, several clustering techniques have been proposed on top of traditional event logs (i.e., event logs with a single case notion) to reduce the complexity of process models and discover homogeneous subsets of cases. Nevertheless, in real-life processes, particularly in the context of Business-to-Business (B2B) processes, multiple objects are involved in a process. Recently, Object-Centric Event Logs (OCELs) have been introduced to capture the information of such processes, and several process discovery techniques have been developed on top of OCELs. Yet, the output of the proposed discovery techniques on real OCELs leads to more informative but also more complex models. In this paper, we propose a clustering-based approach to cluster similar objects in OCELs to simplify the obtained process models. Using a case study of a real B2B process, we demonstrate that our approach reduces the complexity of the process models and generates coherent subsets of objects which help the end-users gain insights into the process.
abstract_zh: 流程挖掘提供了各种算法来根据事件数据分析流程执行。流程发现是流程挖掘技术中最突出的类别，旨在从事件日志中发现流程模型，但是，在处理现实数据时，它会导致意大利面条模型。因此，在传统事件日志（即具有单案例概念的事件日志）之上提出了几种聚类技术，以降低过程模型的复杂性并发现案例的同质子集。然而，在现实生活流程中，特别是在企业对企业 (B2B) 流程的环境中，流程中涉及多个对象。最近，引入了以对象为中心的事件日志（OCEL）来捕获此类进程的信息，并且在 OCEL 之上开发了几种进程发现技术。然而，所提出的发现技术在真实 OCEL 上的输出导致了信息更丰富但也更复杂的模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于聚类的方法来对 OCEL 中的相似对象进行聚类，以简化所获得的过程模型。通过对真实 B2B 流程的案例研究，我们证明我们的方法降低了流程模型的复杂性，并生成连贯的对象子集，帮助最终用户深入了解流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于聚类的对象中心事件日志（OCEL）分析方法，以简化复杂的过程模型并发现具有相似特征的对象子集。
AI.motivation: 传统过程挖掘技术在处理包含多个对象的业务流程（如B2B场景）时会产生复杂且难以理解的模型，而现有针对OCEL的发现技术虽更信息丰富，但复杂度更高，需通过聚类降低复杂性。
AI.method: 基于OCEL的特性，设计聚类算法对事件日志中的对象进行分组，通过案例研究验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在B2B流程案例中，该方法显著降低了过程模型复杂度，并生成了有助于用户理解流程的相干对象子集。
AI.conclusion: 聚类方法能有效简化OCEL生成的过程模型，为多对象业务流程分析提供更清晰的洞察。

authors_text: Till Hofmann,Vaishak Belle
title: Using Abstraction for Interpretable Robot Programs in Stochastic Domains
title_zh: 在随机域中使用抽象来解释机器人程序
comment: Presented at the KR'22 Workshop on Explainable Logic-Based Knowledge Representation (XLoKR). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.03536
comments: Presented at the KR'22 Workshop on Explainable Logic-Based Knowledge Representation (XLoKR). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.03536
abstract: A robot's actions are inherently stochastic, as its sensors are noisy and its actions do not always have the intended effects. For this reason, the agent language Golog has been extended to models with degrees of belief and stochastic actions. While this allows more precise robot models, the resulting programs are much harder to comprehend, because they need to deal with the noise, e.g., by looping until some desired state has been reached with certainty, and because the resulting action traces consist of a large number of actions cluttered with sensor noise. To alleviate these issues, we propose to use abstraction. We define a high-level and nonstochastic model of the robot and then map the high-level model into the lower-level stochastic model. The resulting programs are much easier to understand, often do not require belief operators or loops, and produce much shorter action traces.
summary: A robot's actions are inherently stochastic, as its sensors are noisy and its actions do not always have the intended effects. For this reason, the agent language Golog has been extended to models with degrees of belief and stochastic actions. While this allows more precise robot models, the resulting programs are much harder to comprehend, because they need to deal with the noise, e.g., by looping until some desired state has been reached with certainty, and because the resulting action traces consist of a large number of actions cluttered with sensor noise. To alleviate these issues, we propose to use abstraction. We define a high-level and nonstochastic model of the robot and then map the high-level model into the lower-level stochastic model. The resulting programs are much easier to understand, often do not require belief operators or loops, and produce much shorter action traces.
abstract_zh: 机器人的动作本质上是随机的，因为它的传感器有噪声，而且它的动作并不总是达到预期的效果。因此，代理语言 Golog 已扩展到具有信念度和随机动作的模型。虽然这允许更精确的机器人模型，但生成的程序更难理解，因为它们需要处理噪声，例如，通过循环直到确定地达到某个期望的状态，并且因为生成的动作轨迹由大量充满传感器噪声的动作组成。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议使用抽象。我们定义机器人的高级非随机模型，然后将高级模型映射到较低级随机模型。由此产生的程序更容易理解，通常不需要置信运算符或循环，并且产生更短的动作轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过抽象方法生成更易解释的机器人程序，以应对随机领域中传感器噪声和动作不确定性带来的复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人程序在处理随机性时需引入复杂信念运算和冗余动作，导致程序可解释性下降且动作轨迹冗长。
AI.method: 构建高层非随机机器人模型并将其映射到低层随机模型，通过抽象消除噪声处理逻辑和冗余循环结构。
AI.result: 生成的程序显著简化了逻辑结构，无需使用信念算子，动作轨迹长度减少，同时保持与原模型相同的语义正确性。
AI.conclusion: 抽象方法有效提升了随机领域机器人程序的可解释性，为复杂环境下的机器人控制提供了更清晰的编程范式。

search_text: Using Abstraction for Interpretable Robot Programs in Stochastic Domains 在随机域中使用抽象来解释机器人程序 A robot's actions are inherently stochastic, as its sensors are noisy and its actions do not always have the intended effects. For this reason, the agent language Golog has been extended to models with degrees of belief and stochastic actions. While this allows more precise robot models, the resulting programs are much harder to comprehend, because they need to deal with the noise, e.g., by looping until some desired state has been reached with certainty, and because the resulting action traces consist of a large number of actions cluttered with sensor noise. To alleviate these issues, we propose to use abstraction. We define a high-level and nonstochastic model of the robot and then map the high-level model into the lower-level stochastic model. The resulting programs are much easier to understand, often do not require belief operators or loops, and produce much shorter action traces. 机器人的动作本质上是随机的，因为它的传感器有噪声，而且它的动作并不总是达到预期的效果。因此，代理语言 Golog 已扩展到具有信念度和随机动作的模型。虽然这允许更精确的机器人模型，但生成的程序更难理解，因为它们需要处理噪声，例如，通过循环直到确定地达到某个期望的状态，并且因为生成的动作轨迹由大量充满传感器噪声的动作组成。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议使用抽象。我们定义机器人的高级非随机模型，然后将高级模型映射到较低级随机模型。由此产生的程序更容易理解，通常不需要置信运算符或循环，并且产生更短的动作轨迹。 本文提出通过抽象方法生成更易解释的机器人程序，以应对随机领域中传感器噪声和动作不确定性带来的复杂性问题。 Till Hofmann,Vaishak Belle cs.AI

authors_text: Changkun Ou,Daniel Buschek,Sven Mayer,Andreas Butz
title: The Human in the Infinite Loop: A Case Study on Revealing and Explaining Human-AI Interaction Loop Failures
title_zh: 无限循环中的人类：揭示和解释人机交互循环故障的案例研究
comment: To appear in Mensch und Computer 2022, September 2022, Darmstadt, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
comments: To appear in Mensch und Computer 2022, September 2022, Darmstadt, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 16 pages
abstract: Interactive AI systems increasingly employ a human-in-the-loop strategy. This creates new challenges for the HCI community when designing such systems. We reveal and investigate some of these challenges in a case study with an industry partner, and developed a prototype human-in-the-loop system for preference-guided 3D model processing. Two 3D artists used it in their daily work for 3 months. We found that the human-AI loop often did not converge towards a satisfactory result and designed a lab study (N=20) to investigate this further. We analyze interaction data and user feedback through the lens of theories of human judgment to explain the observed human-in-the-loop failures with two key insights: 1) optimization using preferential choices lacks mechanisms to deal with inconsistent and contradictory human judgments; 2) machine outcomes, in turn, influence future user inputs via heuristic biases and loss aversion. To mitigate these problems, we propose descriptive UI design guidelines. Our case study draws attention to challenging and practically relevant imperfections in human-AI loops that need to be considered when designing human-in-the-loop systems.
summary: Interactive AI systems increasingly employ a human-in-the-loop strategy. This creates new challenges for the HCI community when designing such systems. We reveal and investigate some of these challenges in a case study with an industry partner, and developed a prototype human-in-the-loop system for preference-guided 3D model processing. Two 3D artists used it in their daily work for 3 months. We found that the human-AI loop often did not converge towards a satisfactory result and designed a lab study (N=20) to investigate this further. We analyze interaction data and user feedback through the lens of theories of human judgment to explain the observed human-in-the-loop failures with two key insights: 1) optimization using preferential choices lacks mechanisms to deal with inconsistent and contradictory human judgments; 2) machine outcomes, in turn, influence future user inputs via heuristic biases and loss aversion. To mitigate these problems, we propose descriptive UI design guidelines. Our case study draws attention to challenging and practically relevant imperfections in human-AI loops that need to be considered when designing human-in-the-loop systems.
abstract_zh: 交互式人工智能系统越来越多地采用人机交互策略。这给 HCI 社区设计此类系统带来了新的挑战。我们在与行业合作伙伴的案例研究中揭示并研究了其中一些挑战，并开发了用于偏好引导的 3D 模型处理的原型人机循环系统。两位 3D 艺术家在日常工作中使用了它 3 个月。我们发现人类-AI 循环通常无法收敛到令人满意的结果，因此设计了一项实验室研究 (N=20) 来进一步研究这一问题。我们通过人类判断理论的视角来分析交互数据和用户反馈，以两个关键见解来解释观察到的人机循环故障：1）使用优先选择的优化缺乏处理不一致和矛盾的人类判断的机制； 2）机器结果反过来通过启发式偏差和损失厌恶影响未来的用户输入。为了缓解这些问题，我们提出了描述性 UI 设计指南。我们的案例研究提请人们注意人类人工智能循环中具有挑战性和实际相关的缺陷，在设计人机循环系统时需要考虑这些缺陷。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究揭示并解释人类-AI交互循环中的失败问题，提出设计指南以优化人机协作系统。
AI.motivation: 随着人类在循环（human-in-the-loop）策略在AI系统中的广泛应用，设计此类系统面临新挑战，需深入理解交互失败原因。
AI.method: 与工业伙伴合作开发偏好引导的3D模型处理原型系统，观察两名艺术家3个月使用情况，并通过20人实验室研究分析交互数据与用户反馈。
AI.result: 发现两类核心问题：1) 优化过程无法处理人类判断的矛盾性；2) 机器输出通过启发式偏差和损失厌恶影响后续用户输入，提出描述性UI设计指南。
AI.conclusion: 需正视人类-AI循环中的固有缺陷，通过设计原则改进系统，以减少交互失败并提升协作效率。

authors_text: Chaofei Hong,Mengwen Yuan,Mengxiao Zhang,Xiao Wang,Chegnjun Zhang,Jiaxin Wang,Gang Pan,Zhaohui Wu,Huajin Tang
title: SPAIC: A Spike-based Artificial Intelligence Computing Framework
title_zh: SPAIC：基于Spike的人工智能计算框架
comment: This Paper has been submitted to IEEE computational intelligence magazine
comments: This Paper has been submitted to IEEE computational intelligence magazine
abstract: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging research field that aims to develop new intelligent systems by integrating theories and technologies from multi-disciplines such as neuroscience and deep learning. Currently, there have been various software frameworks developed for the related fields, but there is a lack of an efficient framework dedicated for spike-based computing models and algorithms. In this work, we present a Python based spiking neural network (SNN) simulation and training framework, aka SPAIC that aims to support brain-inspired model and algorithm researches integrated with features from both deep learning and neuroscience. To integrate different methodologies from the two overwhelming disciplines, and balance between flexibility and efficiency, SPAIC is designed with neuroscience-style frontend and deep learning backend structure. We provide a wide range of examples including neural circuits Simulation, deep SNN learning and neuromorphic applications, demonstrating the concise coding style and wide usability of our framework. The SPAIC is a dedicated spike-based artificial intelligence computing platform, which will significantly facilitate the design, prototype and validation of new models, theories and applications. Being user-friendly, flexible and high-performance, it will help accelerate the rapid growth and wide applicability of neuromorphic computing research.
summary: Neuromorphic computing is an emerging research field that aims to develop new intelligent systems by integrating theories and technologies from multi-disciplines such as neuroscience and deep learning. Currently, there have been various software frameworks developed for the related fields, but there is a lack of an efficient framework dedicated for spike-based computing models and algorithms. In this work, we present a Python based spiking neural network (SNN) simulation and training framework, aka SPAIC that aims to support brain-inspired model and algorithm researches integrated with features from both deep learning and neuroscience. To integrate different methodologies from the two overwhelming disciplines, and balance between flexibility and efficiency, SPAIC is designed with neuroscience-style frontend and deep learning backend structure. We provide a wide range of examples including neural circuits Simulation, deep SNN learning and neuromorphic applications, demonstrating the concise coding style and wide usability of our framework. The SPAIC is a dedicated spike-based artificial intelligence computing platform, which will significantly facilitate the design, prototype and validation of new models, theories and applications. Being user-friendly, flexible and high-performance, it will help accelerate the rapid growth and wide applicability of neuromorphic computing research.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算是一个新兴的研究领域，旨在通过整合神经科学和深度学习等多学科的理论和技术来开发新的智能系统。目前，相关领域已经开发了多种软件框架，但缺乏专门针对脉冲计算模型和算法的高效框架。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于 Python 的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模拟和训练框架，又名 SPAIC，旨在支持集成了深度学习和神经科学特征的大脑启发模型和算法研究。为了整合两个压倒性学科的不同方法论，并在灵活性和效率之间取得平衡，SPAIC 设计了神经科学风格的前端和深度学习后端结构。我们提供了广泛的示例，包括神经电路模拟、深度 SNN 学习和神经形态应用，展示了我们框架的简洁编码风格和广泛可用性。 SPAIC是一个专用的基于尖峰的人工智能计算平台，它将极大地促进新模型、理论和应用的设计、原型和验证。其用户友好、灵活、高性能的特点将有助于加速神经形态计算研究的快速发展和广泛适用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPAIC框架，旨在为基于脉冲的神经网络研究提供高效计算平台，整合深度学习与神经科学特性。
AI.motivation: 现有软件框架缺乏针对脉冲计算模型的高效支持，需集成多学科方法以推动神经形态计算发展。
AI.method: 设计神经科学风格前端与深度学习后端结合的框架结构，提供神经电路模拟、深度SNN学习等应用示例。
AI.result: 验证了框架的简洁编码特性与广泛适用性，展示了其在模型设计与算法验证中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SPAIC作为专用平台将加速神经形态计算研究，促进新理论与应用的快速开发与验证。

We provide a wide range of examples including neural circuits Simulation, deep SNN learning and neuromorphic applications, demonstrating the concise coding style and wide usability of our framework. The SPAIC is a dedicated spike-based artificial intelligence computing platform, which will significantly facilitate the design, prototype and validation of new models, theories and applications. Being user-friendly, flexible and high-performance, it will help accelerate the rapid growth and wide applicability of neuromorphic computing research. 神经形态计算是一个新兴的研究领域，旨在通过整合神经科学和深度学习等多学科的理论和技术来开发新的智能系统。目前，相关领域已经开发了多种软件框架，但缺乏专门针对脉冲计算模型和算法的高效框架。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于 Python 的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 模拟和训练框架，又名 SPAIC，旨在支持集成了深度学习和神经科学特征的大脑启发模型和算法研究。为了整合两个压倒性学科的不同方法论，并在灵活性和效率之间取得平衡，SPAIC 设计了神经科学风格的前端和深度学习后端结构。我们提供了广泛的示例，包括神经电路模拟、深度 SNN 学习和神经形态应用，展示了我们框架的简洁编码风格和广泛可用性。 SPAIC是一个专用的基于尖峰的人工智能计算平台，它将极大地促进新模型、理论和应用的设计、原型和验证。其用户友好、灵活、高性能的特点将有助于加速神经形态计算研究的快速发展和广泛适用。 本文提出SPAIC框架，旨在为基于脉冲的神经网络研究提供高效计算平台，整合深度学习与神经科学特性。 Chaofei Hong,Mengwen Yuan,Mengxiao Zhang,Xiao Wang,Chegnjun Zhang,Jiaxin Wang,Gang Pan,Zhaohui Wu,Huajin Tang cs.NE

authors_text: Yudi Zhao,Kuangrong Hao,Chaochen Gu,Bing Wei
title: Distribution Learning Based on Evolutionary Algorithm Assisted Deep Neural Networks for Imbalanced Image Classification
title_zh: 基于进化算法辅助深度神经网络的分布学习用于不平衡图像分类
abstract: To address the trade-off problem of quality-diversity for the generated images in imbalanced classification tasks, we research on over-sampling based methods at the feature level instead of the data level and focus on searching the latent feature space for optimal distributions. On this basis, we propose an iMproved Estimation Distribution Algorithm based Latent featUre Distribution Evolution (MEDA_LUDE) algorithm, where a joint learning procedure is programmed to make the latent features both optimized and evolved by the deep neural networks and the evolutionary algorithm, respectively. We explore the effect of the Large-margin Gaussian Mixture (L-GM) loss function on distribution learning and design a specialized fitness function based on the similarities among samples to increase diversity. Extensive experiments on benchmark based imbalanced datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm, which can generate images with both quality and diversity. Furthermore, the MEDA_LUDE algorithm is also applied to the industrial field and successfully alleviates the imbalanced issue in fabric defect classification.
summary: To address the trade-off problem of quality-diversity for the generated images in imbalanced classification tasks, we research on over-sampling based methods at the feature level instead of the data level and focus on searching the latent feature space for optimal distributions. On this basis, we propose an iMproved Estimation Distribution Algorithm based Latent featUre Distribution Evolution (MEDA_LUDE) algorithm, where a joint learning procedure is programmed to make the latent features both optimized and evolved by the deep neural networks and the evolutionary algorithm, respectively. We explore the effect of the Large-margin Gaussian Mixture (L-GM) loss function on distribution learning and design a specialized fitness function based on the similarities among samples to increase diversity. Extensive experiments on benchmark based imbalanced datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm, which can generate images with both quality and diversity. Furthermore, the MEDA_LUDE algorithm is also applied to the industrial field and successfully alleviates the imbalanced issue in fabric defect classification.
abstract_zh: 为了解决不平衡分类任务中生成图像的质量多样性的权衡问题，我们在特征级别而不是数据级别研究基于过采样的方法，并专注于搜索潜在特征空间以获得最佳分布。在此基础上，我们提出了一种基于改进估计分布算法的潜在特征分布进化（MEDA_LUDE）算法，其中联合学习过程被编程以使潜在特征分别由深度神经网络和进化算法优化和进化。我们探讨了大边缘高斯混合（L-GM）损失函数对分布学习的影响，并根据样本之间的相似性设计了专门的适应度函数以增加多样性。基于基准的不平衡数据集的大量实验验证了我们提出的算法的有效性，该算法可以生成具有质量和多样性的图像。此外，MEDA_LUDE算法还应用于工业领域，成功缓解了织物疵点分类不平衡的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化算法辅助深度神经网络的分布学习方法，用于解决不平衡图像分类中的生成图像质量与多样性矛盾问题。
AI.motivation: 传统过采样方法在数据层面处理不平衡问题时，难以同时保证生成图像的质量与多样性，需在特征层面优化分布学习。
AI.method: 设计MEDA_LUDE算法，结合深度神经网络与进化算法联合优化潜在特征空间，引入大边距高斯混合损失函数及基于样本相似性的适应度函数提升多样性。
AI.result: 在基准不平衡数据集和工业织物缺陷分类任务中验证了算法有效性，成功生成兼具质量与多样性的图像并缓解类别不平衡问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征空间分布优化与进化算法协同学习，可有效解决不平衡图像分类中生成样本质量与多样性难以兼顾的挑战。

authors_text: R. San Millán-Castillo,L. Martino,E. Morgado,F. Llorente
title: An exhaustive variable selection study for linear models of soundscape emotions: rankings and Gibbs analysis
title_zh: 音景情感线性模型的详尽变量选择研究：排名和吉布斯分析
comment: published in IEEE-ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing
comments: published in IEEE-ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing
abstract: In the last decade, soundscapes have become one of the most active topics in Acoustics, providing a holistic approach to the acoustic environment, which involves human perception and context. Soundscapes-elicited emotions are central and substantially subtle and unnoticed (compared to speech or music). Currently, soundscape emotion recognition is a very active topic in the literature. We provide an exhaustive variable selection study (i.e., a selection of the soundscapes indicators) to a well-known dataset (emo-soundscapes). We consider linear soundscape emotion models for two soundscapes descriptors: arousal and valence. Several ranking schemes and procedures for selecting the number of variables are applied. We have also performed an alternating optimization scheme for obtaining the best sequences keeping fixed a certain number of features. Furthermore, we have designed a novel technique based on Gibbs sampling, which provides a more complete and clear view of the relevance of each variable. Finally, we have also compared our results with the analysis obtained by the classical methods based on p-values. As a result of our study, we suggest two simple and parsimonious linear models of only 7 and 16 variables (within the 122 possible features) for the two outputs (arousal and valence), respectively. The suggested linear models provide very good and competitive performance, with $R^2>0.86$ and $R^2>0.63$ (values obtained after a cross-validation procedure), respectively.
summary: In the last decade, soundscapes have become one of the most active topics in Acoustics, providing a holistic approach to the acoustic environment, which involves human perception and context. Soundscapes-elicited emotions are central and substantially subtle and unnoticed (compared to speech or music). Currently, soundscape emotion recognition is a very active topic in the literature. We provide an exhaustive variable selection study (i.e., a selection of the soundscapes indicators) to a well-known dataset (emo-soundscapes). We consider linear soundscape emotion models for two soundscapes descriptors: arousal and valence. Several ranking schemes and procedures for selecting the number of variables are applied. We have also performed an alternating optimization scheme for obtaining the best sequences keeping fixed a certain number of features. Furthermore, we have designed a novel technique based on Gibbs sampling, which provides a more complete and clear view of the relevance of each variable. Finally, we have also compared our results with the analysis obtained by the classical methods based on p-values. As a result of our study, we suggest two simple and parsimonious linear models of only 7 and 16 variables (within the 122 possible features) for the two outputs (arousal and valence), respectively. The suggested linear models provide very good and competitive performance, with $R^2>0.86$ and $R^2>0.63$ (values obtained after a cross-validation procedure), respectively.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，声景已成为声学领域最活跃的主题之一，它提供了涉及人类感知和背景的声学环境的整体方法。音景引发的情绪是核心，并且非常微妙且不易被注意到（与语音或音乐相比）。目前，音景情感识别是文献中非常活跃的主题。我们为众所周知的数据集（情绪音景）提供了详尽的变量选择研究（即音景指标的选择）。我们考虑两个音景描述符的线性音景情感模型：唤醒度和效价。应用了几种用于选择变量数量的排序方案和程序。我们还执行了交替优化方案，以获得保持固定一定数量特征的最佳序列。此外，我们设计了一种基于吉布斯采样的新技术，它提供了每个变量相关性的更完整和清晰的视图。最后，我们还将我们的结果与基于 p 值的经典方法获得的分析进行了比较。根据我们的研究结果，我们建议对两个输出（唤醒度和效价）分别使用两个简单且简约的线性模型，其中仅包含 7 个和 16 个变量（在 122 个可能的特征内）。建议的线性模型提供了非常好的和有竞争力的性能，分别为 $R^2>0.86$ 和 $R^2>0.63$（交叉验证过程后获得的值）。

AI.tldr: 该论文对声音景观情绪的线性模型进行了详尽的变量选择研究，提出基于排名和吉布斯采样的方法以优化模型性能。
AI.motivation: 声音景观引发的情绪具有细微且易被忽视的特点，现有研究缺乏高效且简洁的模型来准确捕捉情绪特征。
AI.method: 采用排名方案、交替优化策略及基于吉布斯采样的新方法进行变量选择，并与传统p值方法对比分析。
AI.result: 提出包含7个和16个变量的简洁模型（从122个特征中选取），分别实现 arousal 和 valence 的 R² > 0.86 和 R² > 0.63 的交叉验证性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在保持高解释性的同时具有竞争力，吉布斯方法能更清晰揭示变量相关性，为声音景观情绪研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiang Bian,Xuhong Li,Tao Wang,Qingzhong Wang,Jun Huang,Chen Liu,Jun Zhao,Feixiang Lu,Dejing Dou,Haoyi Xiong
title: P2ANet: A Dataset and Benchmark for Dense Action Detection from Table Tennis Match Broadcasting Videos
title_zh: P2ANet：乒乓球比赛转播视频中密集动作检测的数据集和基准
abstract: While deep learning has been widely used for video analytics, such as video classification and action detection, dense action detection with fast-moving subjects from sports videos is still challenging. In this work, we release yet another sports video benchmark \TheName{} for \emph{\underline{P}}ing \emph{\underline{P}}ong-\emph{\underline{A}}ction detection, which consists of 2,721 video clips collected from the broadcasting videos of professional table tennis matches in World Table Tennis Championships and Olympiads. We work with a crew of table tennis professionals and referees on a specially designed annotation toolbox to obtain fine-grained action labels (in 14 classes) for every ping-pong action that appeared in the dataset, and formulate two sets of action detection problems -- \emph{action localization} and \emph{action recognition}. We evaluate a number of commonly-seen action recognition (e.g., TSM, TSN, Video SwinTransformer, and Slowfast) and action localization models (e.g., BSN, BSN++, BMN, TCANet), using \TheName{} for both problems, under various settings. These models can only achieve 48\% area under the AR-AN curve for localization and 82\% top-one accuracy for recognition since the ping-pong actions are dense with fast-moving subjects but broadcasting videos are with only 25 FPS. The results confirm that \TheName{} is still a challenging task and can be used as a special benchmark for dense action detection from videos.
summary: While deep learning has been widely used for video analytics, such as video classification and action detection, dense action detection with fast-moving subjects from sports videos is still challenging. In this work, we release yet another sports video benchmark \TheName{} for \emph{\underline{P}}ing \emph{\underline{P}}ong-\emph{\underline{A}}ction detection, which consists of 2,721 video clips collected from the broadcasting videos of professional table tennis matches in World Table Tennis Championships and Olympiads. We work with a crew of table tennis professionals and referees on a specially designed annotation toolbox to obtain fine-grained action labels (in 14 classes) for every ping-pong action that appeared in the dataset, and formulate two sets of action detection problems -- \emph{action localization} and \emph{action recognition}. We evaluate a number of commonly-seen action recognition (e.g., TSM, TSN, Video SwinTransformer, and Slowfast) and action localization models (e.g., BSN, BSN++, BMN, TCANet), using \TheName{} for both problems, under various settings. These models can only achieve 48\% area under the AR-AN curve for localization and 82\% top-one accuracy for recognition since the ping-pong actions are dense with fast-moving subjects but broadcasting videos are with only 25 FPS. The results confirm that \TheName{} is still a challenging task and can be used as a special benchmark for dense action detection from videos.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度学习已广泛用于视频分析，例如视频分类和动作检测，但对体育视频中快速移动的主题进行密集动作检测仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们发布了另一个用于 \emph{\underline{P}}ing \emph{\underline{P}}ong-\emph{\underline{A}} 动作检测的运动视频基准 \TheName{}，其中包含从世界乒乓球锦标赛和奥运会职业乒乓球比赛转播视频中收集的 2,721 个视频片段。我们与一群乒乓球专业人士和裁判合作，开发了一个专门设计的注释工具箱，为数据集中出现的每个乒乓球动作获取细粒度的动作标签（14类），并制定两组动作检测问题——\emph{动作定位}和\emph{动作识别}。我们在各种设置下使用 \TheName{} 来评估许多常见的动作识别（例如，TSM、TSN、Video SwinTransformer 和 Slowfast）和动作定位模型（例如，BSN、BSN++、BMN、TCANet）。这些模型只能实现 AR-AN 曲线下 48% 的定位面积和 82% 的顶级识别准确率，因为乒乓球动作密集且快速移动的物体，而广播视频的帧率仅为 25 FPS。结果证实 \TheName{} 仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，可以用作视频中密集动作检测的特殊基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出P2ANet数据集和基准，用于从乒乓球比赛的转播视频中进行密集动作检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在视频分析中广泛应用，但体育视频中快速移动主体的密集动作检测仍具挑战性，现有方法在低帧率和密集动作场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 收集2,721个专业乒乓球赛事转播视频片段，联合乒乓球专家和裁判使用定制标注工具生成14类细粒度动作标签，构建动作定位与识别两类任务，并评估多种主流模型（如TSM、BSN等）的性能。
AI.result: 主流模型在定位任务中仅达到48%的AR-AN曲线下面积，在识别任务中达到82%的Top-1准确率，凸显了密集动作检测的难度。
AI.conclusion: P2ANet为密集动作检测提供了具有挑战性的基准，可推动相关算法的研究与改进。

authors_text: Agastya Sridharan,Natarajan S
title: An Automated News Bias Classifier Using Caenorhabditis Elegans Inspired Recursive Feedback Network Architecture
title_zh: 使用秀丽隐杆线虫启发的递归反馈网络架构的自动化新闻偏差分类器
comment: The paper is under review for AACL-IJCNLP
comments: The paper is under review for AACL-IJCNLP
abstract: Traditional approaches to classify the political bias of news articles have failed to generate accurate, generalizable results. Existing networks premised on CNNs and DNNs lack a model to identify and extrapolate subtle indicators of bias like word choice, context, and presentation. In this paper, we propose a network architecture that achieves human-level accuracy in assigning bias classifications to articles. The underlying model is based on a novel Mesh Neural Network (MNN),this structure enables feedback and feedforward synaptic connections between any two neurons in the mesh. The MNN ontains six network configurations that utilize Bernoulli based random sampling, pre-trained DNNs, and a network modelled after the C. Elegans nematode. The model is trained on over ten-thousand articles scraped from AllSides.com which are labelled to indicate political bias. The parameters of the network are then evolved using a genetic algorithm suited to the feedback neural structure. Finally, the best performing model is applied to five popular news sources in the United States over a fifty-day trial to quantify political biases in the articles they display. We hope our project can spur research into biological solutions for NLP tasks and provide accurate tools for citizens to understand subtle biases in the articles they consume.
summary: Traditional approaches to classify the political bias of news articles have failed to generate accurate, generalizable results. Existing networks premised on CNNs and DNNs lack a model to identify and extrapolate subtle indicators of bias like word choice, context, and presentation. In this paper, we propose a network architecture that achieves human-level accuracy in assigning bias classifications to articles. The underlying model is based on a novel Mesh Neural Network (MNN),this structure enables feedback and feedforward synaptic connections between any two neurons in the mesh. The MNN ontains six network configurations that utilize Bernoulli based random sampling, pre-trained DNNs, and a network modelled after the C. Elegans nematode. The model is trained on over ten-thousand articles scraped from AllSides.com which are labelled to indicate political bias. The parameters of the network are then evolved using a genetic algorithm suited to the feedback neural structure. Finally, the best performing model is applied to five popular news sources in the United States over a fifty-day trial to quantify political biases in the articles they display. We hope our project can spur research into biological solutions for NLP tasks and provide accurate tools for citizens to understand subtle biases in the articles they consume.
abstract_zh: 对新闻文章的政治偏见进行分类的传统方法未能产生准确的、可概括的结果。以 CNN 和 DNN 为前提的现有网络缺乏识别和推断微妙偏差指标（例如词语选择、上下文和表达）的模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种网络架构，可以在为文章分配偏差分类时达到人类水平的准确性。底层模型基于一种新颖的网状神经网络（MNN），这种结构可以实现网格中任意两个神经元之间的反馈和前馈突触连接。 MNN 包含六种网络配置，这些配置利用基于伯努利的随机采样、预先训练的 DNN 以及根据线虫建模的网络。该模型接受了从 AllSides.com 上抓取的一万多篇文章的训练，这些文章被标记为表明政治偏见。然后使用适合反馈神经结构的遗传算法来进化网络的参数。最后，在为期 50 天的试验中，将表现最佳的模型应用于美国的五个热门新闻来源，以量化它们所展示文章中的政治偏见。我们希望我们的项目能够促进对 NLP 任务的生物解决方案的研究，并为公民提供准确的工具来了解他们所阅读的文章中的微妙偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受秀丽隐杆线虫启发的递归反馈网络架构，用于自动分类新闻的政治偏见，旨在提高分类准确性和可推广性。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN和DNN方法无法准确识别新闻中的细微偏见指标（如用词、上下文等），导致分类结果不够精确和通用。
AI.method: 设计基于网格神经网络（MNN）的架构，包含六种配置（伯努利采样、预训练DNN、线虫模型等），结合遗传算法优化参数，并在AllSides.com的10,000+标注文章上训练，最终在五家美国新闻源进行50天测试。
AI.result: 模型达到人类水平的分类准确率，成功量化五家新闻机构文章的政治偏见程度。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发神经网络为NLP任务提供新思路，同时为公众识别新闻偏见提供实用工具，推动相关领域研究。

authors_text: Marco Boresta,Tommaso Colombo,Alberto De Santis
title: Convolutional neural networks and multi-threshold analysis for contamination detection in the apparel industry
title_zh: 用于服装行业污染检测的卷积神经网络和多阈值分析
abstract: Quality control of apparel items is mandatory in modern textile industry, as consumer's awareness and expectations about the highest possible standard is constantly increasing in favor of sustainable and ethical textile products. Such a level of quality is achieved by checking the product throughout its life cycle, from raw materials to boxed stock. Checks may include color shading tests, fasteners fatigue tests, fabric weigh tests, contamination tests, etc. This work deals specifically with the automatic detection of contaminations given by small parts in the finished product such as raw material like little stones and plastic bits or materials from the construction process, like a whole needle or a clip. Identification is performed by a two-level processing of X-ray images of the items: in the first, a multi-threshold analysis recognizes the contaminations by gray level and shape attributes; the second level consists of a deep learning classifier that has been trained to distinguish between true positives and false positives. The automatic detector was successfully deployed in an actual production plant, since the results satisfy the technical specification of the process, namely a number of false negatives smaller than 3% and a number of false positives smaller than 15%.
summary: Quality control of apparel items is mandatory in modern textile industry, as consumer's awareness and expectations about the highest possible standard is constantly increasing in favor of sustainable and ethical textile products. Such a level of quality is achieved by checking the product throughout its life cycle, from raw materials to boxed stock. Checks may include color shading tests, fasteners fatigue tests, fabric weigh tests, contamination tests, etc. This work deals specifically with the automatic detection of contaminations given by small parts in the finished product such as raw material like little stones and plastic bits or materials from the construction process, like a whole needle or a clip. Identification is performed by a two-level processing of X-ray images of the items: in the first, a multi-threshold analysis recognizes the contaminations by gray level and shape attributes; the second level consists of a deep learning classifier that has been trained to distinguish between true positives and false positives. The automatic detector was successfully deployed in an actual production plant, since the results satisfy the technical specification of the process, namely a number of false negatives smaller than 3% and a number of false positives smaller than 15%.
abstract_zh: 在现代纺织工业中，服装产品的质量控制是强制性的，因为消费者对最高标准的意识和期望不断提高，有利于可持续和道德的纺织产品。这种质量水平是通过检查产品从原材料到盒装库存的整个生命周期来实现的。检查可能包括颜色渐晕测试、紧固件疲劳测试、织物重量测试、污染测试等。这项工作专门涉及自动检测成品中小部件造成的污染，例如小石头和塑料碎片等原材料或施工过程中的材料，如整根针或夹子。通过对物品的 X 射线图像进行两级处理来执行识别：首先，多阈值分析通过灰度级和形状属性识别污染物；第二级由深度学习分类器组成，该分类器经过训练可以区分真阳性和假阳性。该自动检测仪已成功部署在实际生产工厂中，结果满足工艺技术规范，即误报率小于3%，误报率小于15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络和多阈值分析的自动检测方法，用于纺织品生产中的污染物检测。
AI.motivation: 随着消费者对可持续和道德纺织品标准要求的提高，纺织行业需要更严格的质检手段，尤其需检测成品中的微小污染物（如石子、塑料碎片、针头等）以确保产品质量与安全。
AI.method: 采用两阶段处理流程：第一阶段通过多阈值分析根据灰度和形状属性识别污染物；第二阶段利用训练好的深度学习分类器区分真阳性与假阳性结果。
AI.result: 该系统在实际生产环境中部署成功，实现假阴性率低于3%、假阳性率低于15%，满足工艺技术要求。
AI.conclusion: 融合传统图像分析与深度学习的方法有效提升了纺织品污染物检测的准确性，为行业提供了可靠的质量控制解决方案。

authors_text: Pingchuan Ma,Rui Ding,Shuai Wang,Shi Han,Dongmei Zhang
title: XInsight: eXplainable Data Analysis Through The Lens of Causality
title_zh: XInsight：通过因果关系进行可解释的数据分析
abstract: In light of the growing popularity of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), understanding the underlying causes of the knowledge acquired by EDA is crucial. However, it remains under-researched. This study promotes a transparent and explicable perspective on data analysis, called eXplainable Data Analysis (XDA). For this reason, we present XInsight, a general framework for XDA. XInsight provides data analysis with qualitative and quantitative explanations of causal and non-causal semantics. This way, it will significantly improve human understanding and confidence in the outcomes of data analysis, facilitating accurate data interpretation and decision making in the real world. XInsight is a three-module, end-to-end pipeline designed to extract causal graphs, translate causal primitives into XDA semantics, and quantify the quantitative contribution of each explanation to a data fact. XInsight uses a set of design concepts and optimizations to address the inherent difficulties associated with integrating causality into XDA. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets as well as a user study demonstrate the highly promising capabilities of XInsight.
summary: In light of the growing popularity of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA), understanding the underlying causes of the knowledge acquired by EDA is crucial. However, it remains under-researched. This study promotes a transparent and explicable perspective on data analysis, called eXplainable Data Analysis (XDA). For this reason, we present XInsight, a general framework for XDA. XInsight provides data analysis with qualitative and quantitative explanations of causal and non-causal semantics. This way, it will significantly improve human understanding and confidence in the outcomes of data analysis, facilitating accurate data interpretation and decision making in the real world. XInsight is a three-module, end-to-end pipeline designed to extract causal graphs, translate causal primitives into XDA semantics, and quantify the quantitative contribution of each explanation to a data fact. XInsight uses a set of design concepts and optimizations to address the inherent difficulties associated with integrating causality into XDA. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets as well as a user study demonstrate the highly promising capabilities of XInsight.
abstract_zh: 鉴于探索性数据分析 (EDA) 的日益普及，了解 EDA 获取知识的根本原因至关重要。然而，它的研究仍然不足。这项研究提倡一种透明且可解释的数据分析视角，称为可解释数据分析 (XDA)。为此，我们提出了 XInsight，一个 XDA 的通用框架。 XInsight 提供数据分析以及因果和非因果语义的定性和定量解释。这样，它将显着提高人们对数据分析结果的理解和信心，促进现实世界中准确的数据解释和决策。 XInsight 是一个由三个模块组成的端到端管道，旨在提取因果图、将因果原语转换为 XDA 语义，并量化每个解释对数据事实的定量贡献。 XInsight 使用一组设计概念和优化来解决与将因果关系集成到 XDA 相关的固有困难。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验以及用户研究证明了 XInsight 极具前景的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XInsight框架，通过因果性视角实现可解释的数据分析（XDA），提供因果与非因果语义的定性与定量解释。
AI.motivation: 探索性数据分析（EDA）的普及使得理解其知识背后的因果机制变得至关重要，但现有研究对此关注不足，需提升数据分析结果的透明度与可信度。
AI.method: 设计包含三个模块的端到端流水线：提取因果图、将因果原语转化为XDA语义、量化解释对数据事实的贡献，并通过优化解决因果性集成难题。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实数据集上的实验及用户研究验证了XInsight在提升数据分析可解释性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: XInsight通过整合因果性显著增强了数据分析的可解释性，有助于更准确的数据解读与现实决策。

authors_text: Tai Wang,Qing Lian,Chenming Zhu,Xinge Zhu,Wenwei Zhang
title: MV-FCOS3D++: Multi-View Camera-Only 4D Object Detection with Pretrained Monocular Backbones
title_zh: MV-FCOS3D++：使用预训练的单目骨干进行仅多视图相机的 4D 物体检测
abstract: In this technical report, we present our solution, dubbed MV-FCOS3D++, for the Camera-Only 3D Detection track in Waymo Open Dataset Challenge 2022. For multi-view camera-only 3D detection, methods based on bird-eye-view or 3D geometric representations can leverage the stereo cues from overlapped regions between adjacent views and directly perform 3D detection without hand-crafted post-processing. However, it lacks direct semantic supervision for 2D backbones, which can be complemented by pretraining simple monocular-based detectors. Our solution is a multi-view framework for 4D detection following this paradigm. It is built upon a simple monocular detector FCOS3D++, pretrained only with object annotations of Waymo, and converts multi-view features to a 3D grid space to detect 3D objects thereon. A dual-path neck for single-frame understanding and temporal stereo matching is devised to incorporate multi-frame information. Our method finally achieves 49.75% mAPL with a single model and wins 2nd place in the WOD challenge, without any LiDAR-based depth supervision during training. The code will be released at https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion.
summary: In this technical report, we present our solution, dubbed MV-FCOS3D++, for the Camera-Only 3D Detection track in Waymo Open Dataset Challenge 2022. For multi-view camera-only 3D detection, methods based on bird-eye-view or 3D geometric representations can leverage the stereo cues from overlapped regions between adjacent views and directly perform 3D detection without hand-crafted post-processing. However, it lacks direct semantic supervision for 2D backbones, which can be complemented by pretraining simple monocular-based detectors. Our solution is a multi-view framework for 4D detection following this paradigm. It is built upon a simple monocular detector FCOS3D++, pretrained only with object annotations of Waymo, and converts multi-view features to a 3D grid space to detect 3D objects thereon. A dual-path neck for single-frame understanding and temporal stereo matching is devised to incorporate multi-frame information. Our method finally achieves 49.75% mAPL with a single model and wins 2nd place in the WOD challenge, without any LiDAR-based depth supervision during training. The code will be released at https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion.
abstract_zh: 在本技术报告中，我们介绍了我们的解决方案，称为 MV-FCOS3D++，用于 Waymo 开放数据集挑战赛 2022 中的仅摄像头 3D 检测赛道。对于多视图仅摄像头 3D 检测，基于鸟瞰图或 3D 几何表示的方法可以利用相邻视图之间重叠区域的立体线索，直接执行 3D 检测，无需手工制作后处理。然而，它缺乏对 2D 主干的直接语义监督，这可以通过预训练简单的基于单目的检测器来补充。我们的解决方案是遵循此范例的 4D 检测多视图框架。它基于简单的单目检测器 FCOS3D++ 构建，仅使用 Waymo 的对象注释进行预训练，并将多视图特征转换为 3D 网格空间以检测其上的 3D 对象。设计了用于单帧理解和时间立体匹配的双路径颈部来合并多帧信息。我们的方法最终使用单一模型实现了 49.75% mAPL，并在 WOD 挑战中获得第二名，并且在训练期间没有任何基于 LiDAR 的深度监督。代码将在 https://github.com/Tai-Wang/Depth-from-Motion 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MV-FCOS3D++的多视角相机仅4D目标检测方法，用于Waymo Open Dataset Challenge 2022的Camera-Only 3D Detection任务。
AI.motivation: 现有的多视角相机仅3D检测方法缺乏对2D主干网络的直接语义监督，而预训练的单目检测器可以弥补这一不足。
AI.method: 该方法基于预训练的单目检测器FCOS3D++，将多视角特征转换为3D网格空间进行检测，并设计了双路径结构用于单帧理解和时序立体匹配。
AI.result: 该方法在Waymo Open Dataset挑战赛中以单模型取得了49.75%的mAPL成绩，并获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需LiDAR深度监督即可实现高精度的4D目标检测，证明了预训练单目检测器在多视角相机仅3D检测任务中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MV-FCOS3D++的多视角相机仅4D目标检测方法，用于Waymo Open Dataset Challenge 2022的Camera-Only 3D Detection任务。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的多视角相机仅3D检测方法缺乏对2D主干网络的直接语义监督，而预训练的单目检测器可以弥补这一不足。
ai_content.method: 该方法基于预训练的单目检测器FCOS3D++，将多视角特征转换为3D网格空间进行检测，并设计了双路径结构用于单帧理解和时序立体匹配。
ai_content.result: 该方法在Waymo Open Dataset挑战赛中以单模型取得了49.75%的mAPL成绩，并获得第二名。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法无需LiDAR深度监督即可实现高精度的4D目标检测，证明了预训练单目检测器在多视角相机仅3D检测任务中的有效性。
